searchable.name: M&B Ibuprofen Suspension
searchable.brief_info: M&B Ibuprofen Suspension is a widely trusted liquid medication containing Ibuprofen, a non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drug (NSAID), used for the symptomatic relief of mild to moderate pain and to effectively lower high temperatures (fever).
searchable.description: M&B Ibuprofen Suspension is a formulated as an oral suspension with a pleasant taste, it is especially suitable for babies (aged 3 months and above), children, and those who have difficulty swallowing tablets. M&B Ibuprofen Suspension works quickly to reduce inflammation, swelling, and pain, offering necessary comfort during illnesses, teething, or minor injuries.
searchable.how_to_use:
How to Use: Accurate and Safe Dosing

Dosage of M&B Ibuprofen Suspension

The dosage is strictly based on the patient's weight/age and must be accurately measured. Take as directed by the pharmacist or physician.

Dosing Schedule (General Guidance for 100 mg/5 mL strength):

  • Infants 3-6 months (weighing over 5 kg): 2.5 mL up to 3 times in 24 hours. Do not give for more than 24 hours without medical advice.
  • Children 6 months - 1 year: 2.5 mL 3 to 4 times a day.
  • Children 1 year - 4 years: 5  mL 3 to 4 times a day.
  • Children 4  years - 7 years: 7.5 mL 3 times a day.

*Note: Doses should be given every 6 to 8 hours. Leave at least 4  between doses. DO NOT exceed the stated dose.

Administration

  • Proper Administration: Shake the bottle well before use. Always use the measuring device (spoon or syringe) provided in the pack to ensure accuracy. Do not use household teaspoons.
  • Best Time to Take It: It is best to take M&B Ibuprofen Suspension with food or milk to reduce the risk of stomach upset and irritation.
searchable.specification: Pack Size: M&B Ibuprofen Suspension (100 mg/5 mL) is typically supplied in a mL with a measuring spoon or oral syringe.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of M&B Ibuprofen Suspension

Do NOT give M&B Ibuprofen Suspension if the patient:

  • Has or has ever had a stomach ulcer, perforation, or bleeding (including bloody, black, or tarry stools).
  • Is allergic to ibuprofen, aspirin, or any other Non-Steroidal Anti-Inflammatory Drug (NSAID) (symptoms include asthma, runny nose, or facial swelling).
  • Has severe heart, kidney, or liver failure.
  • Is an adult who is in the last trimester of pregnancy.
  • Is an infant under 3 months of age or weighs less than 5 kg.
  • Is taking another NSAID or aspirin dose above 75 text mg daily.

Side Effects of M&B Ibuprofen Suspension
Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Stomach upset, nausea, vomiting, dizziness, or headache.

  • Serious but Rare Side Effects:
  • Signs of stomach bleeding: Vomiting blood or dark particles that look like coffee grounds, passing blood in stools, or black tarry stools.
  • Signs of allergic reaction: Unexplained wheezing, asthma, severe rash/blistering (SJS/TEN), swelling of the face, tongue, or throat.
  • Signs of kidney problems: Decreased urination or swelling of ankles/feet.
  • What to do if side effects occur: Stop the medication immediately and seek medical attention if any serious symptoms (especially stomach bleeding or allergic reactions) occur.

Precautions and Warnings of M&B Ibuprofen Suspension

  • Before Starting: Consult your doctor or pharmacist if the patient has asthma, diabetes, high blood pressure, heart problems, kidney or liver problems, or uncontrolled dehydration.
  • Drug Interactions: Consult a doctor if the patient is taking anticoagulants (blood thinners like Warfarin), diuretics, Methotrexate, or any other medicine for pain/fever.
  • Infections: Ibuprofen can hide the signs of infection (like fever and pain). If new symptoms occur or if the patient is taking it for chickenpox, consult a doctor immediately.

searchable.name: Reprofen Suspension
searchable.brief_info: It is used for reduction of fever and relief of minor aches and pains due to common cold, sore throat, headache and toothaches.
searchable.description: Reprofen Suspension is a trusted, fast-acting pediatric formulation designed to relieve pain and reduce fever in children. Containing Ibuprofen, a potent non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drug (NSAID), Reprofen is specifically engineered for easy administration with a pleasant taste that children accept. It is a reliable choice for parents managing common childhood ailments, providing long-lasting relief that helps children return to their playful, comfortable selves.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Reprofen Suspension This is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) medication. Take as directed by the pharmacist or physician.

  • Dosage by Weight: For children, dosage is most accurately calculated based on body weight (usually 5mg–10mg per kg).
  • Frequency: Do not exceed 3 to 4 doses in a 24-hour period. Space doses at least 6 hours apart.
  • Administration: Shake the bottle vigorously before each use to ensure the active ingredient is evenly distributed.
  • Food: It is best given with or after a meal to protect the child's stomach.

How to Store and Dispose

  • Storage: Store in a cool, dry place below 30°C. Keep the bottle tightly closed and out of direct sunlight.
  • Disposal: Keep out of reach of children. Return expired suspension to a pharmacy for safe disposal to prevent environmental contamination.

Quick Tips for Reprofen Suspension

  • Use the Spoon: Always use the measuring spoon or oral syringe provided with the product; household spoons are inaccurate and can lead to over-dosing.
  • Wait for Results: It typically takes 20 to 30 minutes to start working. Don't give a second dose if the fever doesn't drop immediately.
  • Hydration is Key: Ensure your child drinks plenty of water while taking this medication.
  • Stay Consistent: Keep a written log of the time and amount of each dose to avoid accidental double-dosing between caregivers.
searchable.specification:
• Volume: 100ml bottle.
  • Strength: 100mg of Ibuprofen per 5ml.
  • Form: Oral Liquid Suspension (Fruit-Flavored).
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Reprofen Suspension

  • Asthma: Use with caution if your child has a history of asthma, as NSAIDs can sometimes trigger bronchospasms.
  • Stomach Issues: Do NOT use if the child has a history of stomach ulcers or gastrointestinal bleeding.
  • Allergies: Avoid if the child is allergic to Ibuprofen, Aspirin, or other NSAIDs.
  • Dehydration: Do not administer to children suffering from severe dehydration due to vomiting or diarrhea.

Side Effects of Reprofen Suspension

  • Common: Mild stomach upset, nausea, or diarrhea.
  • Rare but Serious: Allergic reactions (hives, swelling), breathing difficulties, or stomach pain.
  • Action: If you notice any signs of a skin rash, wheezing, or black/tarry stools, stop use immediately and consult a healthcare professional.

Precautions and Warnings

  • Duration: Do not use for more than 3 consecutive days for fever or pain without consulting a doctor.
  • Chickenpox: Consult a doctor before using Ibuprofen if your child has chickenpox, as some studies suggest a risk of skin complications.
  • Kidney/Liver: Use with caution in children with pre-existing renal or hepatic conditions.

searchable.name: Durex Play Tingling Lube 50mL
searchable.brief_info: Durex Play Tingling Lube is a silky, water-based lubricant specially formulated to enhance pleasure by providing unique cooling, warming, and tingling sensations, adding an extra layer of excitement and adventure to your intimate moments.
searchable.description: Durex Play Tingling Lube is a high-quality, water-based intimate lubricant designed to elevate shared or solo sexual experiences. It features a unique, gentle blend of ingredients engineered to create a subtle yet powerful tingling sensation that feels stimulating on the skin. The formula is light, smooth, and silky, helping to ease vaginal dryness and intimate discomfort while reducing friction. As a water-based lubricant, Durex Play Tingling Lube is non-sticky, non-greasy, and will not stain sheets, making cleanup quick and easy. It is fully compatible with all Durex condoms and is safe for use during vaginal, anal, and oral sex.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Durex Play Tingling Lube

Durex Play Tingling Lube is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) cosmetic product.

Use a small amount as required for desired lubrication and sensation.

Proper Administration

  • Route: Topical application to intimate areas (vaginal, anal, or oral).
  • How to Use:
    1. Open the cap and gently squeeze a small amount of gel onto your fingertips.
    2. Smooth the lubricant directly onto the intimate areas as desired.
    3. Reapply as often as needed throughout the intimate encounter.
  • Start Small: Start with a small, pea-sized amount and apply more gradually until you achieve the desired level of sensation and lubrication.
searchable.specification: The product is a water-based intimate lubricant containing Propylene Glycol, Glycerin, and a unique sensory blend. It is supplied in a bottle (common sizes are 50mL and 100mL). It is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) Cosmetic/Intimate Health Product.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Durex Play Tingling Lube

Do NOT use Durex Play Tingling Lube if you:

  • Have a known allergy or hypersensitivity to any of the ingredients, particularly Propylene Glycol or any components of the sensory blend.
  • Have broken or already irritated skin, wounds, or open sores in the intimate area, as the tingling sensation may become an intense burning sensation.

Pregnancy & Breastfeeding Warnings

  • Pregnancy and Breastfeeding: Consult your doctor. While generally safe for external use, if you are pregnant or breastfeeding, discontinue use and seek professional advice if irritation occurs.
  • Fertility Note: This lubricant is NOT a contraceptive and does NOT contain spermicide. It may slightly slow down sperm motility, so if you are trying to conceive, consult a healthcare provider for fertility-friendly lubricant options.

Side Effects of Durex Play Tingling Lube

Side effects are rare, but may occur due to individual sensitivity.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): A temporary, slight burning sensation, especially if too much product is applied initially or if applied to very dry skin.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (that may require medical attention):
    • Severe Irritation: Persistent burning, redness, or itching that does not resolve after rinsing.
    • Allergic Reactions: Local swelling or rash.
    • Yeast Infection: Rarely, the glycerin content might, in sensitive individuals, contribute to a yeast infection if excessive residue remains.

What to do if side effects occur:

  • If you experience discomfort or a burning sensation that is intense or persistent, stop use immediately and rinse the area thoroughly with clean water.
  • If irritation continues, consult a physician.

Precautions and Warnings of Durex Play Tingling Lube

  • External Use Only: This product is for external intimate use only.
  • Not a Contraceptive: This lubricant does not offer protection against pregnancy or sexually transmitted infections (STIs).
  • Patch Test: If you have sensitive skin, perform a patch test on a small area (e.g., inner wrist) before using the product on intimate areas.
  • Avoid Broken Skin: Avoid contact with eyes, broken skin, or wounds.
  • Use Within Timeframe: Use the product within three months of opening the bottle to ensure hygiene and efficacy.

searchable.name: Augmentin Syrup 228.5
searchable.brief_info: Augmentin Syrup 228.5mg is a powerful, broad-spectrum antibiotic suspension containing a combination of Amoxicillin and Clavulanate Potassium. Manufactured by GSK, this specific strength is formulated for pediatric use to treat various bacterial infections. By combining a penicillin-type antibiotic with a "beta-lactamase inhibitor," Augmentin overcomes bacterial resistance, making it effective against a wider range of germs than amoxicillin alone.
searchable.description: Augmentin 228.5mg/5ml is an oral suspension usually provided as a dry powder that must be reconstituted (mixed with water) by a pharmacist. It is designed to be palatable for children and provides dual-action support: while the amoxicillin kills the bacteria, the clavulanic acid protects the amoxicillin from being destroyed by the bacteria's defense enzymes.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Augmentin Syrup This is a Prescription-Only Medicine (POM). The dose is strictly calculated by a doctor based on the child's weight, age, and the severity of the infection.

  • Typical Dose: Usually administered twice daily (every 12 hours).
  • Measurement: Always use the oral dosing syringe or measuring spoon provided to ensure the exact dose is given.

Proper Administration

  • With Food: To minimize potential stomach upset and improve absorption, give Augmentin at the start of a meal or with a light snack.
  • Shake Well: Always shake the bottle vigorously before each dose to ensure the medicine is evenly distributed.
  • Complete the Course: Crucial: Even if the child feels better after a few days, you MUST finish the entire course prescribed by the doctor. Stopping early allows the strongest bacteria to survive and develop resistance.
  • Consistency: Try to give the doses at the same time every day to keep a steady level of antibiotic in the child's system.

How to Store and Dispose of Augmentin Syrup

  • Before Mixing: Store the dry powder at room temperature.
  • After Mixing (Reconstituted): Store in a refrigerator (2°C – 8°C). Do not freeze.
  • The 7–10 Day Rule: Discard any remaining liquid after the duration specified by your pharmacist (usually 7 or 10 days).
  • Disposal: Keep out of reach of children. Return unused portions to the pharmacy.

Quick Tips for Augmentin Syrup

  • Probiotics: Antibiotics can kill "good" gut bacteria, sometimes leading to diarrhea. Giving your child a pediatric probiotic or yogurt can help maintain gut balance.
  • Hydration: Encourage the child to drink plenty of fluids during the course of treatment.
  • Diaper Rash: In infants, antibiotics can sometimes cause yeast-based diaper rash. Keep the area dry and use a barrier cream if needed.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: Usually 35ml or 70ml bottle (dry powder for reconstitution).
  • Manufacturer: GSK (GlaxoSmithKline).
  • Form: Oral Suspension.
  • Active Ingredients: Amoxicillin 200mg + Clavulanic Acid 28.5mg per 5ml.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Safety and Precautions

Contraindications of Augmentin Syrup

  • Penicillin Allergy: Do NOT use if the child has a known allergy to Penicillins, Cephalosporins, or Amoxicillin.
  • History of Jaundice: Do NOT use if the child has previously experienced liver problems or jaundice while taking Augmentin.
  • Glandular Fever: Avoid use if infectious mononucleosis is suspected, as it may cause a widespread skin rash.

Side Effects of Augmentin Syrup

  • Common: Diarrhea, nausea, or oral thrush (white patches in the mouth).
  • Less Common: Mild skin rash or vomiting.
  • Serious: Severe allergic reactions (swelling of face/lips, difficulty breathing), or severe watery diarrhea with stomach cramps.
  • Action: If the child develops a hives-like rash or has difficulty breathing, seek emergency medical attention immediately.

Precautions and Warnings

  • Allergy Check: Inform your doctor if the child has asthma or hay fever, as they may be more prone to allergic reactions.
  • Liver & Kidney: Inform the doctor if the child has any known kidney or liver impairment.

searchable.name: Silver Bird Eucalyptus Oil
searchable.brief_info: Silver Bird Eucalyptus Oil is a pure, pharmaceutical-grade essential oil, renowned for its potent antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and decongestant properties, making it an indispensable natural remedy for respiratory support, muscle aches, and aromatherapy.
searchable.description: Silver Bird Eucalyptus Oil is a 100% pure, pharmaceutical-grade (BP) essential oil extracted from the leaves of the Eucalyptus tree (often Eucalyptus globulus). The oil is meticulously distilled to ensure high purity and potency, containing a high concentration (typically over 70%) of Eucalyptol (1,8-Cineole), the primary active compound responsible for its therapeutic effects. This oil is a natural, cooling, and invigorating product used for a wide range of ailments. The pure nature of Silver Bird Eucalyptus Oil means it must be used with caution and always diluted before topical application.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Silver Bird Eucalyptus Oil

Silver Bird Eucalyptus Oil is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) medicine.

For external use only. Use as directed, ensuring proper dilution.

Proper Administration

  • Route: Inhalation or Topical Application (Diluted).
  • How to Use (Steam Inhalation): Add a few drops (e.g., 5-10 drops) to a bowl of hot water. Lean over the bowl with a towel draped over your head and inhale the steam deeply to clear congestion (adults only).
  • How to Use (Direct Inhalation): Add a few drops to a tissue or handkerchief and inhale the vapour for quick nasal relief.
  • How to Use (Topical/Massage): Dilute 3-5 drops of the oil in one tablespoon of a carrier oil and massage gently onto the chest, back, or sore muscles.
  • Timing: Use as needed for respiratory or muscle discomfort.
searchable.specification: The active ingredient is 100% Eucalyptus Oil (BP Grade), primarily containing Eucalyptol (1,8-Cineole). It is supplied as a clear essential oil liquid in a small bottle (common sizes are 28mL or 50mL). It is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) Topical Antiseptic and Inhalant Decongestant.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Silver Bird Eucalyptus Oil

Do NOT use Silver Bird Eucalyptus Oil if you:

  • Have a known allergy or hypersensitivity to Eucalyptus Oil or any of its components.
  • Are applying it directly to the skin or ingesting it undiluted.
  • Are treating children under 2 years of age (due to the risk of respiratory distress and nervous system side effects).
  • Are applying it near the eyes or inside the nose or mouth.

Pregnancy & Breastfeeding Warnings

  • Pregnancy and Breastfeeding: Consult your doctor. There is insufficient reliable information on safety during pregnancy or breastfeeding. It is advised to avoid use unless strictly directed by a healthcare professional.

Side Effects of Silver Bird Eucalyptus Oil

Side effects are generally related to ingestion or improper application of the undiluted oil.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Localized skin irritation, redness, or burning if applied undiluted.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (that may require medical attention):
    • Toxicity/Poisoning (if swallowed): Taking even a small amount (e.g., less than one teaspoon) of the pure oil by mouth can be fatal, causing seizures, difficulty breathing, vomiting, and coma.
    • Worsening Respiratory Symptoms: In some susceptible individuals (especially those with asthma or wheezing), inhaling the strong vapours may trigger or worsen an asthma episode.
    • Severe Allergic Reactions: Rash, hives, or swelling.

What to do if side effects occur:

  • For skin irritation, wash the area immediately and ensure proper dilution for future use.
  • If accidentally swallowed (even a small amount): Seek emergency medical attention immediately. Do not induce vomiting.
  • If respiratory symptoms worsen, or if you suspect an allergic reaction, discontinue use and consult a physician.

Precautions and Warnings of Silver Bird Eucalyptus Oil

  • POISONOUS/EXTERNAL USE ONLY: CRUCIAL WARNING: This oil is poisonous if ingested. It is strictly for external use (inhalation, topical application after dilution).
  • Dilution is Mandatory: Always dilute eucalyptus oil with a carrier oil (e.g., coconut, olive, or almond oil) before applying it to the skin to prevent irritation and toxicity.
  • Children: Not recommended for use in children under 2 years of age. Use with caution on all children.
  • Drug Interactions: Consult your doctor or pharmacist if taking prescription medications, especially those metabolized by the liver, as eucalyptus oil may slow down this process, altering drug effects.
  • Pre-Surgery: Stop using eucalyptus oil at least 2 weeks before scheduled surgery, as it may affect blood sugar control.

searchable.name: P-Alaxin suspension
searchable.brief_info: P-Alaxin Suspension is a highly effective, fast-acting Antimalarial Combination Therapy (ACT). It combines Dihydroartemisinin and Piperaquine Phosphate, formulated specifically as a dry powder for reconstitution into a palatable liquid for infants and children. P-Alaxin is designed to rapidly clear malaria parasites from the blood while providing a long-lasting protective effect to prevent the immediate return of the infection.
searchable.description: P-Alaxin belongs to the class of Artemisinin-based Combination Therapies (ACTs), which are the gold standard for treating uncomplicated malaria. It works by combining a fast-acting component that kills parasites quickly with a long-acting component that stays in the blood to mop up any remaining parasites.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of P-AlaxinThis is a Prescription-Only Medicine (POM). Dosage is strictly based on the child's body weight.

  • The 3-Day Course: P-Alaxin is usually taken once daily for exactly 3 days.
  • Timing: It should be taken at the same time each day (e.g., 24 hours apart).

Proper Administration

  • Reconstitution: If the bottle contains dry powder, add boiled and cooled water up to the mark indicated on the bottle. Shake vigorously until the suspension is smooth.
  • Shake Well Before Use: Always shake the bottle before measuring each dose.
  • The "Empty Stomach" Rule: For maximum absorption and safety, P-Alaxin is best taken at least 1 hour before or 3 hours after a meal.
  • Vomiting: If the child vomits within 30 minutes of taking the dose, the full dose should be repeated. If they vomit within 30–60 minutes, half a dose should be repeated.

How to Store and Dispose of P-Alaxin

  • Before Mixing: Store the dry powder at room temperature.
  • After Mixing: Store the liquid in a cool place (refrigeration is preferred but not always mandatory; check the specific label).
  • Shelf Life: Discard any remaining suspension 7 to 14 days after mixing.

Quick Tips for P-Alaxin

  • Finish the Course: Even if the child stops having a fever after the first day, you must finish all 3 days of treatment to prevent the malaria from coming back.
  • Fever Management: You can give Paracetamol alongside P-Alaxin to help lower the child's temperature while the antimalarial works.
  • Fatty Foods: Avoid giving high-fat meals (like fried foods or oily soups) immediately before or after the dose, as this can affect how the medicine is absorbed.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: 60ml or 80ml Bottle (after reconstitution).
  • Form: Powder for Oral Suspension.
  • Active Ingredients: Dihydroartemisinin & Piperaquine Phosphate.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Safety and Precautions

Contraindications of P-Alaxin

  • Severe Allergy: Do not use if the child is allergic to Artemisinin or Piperaquine.
  • Heart Conditions: Inform your doctor if the child has a known heart rhythm problem (QT prolongation).
  • Severe Malaria: This suspension is for uncomplicated malaria. If the child is unconscious, fitting, or unable to drink, they need urgent hospital treatment with injections.

Side Effects of P-Alaxin

  • Common: Temporary loss of appetite, nausea, or mild stomach pain.
  • Less Common: Dizziness, headache, or a mild itchy rash.
  • Serious: Irregular heartbeat or severe yellowing of the eyes (jaundice).
  • Action: If the child develops a widespread rash or seems unusually weak, contact your doctor immediately.

Precautions and Warnings

  • Repeat Infections: If the child gets malaria again very soon after finishing P-Alaxin, consult a doctor; do not start another course immediately without advice.
  • Drug Interactions: Tell your pharmacist if the child is taking other medicines, especially for the heart or other infections.

searchable.name: Felvin X10Capsule
searchable.brief_info: Felvin Tablet is used to relieve the signs and symptoms of swollen, stiffed, warm or painful joints. It is also used to relieve the pain and stiffness affecting the spine. It is a prescription medicine.
searchable.description: Felvin X10 Capsule is a high-potency non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drug (NSAID) designed to provide effective relief from acute and chronic pain. Formulated with Piroxicam, it is a trusted choice for individuals managing debilitating joint stiffness and inflammatory conditions. Felvin X10 works by targeting the biological triggers of pain, helping to restore mobility and improve the quality of life for those suffering from musculoskeletal disorders.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Felvin X10 Capsule This is a Prescription-Only Medicine (POM). Take as directed by the pharmacist or physician.

  • Standard Dose: Usually, one 20mg capsule is taken once daily.
  • Administration: Swallow the capsule whole with a full glass of water.
  • Timing: It is best taken with or immediately after food to minimize stomach irritation.
  • Missed Dose: Take it as soon as you remember. If it is nearly time for your next dose, skip the missed one. Do not double the dose.

How to Store and Dispose

  • Storage: Store in a cool, dry place below 30°C. Keep away from direct heat and moisture.
  • Disposal: Keep out of reach of children. Return unused capsules to a pharmacy for safe disposal.

Quick Tips for Felvin X10 Capsule

  • Same Time Daily: Take your dose at the same time each day to maintain consistent pain relief.
  • Limit Alcohol: Drinking alcohol while taking NSAIDs increases the risk of stomach bleeding.
  • Fastest Results: While pain relief begins shortly after the first dose, it may take 7–10 days of consistent use to feel the full anti-inflammatory benefits.
  • Stay Hydrated: Drink plenty of fluids to help your kidneys process the medication efficiently.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: 10 Capsules (1 blister).
  • Strength: 20mg per capsule.
  • Form: Hard Gelatin Capsule.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Felvin X10 Capsule

  • Peptic Ulcers: Do NOT use if you have an active stomach ulcer or a history of gastrointestinal bleeding.
  • Heart Health: Not suitable for those with severe heart failure or immediately before/after heart bypass surgery.
  • Drug Allergies: Avoid if you are allergic to Aspirin or other NSAIDs (e.g., Ibuprofen).
  • Pregnancy: Contraindicated during the third trimester of pregnancy as it may affect fetal circulation.

Side Effects of Felvin X10 Capsule

  • Common: Indigestion, stomach pain, dizziness, and headache.
  • Serious: Black or tarry stools (indicating internal bleeding), skin rashes, or swelling of the ankles.
  • Action: If you experience severe abdominal pain or difficulty breathing, stop use and consult a doctor immediately.

Precautions and Warnings

  • Stomach Protection: Long-term use can irritate the stomach lining. Your doctor may prescribe a "stomach-protecting" medicine alongside Felvin.
  • Skin Sensitivity: This medication can make your skin more sensitive to sunlight (photosensitivity).
  • Kidney/Liver Health: Regular monitoring is required for patients with pre-existing renal or hepatic impairment.

searchable.name: Wellkid Baby & Infant Syrup
searchable.brief_info: Wellkid Baby & Infant Syrup is a comprehensive multivitamin liquid specifically formulated by experts to safeguard the nutritional intake of infants and young children. Designed for ages 3 months to 4 years, it provides a balanced range of 14 essential vitamins and minerals to support rapid physical growth and cognitive development during these critical early years.
searchable.description: Wellkid Baby & Infant Syrup is a great-tasting, Swiss Alpine malt-based liquid supplement. It serves as an ideal nutritional safeguard, ensuring that your little one receives essential nutrients that might be missing from their diet, especially during periods of fussy eating. Trusted by parents worldwide, this formula is free from artificial sweeteners, colours, or flavours, making it a gentle and natural choice for your baby’s daily routine.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Wellkid Baby & Infant Syrup Take as directed by the pharmacist or physician. According to the standard manufacturer guidelines:

  • Infants (3 to 6 months): 2.5ml (half teaspoon) daily.
  • Infants (7 months to 4 years): 5ml (one teaspoon) daily.

Proper Administration

  • Administration: Use the provided spoon or a calibrated oral syringe to measure the exact dose.
  • Mixing: The syrup can be given directly from the spoon or mixed into your baby’s usual milk or water (ensure the child consumes the entire amount).
  • Food Interaction: Best taken just before or with a meal to maximize absorption and reduce the risk of stomach upset.
  • Missed Dose: If a dose is missed, give it as soon as you remember. If it is nearly time for the next dose, skip the missed one. Do not double the dose.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: 150ml Bottle
  • Form: Liquid Syrup
  • Key Ingredients: Vitamin D3, Iron, Zinc, Vitamin C, B-Complex
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Wellkid Baby & Infant Syrup

  • Known Allergies: Do NOT use if your child is allergic to any of the ingredients, including malt or yeast.
  • Medical Conditions: Not suitable for children with hemochromatosis (iron overload) or Wilson's disease.
  • Age Restrictions: Not recommended for infants under 3 months of age.

Side Effects of Wellkid Baby & Infant Syrup

  • Common Side Effects: Darkening of stools (normal due to iron), mild constipation, or temporary stomach upset.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects: Allergic reactions such as swelling or rash.
  • Action: If your child experiences an unusual reaction, stop use and consult a pediatrician immediately.

Precautions and Warnings

  • Iron Safety: This product contains iron, which if taken in excess, can be very harmful to very young children. Always keep the bottle securely stored away.
  • Health Checks: If your child is under medical supervision or has epilepsy, consult a doctor before use.
  • Not a Replacement: Supplements are not a substitute for a varied, balanced diet and a healthy lifestyle.

searchable.name: Strepsils Lozenges Orange Flavour with Vitamin C
searchable.brief_info: Strepsils Lozenges Orange Flavour with Vitamin C offer rapid, dual-action relief from the discomfort and pain of a sore throat
searchable.description:
Product Description

Strepsils Lozenges Orange Flavour with Vitamin C is a popular Over-The-Counter (OTC) medicine containing two powerful, mild antiseptic ingredients that work locally to target and fight bacteria associated with mouth and throat infections. The unique formulation includes a soothing dose of Vitamin C (100 mg) to help support immune function during a cold or flu. By dissolving slowly in the mouth, Strepsils Lozenges deliver the active ingredients directly to the infected area, providing effective pain relief, lubrication, and a boost of immune support in a refreshing orange flavour.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Strepsils Lozenges Orange Flavour with Vitamin C

This is an Over-The-Counter (OTC) medicine.

  • Adults and Children over 6 years old: Dissolve one lozenge slowly in the mouth every 2 to 3 hours.
  • Maximum Dosage: Do not exceed a maximum of 12 lozenges in 24 hours.

Proper Administration

  • Administration: Allow the lozenge to dissolve completely in the mouth. This maximizes contact time with the throat and mouth tissue.
  • Best Time to Take: Use when the throat is most painful. Ensure consistent use throughout the day during waking hours.
  • Missed Dose Guidance: Do not take a double dose. Continue to use the medicine according to the recommended schedule.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Strepsils Lozenges Orange Flavour with Vitamin C

  • Known Allergies: Do NOT take if you are allergic (hypersensitive) to 2,4-dichlorobenzyl alcohol, amylmetacresol, Vitamin C, or any of the inactive ingredients, flavorings, or colorings.
  • Age Restriction: Not suitable for children under 6 years old due to the risk of choking on the lozenge.
  • Sugar Intolerance: Patients with rare hereditary problems of fructose intolerance or malabsorption should consult a doctor, as these lozenges often contain glucose and sucrose.

Side Effects of Strepsils Lozenges Orange Flavour with Vitamin C

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): None are typically common. Mild local irritation or temporary alteration of taste perception may occur.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (That May Require Medical Attention): Signs of severe allergic reaction (rash, swelling of the mouth/face, difficulty breathing). Report persistent, severe soreness or oral pain. If any severe symptoms occur, stop use immediately and consult a doctor.

Precautions and Warnings of Strepsils Lozenges Orange Flavour with Vitamin C

  • Duration of Use: Consult a doctor or pharmacist if your symptoms persist, do not improve, or worsen after 3 days of using the lozenges. This is crucial to ensure the infection is not serious.
  • Diabetes: This medicine contains sucrose and glucose. Patients with diabetes mellitus must consider this carbohydrate content in their daily intake.
  • Pregnancy and Breastfeeding: Consult a doctor or pharmacist before using this product if you are pregnant, planning to become pregnant, or breastfeeding.
  • Administration: Dissolve the lozenge slowly and fully in the mouth; do not chew or swallow it whole, as this reduces the effectiveness in the throat.

Dosage of Immun-Activ VIT C+ZINC 1000mg x100

This is an Over-The-Counter (OTC) nutritional supplement.

  • Adults: Take 1 tablet per day, or as directed by a doctor.

Proper Administration

  • Administration: Swallow the tablet whole with a glass of water.
  • Best Time to Take: Take the tablet with food or water to ensure better absorption of the minerals (Zinc and Selenium) and to minimize the potential for stomach upset from the high dose of Vitamin C.
  • Missed Dose Guidance: If you miss a dose, take the next scheduled dose as usual. Do not take a double dose.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Immun-Activ VIT C+ZINC 1000mg x100

  • Known Allergies: Do NOT take if you have a known allergy or hypersensitivity to Vitamin C, Zinc, Selenium, or any other component of the tablet.
  • Kidney Stones: Individuals with a history of kidney stones should consult a doctor before use, as high doses of Vitamin C (above 1000 mg daily) may increase the risk of recurrence.
  • Hemochromatosis: Individuals with hemochromatosis (a condition causing iron accumulation) should consult a doctor, as Vitamin C enhances iron absorption, which could be harmful.
  • G6PDH Deficiency: Individuals with Glucose-6-phosphate dehydrogenase (G6PDH) deficiency should exercise extreme caution, as high-dose Vitamin C may cause hemolytic anemia.

Side Effects of Immun-Activ VIT C+ZINC 1000mg x100

While generally safe, high dosages of water-soluble vitamins can cause digestive upset.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Digestive disturbances such as diarrhea, stomach cramping, flatulence, nausea, or upset stomach. These effects often occur because the body excretes unabsorbed Vitamin C when intake exceeds $1000\text{ mg}$.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (That May Require Medical Attention): Severe, persistent diarrhea or vomiting, or signs of a severe allergic reaction (rash, hives, swelling of the face, throat, or tongue). If severe symptoms occur, discontinue use immediately and seek medical advice.
  • Note: Long-term excessive intake of Zinc (over $40\text{ mg}$ daily) can lead to copper deficiency and reduced immune function.

Precautions and Warnings of Immun-Activ VIT C+ZINC 1000mg x100

  • Upper Limits: The Tolerable Upper Intake Level (UL) for Vitamin C in adults is 2000 mg per day. This product contains 1000 mg per tablet. Do not take more than directed.
  • Drug Interactions: Consult your doctor or pharmacist if you are taking blood thinners (Warfarin), Estrogen (in birth control or HRT), Chemotherapy, or Aluminum-containing medicines (like antacids), as Vitamin C may interact with them.
  • Diabetes Testing: High doses of Vitamin C may interfere with the results of certain medical tests, such as blood sugar screening or stool tests. Inform your healthcare provider that you are taking this supplement before any lab work.
  • Long-Term Use: Consult a healthcare professional before taking high-dose supplements like this one over a prolonged period (many months).

searchable.name: Cetidyn susp
searchable.brief_info: CETIDYN is a third-generation orally active selective H1 - receptor antagonist. A non-sedative antihistamine, it reduces the effect of the natural chemical histamine in the body. In hay fever, histamine causes inflammation of the nose, eyes or airways and results in itchy watery eyes, runny nose, nasal congestion and sneezing.
searchable.description:
CETIDYN is a non-sedating antihistamine as it does not enter the brain in significant amounts, and is therefore unlikely to cause drowsiness. Its side effects are mild to moderate.

However, some people may experience some slight sleepiness, headache, mouth dryness, fatigue, abdominal pain, muscular pain, convulsion, bronchospasm, cough, diarrhea, itchiness, rash, urticaria, skin eruptions, shortness of breath, nausea and vomiting.

At the first sign of hypersensitivity, stop to administer CETIDYN and see the physician immediately. If any of the side-effects get serious or if you notice any side-effects not listed in this leaflet, please tell your doctor or pharmacist

searchable.name: Beehive Balsam Cough Syrup
searchable.brief_info: A soothing combination of glycerin, Honey and Lemon with Ipecacuanha. For soothing of stubborn coughs.
searchable.description: Beehive Balsam Cough Syrup is a time-tested, traditional remedy formulated to provide effective relief from coughs, sore throats, and chest congestion. Combining the natural healing properties of honey with aromatic oils and expectorants, this syrup works to soothe irritated throat tissues while loosening stubborn phlegm. It is a trusted choice for families seeking a comforting, warming treatment for winter ailments and seasonal respiratory discomfort.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Beehive Balsam Cough Syrup This is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) medicine. Take as directed by the pharmacist or physician.

  • Adults and Children over 12 years: Usually two 5ml spoonfuls (10ml) every 4 hours as required.
  • Children (under 12 years): Consult the product label for specific age-based dosing or ask your pharmacist.
  • Maximum Dose: Do not exceed 6 doses in any 24-hour period.

How to Store and Dispose

  • Storage: Store in a cool, dry place below 25°C. Keep the bottle tightly closed to maintain the integrity of the honey and oils.
  • Disposal: Keep out of reach of children. Dispose of empty glass bottles in accordance with local recycling regulations.

Quick Tips for Beehive Balsam Cough Syrup

  • Warm the Dose: Some users find that slightly warming the syrup (not boiling) enhances its comforting effect on the chest.
  • Bedtime Use: Take a dose right before bed to soothe a night-time cough and promote better sleep.
  • Hydration: Drink plenty of warm water or herbal tea to help the expectorant ingredients thin out mucus more effectively.
  • Shake Well: Always shake the bottle before use to ensure the aromatic oils are well-distributed.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: 150ml or 200ml bottles.
  • Form: Viscous Liquid Syrup.
  • Key Feature: Contains real honey and aromatic balsam.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Beehive Balsam Cough Syrup

  • Diabetes: Due to the high honey and sugar content, this syrup should be used with caution or avoided by diabetic patients.
  • Age Restrictions: Generally not recommended for children under 1 year of age due to the risk of infant botulism associated with honey.
  • Allergies: Do not use if you are allergic to honey, bee products, or any of the essential oils listed in the ingredients.

Side Effects of Beehive Balsam Cough Syrup

  • Common: Mild stomach upset or nausea if taken in large quantities.
  • Rare: Allergic reactions such as skin rashes or swelling.
  • Action: If you experience any difficulty breathing or a severe rash, stop use immediately and seek medical attention.

Precautions and Warnings

  • Persistent Cough: If a cough lasts more than 7 days, returns, or is accompanied by a fever or persistent headache, consult a doctor.
  • Pregnancy: Consult your healthcare provider before use, although the natural ingredients are generally considered safe in moderation.

searchable.name: Reload 4 Kidz Multivitamin Syrup
searchable.brief_info: Reload 4 Kidz Multivitamin Syrup is a great-tasting, liquid, once-daily formula trusted for supporting the optimal growth, healthy development, and strong immune system of children aged 4 to 12 years.
searchable.description: Reload 4 Kidz Multivitamin Syrup 237mL is a premium, once-daily liquid supplement designed to ensure children receive the full spectrum of essential vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants often difficult to obtain through diet alone. Recognizing that children may be picky eaters, this syrup is scientifically formulated to be great-tasting and easily absorbed, greatly reducing the likelihood of nutritional deficiency. Beyond general wellness, the formula is fortified with specialized ingredients like DHA, Choline, and Inositol that support crucial cognitive functions. This liquid format ensures quick and easy absorption by the body, supporting everything from strong bones to a robust immune response.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Reload 4 Kidz Multivitamin Syrup 237mL

Reload 4 Kidz Multivitamin Syrup 237mL is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) supplement.

Children 4-12 years: Take 10 mL to 15 mL once daily, or as directed by a physician. (Check packaging for exact age breakdown and corresponding dose).

Proper Administration

  • Route: Oral liquid.
  • How to Take: Shake the bottle vigorously before measuring. Measure the exact prescribed dose using a proper measuring spoon or cup. The syrup can be taken directly or mixed with juice or water.
  • Timing: Take once daily, preferably with a meal (e.g., breakfast or lunch) to aid absorption of fat-soluble vitamins and minimize stomach upset.

Missed Dose Guidance

  • If you miss a dose, simply resume the regular dosage the following day with the morning meal. Do not take two doses on the same day.
searchable.specification: The active ingredients include a full spectrum of Vitamins (A, B, C, D, E), Minerals, Antioxidants, DHA, Choline, and Inositol. It is supplied as an oral liquid syrup in a 237mL bottle. It is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) Multivitamin Dietary Supplement for children.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Reload 4 Kidz Multivitamin Syrup

Do NOT give Reload 4 Kidz Multivitamin Syrup 237mL if the child:

  • Has a known allergy or hypersensitivity to any of the vitamins, minerals, DHA (fish oil), or other ingredients in the syrup (including flavourings or preservatives).
  • Has severe kidney impairment or severe hypercalcemia (excess Vitamin D or Calcium intake may be contraindicated).

Pregnancy & Breastfeeding Warnings

  • General: This product is not intended for use by pregnant or breastfeeding women (separate adult multivitamins should be used).

Side Effects of Reload 4 Kidz Multivitamin Syrup 

Side effects are rare when the product is used as directed.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Temporary mild digestive upset or nausea if taken on an empty stomach. High doses may cause loose stools.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (that may require medical attention):
    • Hypervitaminosis: Rare, but chronic consumption of significantly high doses (far exceeding the recommended dose) of fat-soluble vitamins (A, D, E) can lead to toxicity.
    • Allergic Reactions: Rash, swelling, or difficulty breathing.

What to do if side effects occur:

  • If the child experiences persistent digestive upset, try giving the syrup with a meal.
  • For any severe or persistent adverse effects, or signs of an allergic reaction, discontinue use immediately and consult a physician.

Precautions and Warnings of Reload 4 Kidz Multivitamin Syrup 

  • Dosage Limit: Do NOT exceed the recommended daily dosage (typically 10mL to 15mL daily for ages 4-12) to avoid potential overdose of fat-soluble vitamins.
  • Keep Out of Reach: The great taste can make children prone to accidental overdose. Store safely out of the sight and reach of children.
  • Shake Well: The liquid formulation requires vigorous shaking before each use to ensure the vitamins, minerals, and DHA are evenly suspended in the liquid.
  • Not a Meal Substitute: This is a supplement and does not replace the necessity of a varied, balanced diet.
  • Consult Paediatrician: Always consult a paediatrician before starting any multivitamin regimen, particularly for children with chronic health conditions.

searchable.name: Novalyn Cough Linctus
searchable.brief_info: Novalyn Cough Linctus is a specially formulated oral solution designed to provide fast and effective relief from "wet" or productive coughs associated with colds, flu, and bronchitis. By acting as an expectorant and decongestant, it helps to clear bronchial congestion, soothe the throat, and ease breathing during respiratory infections.
searchable.description: Novalyn Cough Linctus is a trusted multi-action syrup that targets the buildup of mucus in the respiratory tract. It is designed to loosen stubborn phlegm, making it easier to cough up and clear from the lungs. The linctus also provides a soothing coating for the throat to reduce the irritation caused by persistent coughing. Whether dealing with a heavy chest cold or the aftermath of a viral infection, Novalyn helps restore respiratory comfort.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Novalyn Cough Linctus Take as directed by the pharmacist or physician.

  • Adults: Typically 10ml to 15ml, three to four times daily.
  • Children (6–12 years): 5ml to 10ml, three times daily.
  • Children (2–5 years): 2.5ml to 5ml, as prescribed by a doctor.

Proper Administration

  • Administration: Use the provided measuring cup or a calibrated spoon to ensure the correct dose.
  • Food Interaction: Can be taken with or without food. Drinking a glass of water after the dose can help the expectorant work more effectively.
  • Consistency: Space the doses evenly throughout the waking hours.
  • Missed Dose: Take it as soon as you remember. If it is almost time for the next dose, skip the missed one. Do not double the dose.

How to Store and Dispose of Novalyn Cough Linctus

  • Storage: Store in a cool, dry place below 30°C. Protect from direct sunlight. Keep the bottle tightly closed.
  • Disposal: Keep out of reach of children. Dispose of any unused or expired syrup by returning it to your local pharmacy.

Quick Tips for Novalyn Cough Linctus

  • Hydration: Drink plenty of fluids (water, warm tea) to assist the medicine in thinning out the mucus in your lungs.
  • Steam Inhalation: Using a steamer alongside the linctus can help speed up the clearing of congestion.
  • Bedtime: If the cough is preventing sleep, the last dose should be taken shortly before bed.
  • Duration: If the cough persists for more than 7 days, or is accompanied by a high fever or rash, consult a doctor immediately.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: 100ml Bottle.
  • Form: Oral Linctus (Syrup).
  • Key Ingredients: Ammonium Chloride, Menthol.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Safety and Precautions

Contraindications of Novalyn Cough Linctus

  • Specific Coughs: Do NOT use for chronic or persistent coughs (such as those caused by smoking, asthma, or emphysema) unless directed by a doctor.
  • Known Allergies: Do NOT use if you are allergic to any of the active or inactive ingredients.
  • Age Restrictions: Generally not recommended for children under 2 years of age without a doctor's specific instruction.

Side Effects of Novalyn Cough Linctus

  • Common Side Effects: Mild gastrointestinal upset, nausea, or dizziness.
  • Serious but Rare: Allergic reactions (skin rash or swelling).
  • Action: If you experience vomiting or severe stomach pain, stop use and contact a healthcare professional.

Precautions and Warnings

  • Existing Conditions: Use with caution if you have liver or kidney impairment.
  • Sugar Content: Many linctus formulations contain sugar; diabetic patients should consult their pharmacist before use.
  • Pregnancy & Breastfeeding: Consult your doctor or pharmacist before use to ensure it is appropriate for your situation.

searchable.name: Neurovit Forte Tabs 10 x 10 Hovid
searchable.brief_info: Neurovit Forte is a high-potency therapeutic supplement containing a combination of three essential neurotropic B vitamins: B1 (Thiamine), B6 (Pyridoxine), and B12 (Cyanocobalamin). Manufactured by Hovid, this formulation is specifically designed to support nerve health, repair damaged nerve fibers, and manage various forms of neuralgia. By providing these vitamins in concentrated doses, Neurovit Forte helps restore the normal function of the nervous system and improves overall metabolic health.
searchable.description: The B vitamins in Neurovit Forte are known as "neurotropic" because they have a specific affinity for the nervous system. When nerves are damaged by physical injury, chronic illness, or nutritional deficiency, these vitamins work synergistically to facilitate the repair of the myelin sheath (the protective coating of nerves) and ensure the efficient transmission of nerve impulses.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage and Administration

  • Adults: Usually one (1) tablet, one to three times daily, depending on the severity of the condition.
  • Method: Swallow the tablet whole with water. Do not crush or chew.
  • Timing: For best results, take the tablets during or after a meal to enhance absorption and prevent any potential stomach discomfort.

Proper Usage Tips

  • Course Duration: For chronic nerve issues, Neurovit Forte is often taken for several weeks or months. Follow your doctor's specific timeline.
  • Avoid Overlap: Check other multivitamins you may be taking to ensure you are not exceeding the recommended daily intake of Vitamin B6.
  • Hydration: Drink plenty of water to help your kidneys efficiently process the water-soluble vitamins.

How to Store and Dispose of Neurovit Forte

  • Storage: Store in a cool, dry place below 30°C. Protect the tablets from light and moisture by keeping them in the original blister pack.
  • Disposal: Keep out of reach of children. Return unused or expired medication to a pharmacist for safe disposal.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: 100 Tablets (10 blisters of 10 tablets).
  • Manufacturer: Hovid Berhad.
  • Form: Sugar-coated Tablet.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Safety and Precautions

Contraindications and Restrictions
  • Sensitivity: Do not use if you are allergic to Vitamin B1, B6, or B12.
  • Levodopa Interaction: Patients taking Levodopa (for Parkinson’s disease) should consult their doctor, as Vitamin B6 can reduce its effectiveness.

Side Effects of Neurovit Forte
  • Common: Bright yellow urine (harmless, caused by the excretion of excess Vitamin B).
  • Less Common: Mild nausea, diarrhea, or stomach upset.
  • Serious (Rare): Long-term, excessive use of high-dose Vitamin B6 may lead to sensory neuropathy (numbness). Use only as directed.
  • Action: If you experience an itchy rash or difficulty breathing, stop use and seek medical attention immediately.

Precautions and Warnings
  • Pregnancy & Breastfeeding: Consult your doctor before use. While B vitamins are necessary, high doses should only be taken under medical supervision during pregnancy.
  • Existing Conditions: Inform your doctor if you have a history of peptic ulcers or severe kidney disease.

searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of De-deon's Syrup

Do NOT take De-deon's Syrup if you:

  • Drug Allergies: Are hypersensitive or allergic to any of the ingredients, including Vitamin B 12, Haemoglobin, or Liver Extract.
  • Iron Overload: Have a condition characterized by too much iron in the body, such as hemochromatosis or other iron metabolism disorders.
  • Specific Anemias: If your anemia is not due to iron or B 12 deficiency (e.g., severe non-nutritional anemias), consult a specialist.

Side Effects of De-deon's Syrup

Side effects are rare when used at the recommended dosage.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Stomach upset or pain, mild constipation or diarrhea, nausea, or vomiting. Darkening of stools is expected.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (Requires Medical Attention): Signs of severe fluid retention or heart issues (Pulmonary edema, Congestive heart failure), itching, a feeling of swelling of the entire body, or nervousness/anxiousness.
  • What to do if side effects occur: If you experience symptoms of heart failure, severe or persistent diarrhea, or a widespread allergic reaction, discontinue use and seek professional medical assistance immediately.

Precautions and Warnings of De-deon's Syrup

  • Before Starting De-deon's Syrup: Inform your doctor if you have any pre-existing medical conditions. Since it contains a rich source of iron, its use must be monitored in patients with potential iron accumulation risks.
  • Interactions: Although specific interaction studies have not been widely performed, interactions with other supplements containing iron or B 12 are possible. Avoid concurrent use of other hematic tonics unless directed by a physician.
  • Breastfeeding: The active ingredients are excreted into breast milk. While no adverse effects have been shown in breastfed infants, use should still be under the supervision of a doctor.

searchable.name: IMODIUM INSTANTS LOPERAMIDE 2MG DISPERSIBLE TABLETS X6
searchable.brief_info: Imodium Instant (6 Tablets) is an Over-The-Counter (OTC) medicine specifically formulated to provide rapid, effective relief from the symptoms of acute, non-infectious diarrhoea. The "Instant" formulation usually refers to tablets or melts that dissolve quickly in the mouth for fast action.
searchable.description: Imodium Instant contains Loperamide Hydrochloride, a highly effective agent for controlling episodes of acute, non-infectious diarrhoea. This small pack of 6 tablets is perfect for sudden onset or traveller's diarrhoea. Loperamide works directly on the gut, slowing down intestinal movement and increasing the absorption of water and electrolytes, thereby reducing the frequency and urgency of bowel movements. By normalizing the stool consistency, Imodium Instant helps restore fluid balance and allows the user to quickly resume their daily routine.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Imodium Instant Tablets

This is an Over-The-Counter (OTC) medicine.

  • Adults and Children 12 years and over:
    • Initial Dose: Take two tablets (4 mg) immediately.
    • Subsequent Doses: Take one tablet (2 mg) after every subsequent loose bowel movement.
    • Maximum Daily Dose: Do not exceed six tablets (12 mg) in any 24-hour period.

Proper Administration

  • Administration: For tablets/capsules, swallow whole with a drink. For melts, place the tablet on the tongue to dissolve, then swallow.
  • Best Time to Take: Take immediately after a loose bowel movement.

Duration: Stop taking as soon as the diarrhoea is controlled. Do not use for more than 48 hours without consulting a doctor.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: 6 Tablets / Melts
  • Form: Oral Tablet, or Quick-Dissolve Melt
  • Active Ingredient: Loperamide Hydrochloride 2 mg
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Imodium Instant Tablets

  • Known Allergies: Do NOT take if you have a known allergy to Loperamide or any other ingredients.
  • Bloody/Infectious Diarrhoea: Do NOT take if you have a high fever, or if your stools are bloody or black (dysentery), as this may mask a severe infection.
  • Antibiotic-Associated Colitis: Do NOT take if you have severe diarrhoea after taking antibiotics (e.g., C. difficile infection), as slowing the gut can prolong the toxin's effect.
  • Constipation: Do NOT take if you are already constipated or have abdominal swelling.

Side Effects of Imodium Instant Tablets

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Headache, dizziness, nausea, flatulence, and constipation.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (That May Require Medical Attention): Severe allergic reaction (swelling, rash, difficulty breathing), severe abdominal pain or bloating, or signs of paralytic ileus (cessation of bowel movement). High doses can cause fatal cardiac arrhythmia.

Precautions and Warnings of Imodium Instant Tablets

  • Cardiac Risk: High doses of Loperamide can cause life-threatening heart rhythm abnormalities (QT interval prolongation). Only use as directed and strictly adhere to the dose limits.
  • Liver Impairment: Consult a doctor if you have liver problems, as Loperamide levels may build up in the body.
  • Duration: If symptoms persist for more than 48 hours, stop treatment and seek medical advice, as the cause of the diarrhoea needs investigation.

Pregnancy & Breastfeeding: Consult your doctor or pharmacist before use.

searchable.name: Drujela Mouth Gel
searchable.brief_info: Drujela Mouth Gel is a fast-acting, multi-component oral treatment designed to relieve the pain and discomfort associated with mouth ulcers, sores, and inflammation. By combining a potent local anesthetic with a cooling antiseptic, it provides immediate numbing relief while promoting a clean environment for natural healing of the oral mucosa.
searchable.description: Drujela Mouth Gel is a specialized topical gel formulated for application within the oral cavity. It is a trusted choice for individuals suffering from painful aphthous ulcers (canker sores), denture irritation, or sores caused by orthodontic braces. The gel's muco-adhesive properties allow it to stay in contact with the affected area, providing a protective barrier that reduces sensitivity to food, drink, and touch.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Drujela Mouth Gel Take as directed by the pharmacist or physician. * General Use: Apply a small amount (pea-sized) to the affected area every 3 to 4 hours as needed for pain relief.

Proper Administration

  • Preparation: Wash your hands thoroughly. If possible, gently pat the ulcer dry with a clean tissue before application to help the gel adhere better.
  • Application: Using a clean fingertip or a cotton bud, apply the gel directly onto the ulcer or sore.
  • Aftercare: Avoid eating or drinking for at least 30 minutes after application to prevent the gel from being washed away.

How to Store and Dispose of Drujela Mouth Gel

  • Storage: Store in a cool, dry place below 30°C. Keep the tube tightly capped when not in use.
  • Disposal: Keep out of reach of children. Return expired or unused tubes to your local pharmacy for safe disposal.

Quick Tips for Drujela Mouth Gel

  • Before Meals: Apply the gel 15 minutes before eating to numb the area and make chewing less painful.
  • Targeted Application: Use a cotton swab for precise application on ulcers located at the back of the mouth.
  • Check Your Brush: Use a soft-bristled toothbrush while treating ulcers to prevent further mechanical trauma to the area.
  • Avoid Irritants: While using Drujela, avoid spicy, acidic, or very salty foods which can irritate the ulcer through the gel layer.
searchable.specification:

  • Application: Using a clean fingertip or a cotton bud, apply the gel directly onto the ulcer or sore.

  • Check Your Brush: Use a soft-bristled toothbrush while treating ulcers to prevent further mechanical trauma to the area.
  • Avoid Irritants: While using Drujela, avoid spicy, acidic, or very salty foods which can irritate the ulcer through the gel layer.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Safety and Precautions

Contraindications of Drujela Mouth Gel

  • Known Allergies: Do NOT use if you are allergic to lidocaine or other local anesthetics of the amide type.
  • Age Restrictions: Consult a pediatrician before use in infants or very young children.
  • Severe Sepsis: Do not apply to extensively damaged or infected oral tissues without medical supervision.

Side Effects of Drujela Mouth Gel

  • Common: A temporary tingling or stinging sensation upon application, followed by numbness.
  • Serious but Rare: Hypersensitivity reactions (swelling of the lips or tongue) or lightheadedness if used excessively over large areas.
  • Action: If you experience swelling of the face or difficulty breathing, seek emergency medical help immediately.

Precautions and Warnings

  • Biting Risk: Because your mouth will be numb, be careful not to bite your cheek or tongue while chewing.
  • Hot Drinks: Avoid very hot drinks while the mouth is numb, as you may burn your tissues without realizing it.
  • Pregnancy & Breastfeeding: Consult your doctor before use; it is generally safe for short-term, localized use.

searchable.name: Predicte-Ovulation Prediction Test
searchable.brief_info: If you are planning to get pregnant, Predicte Ovulation Prediction Test can help you plan your pregnancy by helping you determine your two most fertile days to conceive. Using simple one-step test, Predicte Ovulation Prediction test is able to detect the level of luteinizing hormone (LH) responsible for ovulation in the urine. With 98% accurate results within minutes, you'll know in advance your most fertile days.
searchable.description:
PREDICTE OVULATION TEST is a test kit that contains five ovulation test strips and one free pregnancy test strip. Following the instruction in the pack, you will test your urine daily using the PREDICTE OVULATION TEST KIT, until you get a positive result. Positive result means you will ovulate in the next 24-36 hours. This gives you advance notice! Two weeks after timing and meeting with your spouse, you can use the free PREGNANCY TEST STRIP to confirm if you got pregnant.

The PREDICTE PREGNANCY TEST is so sensitive that it can detect pregnancy even before you miss your period!
PREDICTE OVULATION TEST is simple to use, the result is instant, so even very busy executives can use it in comfort of their home or office. The result is very easy to interpret and no expert opinion is needed to understand the result.
PREDICTE OVULATION TEST is readily available in all the pharmacies around you. Click on the Pharmacies stocking PREDICTE to know the one that is nearest to you.
PREDICTE OVULATION TEST is very affordable.
Indeed it is a world of new possibilities-possibilities of naturally achieving conception through timed intercourse, possibilities of naturally increasing the chance of having a boy or a girl; Endless possibilities! You just can not miss it with PREDICTE OVULATION TEST……all you miss is your period!
searchable.how_to_use:
1)   Get the PREDICTE OVULATION TEST KIT, Open the pouch and bring out the strip inside.

2)   Immerse the strip into the urine with the arrow end pointing towards the urine. Do NOT go beyond the MAX (marker line). Take the strip out after 5 seconds and lay on the mouth of the container

3)    Wait for the colored bands to appear. The strip contains 2 bands — A test line and a control line. These lines will not show until after you’ve immersed the strip in urine.

You may get a positive result as early as 40seconds.
However, wait for at least 10 minutes to confirm the result.
Do not read results after more than 30 minutes.

4)    Confirm your result.

If you get a positive result after the ovulation test, this is an indication that your ovulation day will be in the next 24-36hrs. You should have sex for the next 1-2days to increase your chances of conception.

searchable.name: Pulse Oximeter
searchable.brief_info: Pulse oximetry is a noninvasive and painless test that measures your oxygen saturation level, or the oxygen levels in your blood. It can rapidly detect even small changes in how efficiently oxygen is being carried to the extremities furthest from the heart, including the legs and the arms.
searchable.description:
How it works

During a pulse oximetry reading, a small clamp-like device is placed on a finger, earlobe, or toe. Small beams of light pass through the blood in the finger, measuring the amount of oxygen. It does this by measuring changes of light absorption in oxygenated or deoxygenated blood. This is a painless process.

The pulse oximeter will thus be able to tell you your oxygen saturation levels along with your heart rate.

searchable.brief_info: Fast relief from the symptoms of hay-fever and other allergies, nettle rash, hives, heat rash, prickly heat & dermatitis, reactions to food, food additives, medicines & insect bites. Also relieves the itchy rash of chickenpox.
searchable.description:
Relieving symptoms of allergies such as hay fever, pet allergies, nettle rash (urticaria), food allergies and reactions to insect bites or medicines.
Relieving symptoms of a more serious allergic reaction called angioneurotic oedema, which causes swelling of the eyes, lips, tongue or throat.
Relieving itching associated with chickenpox.

Piriton  syrup contain the active ingredient chlorphenamine maleate. Chlorphenamine is a type of medicine called a sedating antihistamine, so-called because it can make you feel sleepy. It works by preventing the actions of histamine.
searchable.how_to_use:
Age Dosage Max dose in 24 hours
1-2 years One 2.5 ml spoonful twice daily at least 4 hours apart Two 2.5 ml spoonfuls (5 ml)
2-6 years One 2.5 ml spoonful every 4-6 hours Six 2.5 ml spoonfuls (15 ml)

searchable.famasi_advice:
Piriton tablets and syrup are not suitable for:

People who have taken a type of antidepressant called a monoamine oxidase inhibitor (MAOI, eg phenelzine, tranylcypromine or isocarboxazid) in the last 14 days.
People with an allergy to any ingredient of Piriton.
Piriton tablets and Piriton allergy tablets contain lactose and are not suitable for people with rare hereditary problems of galactose intolerance, Lapp lactase deficiency or glucose-galactose malabsorption.

searchable.name: Calpol six plus sugar free suspension
searchable.brief_info: Calpol Six Plus Sugar Free Suspension is a widely trusted, easy-to-administer liquid medicine formulated specifically for children aged 6 years and over. It contains a higher concentration of the active ingredient, Paracetamol, than infant formulas, ensuring effective dosing for older children without the use of sugar.
searchable.description: Calpol Six Plus Sugar Free Suspension is a pleasant-tasting, sugar-free oral suspension containing Paracetamol. It is specifically formulated to provide rapid and effective relief from pain and fever in children aged 6 years and up. The "Six Plus" formulation offers a concentrated dose of Paracetamol suitable for older, heavier children, ensuring therapeutic efficacy. Because it is sugar-free, it is kind to teeth and is often the first choice for parents and healthcare professionals for treating childhood ailments like teething pain, colds, and post-vaccination fever.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Calpol Six Plus Sugar Free Suspension

This is an Over-The-Counter (OTC) medicine. The dose is determined by the child's age.

  • Children 6 - 8 years: Give 5 ml (one spoonful).
  • Children 8 - 10 years: Give 7.5 ml (one and a half spoonfuls).
  • Children 10 - 12 years: Give 10 ml (two spoonfuls).
  • Children 12 - 16 years: Give 10 ml - 15 ml (two to three spoonfuls).
  • Do not exceed four doses in any 24 hours.

Proper Administration

  • Administration: For oral use only. Use the syringe or measure cup provided to ensure accurate dosing.
  • Frequency: Repeat the dose every 4 to 6 hours as necessary. DO NOT give more than four doses in 24 hours.
  • Duration: Do not give this medicine to your child for more than 3 days without speaking to your doctor or pharmacist.

Shaking: Shake the bottle thoroughly for at least 10 seconds before measuring the dose.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: Varies (e.g., 100 ml or 200 ml bottle)
  • Form: Oral Suspension
  • Active Ingredient: Paracetamol 250 mg per 5 ml
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Calpol Six Plus Sugar Free Suspension

  • Known Allergies: Do NOT give if your child has a known allergy to Paracetamol or any other ingredient in the medicine.
  • Severe Liver Disease: Do NOT give if the child has severe liver disease.

Side Effects of Calpol Six Plus Sugar Free Suspension

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Rare): Allergic reactions such as rash or itching. Very rarely, blood disorders.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (That May Require Medical Attention): Seek medical advice immediately if your child takes too much, even if they appear well, due to the risk of delayed, severe liver damage. Look for signs of severe skin reactions, which require immediate discontinuation and medical help.

Precautions and Warnings of Calpol Six Plus Sugar Free Suspension

  • Overdose Risk: This is a concentrated formula. Accidental overdose is the primary risk and can cause fatal liver damage. Always adhere strictly to the maximum daily dose and interval.
  • Weight-Based Dosing: If your child is small for their age, consult a pharmacist or doctor who may recommend a dose based on weight rather than age.
  • Chronic Conditions: If the child is taking other medicines or has existing liver or kidney problems, consult a physician before use.
  • Fructose Intolerance: The medicine contains sorbitol and maltitol; children with hereditary fructose intolerance must NOT take this medicine.

searchable.description:
Zinc is an essential mineral that plays an important role in many enzymatic functions. It supports a healthy immune system, functions and is an important component of bodily antioxidant systems.  Zinc also contributes to healthy skin as well as supports cell growth and DNA formation. Low levels of zinc can be the cause for a variety of health-related problems. Zinc is a key mineral that cells use to metabolize nutrients.

 

Health Benefits of Nature’s Field Zinc (100mg)

-1. Your body needs zinc to activate T lymphocytes (T cells) which helps to regulate immune responses and attack infected or cancerous cells
-2. Zinc supplement is effective at treating diarrhea and also helps prevent future bouts of the condition.
-3. Zinc has a crucial role in regulating how memories are formed and how we learn.
-4. It is beneficial in reducing the duration and severity of the common cold in healthy people.
-5. Zinc helps wound to heal faster
-6. Taking Zinc 100mg supplement helps suppresses prostate cancer cell growth.
-7.  Increasing your dietary intake of zinc may help reduce urinary symptoms associated with an enlarged prostate.
-8. Zinc helps in the treatment of attention deficit hyperactivity disorder (ADHD)
-9. Zinc also enables the male organ to produce testosterone. Your levels of zinc may affect erectile dysfunction.

Why choose Zinc Supplement From Nature’s Field

Nature’s Field Zinc (10omg) comes in the form Zinc gluconate.  Zinc gluconate is a best form for the delivery of zinc as a dietary supplement. Zinc gluconate is a generally recognized as safe (GRAS) substance by FDA and drug regulatory agencies of many countries. A cheaper formulation like zinc oxide, can upset your stomach’s acidity balance and is not as easily absorbed. This Zinc Supplement is high strength as it contains 100mg  of the Zinc gluconate for people  with high risk for a zinc deficiency.

searchable.name: Rulox Suspension 200ml
searchable.brief_info: Rulox Suspension is a potent antacid and antiflatulent suspension designed to provide rapid, soothing relief from gastric discomfort. Combining Magnesium Trisilicate, Aluminium Hydroxide, and Simethicone, this liquid formula works instantly to neutralize excess stomach acid and break down trapped gas bubbles. Rulox Syrup is an ideal choice for those who prefer an easy-to-swallow liquid over tablets for the management of heartburn and bloating.
searchable.description: Rulox suspension acts as a chemical buffer in the stomach. Its liquid form allows it to coat the esophagus and stomach lining quickly, providing a cooling sensation that is especially helpful for acid reflux. By balancing fast-acting and long-lasting antacids with a gas-relieving agent, it addresses multiple symptoms of digestive distress in a single dose.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Rulox Syrup For Adults and Children over 12 years:

  • Typical Dose: 10ml to 20ml (two to four 5ml spoonfuls).
  • Frequency: Taken three to four times a day, or as directed by a healthcare professional.

Proper Administration

  • Shake Well: Always shake the bottle vigorously before each use to ensure the active ingredients are properly mixed.
  • Timing: For maximum effectiveness, take Rulox between meals (usually 1 hour after eating) and at bedtime.
  • Method: Use the measuring cup or spoon provided with the bottle for accurate dosing.
  • Dilution: It is usually taken undiluted, but you may follow it with a small sip of water if preferred.

How to Store and Dispose of Rulox Syrup

  • Storage: Store in a cool, dry place below 30°C. Protect from direct sunlight. Do not freeze.
  • Cap Care: Ensure the bottle cap is screwed on tightly after every use to prevent the suspension from drying out.
  • Disposal: Keep out of reach of children. Return expired or unused syrup to a pharmacy.

Quick Tips for Rulox Syrup

  • Liquid Advantage: Liquid antacids generally work faster and more effectively than tablets because they are already dissolved and can coat the stomach lining immediately.
  • Avoid Tight Clothing: If you suffer from frequent reflux, avoid tight belts or waistbands that put pressure on your stomach.
  • Watch Your Triggers: Keep a food diary to identify if specific items like chocolate, mint, or spicy foods trigger your symptoms.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: 200ml Bottle.
  • Form: Oral Suspension (Liquid).
  • Key Ingredients: Aluminium Hydroxide, Magnesium Trisilicate, Simethicone.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Safety and Precautions

Contraindications of Rulox Syrup

  • Severe Kidney Disease: Use with caution (or avoid) if you have kidney failure, as magnesium and aluminium can build up in the blood.
  • Low Phosphate Levels: Aluminium hydroxide can lower phosphate levels; avoid long-term use if you are already deficient.
  • Allergies: Do not use if you are allergic to any of the ingredients listed.

Side Effects of Rulox Syrup

  • Common: Mild changes in bowel habits (constipation due to aluminium or diarrhea due to magnesium).
  • Less Common: Chalky taste or nausea.
  • Action: If you experience severe stomach cramps or persistent bowel changes, stop use and consult a pharmacist.

Precautions and Warnings

  • Drug Interactions: Antacids can interfere with the absorption of many other medicines (e.g., Digoxin, Iron supplements, and certain antibiotics). Wait at least 2 hours between taking Rulox and other medications.
  • Sodium Content: Some antacid suspensions contain sodium; consult your doctor if you are on a low-salt diet.
  • Duration: Do not use this product for more than 2 weeks without consulting a doctor if symptoms persist.
