searchable.name: Paludrine 100mg
searchable.brief_info:
Paludrine contains a medicine called proguanil hydrochloride. This belongs to a group of medicines called ‘anti-malarials’.

‘Anti-malarials’ can be used in certain parts of the world to help prevent malaria. This is a serious disease spread by infected mosquitoes. Paludrine will give some degree of protection (prophylaxis) against malaria in certain countries. Paludrine can also be prescribed by a doctor to help suppress some types of malaria.
searchable.description:
Paludrine contains a medicine called proguanil hydrochloride. This belongs to a group of medicines called ‘anti-malarials’.

‘Anti-malarials’ can be used in certain parts of the world to help prevent malaria. This is a serious disease spread by infected mosquitoes. Paludrine will give some degree of protection (prophylaxis) against malaria in certain countries. Paludrine can also be prescribed by a doctor to help suppress some types of malaria.

Side Effects: Like all medicines, Paludrine can cause side effects, although not everybody gets them. Some possible side effects include;

  • Allergic reactions: If you have an allergic reaction, stop taking Paludrine and get medical help or contact your doctor straight away. The signs may include:
  1. Difficulty in breathing.
  2. Swelling of the face, lips, tongue or throat which may cause difficulty in swallowing.
  3. An itchy rash (similar to nettle rash or hives).

Active Ingredient: proguanil hydrochloride
searchable.how_to_use: Consult your doctor
searchable.famasi_advice:
• Take the tablet(s) at the same time each day.
  • Take the tablet(s) after food.
  • Swallow the tablet(s), or part tablets, whole with a drink of water.
  • For a young child, the tablet(s) may be given crushed in milk, honey or jam.

  • If you take more Paludrine tablets than you should, talk to a doctor or go to a hospital straight away. Show any left-over medicines or the empty packet to the doctor.

searchable.name: Reload Immunity
searchable.brief_info: Reload Immunity is a premium, balanced nutritional formula trusted to support the body's natural defences by fortifying seven critical biological systems, helping you ward off disease and maintain optimal cellular protection.
searchable.description: Reload Immunity Formula Tablets is a specialized, once-daily nutritional supplement designed to provide comprehensive immune system support. Everyday exposure to toxins, bacteria, and free radicals can compromise the body's natural defence mechanisms. This premium formula is engineered to address this by targeting seven critical systems involved in immunity: cellular, lymphatic, epidermal, systemic, circulatory, digestive, and respiratory. The blend combines high-potency antioxidants (like Vitamins C and E), essential immune minerals (Zinc and Selenium), and a proprietary mix of superfoods and herbs (including Cordyceps, Cayenne Pepper, and Maitake Mushroom) to offer sustained protection, enhance energy levels, and support quicker recovery.
searchable.how_to_use:
Contraindications of Reload Immunity Formula Tablets

Do NOT take Reload Immunity Formula Tablets if you:

  • Have a known allergy or hypersensitivity to any of the vitamins, minerals, or herbal components (e.g., mushrooms, ginseng, cayenne pepper).
  • Have a severe, pre-existing medical condition, such as liver damage, kidney failure, or certain autoimmune diseases, without medical consultation.

Pregnancy & Breastfeeding Warnings

  • Pregnancy: Consult your doctor. High doses of certain vitamins (like Vitamin A) can be harmful to an unborn baby. Use only a prenatal formula specifically advised by a physician.
  • Breastfeeding: Consult your doctor. Use only under medical supervision.

Side Effects of Reload Immunity Formula Tablets

Side effects are generally mild and related to the high concentration of certain nutrients.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Mild digestive upset, constipation, or diarrhea, which may occur due to high intake of certain minerals or vitamins.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (that may require medical attention):
    • Hypervitaminosis: Rare, but chronic consumption of extremely high doses of fat-soluble vitamins (A, D, E) can lead to toxicity.
    • Allergic Reactions: Severe allergic reaction with hives, difficulty breathing, or swelling of the face, tongue, or throat.

What to do if side effects occur:

  • For mild digestive upset, try taking the tablet immediately after a meal.
  • If you experience any severe or persistent adverse effects, or signs of a serious allergic reaction, discontinue use immediately and seek emergency medical attention.

Precautions and Warnings of Reload Immunity Formula Tablets

  • Dosage Limit: Do NOT exceed the recommended daily dosage (typically one tablet per day) to avoid potential overdose, particularly of fat-soluble vitamins (A, D, E).
  • Smokers: Individuals who smoke or have a history of heavy smoking should consult a doctor before taking supplements high in Vitamin A or Beta-Carotene, as high intake may increase the risk of lung cancer in this population.
  • Drug Interactions: Consult your doctor or pharmacist if you are taking prescription medications, as vitamins and herbs may interact with drugs like blood thinners (Vitamin K, high dose Vitamin E) or thyroid medications (Selenium).

Underlying Conditions: Consult a physician if you have a medical condition before starting any high-potency supplement.
searchable.specification: The active ingredients include a blend of Vitamins (A, C, D3, E, B-Complex), Minerals (Zinc, Selenium, Magnesium, Manganese), and a Proprietary Herbal Blend (Cordyceps, Cayenne Pepper, Maitake Mushroom). It is supplied as an oral tablet, typically in bottles of 30, 90, or 120 counts. It is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) Dietary Supplement for Immune Support.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Dosage of Reload Immunity Formula Tablets

Reload Immunity Formula Tablets is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) Dietary Supplement.

Take 1 tablet daily, or as directed by a physician.

Proper Administration

  • Route: Oral tablet.
  • How to Take: Swallow the tablet whole with a glass of water. Do not crush or chew.
  • Timing: Take once daily, preferably with a meal (breakfast or lunch) to maximize absorption of fat-soluble vitamins and minimize digestive upset.

Missed Dose Guidance

  • If you miss a dose, simply take the next tablet the following day with your meal. Consistency is key for building long-term immune support.

searchable.name: Countboost for men
searchable.brief_info: CountBoost is a specialist dietary supplement by Fairhaven Health, expertly formulated for men who have been diagnosed with a low sperm count (oligospermia). Designed to be taken alongside a comprehensive fertility multivitamin like FertilAid for Men, CountBoost provides a concentrated "boost" of specific vitamins, antioxidants, and herbal extracts that have been scientifically shown to support healthy sperm production and count.
searchable.description: A healthy sperm count is a vital component of male fertility. CountBoost targets the physiological processes involved in spermatogenesis (the creation of sperm). By reducing oxidative stress in the testes and providing the necessary raw materials for cellular energy, this formula helps optimize the environment for sperm production, increasing the chances of successful conception.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage and Administration

  • Dosage: Take two (2) capsules daily.
  • Method: Swallow the capsules with water. You may take one in the morning and one in the evening, or both at once.
  • Timing: For optimal absorption and to avoid stomach upset, take with a meal.

Proper Usage Tips

  • The 90-Day Window: Sperm take approximately 74–90 days to fully mature. To see the maximum benefit in sperm count, CountBoost should be taken consistently for at least 3 months.
  • The Fertility Foundation: CountBoost is not a standalone multivitamin. For best results, it must be taken in conjunction with FertilAid for Men to ensure you are also receiving essential minerals like Zinc and Selenium.
  • Lifestyle Factors: To support the supplement, avoid hot baths/saunas, quit smoking, and limit alcohol, as these factors can negatively impact sperm production.

How to Store and Dispose of CountBoost

  • Storage: Store in a cool, dry place. Keep the bottle tightly closed and away from direct sunlight.
  • Disposal: Keep out of reach of children. Dispose of the empty bottle in your local plastic recycling bin.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Safety and Precautions

Contraindications and Restrictions

  • Underlying Conditions: If you have a pre-existing medical condition or are taking medication for depression or high blood pressure, consult your doctor before use.
  • Not for Women: This product is specifically formulated for male physiology and should not be used by women.

Side Effects of CountBoost

  • Common: Generally very well tolerated. Some men may experience mild indigestion if taken on an empty stomach.
  • Action: If you experience any allergic reaction, such as a rash or itching, discontinue use and consult a healthcare professional.

Precautions and Warnings

  • Diagnosis: CountBoost is intended for men with low sperm count. If you are unsure of your fertility status, a semen analysis is recommended before starting treatment.
  • No "Double-Dosing": Do not exceed the recommended daily dose of two capsules.

searchable.name: Puritan's Pride Melatonin 3mg X120
searchable.brief_info: Puritan's Pride Melatonin is a dietary supplement designed to support restful sleep and help regulate the body's natural sleep-wake cycle. Melatonin, a hormone naturally produced in the pineal gland, signals the body that it is time to sleep. This high-quality supplement is ideal for individuals struggling with occasional sleeplessness, stress, jet lag, or shift work, offering a natural way to promote relaxation and achieve deep, rejuvenating rest without the common grogginess associated with prescription sleep aids. Puritan's Pride Melatonin is a trusted supplement to help you wake up feeling refreshed.
searchable.description:
Melatonin is a hormone naturally produced in the body that is closely involved in the natural sleep cycle. It helps promote a tranquil sleep so you can awaken refreshed and revitalized. It also supports rest and relaxation to aid with occasional sleeplessness.

Uses of Melatonin: The primary purpose of Puritan's Pride Melatonin is to help manage and alleviate sleep disturbances. Its main uses include:

  • Occasional Sleeplessness (Insomnia): Supports falling asleep faster and staying asleep longer.
  • Jet Lag: Helps to reset the internal clock (circadian rhythm) when traveling across multiple time zones.
  • Shift Work Adjustments: Aids those working late or overnight shifts in establishing a consistent sleep schedule.
  • Stress Support: Promotes calm and relaxation, which are essential precursors to sleep.

Active Ingredients: The key active ingredient in this supplement is:

  • Melatonin: Melatonin functions as a chronobiotic hormone, meaning it directly influences the timing of the body's biological rhythms. It works by signaling the central nervous system that it is dark, reducing the time needed to fall asleep (sleep latency) and increasing total sleep time.

FAQs:

  • Does melatonin act as a sedative?: Melatonin does not act as a sedative; instead, it works with your body's natural processes, helping to regulate the rhythm of sleep.
  • Is Puritan's Pride Melatonin safe for long-term use?: Melatonin is generally considered safe for short-term use. Consult your healthcare provider for guidance on prolonged or daily use.

Offers from OneHealth: Referral bonus: Get 10% off your next order when you refer a family member, patient, or friend. They also get 10% off on their first order. Share your referral code by visiting https://onehealthng.com/refer-and-earn.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Puritan's Pride Melatonin: Take as directed by the pharmacist or physician. The typical dose for adults is one tablet approximately 30 minutes before bedtime. Do not exceed the recommended dosage without consulting a healthcare professional.

  • Best Time to Take: 30 minutes before the intended sleep time.
  • Administration: Swallow the tablet whole with water.
  • Food/Drink Interactions: Avoid consuming alcohol, caffeine, or large meals immediately before taking Melatonin, as these can interfere with sleep onset.

How to Store and Dispose: Store the bottle at room temperature, away from excessive heat, moisture, and direct sunlight. Keep the lid tightly closed. Dispose of any expired product according to local drug disposal guidelines, ideally through a pharmacy take-back program.

Quick Tips for Puritan's Pride Melatonin:

  • Optimal Timing: Take 30 minutes before bed to allow time for absorption.
  • Dim the Lights: Use Melatonin in conjunction with reducing screen time and exposure to bright lights (blue light) to maximize its effect.
  • Consistency: Take at the same time nightly for best results in regulating your cycle.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Puritan's Pride Melatonin: Do NOT Take Melatonin if you:

  • Are pregnant or nursing without consulting a doctor.
  • Have a serious medical condition such as epilepsy, diabetes, or an autoimmune disorder.
  • Are taking immunosuppressants or blood thinners (anticoagulants), as Melatonin may interact with these medications.
  • Drug Allergies: Discontinue use if allergic reactions occur.

Side Effects of Melatonin:

  • Common Side Effects: Drowsiness (especially the morning after), headache, dizziness, or mild nausea.
  • Serious (Rare): Reports of confusion or disorientation. If these occur, stop taking the product and seek medical advice.

Precautions and Warnings:

  • During Use: Do NOT drive, operate machinery, or consume alcohol after taking Melatonin.
  • Consultation: Always speak to a healthcare professional before combining Melatonin with prescription sleeping pills or sedatives.

searchable.name: Polygel Antacid Suspension 200ml
searchable.brief_info: Polygel Antacid Suspension is a high-performance oral medication designed to provide rapid and long-lasting relief from gastric discomfort. By combining two powerful acid-neutralizing agents with a gas-relieving component, Polygel addresses the root causes of indigestion. Its smooth, liquid formula quickly coats the esophagus and stomach lining, making it an essential treatment for acid reflux, stomach upset, and painful bloating.
searchable.description:
Polygel works through a dual mechanism: it chemically neutralizes excess stomach acid while physically breaking down gas bubbles that cause pressure. The liquid suspension format is particularly effective as it begins working the moment it is swallowed, providing an immediate cooling sensation for the "burning" feeling associated with heartburn.

Uses of Polygel Antacid SuspensionPolygel is specifically indicated for:

  • Heartburn & Acid Reflux: Relief from the burning pain in the chest caused by acid rising into the esophagus (GERD).
  • Peptic Ulcer Pain: Soothing the irritation caused by stomach or duodenal ulcers.
  • Flatulence & Meteorism: Reducing bloating and the uncomfortable pressure of trapped gas.
  • Dyspepsia: Treating general indigestion, "sour stomach," and over-fullness after meals.
  • Gastritis: Managing the inflammation of the stomach lining.

Active Ingredients in Polygel Each 5ml typically contains a synergistic blend of:

  • Aluminium Hydroxide: A fast-acting antacid that raises the pH level of the stomach.
  • Magnesium Hydroxide: Provides a sustained neutralizing effect and helps balance the constipating tendency of aluminium.
  • Activated Methylpolysiloxane (Simethicone): An anti-foaming agent that changes the surface tension of gas bubbles in the stomach, allowing them to be passed more easily.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Polygel

  • Adults and Children over 12 years: Usually 5ml to 10ml (1 to 2 teaspoonfuls).
  • Frequency: Taken between meals (about 1 hour after eating) and at bedtime, or as directed by a healthcare professional.
  • Maximum Dose: Do not exceed 60ml in a 24-hour period.

Proper Administration

  • Shake Well: Always shake the bottle vigorously before each dose to ensure the active ingredients are evenly suspended.
  • Measurement: Use a proper measuring spoon or the cup provided with the bottle to ensure an accurate dose.
  • Water: You may follow the dose with a small amount of water if you dislike the taste, but for maximum coating effect, it is best taken undiluted.

How to Store and Dispose of Polygel

  • Storage: Store in a cool, dry place below 30°C. Protect from direct sunlight. Do not freeze.
  • Cap Care: Keep the bottle tightly closed when not in use to prevent the liquid from thickening or drying out.
  • Disposal: Keep out of reach of children. Dispose of the bottle according to local environmental regulations.

Quick Tips for Polygel

  • The "Hour After" Rule: Taking antacids one hour after a meal provides longer-lasting relief (up to 3 hours) compared to taking them on an empty stomach.
  • Lifestyle Adjustments: To help Polygel work better, avoid lying down immediately after eating and try to eat smaller, more frequent meals.
  • Nighttime Relief: If you suffer from nighttime heartburn, taking a dose right before bed can prevent acid from rising while you sleep.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: 200ml Bottle.
  • Form: Oral Suspension.
  • Key Ingredients: Aluminium Hydroxide, Magnesium Hydroxide, Simethicone.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Safety and Precautions

Contraindications of Polygel

  • Severe Renal Failure: Patients with significant kidney disease should avoid magnesium/aluminium antacids due to the risk of mineral buildup in the blood.
  • Hypophosphatemia: Avoid prolonged use if you have low phosphate levels, as aluminium can further deplete phosphate.
  • Allergy: Do not use if you are hypersensitive to any of the ingredients.

Side Effects of Polygel

  • Common: Mild changes in bowel movements. Aluminium may cause constipation, while magnesium may have a mild laxative effect; Polygel is balanced to minimize these.
  • Less Common: Chalky taste in the mouth or mild nausea.
  • Action: If you experience persistent diarrhea or severe stomach cramps, stop use and consult your pharmacist.

Precautions and Warnings

  • Drug Interactions: Antacids can significantly reduce the absorption of other medicines (such as Tetracycline antibiotics, Iron supplements, and Digoxin). Wait at least 2 hours between taking Polygel and any other medication.
  • Duration: If symptoms persist for more than 2 weeks despite regular use, see a doctor to rule out more serious underlying conditions.
  • Sodium Content: Check the label if you are on a strictly sodium-restricted diet.

searchable.name: Jobelyn Dietary Supplement 250mg x30
searchable.brief_info: Jobelyn is a specialized, 100% natural dietary supplement derived from the leaf sheaths of a unique variety of Sorghum bicolor. Renowned for its exceptionally high antioxidant capacity, Jobelyn is a trusted choice for individuals looking to boost their blood count, support their immune system, and manage chronic inflammatory conditions naturally.
searchable.description: Jobelyn is a powerful botanical extract that has gained international recognition for its rich concentration of polyphenols and anthocyanins. Unlike synthetic supplements, Jobelyn works with the body’s natural processes to improve hematological (blood) parameters and cellular health. It is particularly valued for its ability to support the body during recovery from illness, manage anemia, and provide comprehensive antioxidant protection against oxidative stress.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Jobelyn Take as directed by the pharmacist or physician. * Adults: The typical dosage is one capsule (250mg or 500mg) taken two to three times daily.

  • Children: Consult a pediatrician for appropriate dosage based on age and weight.

Proper Administration

  • Administration: Swallow the capsule whole with a glass of water.
  • Best Time: Can be taken before or after meals. For general wellness, morning and evening doses are common.
  • Consistency: For the best results in blood building, it is important to take the supplement consistently for at least 30 days.
  • Missed Dose: Take the missed dose as soon as you remember. If it is almost time for your next dose, skip it. Do not double the dose.

How to Store and Dispose of Jobelyn

  • Storage: Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight and moisture. Keep the bottle tightly closed.
  • Disposal: Keep out of reach of children. Dispose of any expired product via a local pharmacy or professional waste program.

Quick Tips for Jobelyn

  • Stay Hydrated: Drink plenty of water to help the body process the antioxidants and support blood circulation.
  • Healthy Diet: Pair with iron-rich foods (like green leafy vegetables) to enhance its blood-building effects.
  • Monitor Progress: If taking for anemia, have your PCV levels checked regularly to track your improvement.
  • Avoid Heat: Do not store the capsules in hot environments (like a car) as it may degrade the natural phytochemicals.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: 30, 60, or 100 Capsules.
  • Form: Capsules (250mg or 500mg).
  • Key Ingredients: 100% Sorghum bicolor powder.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Safety and Precautions

Contraindications of Jobelyn

  • Known Allergies: Do NOT use if you have a known hypersensitivity to sorghum or any of the botanical components.
  • Specific Conditions: If you have iron-overload disorders (e.g., hemochromatosis), consult your doctor before use.

Side Effects of Jobelyn

  • Common: Jobelyn is generally very well-tolerated. Some individuals may experience mild gastrointestinal changes as the body adjusts.
  • Serious but Rare: Allergic reactions (rash or itching).
  • Action: If you experience any unusual or severe symptoms, discontinue use and consult your healthcare provider.

Precautions and Warnings

  • Doctor Consultation: Always inform your doctor before starting Jobelyn if you are on medication for blood pressure, diabetes, or blood thinning.
  • Pregnancy & Breastfeeding: Consult your doctor before use. While natural, medical supervision is recommended during pregnancy.
  • Not a Replacement: This is a dietary supplement and should not replace prescribed medical treatments for serious illnesses.

searchable.name: CYPROHEPTADINE (CYPRIVIT) SYRUP 100ML
searchable.brief_info: Cyprivit Syrup is a dietary supplement that contains an anti-histamine, cyproheptadine which relieves allergies and also acts as an appetite stimulant to aid weight gain.
searchable.description: Product Description CYPROHEPTADINE (CYPRIVIT) SYRUP 100ML is a specialized therapeutic syrup formulated to address appetite loss and allergic reactions. As a central-acting antihistamine with antiserotonergic properties, it serves a dual purpose: providing rapid relief from allergy symptoms and helping individuals who struggle with poor nutrition to regain a healthy appetite. The 100ml volume is an ideal size for short-term treatment courses or for assessing a patient's response to the medication.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of CYPROHEPTADINE (CYPRIVIT) SYRUP 100ML

This is a potent medication. Take as directed by the pharmacist or physician.

  • Adults: Standard dosing is typically 4mg (10ml) three times daily.
  • Children (2–6 years): Generally 2mg (5ml) two to three times daily.
  • Children (7–14 years): Generally 4mg (10ml) two to three times daily.

How to Store and Dispose

  • Storage: Store in a cool, dry place below 30°C. Keep the bottle tightly closed and protected from light.
  • Disposal: Keep out of reach of children. Return expired or unused syrup to a pharmacy for safe disposal.

Quick Tips for CYPROHEPTADINE (CYPRIVIT) SYRUP 100ML

  • The Best Way to Take: Administer the dose 20–30 minutes before a meal to maximize the appetite-stimulating effect.
  • Measure Accurately: Always use a calibrated medicine cup or syringe; household spoons are inaccurate for dosing.
  • Manage Dry Mouth: Sip water or suck on sugar-free hard candy to relieve dryness in the mouth and throat.
  • Consistency: Take the medication at the same times each day to maintain a steady level in your system.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: 100ml bottle.
  • Form: Flavored Liquid Syrup.
  • Strength: 2mg Cyproheptadine per 5ml.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of CYPROHEPTADINE (CYPRIVIT) SYRUP 100ML

  • Newborns/Infants: DO NOT use in newborn or premature infants.
  • Existing Conditions: Not for individuals with narrow-angle glaucoma, stenosing peptic ulcers, or an enlarged prostate (prostatic hypertrophy).
  • Elderly Patients: Use with extreme caution, as older adults are more prone to dizziness, sedation, and low blood pressure.
  • Lactation: Not recommended for breastfeeding women as it may inhibit lactation or pass into breast milk.

Side Effects of CYPROHEPTADINE (CYPRIVIT) SYRUP 100ML

  • Common: Significant drowsiness, sedation, dry mouth, nose, or throat, and blurred vision.
  • Rare: Confusion, skin rashes, or "paradoxical excitation" (restlessness/hyperactivity), particularly in young children.
  • Action: If you experience difficulty urinating, a pounding heart, or severe dizziness, stop use and seek medical attention immediately.

Precautions and Warnings

  • Drowsiness: This syrup is highly sedative. Do not drive or operate machinery until you are certain of your reaction to the dose.
  • Alcohol: Avoid alcohol, as it dangerously increases the sedative effects of Cyproheptadine.
  • Asthma: Use with caution if you have a history of bronchial asthma, as antihistamines can thicken bronchial secretions.

searchable.name: Nutravit Syrup 100mL
searchable.brief_info: Nutravit Syrup 100mL is a delicious, orange-flavored multivitamin liquid supplement designed to support daily nutritional balance and overall well-being.
searchable.description: Nutravit Syrup 100mL provides a carefully formulated blend of essential vitamins, often including Vitamins A, B-Complex (B1, B2, B12), C, and D, along with the amino acid Lysine. Nutravit Syrup 100mL is especially beneficial during periods of growth, recovery from illness, or when dietary intake is inadequate. Its palatable liquid format and comprehensive nutrient profile make it a popular choice for children and adults who require sustained energy levels, enhanced immune function, and support for proper growth and development.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Nutravit Syrup 100mL

This is an Over-The-Counter (OTC) nutritional supplement.

  • Adults and Children/Adolescents: Take as directed by a healthcare professional for age-appropriate dosage. A general dosage may be 5 mL to 10 mL once daily, but follow specific instructions on the bottle.

Proper Administration

  • Administration: Take orally. Shake the bottle well before each use to ensure even distribution of ingredients. Use a measuring device (like the cap or a medicine spoon) to accurately measure the prescribed dose.
  • Best Time to Take: It is generally recommended to be consumed after meals to enhance absorption and minimize stomach upset.
  • Missed Dose Guidance: Simply take the next scheduled dose. Avoid doubling up on the syrup to compensate for a missed intake.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Nutravit Syrup 100mL

  • Known Allergies: Do NOT consume if you have a known allergy or hypersensitivity to any of the ingredients, including Vitamin A, Vitamin D, or any inactive components (e.g., coloring agents).
  • Pre-existing Conditions: Individuals with conditions causing Vitamin A or Vitamin D overload (hypervitaminosis) should consult a doctor before use.

Side Effects of Nutravit Syrup 100mL

Multivitamin supplements are generally safe when taken at recommended doses.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Mild gastrointestinal disturbances such as stomach upset, nausea, vomiting, constipation, or diarrhea may occur, especially as the body adjusts.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (That May Require Medical Attention): Signs of a severe allergic reaction (rash, hives, difficulty breathing, swelling of the face/tongue/throat). If any severe symptoms occur, discontinue use immediately and consult a physician.
  • Note: Multivitamins with iron (if included) carry a risk of overdose and iron poisoning. While the key listed ingredients do not strongly suggest iron, check the specific bottle label for any iron content and store safely away from children.

Precautions and Warnings of Nutravit Syrup 100mL

  • Overdose Risk: Do not take more than the recommended daily dosage. Exceeding the recommended dose, especially of fat-soluble vitamins (A and D), can lead to toxicity.
  • Diabetes: Liquid preparations may contain sugar. Caution is advised if the patient has diabetes. Consult a doctor or pharmacist for guidance on using this product safely.
  • Combination with Other Supplements: Consult a healthcare professional before combining Nutravit Syrup with any other supplements to avoid potential nutrient overlap or over-dosing of fat-soluble vitamins.

Phenylketonuria (PKU): Some products contain phenylalanine. If the patient has PKU, consult a doctor.

searchable.name: Piriton Expectorant Adult
searchable.brief_info: Piriton Expectorant is a multi-action formula designed to relieve chesty coughs and upper respiratory symptoms associated with the common cold, flu, or allergies. By combining a powerful expectorant with a trusted antihistamine and a decongestant, Piriton Expectorant helps to thin and loosen stubborn mucus in the chest while drying up nasal secretions. This makes it easier to clear the airways and provides comprehensive comfort from the congestion that makes breathing difficult.
searchable.description: Unlike a cough suppressant, which stops the urge to cough, Piriton Expectorant is designed for "wet" or "productive" coughs. It encourages the body to clear out the phlegm that has settled in the lungs and bronchial tubes. Simultaneously, it addresses the "head cold" symptoms like a runny nose and sneezing, providing an all-in-one solution for respiratory distress.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage for Adults

  • Adults and Children over 12 years: Usually 5ml to 10ml (1 to 2 teaspoonfuls) every 4 to 6 hours.
  • Maximum Dose: Do not exceed 4 doses (40ml) in a 24-hour period.
  • Note: For children under 12, consult your pharmacist for the specific pediatric version of Piriton.

Proper Administration

  • Measurement: Always use the measuring cup or spoon provided with the bottle. Do not use a regular kitchen spoon.
  • Hydration: For the best results, drink plenty of water throughout the day. Expectorants work best when the body is well-hydrated, as water helps thin the mucus.
  • Timing: Can be taken with or without food. If it causes mild stomach upset, take it after a meal.

How to Store and Dispose of Piriton Expectorant

  • Storage: Store in a cool, dry place below 30°C. Keep the bottle tightly closed and protect it from direct sunlight.
  • Disposal: Keep out of reach of children. Return unused or expired syrup to your local pharmacy for safe disposal.

Quick Tips for Piriton Expectorant

  • Steam Inhalation: Combine the use of this expectorant with steam inhalation to help open up the airways even faster.
  • Avoid Suppressants: Do not take this medicine with a cough suppressant (like Dextromethorphan), as you want to encourage the coughing up of loosened mucus, not stop it.
  • Warm Liquids: Drinking warm tea or broth can help soothe the throat while the medicine works on the chest.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: 100ml Bottle.
  • Form: Oral Syrup.
  • Active Ingredients: Guaifenesin, Chlorpheniramine Maleate, Ammonium Chloride.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Safety and Precautions

Contraindications and Restrictions

  • MAOIs: Do NOT use if you have taken a Monoamine Oxidase Inhibitor (for depression) in the last 14 days.
  • Severe Hypertension: Use with caution if you have very high blood pressure or heart disease.
  • Chronic Bronchitis/Emphysema: Consult a doctor if you have a persistent cough associated with smoking or asthma.

Side Effects of Piriton Expectorant

  • Common: Drowsiness, dry mouth, or mild dizziness.
  • Less Common: Stomach upset, nausea, or blurred vision.
  • Action: If you experience a rapid heartbeat, skin rash, or difficulty urinating, stop use and contact your doctor.

Precautions and Warnings

  • Drowsiness: This medication may cause drowsiness. Do not drive or operate heavy machinery until you know how it affects you.
  • Alcohol: Avoid alcohol, as it increases the sedative effects of the antihistamine.
  • Sugar Content: Many expectorants contain sugar; diabetics should consult their pharmacist before use.

searchable.description: Men’s bodies have specific needs for muscle maintenance, cardiovascular health, and prostate support. Reload Men’s Formula addresses these through a balanced blend of 24 essential vitamins and minerals combined with a proprietary "Whole Food" base. It is designed to be highly bioavailable, ensuring your body effectively absorbs the nutrients needed for peak performance.
searchable.how_to_use:

  • Adult Men: Take one (1) tablet daily.
  • Method: Swallow the tablet whole with a glass of water or a cold drink.
  • Timing: It is best taken with a meal (such as breakfast). Taking multivitamins on a full stomach increases the absorption of fat-soluble vitamins (A, D, E, and K) and prevents minor stomach upset.

Proper Usage Tips

  • Establish a Routine: Take your tablet at the same time each day to ensure you never miss a dose.
  • Hydration: Always drink plenty of water throughout the day to help your kidneys process the minerals and vitamins.
  • Avoid "Caffeine Flush": Avoid taking your multivitamin at the exact same time as your morning coffee, as caffeine can slightly inhibit the absorption of certain minerals.

How to Store and Dispose of Reload

  • Storage: Store in a cool, dry place below 30°C. Keep the bottle tightly closed to protect the tablets from humidity.
  • Disposal: Keep out of reach of children. Dispose of the empty bottle in accordance with local plastic recycling guidelines.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: 30 Tablets.
  • Form: Once-daily Oral Tablet.
  • Manufacturer: Reload Vitamins (USA).
searchable.famasi_advice:
Safety and Precautions

Contraindications and Restrictions

  • Gender Specific: This formula is tailored for men. Women (especially those pregnant) should use a formula designed for their specific needs, like Reload Women's or Prenatal.
  • Pre-existing Conditions: If you have a history of kidney stones or high iron levels, consult your doctor before starting any multivitamin.

Side Effects of Reload Men’s

  • Common: You may notice your urine turns a bright yellow color. This is a harmless effect of Vitamin B2 (Riboflavin) being processed by your body.
  • Less Common: Mild nausea or a "vitamin" aftertaste if taken on an empty stomach.
  • Action: If you experience an allergic reaction (rash or swelling), stop use and seek medical advice.

Precautions and Warnings

  • Drug Interactions: If you are on blood thinners (e.g., Warfarin) or medication for blood pressure, consult your doctor first, as Vitamin K and certain minerals can interact with these drugs.
  • Surgery: Discontinue use 2 weeks before any scheduled surgery to avoid interference with blood clotting or anesthesia.

searchable.name: ZENTEL SUSPENSION 20ML
searchable.brief_info: Zentel Suspension is a potent, broad-spectrum anthelmintic medication containing Albendazole. Designed as a convenient oral liquid, it is highly effective against a wide range of intestinal parasites and worms. Zentel works by interfering with the parasites' ability to absorb glucose, effectively depleting their energy and leading to their elimination from the body. This 20ml bottle is an ideal choice for both adults and children who prefer a liquid format for easy swallowing.
searchable.description: Zentel is a trusted name in family deworming. It is specifically formulated to treat single or mixed intestinal infections. Because worms often go undetected, regular deworming with a high-quality treatment like Zentel helps maintain optimal nutritional health, especially in children where parasites can interfere with growth and energy levels.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage and Administration

  • Adults & Children (Over 2 years): Typically the full 20ml bottle (400mg) as a single dose.
  • Children (12 to 24 months): Usually 10ml (200mg) as a single dose.
  • Method: Shake the bottle well before use. The suspension can be taken directly or mixed with a small amount of juice or water.
  • Note: For certain infections like Strongyloides or Tapeworm, your doctor may advise taking a dose once daily for three consecutive days.

Proper Usage Tips

  • Shake Well: IMPORTANT: Always shake the bottle vigorously before pouring to ensure the medicine is evenly distributed.
  • Fatty Meals: While not strictly required for intestinal worms, taking Zentel with a meal containing some fat (like milk or butter) can improve absorption if treating systemic infections.
  • Family Treatment: It is often recommended that the entire household be treated at the same time to prevent re-infection, especially with pinworms.

How to Store and Dispose of Zentel

  • Storage: Store in a cool, dry place below 30°C. Protect from direct sunlight.
  • Disposal: Keep out of reach of children. Return any unused or expired suspension to your pharmacist.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Safety and Precautions

Contraindications and Restrictions

  • Pregnancy: DO NOT USE if you are pregnant or think you might be pregnant. Albendazole is known to be harmful to the developing fetus.
  • Conception: Women of childbearing age should take the dose within the first 7 days of their menstrual cycle or after a negative pregnancy test.
  • Allergy: Do not use if you are allergic to Albendazole or other benzimidazole medicines (like Mebendazole).

Side Effects of Zentel

  • Common: Occasional headache, dizziness, or mild stomach pain/nausea.
  • Rare: Temporary thinning of the hair or a mild skin rash.
  • Action: If you experience high fever or severe abdominal pain, consult your doctor.

Precautions and Warnings

  • Hygiene: To prevent re-infection, wash hands thoroughly after using the bathroom and before meals. Keep fingernails short and change bed linens frequently after treatment.
  • Breastfeeding: Consult your doctor before use if you are nursing.

searchable.name: Vitabiotics Feroglobin Liquid Plus
searchable.brief_info: Vitabiotics Feroglobin Liquid Plus is an advanced, comprehensive liquid formula designed to combat fatigue and support vital blood health and energy release.
searchable.description: Vitabiotics Feroglobin Liquid Plus is supplement goes beyond standard iron formulas by combining a gentle, highly absorbable form of Iron with the essential B vitamins (including Folic Acid and B12), plus a full spectrum of energy-releasing micronutrients, including Siberian Ginseng, Vitamin C, Zinc, and Copper. The "Plus" formulation is particularly beneficial for individuals needing extra vitality support, such as those with busy, active lifestyles, athletes, or during menstruation or pregnancy. Feroglobin Liquid Plus is easy on the stomach, tastes great, and provides the nutritional boost needed to help maintain health, vitality, and optimal performance.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Vitabiotics Feroglobin Liquid Plus

This is an Over-The-Counter (OTC) nutritional supplement.

  • Adults (Men and Women): Take one to two teaspoonfuls (5 mL to 10 mL) daily.
  • During Menstruation or Pregnancy: Take one to two teaspoonfuls (5 mL to 10 mL daily, or as directed by your doctor.
  • Children 3-7 years: Take 1/2 (half) a teaspoonful daily.
  • Children 7-12 years: Take one teaspoonful (5 mL ) daily.

Proper Administration

  • Administration: Take orally, either directly from the spoon or mixed with water or fruit juice.
  • Best Time to Take: Take the liquid after your main meal. Taking it after food minimizes the risk of stomach irritation.
  • Missed Dose Guidance: If you miss a dose, simply take the next dose as usual. Do not take a double dose to make up for a missed one.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Vitabiotics Feroglobin Liquid Plus

  • Known Allergies: Do NOT take if you have a known allergy or hypersensitivity to any of the ingredients, including iron compounds, B vitamins, or Siberian Ginseng.
  • Pre-existing Conditions: Individuals with conditions causing iron overload (e.g., Haemochromatosis) or certain types of anaemia (e.g., pernicious anaemia where B12 is not absorbed) should consult a doctor before use.
  • Thyroid Conditions: Siberian Ginseng may interact with medications for thyroid conditions or high blood pressure. Consult your doctor if you have a pre-existing thyroid condition.

Side Effects of Vitabiotics Feroglobin Liquid Plus

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Blackening of stools (due to unabsorbed iron) and mild constipation or stomach upset. These are generally less common with Ferric Ammonium Citrate compared to other iron salts.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (That May Require Medical Attention): Severe allergic reaction (swelling, difficulty breathing), or severe gastrointestinal discomfort. If you experience unexpected or severe symptoms, stop use immediately and seek medical advice.

Precautions and Warnings of Vitabiotics Feroglobin Liquid Plus

  • Keep Out of Reach of Children: Iron supplements are a leading cause of accidental poisoning in young children. Store the bottle securely out of their sight and reach.
  • Overdose Risk: Do not exceed the recommended dose. Excessive iron intake can be dangerous and lead to iron poisoning.
  • Absorption Interference: Avoid taking the liquid within one hour of consuming tea, coffee, milk, or whole-grain cereals, as these can significantly reduce iron absorption.
  • Diagnosis: If symptoms of fatigue and tiredness persist, consult a doctor to rule out any underlying medical causes other than simple nutritional deficiency.

searchable.name: Aroma Naturals - Aromatherapy Candle
searchable.brief_info: Aroma Naturals is a pioneer in the wellness industry, renowned for creating "original and authentic" aromatherapy candles. These are designed as therapeutic tools to enhance mood and health. They combine 100% pure essential oils with plant-based waxes to create a clean-burning, functional experience.
searchable.description: Aroma Naturals candles are crafted using the "Seed to Wick" philosophy. They feature Soy VegePure®, a proprietary blend of non-GMO soy, vegetable, and food-grade waxes, and use 100% pure essential oils. These candles are designed to provide a "functional" scent—meaning the aroma isn't just for fragrance, but to trigger specific physiological responses like relaxation or increased focus.
searchable.how_to_use:
The First Burn (Crucial) To prevent "tunneling" (where a hole burns down the center, leaving wasted wax on the sides), allow the candle to burn long enough for the entire top surface to melt into a liquid pool. This usually takes 1–3 hours depending on the size.

Proper Maintenance

  • Trim the Wick: Always trim the wick to 1/4 inch (5mm) before every lighting. This prevents black soot and keeps the flame at a safe, steady height.
  • Burn Time: Limit use to 2–4 hours at a time. This prevents the glass from overheating and preserves the delicate essential oils.

Extinguishing: Use a candle snuffer or dip the wick into the wax pool to put out the flame. Avoid blowing it out, as the resulting smoke can overwhelm the natural scent.
searchable.specification:
• Wax Type: Soy VegePure® (Non-GMO Soy & Vegetable blend)
  • Fragrance: 100% Pure Essential Oils (No synthetic fragrances or dyes)
  • Sizes: Travel Tins (approx. 15hr burn), Glass Pillars (approx. 45-70hr burn)
  • Origin: Made in the USA
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications

  • Allergies: While "allergy-friendly," individuals with specific plant sensitivities should check the label (e.g., avoid "Peace" if sensitive to Cinnamon).
  • Asthma: If you have severe respiratory issues, use in a well-ventilated room or consult a doctor.

Precautions

  • Pet Safety: Essential oils are much stronger for animals. Ensure pets can leave the room where the candle is burning. Avoid burning "Vitality" (Peppermint/Eucalyptus) in small spaces with cats.
  • Pregnancy: Certain oils (like Clary Sage or heavy spices) should be used with caution. Consult a healthcare provider before use.

Avoid Skin Contact: Do not use the melted wax as a massage oil unless the specific product is labeled as "skin-safe," as high concentrations of certain essential oils can cause irritation.

searchable.name: Reload Men Formula X 90
searchable.brief_info: Reload Men’s Formula is a scientifically developed, comprehensive multivitamin, multimineral, and antioxidant supplement designed specifically for the unique nutritional needs of the modern man. This 90-tablet pack provides a three-month supply of essential nutrients that support energy production, immune function, heart health, and overall vitality. By bridging nutritional gaps in the daily diet, Reload helps men maintain peak physical and mental performance.
searchable.description: Men have specific physiological requirements, particularly regarding muscle maintenance, prostate health, and energy metabolism. Reload Men’s Formula addresses these needs by combining 24 essential vitamins and minerals with a proprietary blend of botanicals and antioxidants. This formula is designed to be gentle on the stomach while providing high-potency support for a man’s active lifestyle.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage and Administration

  • Adult Men: Take one (1) tablet daily.
  • Method: Swallow the tablet whole with a full glass of water.
  • Timing: It is highly recommended to take your tablet with a meal (ideally breakfast or lunch). This improves the absorption of fat-soluble vitamins and prevents any potential stomach upset.

Proper Usage Tips

  • Consistency: Take your multivitamin at the same time every day to establish a healthy routine.
  • Avoid Caffeine: Try not to take your multivitamin with coffee or tea, as the tannins and caffeine can interfere with the absorption of certain minerals like Calcium and Iron.
  • Hydration: Drink plenty of water throughout the day to help your body process and transport the nutrients.

How to Store and Dispose of Reload

  • Storage: Store in a cool, dry place (below 30°C). Keep the bottle tightly closed when not in use to protect the tablets from moisture and humidity.
  • Disposal: Keep out of reach of children. Dispose of the empty bottle in a plastic recycling bin.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: 90 Tablets.
  • Form: Once-daily Oral Tablet.
  • Manufacturer: Reload Vitamins (USA).
searchable.famasi_advice:
Safety and Precautions

Contraindications and Restrictions

  • Not for Women or Children: This formula is specifically balanced for adult male physiology. Women (especially those pregnant or nursing) should use the specific Reload Women's or Prenatal formulas.
  • Pre-existing Conditions: If you have a history of kidney stones or high iron levels (hemochromatosis), consult your doctor before use.

Side Effects of Reload Men's

  • Common: You may notice your urine turns a bright yellow color. This is perfectly normal and harmless; it is simply your body flushing out excess Vitamin B2 (Riboflavin).
  • Less Common: Mild nausea or a "metallic" taste if taken on an empty stomach.
  • Action: If you experience a persistent skin rash or severe stomach pain, discontinue use and speak with a pharmacist.

Precautions and Warnings

  • Surgery: If you have a scheduled surgery, inform your doctor that you are taking a multivitamin, as some antioxidants can affect blood clotting.
  • Medication Interactions: If you are taking blood thinners (like Warfarin), consult your doctor, as Vitamin K in multivitamins can interfere with the medication's effectiveness.

searchable.name: Piriton Expectorant for children Evans Baroque 100ml
searchable.brief_info: Piriton Expectorant is a specially formulated linctus designed to relieve chesty (productive) coughs and the distressing symptoms of the common cold or upper respiratory allergies in children. By combining an antihistamine with an expectorant, it helps to loosen stubborn phlegm while calming the sneezing and runny nose that often accompany a cough.
searchable.description: Piriton Expectorant is a palatable liquid medication that targets the discomfort of a "wet" cough. Unlike simple cough suppressants, this expectorant formula works to make coughing more productive by thinning bronchial secretions, making it easier for the child to clear mucus from their airways. Simultaneously, the antihistamine component provides relief from allergic triggers and catarrh, helping your child breathe more comfortably and rest better.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Piriton Expectorant Take as directed by the pharmacist or physician.

  • Children 6 to 12 years: 5ml (one teaspoonful) up to 3 or 4 times daily.
  • Children 2 to 6 years: 2.5ml (half a teaspoonful) up to 3 or 4 times daily.
  • Children under 2 years: Not recommended except under strict medical advice.

Proper Administration

  • Administration: Use a calibrated medicine spoon or syringe to ensure an accurate dose.
  • Consistency: Space doses evenly throughout the day.
  • Food Interaction: Can be taken with or without food. Taking it with water can further help thin the mucus.
  • Missed Dose: Give the dose as soon as you remember. If it is almost time for the next dose, skip the missed one. Never double the dose.

How to Store and Dispose of Piriton Expectorant

  • Storage: Store in a cool, dry place below 30°C. Protect from direct sunlight. Keep the bottle tightly closed.
  • Disposal: Keep out of reach of children. Return any unused or expired syrup to a local pharmacy for safe disposal.

Quick Tips for Piriton Expectorant

  • Hydration is Key: Encourage your child to drink plenty of water while taking this medicine; fluids help the expectorant work better at thinning phlegm.
  • Bedtime Use: Be aware that the antihistamine may cause mild drowsiness, which can help a child rest if a cough is keeping them awake at night.
  • Not for Dry Coughs: This is for "wet" coughs. If your child has a dry, hacking cough without mucus, a different formula may be needed.
  • Duration: If the cough persists for more than 5 days or is accompanied by a high fever, consult a pediatrician.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: 100ml Bottle.
  • Form: Oral Linctus (Syrup).
  • Active Ingredients: Chlorpheniramine Maleate and Ammonium Chloride.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Safety and Precautions

Contraindications of Piriton Expectorant

  • Known Allergy: Do NOT use if the child is allergic to Chlorpheniramine, Ammonium Chloride, or any of the inactive ingredients.
  • Specific Conditions: Avoid use in children with narrow-angle glaucoma or certain rare metabolic disorders.
  • MAOIs: Do not give if the child has taken an antidepressant (MAOI) in the last 14 days.

Side Effects of Piriton Expectorant

  • Common Side Effects: Drowsiness, dizziness, dry mouth, or mild blurred vision.
  • Serious but Rare: Allergic reactions (rash/swelling), urinary retention, or excitability (especially in very young children).
  • Action: If the child becomes unusually restless or develops a skin rash, stop use and contact your doctor.

Precautions and Warnings

  • Drowsiness: Warn older children to be careful if riding bicycles or engaging in activities requiring balance, as the medicine can cause "sleepiness."
  • Liver/Kidney Health: Use with caution if the child has pre-existing liver or kidney issues.
  • Other Medications: Do not use with other antihistamines or cold medicines unless advised by a professional.

searchable.name: Immune Booster Vit.C 1000mg
searchable.brief_info: Lignel Healthcare High Strength Immunity Booster Vit.C 1000mg, Vit D3 1000IU, Zinc 15mg & Selenium 40mg Effverscence serves as an immune booster. It helps keep the body healthy and strong.
searchable.description:
Lignel Healthcare High Strength Immunity Booster is a supplement that contains Vitamin C, Vitamin D3, Zinc, and Selenium. Here's a brief overview of each ingredient:

  1. Vitamin C (1000mg): Vitamin C is a water-soluble vitamin known for its antioxidant properties. It is commonly used to support immune system function, promote collagen production, and protect against oxidative stress.
  2. Vitamin D3 (1000IU): Vitamin D3 is a fat-soluble vitamin that plays a crucial role in maintaining bone health and supporting immune function. It helps the body absorb calcium and phosphorus, which are essential for strong bones and teeth.
  3. Zinc (15mg): Zinc is a mineral that is involved in numerous bodily functions, including immune system support, wound healing, and DNA synthesis. It is necessary for the proper functioning of enzymes and plays a vital role in cell division.
  4. Selenium (40mg): Selenium is a trace mineral that acts as an antioxidant and is essential for the proper functioning of the immune system. It plays a role in thyroid hormone metabolism and may have anticancer properties.

Please note that before taking any supplements, it's always a good idea to consult with a healthcare professional to ensure they are suitable for your specific needs and to determine the appropriate dosage.

searchable.name: Nurofen Suspension for Children 100mL
searchable.brief_info: Nurofen Suspension for Children 100mL is a trusted over-the-counter (OTC) medication specifically formulated to provide rapid and effective relief from pain and fever in infants and children.
searchable.description: Nurofen Suspension for Children 100mL with an active ingredient, Ibuprofen, is a non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drug (NSAID) known for its dual action. This product not only reduces fever but also targets the source of pain by reducing inflammation. The pleasant, child-friendly flavor and easy-to-administer liquid suspension format, often accompanied by an oral syringe or measuring spoon, make it easy to give the correct dose. Nurofen Suspension for Children 100mL is effective for up to 8 hours and is a go-to choice for managing common childhood discomforts.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Nurofen Suspension for Children 100mL

This is an Over-The-Counter (OTC) medicine. Dosage depends on the child's weight/age. Always follow the instructions on the package insert (PIL) exactly.

  • Infants (3 to 6 months - typically 5-7 kg): Usually 2.5 mL (50 mg) up to 3 times in 24 hours.
  • Children (6 to 12 months - typically 7-10 kg): Usually 2.5 mL (50 mg) up to 3 to 4 times in 24 hours.
  • Children (1 to 3 years - typically 10-15 kg): Usually 5 mL (100 mg) up to 3 times in 24 hours.

Proper Administration

  • Administration: Shake the bottle thoroughly. Use the provided oral syringe or measuring spoon to measure the exact dose. Administer orally.
  • Best Time to Take: The suspension can be taken on an empty stomach for faster effect, but taking it with or after food is recommended to minimize the chance of stomach upset.
  • Missed Dose Guidance: If a dose is missed, administer the dose as soon as you remember. Ensure there is the minimum required time gap (usually 6-8 hours) before the next dose. Do not give a double dose.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Nurofen Suspension for Children 100mL

  • Known Allergies: Do NOT administer if the child has a known allergy or hypersensitivity to Ibuprofen, aspirin, or any other Non-Steroidal Anti-Inflammatory Drugs (NSAIDs), or any of the inactive ingredients.
  • Asthma: Do not give to children who have experienced asthma, hives (urticaria), or a severe runny nose after taking aspirin or other NSAIDs (NSAID-exacerbated respiratory disease).
  • Gastrointestinal Issues: Children with a history of stomach ulcers, bleeding, or perforation related to previous NSAID use should not take this product.
  • Heart/Kidney/Liver Disease: Use with caution and only under a doctor's supervision if the child has severe heart, kidney, or liver failure.
  • Age/Weight Restriction: Check the packaging for the minimum age and weight threshold for use (usually suitable from 3 to 6 months of age and above).

Side Effects of Nurofen Suspension for Children 100mL

Side effects are uncommon when used as directed, but parents should be aware of potential reactions:

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Mild stomach upset, nausea, vomiting, or indigestion.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (That May Require Medical Attention): Signs of stomach bleeding (black, tarry stools, or vomiting blood), severe allergic reaction (rash, difficulty breathing, swelling of the face/tongue), or signs of kidney problems (decreased urination). If any serious symptoms occur, stop use immediately and seek emergency medical attention.

Precautions and Warnings of Nurofen Suspension for Children 100mL

  • Dosage Accuracy (Crucial): Always measure the dose accurately using the syringe or measuring spoon provided. Dosage is based strictly on the child's weight and/or age.
  • Consult Doctor: Consult a doctor if the child is taking other medications, especially other NSAIDs, anticoagulants (blood thinners), or diuretics. Do not combine with other Ibuprofen or Aspirin products.
  • Duration: Do not use for more than 3 days for fever or pain without consulting a doctor. Prolonged use or high doses can increase the risk of side effects.
  • Dehydration: Be cautious if the child is severely dehydrated, as Ibuprofen may temporarily affect kidney function. Ensure adequate fluid intake.

Shaking: Always shake the bottle well before drawing up the dose.

searchable.name: Revive Beauty Complex
searchable.brief_info: Revive Active Beauty Complex is a scientifically formulated powdered blend trusted to nourish your skin, strengthen your hair and nails, and combat the visible signs of aging from the inside out.
searchable.description: Revive Active Beauty Complex is a premium, daily powdered supplement, often delivered in convenient single-dose sachets (e.g., a 30-day supply). It is specifically developed to compensate for the natural decline in essential skin components like Collagen, Hyaluronic Acid, and Ceramides that occurs with age. The formulation features a light, refreshing orange and pineapple flavour when mixed with water. Unlike topical creams, Revive Active Beauty Complex works systematically, delivering bioavailable nutrients like Marine Collagen Peptides, Phytoceramides, and Biotin deep into the dermis. This holistic approach enhances skin elasticity, tone, and hydration, leading to visibly smoother skin, more lustrous hair, and stronger nails.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Revive Active Beauty Complex

Revive Active Beauty Complex is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) Dietary Supplement.

Take 1 sachet daily, or as directed by a healthcare professional.

Proper Administration

  • Route: Oral powder for solution.
  • How to Take: Empty the entire contents of one sachet into a glass. Add 250-300 mL of water or juice and stir thoroughly until the powder is fully dissolved. Drink immediately.
  • Timing: Best taken on an empty stomach (1 hour before a meal or 2 hours after a meal) to maximize the absorption of the Marine Collagen Peptides.
  • Duration: For visible results, it is recommended to take the supplement daily for a minimum of 8 to 9 weeks.

Missed Dose Guidance

  • If you miss a dose, simply take the sachet as soon as you remember that day, or skip it and take the next scheduled dose the following morning. Do not double the dose.
searchable.specification: The active ingredients include Marine Collagen Peptides (7,000mg), Hyaluronic Acid, Phytoceramides, Biotin, Vitamin C, Vitamin E, Selenium, and Copper. It is supplied as a powder in individual sachets (e.g., 21 or 30 sachets per box). It is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) "Super Supplement" for skin, hair, and nail health.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Revive Active Beauty Complex

Do NOT take Revive Active Beauty Complex if you:

  • Are under 18 years of age.
  • Have a known allergy or hypersensitivity to any of the ingredients, especially Marine Collagen (derived from fish).
  • Have severe kidney or liver disease (consult a specialist first).

Pregnancy & Breastfeeding Warnings

  • Pregnancy: Consult your doctor. If pregnant, lactating, or if you have an underlying medical condition, you should consult your General Practitioner (GP) or specialist before introducing new supplements to your routine.
  • Breastfeeding: Consult your doctor. Use only under medical supervision.

Side Effects of Revive Active Beauty Complex

Side effects are rare when the product is used as directed.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Mild digestive upset, such as temporary bloating, gas, or a slight feeling of fullness, especially when initiating use of high-dose collagen.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (that may require medical attention):
    • Allergic Reactions: Severe rash, hives, swelling, or difficulty breathing (particularly relevant if you have an unmanaged fish allergy).
    • Hypercalcemia: Rare instances of excessive calcium accumulation leading to abnormal heart rhythm (often linked to collagen in rare cases).

What to do if side effects occur:

  • For mild digestive upset, try dissolving the sachet in a larger volume of water.
  • If you experience symptoms of a severe allergic reaction or persistent adverse effects, discontinue use immediately and consult a physician.

Precautions and Warnings of Revive Active Beauty Complex

  • Allergen Warning: This product contains Marine Collagen (FISH) and may be manufactured in a factory that handles other allergens (wheat, egg, peanuts). Individuals with fish allergies must not take this product.
  • Hydration: Ensure adequate water intake throughout the day when consuming this supplement, as hyaluronic acid and collagen work by drawing water into tissues.
  • Medical Conditions: If you have underlying medical conditions (e.g., kidney disease, a history of gout), consult your doctor before using a high-protein/collagen supplement.
  • Diabetics: This product is generally suitable for diabetics as it is sweetened with a natural plant-based sweetener (Steviol Glycosides) and contains no added sugar.

searchable.name: Now Glutathione
searchable.brief_info: Glutathione medication is critical for healthy immune system function, necessary for proper detoxification processes, and supports healthy aging.
searchable.description: Glutathione is a small peptide molecule composed of three amino acids: cysteine, glutamic acid, and glycine. It is produced by every cell of the body, with especially high levels in the liver. Glutathione medication  plays a critical role in maintaining cellular health by directly neutralizing free radicals, as well as by maintaining the activity of vitamins C and E.  Milk thistle extract and alpha lipoic acid are included as complementary ingredients.

searchable.name: DUREX PERFORMA CONDOM x3
searchable.brief_info: Durex Performa is the good choice for longer lasting lovemaking. With Performa condom, you'll have a prolonged erection.
searchable.description:
Durex Performa condoms contain suspending agent benzocaine which effectively prolongs duration of sex for more enjoyment. Benzocaine is a safe chemical approved by state competent body. It is a great help to longer intercourse! And it will not harm your health! It's made of natural latex, does not irritate the skin and is easy and safe to wear. Also, it is pretty thin and will not interrupt your sex. It will prolong the blissful pleasure and bring you satisfaction. This product is specially shaped and transparent with pleasant scent. Every Performa condom has 6 to 8 mg benzocaine. Couples can choose different specifications according to their needs.

Uses of Durex Condoms Durex Condoms are used for:

  • Providing a barrier against sexually transmitted infections (STIs), including HIV.
  • Preventing unintended pregnancies.
  • Enhancing sexual pleasure with various textures and lubricants.
  • Reducing friction and discomfort during intercourse.

Active Ingredients in Durex Condoms Durex Condoms are made of high-quality materials, including:

  • Natural Rubber Latex: Forms a strong yet flexible barrier to prevent fluid exchange.
  • Silicone-based Lubricants: Enhance comfort and reduce friction.
  • Polyisoprene (for Latex-Free Options): A synthetic material designed for those with latex allergies.

Contraindications of Durex Condoms Durex Condoms should NOT be used by individuals who:

  • Have a latex allergy (unless using latex-free variants).
  • Are using oil-based lubricants, as they can degrade latex integrity.
  • Experience irritation or discomfort when using condoms.

Side Effects of Durex Condoms While generally safe, some users may experience:

  • Common: Mild irritation or discomfort.
  • Serious but Rare: Allergic reactions such as rashes, swelling, or difficulty breathing.

What to Do if Side Effects Occur:

  • Discontinue use and switch to a latex-free alternative if irritation occurs.
  • Seek medical attention for severe allergic reactions.

Precautions and Warnings of Durex Condoms

  • Check the expiration date before use.
  • Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight.
  • Do not reuse condoms.
  • Avoid sharp objects when opening the package to prevent damage.
searchable.how_to_use:
How to Use Durex Condoms

  • Proper Application: Open carefully, roll onto an erect penis before intercourse.
  • Best Time to Use: Before any sexual contact.
  • Lubricant Compatibility: Water-based and silicone-based lubricants are safe; avoid oil-based ones.
  • Missed Use Guidance: If a condom breaks or slips, consider emergency contraception and STI testing.

How to Store and Dispose of Durex Condoms

  • Keep in a cool, dry place.
  • Do not store in wallets or pockets for extended periods to avoid damage.
  • Dispose of used condoms in the trash, not in the toilet.

Quick Tips for Durex Condoms

  • Choose the right size for comfort and effectiveness.
  • Use a new condom for each sexual act.
  • Check for any damage before use.
  • Ensure correct application to prevent slippage.
  • Use additional lubrication for enhanced comfort if needed.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Usage Frequency: One condom per sexual encounter.

  • Storage Limit: Follow manufacturer’s shelf-life recommendations.

How Durex Condoms Work Durex Condoms act as a physical barrier, preventing direct contact of bodily fluids to reduce the risk of STIs and pregnancy.

Mode of Action of Durex Condoms

  • Creates a barrier to prevent sperm from reaching the egg.
  • Reduces exposure to infectious agents responsible for STIs.
  • Lubricated variants reduce friction, preventing breakage.

Interactions of Durex Condoms

  • Drug-Drug Interactions: None known.
  • Food Interactions: None.
  • Alcohol and Smoking: No direct impact on effectiveness, but excessive alcohol may increase misuse risk.

Additional Information about Durex Condoms

  • Good to Know: Available in different textures, flavors, and thickness levels.
  • Allergy Information: Latex-free options are available for those with sensitivities.
  • Recommended Frequency of Use: As needed per sexual activity.

Frequently Asked Questions about Durex Condoms

  • How effective are Durex Condoms?
    • When used correctly, they are over 98% effective at preventing pregnancy and STIs.
  • Can I use two condoms at once?
    • No, using two condoms increases the risk of breakage due to friction.
  • Are Durex Condoms safe for oral sex?
    • Yes, but flavored condoms are recommended for a better experience.
  • Can I use Durex Condoms if I have a latex allergy?
    • Yes, latex-free options are available.
  • What should I do if a condom breaks?
    • Stop immediately, consider emergency contraception, and get tested for STIs.
  • Are Durex Condoms reusable?
    • No, they are designed for single use only.

searchable.name: Emzolyn cough syrup for Children
searchable.brief_info: Emzolyn Cough Syrup for Children is a specially formulated pediatric medication designed to relieve dry, irritating coughs and nasal congestion. Produced by Emzor Pharmaceuticals, this syrup combines a gentle antihistamine with a decongestant to help children breathe more easily and sleep better during a cold. Its pleasant flavor and age-appropriate strength make it a trusted choice for managing childhood respiratory discomfort.
searchable.description: Emzolyn for Children is a dual-action liquid formulation that targets both the "tickle" in the throat and the "stuffiness" in the nose. Unlike adult formulas, it is calibrated to be safe for young bodies while effectively reducing the symptoms that cause restlessness during viral infections. By drying up post-nasal drip and shrinking swollen nasal passages, it helps break the cycle of coughing that often worsens at night.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Emzolyn for Children Always follow the age-specific dosage on the label or your doctor's instructions.

  • Children 2 to 5 years: Usually 2.5ml to 5ml, taken 3 to 4 times daily.
  • Children 6 to 12 years: Usually 5ml to 10ml, taken 3 to 4 times daily.
  • Under 2 years: Do not use without direct medical supervision from a pediatrician.
  • Measuring: Always use the provided measuring cup or oral syringe for accuracy.

Proper Administration

  • Timing: Can be taken with or without food.
  • Nighttime Use: Many parents find it most helpful to give a dose 30 minutes before bedtime to help the child sleep through the cough.
  • Duration: Do not use for more than 5 consecutive days. If the cough persists, is accompanied by a high fever, or if a rash develops, consult a doctor.

How to Store and Dispose of Emzolyn

  • Storage: Store in a cool, dry place below 30°C. Keep the bottle tightly closed and away from direct sunlight.
  • Disposal: Keep out of reach of children. Return expired bottles to a pharmacy.

Quick Tips for Parents

  • Hydration: Encourage your child to drink plenty of warm water or broth. This helps naturally soothe the throat and thin any mucus.
  • Humidity: Using a cool-mist humidifier in the child's room can help prevent the throat from drying out at night.
  • Avoid Multi-Dosing: Do not give your child other "cold and flu" medicines at the same time as Emzolyn, as they may contain the same active ingredients, leading to an overdose.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: 100ml Bottle.
  • Manufacturer: Emzor Pharmaceuticals.
  • Form: Oral Syrup.
  • Active Ingredients: Diphenhydramine HCl (plus decongestant/soothing agents).
searchable.famasi_advice:
Safety and Precautions

Contraindications of Emzolyn for Children

  • Asthma: Use with caution if the child has a history of asthma or chronic respiratory issues.
  • Hypersensitivity: Do not use if the child is allergic to Diphenhydramine or other antihistamines.
  • Underlying Conditions: Consult a doctor if the child has heart issues or high blood pressure (rare in children but important).

Side Effects of Emzolyn for Children

  • Common: Drowsiness or sleepiness (most common).
  • Less Common: Dry mouth, blurred vision, or mild stomach upset.
  • Paradoxical Reaction: Occasionally, some children may become hyperactive or "wired" rather than sleepy after taking antihistamines.
  • Action: If the child develops difficulty breathing or a widespread rash, stop use immediately and seek medical care.

Precautions and Warnings

  • Do Not Sedate: Never use this medicine solely to make a child sleep if they do not have a cough or cold.
  • Liver & Kidney: Use with caution in children with known kidney or liver problems.
  • Sugar Content: Be mindful of the sugar content if the child has specific dietary restrictions.

searchable.name: Vitabiotics Feroglobin Capsules
searchable.brief_info: Vitabiotics Feroglobin Capsules are an advanced, gentle iron supplement designed to support the normal formation of red blood cells and hemoglobin while reducing tiredness and fatigue.
searchable.description: Vitabiotics Feroglobin Capsules formula provides an ideal amount of Iron (as Fumarate) alongside essential blood-building co-factors like Folic Acid, Vitamin B12, Zinc, and Copper. A key feature of Feroglobin Capsules is the special slow-release delivery system, which ensures the steady, gradual release of nutrients throughout the day. This unique system prevents the common issue of excess iron settling in the stomach, making the supplement exceptionally gentle and kind on the digestive system. It is the ideal choice for women (especially during menstruation or pregnancy), athletes, and anyone seeking sustained energy and vitality.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Vitabiotics Feroglobin Capsules

This is an Over-The-Counter (OTC) nutritional supplement.

  • Adults (Men and Women): Take one capsule per day.

Proper Administration

  • Administration: Swallow the capsule whole with a glass of water or a cold drink. Do not chew the capsule.
  • Best Time to Take: The capsule must be taken with your main meal (on a full stomach) for optimal absorption and to minimize digestive upset.

Missed Dose Guidance: If you miss a dose, simply take the next capsule as usual with your next main meal. Do not take a double dose.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: Varies (Commonly 30 Capsules)
  • Form: Slow-Release Oral Capsule
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Vitabiotics Feroglobin Capsules

  • Known Allergies: Do NOT take if you have a known allergy or hypersensitivity to any of the ingredients, including iron compounds, B vitamins, or the capsule components (e.g., gelatin).
  • Age Restriction: Not suitable for children. Taking iron in excess can be very harmful to young children.
  • Pre-existing Conditions: Individuals with conditions causing iron overload (e.g., Haemochromatosis) or certain types of anaemia should consult a doctor before use.

Side Effects of Vitabiotics Feroglobin Capsules

Due to the slow-release design, this supplement is generally gentle on the stomach.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Darkening of stools (due to unabsorbed iron) and mild, temporary stomach upset or constipation.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (That May Require Medical Attention): Signs of severe allergic reaction, or severe, persistent gastrointestinal pain. If you experience unexpected or severe symptoms, stop use immediately and seek medical advice.

Precautions and Warnings of Vitabiotics Feroglobin Capsules

  • Keep Out of Reach of Children: Iron supplements are a leading cause of accidental poisoning in young children. Store the capsules securely out of their sight and reach.
  • Overdose Risk: Do not exceed the recommended daily dose of one capsule per day. Excessive iron intake can be dangerous.
  • Absorption Interference: Take the iron supplement at least 3 hours apart from antacids, calcium, copper, or thyroid medications, as these can inhibit iron absorption.
  • Food Interactions: Avoid taking with black tea, coffee, or high-fiber meals, as they can inhibit iron absorption.
  • Diagnosis: If symptoms of fatigue persist, consult a doctor to rule out any underlying medical causes other than simple nutritional deficiency.

searchable.name: Moxie Vitamin C Syrup 100mL
searchable.brief_info: Moxie Vitamin C Syrup for Kids is a vital, water-soluble nutrient and a powerful antioxidant essential for healthy growth, development, and maintenance of the body.
searchable.description: Moxie Vitamin C Syrup for Kids is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) nutritional supplement containing Ascorbic Acid (Vitamin C), presented as a pleasant-tasting syrup. This syrup is specifically formulated for children to ensure they meet their daily requirements, supporting key bodily functions that may be compromised by limited dietary intake or periods of illness.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Moxie Vitamin C Syrup for Kids

Take as directed by the pharmacist or physician. The dosage depends on the child's age and whether it is for prevention or treatment.

  • Children 1–5 years: Typically 2.5 mL daily (or half a teaspoonful).
  • Children 6–10 years: Typically 2.5 mL one to two times daily.
  • Adults and children over 12 years: Consult a physician, but generally a higher daily dose than children.

Proper Administration

  • Administration: Swallow the syrup orally. Use a proper measuring spoon or cup.
  • Best Time to Take It: Can be taken with or without food.
searchable.specification: Pack Size: Moxie Vitamin C Syrup for Kids is typically supplied in a 100 mL bottle.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Moxie Vitamin C Syrup for Kids

Do NOT take Moxie Vitamin C Syrup if you:

  • Drug Allergies: Are hypersensitive or allergic to Ascorbic Acid or any of the syrup's components.
  • Pre-existing Conditions: Have severe kidney disease or kidney stone formation problems (renal oxalate calculi), as high doses of Vitamin C can increase oxalate excretion.
  • Iron Overload: Have iron storage diseases (e.g., hemochromatosis) or severe iron overload, as Vitamin C enhances iron absorption.

Side Effects of Moxie Vitamin C Syrup for Kids

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Gastrointestinal upset, including diarrhea, nausea, stomach cramps, and sometimes heartburn. These effects are usually dose-related.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (Requires Medical Attention):
    • Kidney Stones: Flank pain or other signs of kidney stones.
    • Haemolysis: In patients with G6PD deficiency, high doses may cause destruction of red blood cells.
    • Allergic Reactions: Rash, hives, or swelling.
  • What to do if side effects occur: If severe diarrhea persists, or if you suspect signs of kidney stones or an allergic reaction, discontinue use and seek professional medical assistance.

Precautions and Warnings of Moxie Vitamin C Syrup for Kids

  • Before Starting Moxie Vitamin C: Consult your doctor if the child has G6PD deficiency, severe renal insufficiency, or is taking medications for iron overload.
  • Drug Interactions: Avoid taking high doses concurrently with Aluminum-containing antacids (wait at least 2–4 hours between doses). High doses may also interact with blood thinners (like Warfarin) and certain cancer or HIV treatments.
  • Dosage Limit: Do not exceed the maximum safe intake levels for the child's age (e.g., 400 mg per day for 1–3 years old) unless explicitly directed by a physician for therapeutic purposes.
