searchable.name: Aeroline Salbutamol Inhaler
searchable.brief_info: Aeroline is a rapid-onset bronchodilator inhaler used for the immediate relief of breathing difficulties. Containing Salbutamol (100mcg per puff), it is commonly referred to as a "reliever" inhaler. Aeroline works by quickly opening up the airways in the lungs, making it an essential treatment for individuals managing asthma, bronchitis, or other conditions that cause wheezing and shortness of breath.
searchable.description: Aeroline is a pressurized metered-dose inhaler (pMDI) that delivers medication directly to the lungs. It acts within minutes to relax the muscles in the walls of the small air passages in the lungs. This helps to keep the bronchial tubes open, easing chest tightness and allowing for easier airflow during a sudden flare-up or "asthma attack."
searchable.how_to_use:
Application Instructions

  1. Prepare: Remove the mouthpiece cover and shake the inhaler well.
  2. Exhale: Breathe out as much as is comfortable, away from the inhaler.
  3. Position: Place the mouthpiece in your mouth between your teeth and close your lips around it.
  4. Inhale & Press: Start to breathe in slowly and deeply. Just after starting to breathe in, press the top of the canister to release one puff.
  5. Hold: Remove the inhaler and hold your breath for 10 seconds (or as long as comfortable) to allow the medicine to settle in the lungs.
  6. Wait: If you need a second puff, wait about 30–60 seconds before repeating the steps.

Proper Usage Tips

  • Cleaning: Clean your inhaler once a week. Remove the metal canister and wash the plastic actuator in warm soapy water, rinse, and air dry.
  • Prime Your Inhaler: If the inhaler is new or hasn't been used for 5 days or more, "prime" it by spraying two puffs into the air away from your face.
  • Spacers: If you find it difficult to coordinate breathing and pressing the inhaler, ask your pharmacist about using a spacer device.

How to Store and Dispose of Aeroline

  • Storage: Store in a cool place (below 30°C) away from direct sunlight. Do not freeze.
  • Safety: The canister is pressurized; do not puncture or burn it even when empty.
  • Disposal: Keep out of reach of children. Return finished inhalers to your local pharmacy for safe disposal.
searchable.specification:
• Dose Count: Usually 200 metered doses per canister.
  • Strength: 100mcg per puff.
  • Type: Short-acting Bronchodilator.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Safety and Precautions

Contraindications and Restrictions

  • Allergy: Do not use if you are allergic to Salbutamol.
  • Heart Conditions: Consult your doctor if you have a history of high blood pressure, irregular heartbeats (arrhythmia), or heart disease.

Side Effects of Aeroline

  • Common: A slight tremor (shaky hands), headache, or a fast/pounding heartbeat (palpitations). These usually pass quickly.
  • Action: If you feel a sudden increase in wheezing immediately after use (paradoxical bronchospasm), stop use and seek emergency medical help.

Precautions and Warnings

  • "Reliever" vs. "Preventer": Aeroline only provides temporary relief. If you need to use your reliever inhaler more than three times a week, your asthma may not be well-controlled, and you should see your doctor to discuss a "preventer" (steroid) inhaler.
  • Diabetes/Thyroid: Use with caution if you have an overactive thyroid or diabetes.
  • Pregnancy: Generally considered safe for use during pregnancy when needed, but always keep your doctor informed.

searchable.name: Doppel Herz Aktiv For Joints – 30 Capsules
searchable.brief_info: Doppelherz Aktiv For Joints is a high-quality nutritional supplement formulated to maintain the health, flexibility, and mobility of the musculoskeletal system. Combining essential cartilage building blocks with vital vitamins and trace elements, these capsules are designed for individuals experiencing joint wear and tear, athletes, or those with physically demanding lifestyles. This specialized German formula helps support the natural regeneration of cartilage and protects joint structures from oxidative stress.
searchable.description: Healthy joints and cartilage are essential for an active life. Doppelherz Aktiv For Joints provides a balanced combination of Glucosamine and Chondroitin—two natural components of connective tissue and cartilage—alongside micronutrients that facilitate their absorption and protect the joints. By providing these "biological building blocks," the supplement helps maintain the cushioning effect of the joints, reducing friction and discomfort during movement.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage and Administration

  • Adults: Take 1 to 2 capsules daily (depending on the specific pack instructions or your doctor's advice).
  • Method: Swallow the capsules whole with a full glass of water.
  • Timing: It is best taken during or immediately after a meal to enhance the absorption of the nutrients and minimize any potential stomach sensitivity.

Proper Usage Tips

  • Consistency is Key: Glucosamine and Chondroitin are "slow-acting" supplements. It typically takes 4 to 8 weeks of daily use to feel a significant improvement in joint comfort.
  • Hydration: Ensure you drink enough water throughout the day to help the Chondroitin maintain cartilage hydration.
  • Avoid Heat: Store the capsules in a cool place, as high temperatures can degrade the quality of the Glucosamine.

How to Store and Dispose of Doppelherz Aktiv

  • Storage: Store in a cool, dry place below 25°C. Keep the blister pack inside the box to protect it from light.
  • Disposal: Keep out of reach of children. Dispose of the empty cardboard and foil according to local recycling guidelines.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: 30 Capsules (1-month supply).
  • Form: Oral Capsule.
  • Origin: Made in Germany.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Safety and Precautions

Contraindications and Restrictions

  • Shellfish Allergy: Many Glucosamine supplements are derived from the shells of shellfish. Do not use if you have a known seafood or shellfish allergy.
  • Diabetes: Glucosamine is an amino sugar; individuals with diabetes should monitor their blood glucose levels closely when starting this supplement.
  • Blood Thinners: Consult your doctor if you are taking Warfarin or other anticoagulants, as Glucosamine may increase their effect.

Side Effects of Doppelherz Aktiv

  • Common: Mild gastrointestinal symptoms such as heartburn, bloating, or nausea.
  • Rare: Skin rash or headaches.
  • Action: If you experience any allergic reaction (swelling or itching), stop use immediately and consult a healthcare professional.

Precautions and Warnings

  • Pregnancy & Breastfeeding: Not recommended for pregnant or breastfeeding women unless specifically advised by a doctor.
  • Not a Painkiller: This is a long-term joint support supplement; it is not intended for the immediate relief of acute, severe pain.

searchable.description:
Glucosamine is a component of carbohydrates that the organism does not use as energy, and they become part of the structure of tissues. Thus, it relates to organs such as ligaments, eyes, tendons, nails, skin, bones and heart valves.
Chondroitin is also a natural part of the connective tissues that support the body, as in bones and cartilages. It is essential to the functioning of these organs because it absorbs necessary fluids in tissues and blocks enzymes that can harm. Moreover, Chondroitin is the basis for the formation of new cartilage tissue.
Methyl Sulfonyl Methane (MSM) is an organic source of sulfur, which participates in the production of other vital substances in the body. It is also found in foods such as vegetables and dairy products. MSM supports the body's ability to produce antioxidants and reduce inflammation. It helps get rid of excess calcium, which facilitates the removal of fluid and toxins in cells.

searchable.name: Ascochew  Coloured X100
searchable.brief_info: Ascochew Vitamin C Tablets is a combination of vitamin C and zinc sulfate. Vitamin C is needed for growth, development, and repair of body tissues.
searchable.description: Ascochew Coloured is a high-quality, flavored Vitamin C supplement designed to make daily nutrition enjoyable. These chewable tablets provide a potent dose of Ascorbic Acid, an essential nutrient that the body cannot produce on its own. Trusted by parents and individuals alike, Ascochew Coloured is formulated for rapid absorption and is particularly effective at bolstering the immune system during seasonal changes. Its vibrant color and pleasant taste ensure high compliance, especially for children and adults who have difficulty swallowing traditional capsules.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Ascochew Coloured This is a nutritional supplement. Take as directed by the pharmacist or physician.

  • Adults: Typically 1 to 2 tablets daily.
  • Children (over 6 years): Usually 1 tablet daily or as recommended by a pediatrician.
  • Administration: Thoroughly chew the tablet before swallowing. It can be taken with or without food.

How to Store and Dispose of Ascochew Coloured

  • Storage: Store in a cool, dry place below 30°C. Keep the bottle tightly closed and away from direct moisture, as Vitamin C can degrade in humid conditions.
  • Disposal: Keep out of reach of children. Return expired tablets to a pharmacy for safe disposal.

Quick Tips for Ascochew Coloured

  • Best Time to Take: Take it in the morning to support your immune system throughout the day’s activities.
  • Pair with Iron: If you take an iron supplement, take Ascochew at the same time to maximize iron uptake.
  • Avoid Hot Drinks: Do not take immediately with very hot beverages, as heat can reduce the potency of Vitamin C.
  • Consistency: Take it daily during the "flu season" to maintain a steady defensive barrier.
  • Healthy Habit: Keep the bottle in a visible place (like the breakfast table) to help you remember your daily dose.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: 100 Chewable Tablets.
  • Form: Coloured, Flavored Chewable Tablets.
  • Strength: Usually available in 100mg or 500mg variants (Check specific label).
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Ascochew Coloured

  • Kidney Stones: Use with caution if you have a history of hyperoxaluria or calcium oxalate kidney stones.
  • Hemochromatosis: Individuals with iron-overload disorders should limit high-dose Vitamin C intake.
  • Allergies: Do not use if you are hypersensitive to any of the ingredients, including specific food colorings used in the "coloured" variety.

Side Effects of Ascochew Coloured

  • Common: Mild stomach cramps, nausea, or diarrhea (usually only at very high doses).
  • Rare: Heartburn or headache.
  • Action: If you experience any persistent digestive discomfort, reduce the dosage. In case of a rare allergic reaction (rash or swelling), stop use and consult a healthcare provider.

Precautions and Warnings

  • Dental Health: Because these are chewable and contain mild acidity, it is recommended to rinse your mouth with water after consumption to protect tooth enamel.
  • Diabetes: Check the label for sugar content, as chewable tablets often contain sweeteners.
  • Pregnancy & Breastfeeding: Generally considered safe and beneficial, but always follow the RDA (Recommended Dietary Allowance) unless directed otherwise by your doctor.

searchable.name: Nutrify Effervescent Vitamin C + Zinc
searchable.brief_info: NUTRIFY Effervescent Vitamin C + Zinc is one of the biggest immune system boosters of all.
searchable.description: Nutrify Effervescent Vitamin C + Zinc is a powerful 2-in-1 supplement designed for optimal immune function. Each effervescent tablet delivers a high dose of Vitamin C (typically 1000mg) alongside the essential mineral Zinc, providing synergistic support against common colds and environmental stresses. The effervescent format ensures rapid dissolution and quick absorption, making it an easy, refreshing, and highly effective way to support your daily wellness and maintain peak health.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Nutrify Effervescent Vitamin C + Zinc

Over The Counter (OTC): Adults and children 12 years and over:

  • One tablet daily, dissolved in a glass of water (150ml to 200ml).
  • Proper Administration: Drop one tablet into a glass of plain water. Wait until it is fully dissolved before drinking.
  • Best Time: Can be taken at any time of day, preferably with a meal to enhance absorption.
  • Missed Dose Guidance: If you miss a dose, simply take the next dose as scheduled. Do not double the dose.
searchable.specification:
• Active Ingredients: Vitamin C (e.g., 1000mg), Zinc (e.g., 10mg or 15mg)
  • Pack Size: [Placeholder: Available Pack Sizes, e.g., Tube of 10 or 20 Effervescent Tablets]
  • Storage Temperature: Store below 30 degree C, tightly sealed.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Nutrify Effervescent Vitamin C + Zinc

Do NOT take Nutrify Effervescent Vitamin C + Zinc if you have:

  • Drug Allergies: Known hypersensitivity to Ascorbic Acid, Zinc, or any other ingredient in the product.
  • Pre-existing Medical Conditions: History of kidney stones (renal calculi). High doses of Vitamin C may increase the risk of stones in susceptible individuals.

Side Effects of Nutrify Effervescent Vitamin C + Zinc

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): High doses of Vitamin C may cause mild diarrhea, nausea, or abdominal cramps. High doses of Zinc may cause temporary stomach upset.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects: Large, long-term doses of zinc can interfere with copper absorption.
  • What to do: If symptoms persist or you suspect a serious reaction, discontinue use and consult a healthcare professional.

Precautions and Warnings of Nutrify Effervescent Vitamin C + Zinc

  • Maximum Dose: Do not exceed the maximum recommended daily dose of Nutrify Effervescent Vitamin C + Zinc. Excessive long-term zinc intake can lead to copper deficiency.
  • Storage: Keep the cap tightly sealed to protect the tablets from moisture and humidity.

Before Starting: Consult your doctor if you are on dialysis or have a pre-existing medical condition.

searchable.name: Ulgicid Suspension Mint Flavour
searchable.brief_info: Ulgicid suspension is used for gastric reflux, toxicity, stomach acid, Gastric problems, stomach upset, heart burn and acid related indigestion.
searchable.description: Ulgicid Suspension is a high-performance formula that offers three layers of defense against common stomach and digestive complaints. It doesn't just treat the symptoms; it works in multiple ways to restore comfort. The blend of Aluminium and Magnesium salts provides quick and balanced acid neutralization, while Alginic Acid physically blocks acid reflux. This combined approach makes Ulgicid a comprehensive solution for managing stomach acidity and related discomfort.
searchable.how_to_use:
Proper Usage and Dosing

Ulgicid Suspension is an over-the-counter (OTC) medicine, but it is important to follow dosage instructions.

  • Proper Administration: Shake the bottle thoroughly before pouring the dose. Measure the exact amount using a measuring spoon or cup. Ulgicid is taken orally.
  • Dosage: The recommended dosage for adults is typically 10–20 mL (two to four teaspoonfuls) three or four times daily, or as required.
  • Frequency: Best taken after meals and at bedtime, or whenever symptoms occur. Do not exceed four doses daily unless specifically directed by a doctor.
  • Missed Dose Guidance: Since Ulgicid is an on-demand medication for symptoms, there is no risk in missing a dose. Simply take the next dose when symptoms return.
searchable.specification:
What’s in the Box:

  • 1 × Ulgicid Suspension Bottle (Commonly 200 mL)
  • 1 × Measuring Device (for accurate dosing)
  • 1 × Patient Information Leaflet (PIL)
  • Active Ingredients (per specified volume, e.g., 10 mL):
    • Activated Dimethicone: 125 mg
    • Alginic Acid: 200 mg
    • Dried Aluminium Hydroxide: 25 mg
    • Magnesium Hydroxide: 250 mg
    • Magnesium Trisilicate: 250 mg
  • Product Category: Over-The-Counter (OTC) / Pharmacy Medicine
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications (Usage Restrictions)

Do NOT take Ulgicid Suspension if you have:

  • Allergy: Hypersensitivity or allergy to any of the active or inactive ingredients (e.g., Alginic Acid, Aluminium/Magnesium salts, Dimethicone).
  • Kidney Failure: Severe kidney failure, as the body may struggle to excrete the Magnesium and Aluminium components, leading to potential toxicity.
  • Severely Debilitated Patients: Use should be avoided or closely monitored.
  • Age Restriction: Antacids are generally not recommended for children under 6 years of age unless explicitly instructed by a physician.

Device Function and Maintenance (Side Effects and Precautions)

  • Side Effects:
    • Common Side Effects: Changes in bowel habits. Aluminium tends to cause constipation, while Magnesium tends to cause diarrhea. The balanced formula is designed to minimize these effects, but they can still occur.
    • Serious Side Effects: Rare allergic reactions (rash, swelling, difficulty breathing) or signs of high levels of Aluminium/Magnesium (muscle weakness, confusion). Stop use and consult a doctor immediately.
  • Precautions:
    • Long-Term Use: Do not use for prolonged periods (more than 14 days) or in excessively high doses without medical advice, as this can lead to electrolyte disturbances (e.g., low phosphate levels) or accumulation of Aluminium.
    • Drug Interactions: Always observe the timing rule: take other medicines at least 1 hour before or 4 hours after Ulgicid to prevent reduced absorption of the other drug.
    • Underlying Conditions: If symptoms persist for more than 7 days, if you experience weight loss, or have difficulty swallowing, consult a doctor immediately to rule out a more serious underlying condition.

searchable.name: Imani Double Breast Pump
searchable.brief_info:
The Imani i2 Plus Wearable Breast Pump is designed for the modern, busy mom. 

Experience the next level of comfort and efficiency with this completely Hands-Free Breast Pump that slips right into your bra, offering ultimate discretion and mobility. 

Say goodbye to restrictive wires, tubes, and bulky bottles, and hello to pumping confidently at work, while driving, or simply relaxing at home. The Imani i2 Plus combines hospital-grade performance with unparalleled convenience, making efficient milk expression easier than ever.
searchable.description:
Imani i2 Plus Wearable Breast Pump: Freedom to Pump Anywhere

The primary purpose of the Imani i2 Plus is efficient and discreet milk expression. It is perfect for:

  • Working or On-the-Go Moms: Pump discreetly during commutes, meetings, or while multitasking.
  • Moms Seeking Freedom: Eliminates the need to be "stuck" to a wall outlet, allowing you to move around freely.
  • Increasing Milk Supply: The strong, yet gentle, Hospital-Grade Suction Power ensures efficient breast emptying, which is key to stimulating and maintaining milk supply.

Key Device Features: Unlike medication ingredients, the pump's effectiveness is based on its core features:

  • Hands-Free Design: The all-in-one unit (motor and collection cup) sits inside the bra.
  • Ultra-Silent Motor: Ensures maximum discretion while pumping.
  • Rechargeable Battery: Provides portability with up to 3 sessions per charge.
  • Smart Display (LED): Easily track and control the suction level and session time.

Additional Information:

  • The i2 Plus features two sets of flange sizes (24mm and 21mm insert), helping ensure a comfortable and effective fit right out of the box.


FAQs: 

  • Is the Imani i2 Plus painful? No, the pump uses gentle yet strong suction power designed for comfort and efficient milk flow.

searchable.how_to_use:
Proper Usage and Dosing:

  • Assembly: Assemble the cup and flange, ensuring the duckbill valve is securely in place.
  • Placement: Place the assembled pump and collection cup into your nursing bra, ensuring the nipple is centered in the flange tunnel.
  • Operation: Use the LED display controls to select your desired suction level and start pumping. A session typically lasts 15-25 minutes.
  • Frequency: Use as needed to empty breasts, maintain supply, or relieve engorgement (typically 6-8 times per day).

How to Store and Dispose:

  • Storage: Store the pump motor and dry components in a clean, dry place at room temperature. The rechargeable battery should be kept fully charged when not in use for extended periods.
  • Cleaning: After each use, disassemble the collection cup and wash all parts that contact milk with warm, soapy water. Sterilize regularly. Never immerse the pump motor unit in water.

Quick Tips for Imani i2 Plus:

  • Optimize Suction: Start on a low setting and slowly increase to the maximum comfortable level.
  • Centering: Correct nipple centering is vital for comfort and maximum output.
  • Charge Regularly: Ensure the unit is fully charged before leaving the house.
  • Easy Cleaning: The design has fewer parts, allowing for faster cleaning and sterilization.
searchable.specification:
What’s in the Box:

  • 2 × Imani i2 Plus Pump Motors
  • 2 × Milk Collection Cups (Capacity varies, check manual)
  • 2 × Duckbill Valves
  • 2 × Flanges (24mm size)
  • 2 × Flange Inserts (21mm size)
  • 2 × Charging Cables
  • 1 × User Manual
searchable.famasi_advice:
Usage Restrictions:

  • Flange Size: Incorrect flange size can cause pain and reduce milk output. Consult a lactation specialist if discomfort or low output persists.
  • Motor Unit: Do NOT allow water or milk to enter the motor unit, as this will damage the device and void the warranty.

Device Function and Maintenance:

  • Side Effects: Pumping on excessively high or painful suction settings can cause nipple damage, bruising, or pain. Always use a comfortable setting.
  • Precautions: Only use the official Imani charging cables. Do not use the pump while sleeping or drowsy. If you notice signs of mastitis or infection, consult a healthcare professional immediately.

searchable.brief_info: Dermavia Sun Cream Anti-Blemish. Sunscreen with anti-blemish properties.
searchable.description: Achieve superior protection against harmful sun damage with Dermavia Suncream SPF 50+. Formulated for very high protection, this suncream shields skin from over 98% of UVB rays while also offering robust defense against UVA rays (broad spectrum). Dermavia Suncream SPF 50+ is often dermatologically tested, features a non-greasy or light texture, and is designed to resist water and sweat, making it ideal for daily wear, sensitive skin, and intense sun exposure. Protect your skin’s health and minimize the risks of photo-aging and sunburn with this essential shield.
searchable.how_to_use:
Usage Instructions

General Use (OTC):

  • Application Time: Apply generously 15 to 20 minutes before sun exposure.
  • Proper Administration: Apply a visible layer of Dermavia Suncream SPF 50+ to all exposed skin. Do not forget the ears, back of the neck, and tops of the feet.
  • Best Time: Use daily, regardless of the weather or season, as UVA rays penetrate clouds and glass.
  • Reapplication: Reapply every 2 hours, or more often if swimming, perspiring heavily, or toweling dry.
searchable.specification:
• Product Type: Very High Protection Sunscreen
  • Active Ingredients: UVA and UVB Filters (e.g., Avobenzone, Octocrylene, Zinc Oxide)
  • Pack Size: [Placeholder: Available Tube Sizes, e.g., 50ml or 100ml tube]
  • Storage Temperature: Store below 30 degree C.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Dermavia Suncream SPF 50+

Do NOT use Dermavia Suncream SPF 50+ if you have:

  • Allergies: Known hypersensitivity or allergy to any active UV filter or other ingredients.
  • Severe Skin Wounds: Avoid applying to broken, infected, or severely irritated skin.

Side Effects of Dermavia Suncream SPF 50+

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Temporary white residue on the skin or mild, transient stinging if applied to sensitive areas.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects: Allergic contact dermatitis (rash, persistent itching, swelling) due to sensitivity to specific filters or fragrances.
  • What to do: If a rash, severe itching, or persistent redness occurs, discontinue use and cleanse the area. Consult a dermatologist if symptoms do not improve.

Precautions and Warnings of Dermavia Suncream SPF 50+

  • External Use Only: Strictly for topical use. Do not ingest.
  • Reapplication is Key: Reapplication every 2 hours is essential, or immediately after swimming, heavy sweating, or towel drying.
  • Eye Contact: Avoid contact with eyes. If contact occurs, rinse thoroughly with water.

Quantity: Apply liberally—use approximately a teaspoon for the face, neck, and ears.

searchable.name: Anti-Diarrheal Caplet (Quality Plus)
searchable.brief_info: Anti-Diarrheal Caplet (Quality Plus) for fast and  reliable relief from sudden (acute) diarrhea.
searchable.description: Anti-Diarrheal Caplet contains Loperamide Hydrochloride (2mg), a globally recognized and trusted ingredient that works to restore the natural rhythm of your digestive system. By slowing down the movement of the gut, Anti-Diarrheal Caplet (Quality Plus) effectively reduces the frequency and volume of bowel movements, helping your body absorb fluids and nutrients and providing discreet, dependable relief when you need it most.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Anti-Diarrheal Caplet (Quality Plus)

Over The Counter (OTC): Adults and children 12 years and over:

  • Initial Dose: Two caplets (4mg) taken once.
  • Subsequent Dose: One caplet (2mg) after each loose bowel movement.
  • Maximum Dose: Do not exceed 8mg (4 caplets) in 24 hours.
  • Proper Administration: Swallow the caplet whole with water.
  • Best Time: Take immediately after a loose bowel movement.

Missed Dose Guidance: As this is an 'as needed' medication, simply take the next dose after the next loose stool, ensuring you stick to the maximum 24-hour limit.
searchable.specification:
• Active Ingredient: Loperamide Hydrochloride 2mg
  • Pack Size: [Placeholder: Available Pack Sizes, e.g., Blister packs of 6, 8, or 12 caplets]
  • Storage Temperature: Store below 30°C and protect from moisture.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Anti-Diarrheal Caplet (Quality Plus)

Do NOT take Anti-Diarrheal Caplet (Quality Plus) if you have:

  • Severe Gastrointestinal Conditions: Diarrhea accompanied by blood in the stool or high fever, or severe ulcerative colitis.
  • Infectious Diarrhea: Diarrhea caused by certain bacteria, as slowing the gut may prolong the infection.
  • Drug Allergies: Known allergy to Loperamide or any ingredient in the caplet.
  • Age Restrictions: Not for use in children under 12 years of age unless specifically directed by a doctor.

Side Effects of Anti-Diarrheal Caplet (Quality Plus)

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Constipation (if taken excessively), headache, dizziness, and mild nausea.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects: Severe abdominal pain, signs of intestinal obstruction (severe bloating), or serious heart problems if misused.
  • What to do: If constipation persists or if abdominal pain worsens, stop taking the caplets immediately and consult a doctor. Never exceed the recommended dose.

Precautions and Warnings of Anti-Diarrheal Caplet (Quality Plus)

  • Duration Limit: Do not use for more than 48 hours (2 days). If diarrhea continues, stop use and see your doctor.
  • Hydration: It is crucial to maintain adequate hydration (drinking plenty of fluids or ORS) while taking this medication.

Before Starting: Consult a doctor if you have liver disease.

searchable.name: Oilatum Cream 500 mL
searchable.brief_info: Oilatum Cream is a highly effective emollient formulated to provide intense, long-lasting moisture and protection for very dry, sensitive, and eczema-prone skin. The large 500 mL pump dispenser is ideal for frequent, all-over body application.
searchable.description: Oilatum Cream is a medical-grade emollient designed to deeply hydrate and protect the skin's natural barrier. Formulated with light liquid paraffin, it creates a protective oil layer on the skin's surface that prevents water loss (transepidermal water loss - TEWL). This action helps to soothe itching, reduce redness, and restore the skin’s smoothness and elasticity. Oilatum Cream (500 mL) is hypoallergenic, fragrance-free, and suitable for the entire family, including infants, making it a trusted, gentle choice for the management of conditions like eczema, contact dermatitis, and severe dryness.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Oilatum Cream

This is an Over-The-Counter (OTC) topical emollient.

  • Adults and Children (including infants): Apply to the affected area as often as necessary. Frequent use (e.g., 2–4 times a day) is recommended for best results.

Proper Administration

  • Administration: Apply a generous amount of cream to clean, dry skin. Use the large 500 mL pump bottle for easy access.
  • Application Technique: Massage gently into the skin following the direction of hair growth. For severe eczema, apply frequently throughout the day, particularly after bathing or showering, to trap maximum moisture.

Bathing: Oilatum Cream can also be applied before a bath or shower to protect the skin from the drying effects of water.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Oilatum Cream

  • Known Allergies: Do NOT use if you have a known allergy or hypersensitivity to light liquid paraffin, lanolin, or any other ingredients in the cream.

Side Effects of Oilatum Cream

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Rare): Transient stinging, burning, or redness at the site of application, particularly when applied to severely inflamed or weeping skin.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects: Signs of an allergic reaction (rash, severe redness) indicating intolerance to a component. If irritation is persistent or severe, discontinue use and consult a physician.

Precautions and Warnings of Oilatum Cream

  • Broken Skin: While generally safe, apply emollients with caution to severely broken or weeping skin, and discontinue if irritation occurs.
  • Flammability Risk: THIS IS A CRITICAL WARNING. Fabrics (clothing, bedding, dressings) that have been in contact with this product burn more easily and can be a severe fire hazard. Keep away from fire and flames.

Topical Steroids: If you are also using a prescribed topical steroid (like Diprosalic), apply the steroid cream first, wait 10-15 minutes for absorption, and then apply the Oilatum Cream over the top.

This syrup is trusted by parents and recommended by healthcare professionals for its ability to aid learning, memory retention, and concentration. searchable.name: Ultimate Maca Plus
searchable.brief_info: Ultimate Maca Plus is a premium dietary supplement formulated to support overall vitality, energy balance, and hormonal wellness. With its unique blend of natural extracts and nutrients
searchable.description:
Ultimate Maca Plus is designed to enhance stamina, improve mood, and promote sexual health. Trusted by users looking for a natural boost to their daily energy levels, Ultimate Maca Plus is an ideal addition to a balanced lifestyle. Whether you’re an athlete, a busy professional, or someone experiencing low energy levels, Ultimate Maca Plus offers a natural solution to help you feel your best.

Uses of Ultimate Maca Plus

Ultimate Maca Plus is recommended for individuals seeking to improve overall well-being and energy. Its benefits include:

  • Enhanced Energy & Stamina: Helps combat fatigue and supports sustained physical and mental energy.
  • Hormonal Balance: Aids in regulating hormonal fluctuations, which can improve mood and overall hormonal health.
  • Libido & Sexual Health: Supports natural libido enhancement and sexual wellness.
  • Stress Adaptation: Contains adaptogenic properties that may help the body better cope with stress.
  • General Vitality: Contributes to improved endurance, mental clarity, and overall vitality for a healthier lifestyle.

Doctor-recommended use: While Ultimate Maca Plus is widely used as a natural supplement for energy and vitality, healthcare professionals advise consulting a doctor before starting any new supplement regimen, especially if you have underlying health conditions or are taking other medications.

Active Ingredients in Ultimate Maca Plus

Ultimate Maca Plus harnesses the power of several high-quality natural ingredients, each contributing uniquely to its effectiveness:

  • Maca Root Extract (Lepidium meyenii):
     Known for its adaptogenic properties, Maca Root Extract helps balance hormones, boost energy levels, and enhance endurance. It is traditionally used to improve libido and overall vitality.


  • Tribulus Terrestris Extract:
     Often used to promote natural testosterone production and enhance libido, this extract supports sexual health and athletic performance.


  • Panax Ginseng Extract:
     Recognized for its energy-boosting and stress-reducing properties, Panax Ginseng enhances cognitive function and supports immune health.


  • Vitamin B Complex:
     A blend of essential B vitamins aids in energy metabolism and helps convert food into energy, supporting overall physical and mental well-being.


  • Zinc:
     An essential mineral that supports reproductive health, immune function, and hormonal balance.


Each ingredient in Ultimate Maca Plus works synergistically to promote a well-rounded boost to your health, making it a trusted choice for those seeking natural support for energy, vitality, and hormonal balance.

Contraindications of Ultimate Maca Plus

Before incorporating Ultimate Maca Plus into your routine, please consider the following contraindications:

  • Pre-existing Medical Conditions:
     Individuals with hormone-sensitive conditions (e.g., certain cancers or endocrine disorders) should consult their doctor before use.
  • Pregnancy & Breastfeeding:
     Pregnant or breastfeeding women should seek medical advice prior to using Ultimate Maca Plus.
  • Age Restrictions:
     Ultimate Maca Plus is formulated for adults. Its use in children and adolescents should be under strict medical supervision.
  • Drug Allergies:
     Those allergic to Maca or any other components of Ultimate Maca Plus should avoid this supplement.

Always consult a healthcare professional if you have any concerns regarding pre-existing health conditions or potential allergies.

Side Effects of Ultimate Maca Plus

While Ultimate Maca Plus is crafted from natural ingredients and is generally well-tolerated, some users may experience side effects.

Common Side Effects

  • Mild digestive discomfort (e.g., bloating or stomach upset)
  • Headaches
  • Temporary changes in sleep patterns or slight insomnia
  • Minor mood fluctuations

Serious but Rare Side Effects

  • Allergic reactions (e.g., rash, itching, or swelling)
  • Noticeable hormonal imbalances if the supplement is taken in excessive amounts

What to Do if Side Effects Occur

  • If you experience mild side effects, consider taking the supplement with food or reducing the dosage.
  • For persistent or severe side effects—such as signs of an allergic reaction—discontinue use immediately and consult a healthcare professional.

Precautions and Warnings for Ultimate Maca Plus

To ensure safe use, keep the following precautions in mind:

  • Before Starting:
     Undergo a health check-up, especially if you have underlying conditions. Consultation with a doctor is highly recommended to determine if Ultimate Maca Plus is right for you.


  • During Use:


    • Follow the recommended dosage strictly.
    • Maintain a balanced diet and healthy lifestyle to complement the supplement’s effects.
    • Avoid combining with other hormone-modulating supplements unless advised by your healthcare provider.
  • Long-Term Safety Considerations:


    • Regular monitoring of energy levels and hormonal balance may help determine the ongoing suitability of Ultimate Maca Plus.
    • It is not intended to replace conventional medical treatments for hormonal or metabolic disorders.
searchable.how_to_use:
How to Use Ultimate Maca Plus

For optimal results, adhere to these usage instructions:

  • Administration:
     Ultimate Maca Plus is intended for oral consumption. It typically comes in capsule or tablet form.


  • Dosage Instructions:


    • Standard Dose: Take 1-2 capsules daily with a full glass of water, or as directed by your healthcare provider.
    • Best Time to Take: Morning is generally recommended to help boost energy throughout the day.
    • Food/Drink Interactions:
       It is advisable to take Ultimate Maca Plus with food to minimize potential digestive discomfort.
    • Missed Dose Guidance:
       If you miss a dose, take it as soon as you remember. If it is close to your next scheduled dose, skip the missed one and resume your regular schedule. Do not double the dose.
searchable.famasi_advice:
How to Store and Dispose of Ultimate Maca Plus

Proper storage and disposal help maintain product quality and ensure safety:

  • Storage:


    • Store Ultimate Maca Plus at room temperature (15-30°C/59-86°F) in a cool, dry place.
    • Protect from direct sunlight and moisture.
    • Keep the product out of reach of children.
  • Disposal:


    • Unused or expired supplements should be disposed of according to local guidelines.
    • Consult your pharmacist or local waste management service for the proper disposal of dietary supplements.

Quick Tips for Ultimate Maca Plus

Here are some quick pointers to maximize the benefits of Ultimate Maca Plus:

  • Take Ultimate Maca Plus at the same time each day for consistent results.
  • Combine with a balanced diet rich in fruits, vegetables, and whole grains.
  • Avoid exceeding the recommended dosage to prevent potential side effects.
  • Stay well-hydrated to aid in the supplement's absorption.
  • Consult with your healthcare provider if you experience any unusual symptoms.

Dosage of Ultimate Maca Plus

Proper dosage is key to achieving the desired benefits safely:

  • Adults:
     The typical recommendation is 1-2 capsules daily.
  • Children:
     Use in children or adolescents only under strict medical supervision.
  • Initial vs. Maintenance Dose:
     Begin with the standard dose as advised and adjust based on individual tolerance and doctor’s guidance.
  • Maximum Daily Limit:
     Do not exceed the recommended dosage as stated on the product label or by your healthcare provider.

How Ultimate Maca Plus Works

Ultimate Maca Plus operates through a multifaceted mechanism that supports your overall well-being:

  • Hormonal Regulation:
     Maca Root Extract works as an adaptogen, helping to balance hormones and mitigate the effects of stress on the endocrine system.
  • Energy Metabolism:
     The combination of active ingredients aids in the efficient metabolism of nutrients, providing a natural energy boost throughout the day.
  • Enhanced Circulation & Libido:
     Extracts such as Tribulus Terrestris and Panax Ginseng support natural testosterone production and enhance blood flow, contributing to improved sexual health and physical performance.

Mode of Action of Ultimate Maca Plus

A closer look at how Ultimate Maca Plus interacts with your body:

  • Adaptogenic Effects:
     The adaptogenic properties of Maca and Ginseng help your body cope with physical and mental stress by modulating hormone levels and supporting adrenal function.


  • Synergistic Support:
     The combination of natural extracts works synergistically to optimize energy production, support reproductive health, and enhance overall vitality. This synergy helps ensure that no single pathway is overburdened, promoting balanced health.


  • Nutrient Synergy:
     The inclusion of Vitamin B Complex and Zinc supports metabolic processes and immune function, ensuring that energy and hormonal balance are maintained naturally.


Interactions of Ultimate Maca Plus

Understanding potential interactions is essential for safe use:

  • Drug-Drug Interactions:
    • If you are taking medications for hormone-related conditions, blood pressure, or mood disorders, consult your healthcare provider before starting Ultimate Maca Plus.
  • Food Interactions:
    • While there are no major food interactions, taking the supplement with a balanced meal may enhance its absorption and reduce digestive discomfort.
  • Alcohol and Smoking Considerations:
    • Excessive alcohol consumption or smoking may interfere with the supplement’s metabolism. Moderate consumption is advised.

Additional Information about Ultimate Maca Plus

Here are some extra details and tips that may be useful:

  • Good to Know:
     Ultimate Maca Plus is a natural supplement designed to complement a healthy lifestyle—it is not a substitute for a balanced diet or professional medical treatment.

  • Recommended Frequency of Use:

Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs) about Ultimate Maca Plus

  1. How long does Ultimate Maca Plus take to work?
     Answer: Results may vary; many users report noticeable energy and mood improvements within a few weeks of daily use, though full benefits might take up to 4-6 weeks.


  2. Can I take Ultimate Maca Plus with my current medications?
     Answer: If you are on any medications—especially those affecting hormones or blood pressure—please consult your healthcare provider to ensure there are no interactions.


  3. Is Ultimate Maca Plus safe for long-term use?
     Answer: Ultimate Maca Plus is generally safe when taken as directed. However, long-term use should be monitored by a healthcare professional to ensure ongoing suitability.


  4. Can pregnant or breastfeeding women use Ultimate Maca Plus?
     Answer: It is advised that pregnant or breastfeeding women consult a doctor before using Ultimate Maca Plus due to potential hormonal effects.


  5. What should I do if I miss a dose?
     Answer: Take the missed dose as soon as you remember. If it’s nearly time for your next dose, skip the missed dose—do not double up.


  6. Are there any natural alternatives to Ultimate Maca Plus?
     Answer: While other natural supplements may offer similar benefits (such as ashwagandha or rhodiola), Ultimate Maca Plus is uniquely formulated with a synergistic blend of ingredients designed for overall vitality. Always consult a healthcare provider for personalized recommendations.


  7. What is the best time of day to take Ultimate Maca Plus?

  8. Does Ultimate Maca Plus contain any allergens?

searchable.how_to_use:
How to Use

Proper Usage and Dosing:

  • Assembly: Assemble the cup and flange, ensuring the duckbill valve is securely in place.
  • Placement: Place the assembled pump and collection cup into your nursing bra, ensuring the nipple is centered in the flange tunnel.
  • Operation: Use the LED display controls to select your desired suction level and start pumping. A session typically lasts 15-25 minutes.
  • Frequency: Use as needed to empty breasts, maintain supply, or relieve engorgement (typically 6-8 times per day).

How to Store and Dispose:

  • Storage: Store the pump motor and dry components in a clean, dry place at room temperature. The rechargeable battery should be kept fully charged when not in use for extended periods.
  • Cleaning: After each use, disassemble the collection cup and wash all parts that contact milk with warm, soapy water. Sterilize regularly. Never immerse the pump motor unit in water.

Quick Tips for Imani i2 Plus:

  • Optimize Suction: Start on a low setting and slowly increase to the maximum comfortable level.

searchable.name: Neurozan Original
searchable.brief_info: Neurozan Original is a specialized, high-potency micronutrient supplement from Vitabiotics, designed to support optimal brain health and cognitive function. This advanced formula combines a comprehensive range of vitamins, minerals, and bio-active nutrients that cross the blood-brain barrier to nourish neurons. Neurozan is ideal for students, professionals, and the elderly who wish to maintain concentration, mental clarity, and long-term cognitive resilience during times of high mental demand.
searchable.description: The brain requires specific, high-quality nutrients to function at its peak. Neurozan Original delivers an all-in-one solution that replaces the need for a general multivitamin by focusing on the unique needs of the central nervous system. It provides the building blocks for neurotransmitter synthesis and protects brain cells from the oxidative stress associated with aging and mental fatigue.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage and Administration

  • Adults: Take one (1) tablet daily.
  • Method: Swallow the tablet whole with a glass of water or a cold drink. Do not chew.
  • Timing: It is essential to take Neurozan with your main meal (such as lunch or dinner). This maximizes the absorption of the fat-soluble nutrients and minimizes any potential stomach sensitivity.

Proper Usage Tips

  • Consistency: Cognitive benefits are cumulative. For optimal results, take Neurozan consistently for at least 4 to 8 weeks.
  • Hydration: Since the brain is roughly 75% water, ensure you drink at least 2 liters of water daily to maintain cognitive speed.
  • Full Stomach: Never take Neurozan on an empty stomach; the high-potency minerals and botanical extracts are best tolerated alongside food.

How to Store and Dispose of Neurozan

  • Storage: Store in a cool, dry place below 25°C. Keep the tablets in the blister pack until you are ready to use them to protect against moisture.
  • Disposal: Keep out of reach of children. Dispose of empty cardboard packaging in your local recycling bin.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Safety and Precautions

Contraindications and Restrictions

  • Allergy Information: Contains Soya. Do not use if you have a known soy allergy.
  • Surgery: If you have a scheduled surgery, stop taking Neurozan 2 weeks prior, as Ginkgo Biloba can affect blood clotting.
  • Epilepsy: Consult your doctor before use if you suffer from epilepsy, as some ingredients may affect seizure thresholds.

Side Effects of Neurozan

  • Common: Mild nausea if taken on an empty stomach.
  • Note: The product contains Iron, which may cause a harmless darkening of the stool.
  • Action: If you experience a persistent headache or skin rash, stop use and consult your healthcare provider.

Precautions and Warnings

  • No Multi-Vitamins: This formula is very comprehensive. Do not take an additional multivitamin alongside it.
  • Blood Thinners: If you are taking anticoagulants (like Warfarin), speak to your doctor first, as Ginkgo may slightly increase the risk of bruising.
  • Pregnancy: Not recommended for pregnant or breastfeeding women. We recommend Pregnacare products for that stage.

What sets UNCOVER Aloe Invincible Sunscreen apart is its fast-absorbing, non-comedogenic formula that suits all skin types, including sensitive and acne-prone skin. Whether you’re out in the sun or working indoors near screens, this sunscreen shields your skin with an invisible, non-greasy finish, making it a trusted choice for everyday sun protection.


Uses of UNCOVER Aloe Invincible Sunscreen

UNCOVER Aloe Invincible Sunscreen is primarily used to:

  • Protect against UV radiation (both UVA and UVB)


  • Prevent sunburn


  • Minimize risk of skin cancer and photoaging


  • Prevent hyperpigmentation and dark spots


  • Protect sensitive skin after skincare treatments (like exfoliation or peels)


Off-label/Additional Benefits

  • Helps soothe irritated skin due to aloe vera


  • Aids in maintaining even skin tone


  • Can be used as a daily moisturizer for oily skin types


Active Ingredients in UNCOVER Aloe Invincible Sunscreen

  • This Aloe Invisible Sunscreen is infused SPF 50+, Aloe Vera and Hyaluronic Acid which work together to give hydrate and protect the skin from harmful UVA and UVB rays.
    • SPF 50+ – Sun Protection Factor of 50+ gives high level of protection from UV rays. Helps prevent sun damage, premature ageing, sunspots, and hyperpigmentation.
    • Hyaluronic Acid – Extremely hydrating ingredient. Increases water content of skin by binding to water molecules, reduces the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles. Plumps skin and increases skin elasticity.
    • Aloe Vera – Hydrates, cools, and soothes the skin with its anti-inflammatory properties.

Each ingredient in UNCOVER Aloe Invincible Sunscreen plays a critical role in ensuring the product is not only protective but also skin-repairing and calming.


Contraindications of UNCOVER Aloe Invincible Sunscreen

Do not use UNCOVER Aloe Invincible Sunscreen if:

  • You are allergic to any of the ingredients (e.g., aloe vera or chemical UV filters)


  • You have a history of severe skin allergies or contact dermatitis from sunscreens


  • You are under 6 months old (consult a pediatrician first)


Pregnancy & Breastfeeding

Generally considered safe. However, consult a dermatologist if you have specific skin concerns during pregnancy.


Side Effects of UNCOVER Aloe Invincible Sunscreen

Common Side Effects:

  • Mild stinging or tingling upon application (especially on broken skin)


  • Temporary skin dryness or tightness


  • Minor breakouts (rare)


Rare but Serious Side Effects:

  • Severe allergic reaction (rash, itching/swelling, dizziness)


  • Eye irritation (if applied too close to the eye area)


If side effects occur: Rinse thoroughly with water and discontinue use. Seek medical attention for persistent or severe reactions.


Precautions and Warnings of UNCOVER Aloe Invincible Sunscreen

Before use:

  • Conduct a patch test if you have sensitive or reactive skin


  • Consult a dermatologist if you are currently undergoing skin treatments


During use:

  • Avoid direct contact with eyes


  • Reapply every 2 hours if exposed to sun, or after sweating/swimming


  • Use a generous amount for adequate protection


Long-term use:

  • Suitable for daily use and safe for long-term application


  • Regular use supports skin health and prevents UV-induced skin aging

searchable.name: BAOBAB GLOW-C SERUM
searchable.brief_info: Baobab Glow-C Serum is a potent, vitamin C-enriched serum formulated to brighten the skin, fade dark spots, and deliver deep hydration for a radiant, even-toned complexion. searchable.description:
infused with super ingredients to give you ‘The Glow-C Effect’. Powered by 8% Vitamin C, 2% Arbutin and African Baobab to visibly brighten and even the skin tone. Leaves skin feeling healthy, protected and nourished.

Baobab Glow-C Serum is a potent, vitamin C-enriched serum formulated to brighten the skin, fade dark spots, and deliver deep hydration for a radiant, even-toned complexion. Infused with antioxidant-rich baobab extract, this lightweight yet powerful serum boosts collagen production, enhances skin elasticity, and protects against environmental stressors that accelerate aging.

Ideal for all skin types, including sensitive and acne-prone skin, Baobab Glow-C Serum absorbs quickly without clogging pores, leaving your skin soft, smooth, and visibly glowing. Whether you're targeting hyperpigmentation, dullness, or uneven skin tone, this serum is your go-to solution for a healthy, youthful glow.

Uses of Baobab Glow-C Serum

Baobab Glow-C Serum is used to:

  • Brighten dull and uneven skin tone
  • Fade dark spots, hyperpigmentation, and acne scars
  • Promote collagen synthesis for firmer skin
  • Provide antioxidant protection against pollution and UV damage
  • Improve skin texture and radiance


Additional Benefits:

  • Helps reduce inflammation and redness
  • Supports skin barrier repair and hydration
  • Can be used under makeup or sunscreen for a dewy finish

Active Ingredients in Baobab Glow-C Serum

  • Baobab Extract (Adansonia digitata)
     Rich in vitamins A, C, D, E, and omega-3 fatty acids. It nourishes and rejuvenates the skin while providing antioxidant and anti-inflammatory benefits.


  • Vitamin C (Sodium Ascorbyl Phosphate)
     A stable, non-irritating form of Vitamin C that brightens skin, reduces dark spots, and boosts collagen production.


  • Niacinamide (Vitamin B3)
     Reduces the appearance of enlarged pores, evens out skin tone, and improves skin barrier function.


  • Hyaluronic Acid
     Deeply hydrates the skin by attracting moisture, plumping fine lines and enhancing skin smoothness.


Together, these ingredients make Baobab Glow-C Serum a powerhouse for skin rejuvenation and protection.

Contraindications of Baobab Glow-C Serum

Do not use Baobab Glow-C Serum if:

  • You are allergic to any of its ingredients


  • You have recently undergone intense skin treatments (e.g., chemical peels, microneedling) unless cleared by a dermatologist


  • You are using prescription-strength retinoids or exfoliants that may increase sensitivity


Pregnancy & Breastfeeding

Generally safe for use during pregnancy and breastfeeding. However, consult a healthcare provider before introducing new skincare during these periods.


Side Effects of Baobab Glow-C Serum

Common Side Effects:

  • Mild tingling or warmth during first few applications


  • Temporary redness if applied on freshly exfoliated skin


Rare but Serious Side Effects:

  • Skin irritation or allergic rash


  • Increased sensitivity to sun if not followed with sunscreen


If side effects occur: Discontinue use and consult a dermatologist.


Precautions and Warnings of Baobab Glow-C Serum

Before use:

  • Conduct a patch test on the inside of your arm before applying to your face


  • Avoid use on broken or inflamed skin


During use:

  • Always follow with a broad-spectrum SPF during the day


  • Avoid combining immediately with exfoliating acids (AHAs/BHAs) or retinol unless part of a professionally recommended routine


Long-term use:

  • Safe and effective for daily application
  • Supports long-term skin brightness and resilience

searchable.how_to_use:
How to Use Baobab Glow-C Serum

  • Application: Apply 2–3 drops to clean, dry face and neck using fingertips
  • Frequency: Use once or twice daily (AM and/or PM)
  • Sequence: Use after cleansing and toning, before moisturizer
  • Sun Exposure: Must follow with sunscreen in the morning to prevent sun sensitivity
  • Maximum: Do not exceed two full applications per day


How to Store and Dispose of Baobab Glow-C Serum

  • Storage:
    • Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight
    • Keep bottle tightly closed to prevent oxidation

  • Disposal:
    • Dispose of bottle in accordance with local recycling guideline
    • Do not pour serum down the drain
searchable.famasi_advice:
Quick Tips for Baobab Glow-C Serum

  •  Use in the morning with sunscreen for optimal results
    Combine with hyaluronic acid or moisturizer to lock in hydration
  • Avoid mixing with AHAs/BHAs during the same routine if irritation occurs
  • Night use enhances overnight skin repair
  • Consistent use leads to visible improvement in 2–4 weeks
  • Store in a cool spot to prolong product stability
  • Great to use before makeup for a smooth, glowing base

How Baobab Glow-C Serum Works

Baobab Glow-C Serum combines stable vitamin C with baobab and niacinamide to combat dullness and uneven tone. Vitamin C blocks melanin formation and promotes collagen, while baobab calms inflammation and hydrates the skin, resulting in brighter and smoother skin over time.


Mode of Action of Baobab Glow-C Serum

Vitamin C (sodium ascorbyl phosphate) inhibits tyrosinase, an enzyme involved in melanin synthesis. Niacinamide strengthens the skin barrier and reduces inflammation. Baobab extract delivers essential fatty acids and antioxidants, neutralizing free radicals and protecting skin cells. The serum penetrates the upper dermis, stimulating collagen and elastin synthesis while improving moisture retention.




Interactions of Baobab Glow-C Serum

  • Drug Interactions: None when used topically


  • Skincare Interactions:
    • Do not use simultaneously with high-strength AHAs/BHAs or retinoids without dermatologist guidance
    • Food & Beverage: Not applicable
    • Alcohol & Smoking: Smoking reduces antioxidant effects; serum still safe to use

Additional Information about Baobab Glow-C Serum

  • Good to Know: Non-comedogenic, cruelty-free, and fragrance-free
  • Allergy Info: Free from parabens, sulfates, and artificial dyes

Conditions It Helps With:

  • Hyperpigmentation
  • Post-acne marks
  • Sun spots
  • Dehydrated, dull skin

Recommended Frequency: Daily, preferably once in the morning and optionally at night



Frequently Asked Questions about Baobab Glow-C Serum

1. How long does Baobab Glow-C Serum take to work?
 Visible improvements in skin tone and texture typically appear within 2–4 weeks.

2. Can I use Baobab Glow-C Serum with other serums?
 Yes, but avoid layering with strong acids or retinol unless under professional guidance.

3. Is it safe for acne-prone skin?
 Yes. The non-comedogenic formula and anti-inflammatory ingredients make it suitable for acne-prone skin.

4. Should I apply it in the morning or night?
 You can use it in both routines. Just be sure to apply sunscreen during the day.

5. Can pregnant or breastfeeding women use it?
 Generally safe, but consult a doctor before starting new skincare during pregnancy.

6. What should I do if I miss a day of use?
 Just continue with your regular routine the next day. No need to double the dose.

7. Will this make my skin photosensitive?
 Vitamin C can increase sensitivity slightly, so always wear SPF during the day.

8. Can I use it under makeup?
 Yes. It creates a smooth base and adds a natural glow to the skin.

searchable.name: Shaltoux Chesty Cough Syrup 100ml
searchable.brief_info: SHALTOUX CHESTY COUGH SYRUP 100ML is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) combination medication designed for the relief of productive, or "chesty," coughs associated with respiratory conditions.
searchable.description: SHALTOUX CHESTY COUGH SYRUP 100ML is specifically formulated with four active ingredients to provide relief through multiple pathways: opening the airways, liquefying thick mucus, aiding in phlegm expulsion, and soothing the throat. SHALTOUX CHESTY COUGH SYRUP is generally used to manage symptoms where excess, sticky mucus is causing a rattling cough, wheezing, and chest tightness.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of SHALTOUX CHESTY COUGH SYRUP

Take as directed by the pharmacist or physician. The dosage is based on age and should be measured accurately (1 teaspoonful approxmatiely 5 mL; 1 tablespoon 15 mL.

  • Adults and pediatric patients over 12 years of age: The usual starting dose is 1 tablespoonful (15 mL) three times a day.
  • Pediatric patients 6 to 12 years of age: The usual starting dose is 1 teaspoonful (5 mL) three times a day.
  • Pediatric patients 2 to 6 years of age: Dosing should be initiated at Salbutamol 0.1 mg/kg of body weight three times a day, not exceeding 2 mg of Salbutamol per dose. Consult a doctor.

Proper Administration

  • Administration: Swallow the syrup orally.
  • Best Time to Take It: Can be taken with or without food. Spread doses evenly throughout the day.
  • Common Mistake to Avoid: Do not take more frequently than the prescribed or recommended interval to avoid excessive Salbutamol intake.
searchable.specification: Pack Size: SHALTOUX CHESTY COUGH SYRUP is supplied in a 100 mL bottle.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Side Effects of SHALTOUX CHESTY COUGH SYRUP

Side effects are generally related to the bronchodilator component (Salbutamol).

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Nervousness, shakiness, fine muscle tremor (especially in the hands), headache, dizziness, nausea, and vomiting. These are usually mild and subside with continued use.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (Requires Medical Attention): Palpitations (fast, pounding, or irregular heartbeat), sudden chest pain, severe skin rash, or signs of a serious allergic reaction (swelling, difficulty breathing).
  • What to do if side effects occur: If you experience severe chest pain, severe palpitations, or any sign of an allergic reaction, stop taking the syrup and seek immediate medical attention.

Precautions and Warnings of SHALTOUX CHESTY COUGH SYRUP

  • Before Starting SHALTOUX: Inform your doctor if you have hyperthyroidism (overactive thyroid), diabetes mellitus, cardiovascular problems (including angina or high blood pressure), or if you are taking monoamine oxidase inhibitors (MAOIs) or tricyclic antidepressants.
  • During Use: Avoid combining this product with other medications containing similar ingredients (bronchodilators, cough suppressants, or expectorants) to prevent accidental overdose.
  • Driving/Operating Machinery: Side effects like dizziness, nervousness, or tremor may impair the ability to drive or operate machinery. Exercise caution.

Use a small amount as required for desired lubrication.

Proper Administration

searchable.specification: The product is a water-based intimate lubricant containing Propylene Glycol and Glycerin. It is supplied as a light, smooth gel in a 50mL bottle. It is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) Cosmetic/Intimate Health Product.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Durex Play Feel Lube 50mL

Do NOT use Durex Play Feel Lube 50mL if you:

  • Have a known allergy or hypersensitivity to any of the ingredients, particularly Propylene Glycol or Glycerin.
  • Have broken skin or wounds in the intimate area, as the lubricant may cause slight, temporary irritation.

Pregnancy & Breastfeeding Warnings

  • Pregnancy and Breastfeeding: Consult your doctor. The lubricant is generally safe for external use. If you experience irritation, discontinue use and seek professional advice.
  • Fertility Note: This lubricant is NOT a contraceptive and does NOT contain spermicide. Durex Play lubricants may slow sperm down; if you are actively trying to conceive, consult a healthcare provider for fertility-friendly lubricant options.

Side Effects of Durex Play Feel Lube 50mL

Side effects are rare when used as directed.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): None typically expected.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (that may require medical attention):
    • Severe Irritation: Persistent burning, redness, or itching that does not resolve after rinsing.
    • Allergic Reactions: Local swelling or rash.
    • Yeast Infection: Rare instances of irritation that might resemble a yeast infection in sensitive individuals (due to Glycerin).

What to do if side effects occur:

  • If you experience any intense or persistent burning or irritation, stop use immediately and rinse the area thoroughly with clean water.
  • If irritation continues, consult a physician.

Precautions and Warnings of Durex Play Feel Lube 50mL

  • External Use Only: This product is for external intimate use only.
  • Not a Contraceptive: This lubricant does not offer protection against pregnancy or sexually transmitted infections (STIs).
  • Avoid Broken Skin: Avoid contact with eyes, broken skin, or wounds.
  • Use Within Timeframe: Use the product within three months of opening the bottle to ensure hygiene and efficacy.

searchable.brief_info: Night Nurse Liquid is a specific, potent, multi-ingredient cold and flu remedy formulated exclusively to be taken at bedtime. It combines a painkiller, a cough suppressant, and a sedating antihistamine to provide comprehensive relief from symptoms, ensuring a restful night's sleep.
searchable.description: Night Nurse Liquid is a powerful, specialized oral solution designed to provide targeted relief from the symptoms of cold, flu, and chills, allowing the user to sleep through the night undisturbed. Unlike non-drowsy daytime formulations, this medicine contains a high-strength combination of a paracetamol for pain and fever, a sedating antihistamine to treat nasal congestion and sneezing, and a cough suppressant to control dry or tickly coughs. By effectively treating multiple symptoms and aiding sleep, Night Nurse Liquid promotes rest, which is crucial for a speedy recovery.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Night Nurse Liquid

This is an Over-The-Counter (OTC) medicine.

  • Adults and Children aged 16 years and over: Fill the measure cup to the 20 ml mark and take one 20 ml dose at bedtime.

Proper Administration

  • Administration: For oral use only. Measure the dose precisely using the cup provided.
  • Frequency: Take only one dose in 24 hours. DO NOT repeat the dose.
  • Timing: Take the medicine just before going to bed. Ensure you allow for 7–8 hours of undisturbed sleep afterward.

Children: Do not give to children under 16 years of age except on the advice of a physician.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: Varies (e.g., 160 ml or 200 ml bottle)
  • Form: Oral Solution
  • Active Ingredients (per 20 ml dose): Paracetamol 1000 mg, Promethazine HCl 20 mg, Dextromethorphan HBr 15 mg.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Night Nurse Liquid

  • Known Allergies: Do NOT take if you have a known allergy to paracetamol, promethazine, dextromethorphan, or any other components.
  • Respiratory Conditions: Do NOT use for productive (chesty) coughs or if you have severe lung disease (e.g., acute asthma attack, Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease - COPD).
  • MAOIs: Do NOT take if you are currently taking or have taken a Monoamine Oxidase Inhibitor (MAOI) antidepressant in the last two weeks, as this combination can cause severe, dangerous reactions.
  • Liver Disease: Do NOT take if you have severe liver or kidney problems.

Side Effects of Night Nurse Liquid

  • Common Side Effects (Expected): Drowsiness, dizziness, blurred vision, dry mouth, and confusion (especially in the elderly).
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (That May Require Medical Attention): Hallucinations, difficulty urinating, difficulty breathing, or severe allergic reaction. Seek medical help immediately in case of overdose, even if you feel fine, due to the risk of delayed, fatal liver damage.

Precautions and Warnings of Night Nurse Liquid

  • Liver Damage Risk: The 1000 mg dose of paracetamol is high. Do not exceed the one-dose limit in 24 hours.
  • Chronic Cough: If the cough is chronic (e.g., from smoking or asthma), consult a doctor before use.
  • Elderly Caution: Elderly patients are more susceptible to side effects, including confusion and increased risk of falls.

Pregnancy & Breastfeeding: Consult your doctor or pharmacist before taking this medicine if you are pregnant or breastfeeding.

searchable.name: Bronquidiazina CR Suspension
searchable.brief_info: Bronquidiazina CR provides both powerful antibacterial action and a strong mucolytic/expectorant effect.
searchable.description: The Bronquidiazina CR oral suspension is designed to address the dual challenge of respiratory infections: the bacterial cause and the build-up of thick secretions. It delivers a proven combination of antibiotics (Co-trimoxazole) to tackle the underlying bacterial source, paired with a potent mucolytic (Bromhexine) to make breathing easier. This dual action makes Bronquidiazina CR a highly efficient and complete treatment choice recommended by healthcare professionals.
searchable.how_to_use:
Bronquidiazina CR is a Prescription-Only Medicine (POM).

  • Proper Administration: Shake the bottle well before each use. Measure the exact dose using a dedicated measuring device. Bronquidiazina CR is taken orally.
  • Dosage: Take as directed by the pharmacist or physician. Dosage is calculated based on the patient's age, weight, and the severity of the infection.
  • Frequency: It is typically prescribed to be taken twice daily (every 12 hours).
  • Missed Dose Guidance: If you miss a dose, take it as soon as you remember, unless it is almost time for the next scheduled dose. Never take a double dose.
searchable.specification:
What’s in the Box:

  • 1 × Bronquidiazina CR Oral Suspension Bottle (150 mL)
  • 1 × Measuring Device (for accurate dosing)
  • 1 × Patient Information Leaflet (PIL)
  • Active Ingredients per 7.5 mL Dose:
    • Trimethoprim 80 mg
    • Sulfamethoxazole 400 mg
    • Bromhexine Hydrochloride 4 mg
    • Sodium Benzoate 250 mg
    • Tolu Balsam Syrup 325 mg

Product Category: Prescription-Only Medicine (POM)
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications (Usage Restrictions)
Do NOT take Bronquidiazina CR if you have:

  • Allergy: Known hypersensitivity to Trimethoprim, Sulfamethoxazole, Bromhexine, or other sulfamide-based medicines.
  • Pre-existing Conditions: Severe kidney failure, advanced liver failure, or serious blood disorders (especially megaloblastic anemia).
  • Age Restriction: This medicine is contraindicated in infants under two years of age.
  • Pregnancy & Breastfeeding: Contradicated during pregnancy and requires a physician's evaluation for use while breastfeeding due to potential infant risks.

Device Function and Maintenance (Side Effects and Precautions)

  • Side Effects: Common side effects include nausea, vomiting, stomach pain, or diarrhea. If you experience serious but rare effects like severe rash, signs of liver or kidney problems, or signs of an allergic reaction (swelling, difficulty breathing), stop the medicine and seek emergency medical attention immediately.
  • Precautions:
    • Inform your doctor if you have a history of allergies, asthma, kidney/liver impairment, or folate deficiency.
    • Do not take with certain medications (e.g., specific diuretics, blood thinners). Always inform your doctor of all your current medications.
    • Stop the medication and contact your doctor if a rash appears, as this could be a sign of a serious, life-threatening skin condition.

searchable.name: Ulgicid Suspension Pineapple Flavour
searchable.brief_info: Ulgicid suspension is used for gastric reflux, toxicity, stomach acid, Gastric problems, stomach upset, heart burn and acid related indigestion.
searchable.description: Ulgicid Suspension is a high-performance formula that offers three layers of defense against common stomach and digestive complaints. It doesn't just treat the symptoms; it works in multiple ways to restore comfort. The blend of Aluminium and Magnesium salts provides quick and balanced acid neutralization, while Alginic Acid physically blocks acid reflux. This combined approach makes Ulgicid a comprehensive solution for managing stomach acidity and related discomfort.
searchable.how_to_use:
Proper Usage and Dosing

Ulgicid Suspension is an over-the-counter (OTC) medicine, but it is important to follow dosage instructions.

  • Proper Administration: Shake the bottle thoroughly before pouring the dose. Measure the exact amount using a measuring spoon or cup. Ulgicid is taken orally.
  • Dosage: The recommended dosage for adults is typically 10–20 mL (two to four teaspoonfuls) three or four times daily, or as required.
  • Frequency: Best taken after meals and at bedtime, or whenever symptoms occur. Do not exceed four doses daily unless specifically directed by a doctor.
  • Missed Dose Guidance: Since Ulgicid is an on-demand medication for symptoms, there is no risk in missing a dose. Simply take the next dose when symptoms return.
searchable.specification:
What’s in the Box:

  • 1 × Ulgicid Suspension Bottle (Commonly 200 mL)
  • 1 × Measuring Device (for accurate dosing)
  • 1 × Patient Information Leaflet (PIL)
  • Active Ingredients (per specified volume, e.g., 10 mL):
    • Activated Dimethicone: 125 mg
    • Alginic Acid: 200 mg
    • Dried Aluminium Hydroxide: 25 mg
    • Magnesium Hydroxide: 250 mg
    • Magnesium Trisilicate: 250 mg

Product Category: Over-The-Counter (OTC) / Pharmacy Medicine
searchable.famasi_advice:
Pharmacist Advice (Contraindications and Warnings)

Contraindications (Usage Restrictions)

Do NOT take Ulgicid Suspension if you have:

  • Allergy: Hypersensitivity or allergy to any of the active or inactive ingredients (e.g., Alginic Acid, Aluminium/Magnesium salts, Dimethicone).
  • Kidney Failure: Severe kidney failure, as the body may struggle to excrete the Magnesium and Aluminium components, leading to potential toxicity.
  • Severely Debilitated Patients: Use should be avoided or closely monitored.
  • Age Restriction: Antacids are generally not recommended for children under 6 years of age unless explicitly instructed by a physician.

Device Function and Maintenance (Side Effects and Precautions)

  • Side Effects:
    • Common Side Effects: Changes in bowel habits. Aluminium tends to cause constipation, while Magnesium tends to cause diarrhea. The balanced formula is designed to minimize these effects, but they can still occur.
    • Serious Side Effects: Rare allergic reactions (rash, swelling, difficulty breathing) or signs of high levels of Aluminium/Magnesium (muscle weakness, confusion). Stop use and consult a doctor immediately.
  • Precautions:
    • Long-Term Use: Do not use for prolonged periods (more than 14 days) or in excessively high doses without medical advice, as this can lead to electrolyte disturbances (e.g., low phosphate levels) or accumulation of Aluminium.
    • Drug Interactions: Always observe the timing rule: take other medicines at least 1 hour before or 4 hours after Ulgicid to prevent reduced absorption of the other drug.
    • Underlying Conditions: If symptoms persist for more than 7 days, if you experience weight loss, or have difficulty swallowing, consult a doctor immediately to rule out a more serious underlying condition.
