searchable.name: Osteocare Plus Glucosamine & Chondroitin
searchable.brief_info: Osteocare Plus Glucosamine & Chondroitin formula combines the trusted, essential minerals of the original Osteocare (Calcium, Magnesium, Zinc, and Vitamin D) with key joint support compounds: Glucosamine and Chondroitin.
searchable.description: This formula is scientifically developed to eliminate the need for separate bone and joint supplements. It delivers a dual-action benefit: the bone component ensures optimal mineral density, while the cartilage component supplies structural building blocks. The balanced blend ensures maximum absorption, making Osteocare Plus Glucosamine & Chondroitin an ideal choice for active adults and those seeking advanced support for flexibility and strength.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Osteocare Plus Glucosamine & Chondroitin

  • Dosage: Two to three tablets per day.
  • Proper Administration: Swallow the tablets whole with water or a cold drink. Do NOT chew.
  • Best Time to Take: Take with your main meal to optimize the absorption of the fat-soluble vitamins and minerals.
  • Missed Dose Guidance: If you miss a dose, simply take the next dose as usual with your next main meal.
searchable.specification:
The specification section should contain actual information on pack size based on PIL.

  • Pack Size: Commonly available in 60 Tablets or 90 Tablets
  • Product Category: Food Supplement / Bone & Joint Health Formula
  • Allergen Information: Contains Crustaceans and Fish.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Osteocare Plus Glucosamine & Chondroitin

Do NOT take Osteocare Plus Glucosamine & Chondroitin if you:

  • Drug Allergies: Are allergic to Fish or Shellfish (Crustaceans).
  • Pre-existing Medical Conditions: Are diabetic or taking blood-thinners (anticoagulants) without consulting a doctor.
  • Age Restrictions: Not suitable for children.
  • Pregnancy & Breastfeeding Warnings: Consult a doctor or pharmacist before use.

Side Effects of Osteocare Plus Glucosamine & Chondroitin

This supplement is generally well-tolerated when taken as directed.

  • Common Side Effects (mild and expected): Mild nausea, constipation, diarrhea, or indigestion. These often subside with continued use.
  • Serious but rare side effects (that may require medical attention): Allergic reactions (rash, swelling, difficulty breathing) or swelling in the legs (edema).
  • What to do if side effects occur: Discontinue use and contact your doctor or pharmacist immediately.

Precautions and Warnings of Osteocare Plus Glucosamine & Chondroitin

  • Before starting Osteocare Plus Glucosamine & Chondroitin: Diabetics and those on medication should seek doctor consultation.
  • During use: Do not exceed the recommended intake. It is a food supplement and not a substitute for a varied diet.
  • Long-term safety considerations: Generally safe for long-term use, but prolonged use in vulnerable patients should be monitored by a healthcare professional.

searchable.name: Immunace Tablets x 30 Vitabiotics
searchable.brief_info: Immunace Tablet is delivers a comprehensive combination of 24 essential vitamins and minerals, including key antioxidants and specific micronutrients crucial for immune cell function and defense.
searchable.description:
The primary purpose of Immunace Tablet is to provide daily nutritional support to optimize immune function. It is perfect for:

  • Daily Immune Maintenance: Provides the necessary micronutrients to help the immune system function normally, especially during high-demand periods like seasonal changes or stress.
  • Cellular Protection: The potent antioxidant complex protects cells from oxidative stress caused by free radicals, supporting healthy aging and tissue maintenance.
  • Energy and Vitality: Certain B vitamins and minerals are included to contribute to normal energy release, supporting overall vitality.
  • General Well-being: Helps fill potential nutritional gaps in the diet that can impact immune response.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Immunace Tablet

Immunace Tablet is an over-the-counter (OTC) food supplement.

  • Dosage: One tablet per day. Do not exceed the recommended intake.
  • Proper Administration: Swallow the tablet whole with water or a cold drink. Do NOT chew.
  • Best Time to Take: Ideally taken with your main meal to maximize the absorption of the fat-soluble vitamins and minimize potential stomach upset.
  • Missed Dose Guidance: If you miss a dose, simply take the next dose with your next main meal. Do not take two doses at the same time.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: Commonly available in 30 Tablets or 60 Tablets.
  • Active Ingredients: A broad spectrum of vitamins and minerals, including Vitamins C, D3, E, Zinc, Selenium, Folic Acid, and B Vitamins.

Product Category: Food Supplement / Immune Support Formula
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Immunace Tablet

Do NOT take Immunace Tablet if you:

  • Drug Allergies: Are allergic to any of the ingredients.
  • Pre-existing Medical Conditions: Are under medical supervision, have epilepsy, a thyroid condition, or haemochromatosis (a condition involving iron overload).
  • Age Restrictions: Not suitable for children.
  • Pregnancy & Breastfeeding Warnings: Consult your doctor or pharmacist before use.

Side Effects of Immunace Tablet

Immunace Tablet has no known side effects when taken as directed.

  • Common Side Effects (mild and expected): Mild stomach upset or nausea is rare but possible if taken on an empty stomach.
  • Serious but rare side effects (that may require medical attention): Severe allergic reactions (rash, itching, swelling).
  • What to do if side effects occur: Stop using the product immediately and consult your doctor.

Precautions and Warnings of Immunace Tablet

  • Before starting Immunace Tablet: Inform your doctor if you are on any other medication.
  • During use: Do not exceed the recommended daily intake. This product contains iron, which, if taken in excess, may be harmful to young children.
  • Long-term safety considerations: If symptoms persist, seek medical advice to identify any underlying health issues.

searchable.name: Osteocare Liquid Original
searchable.brief_info: Osteocare Liquid Original is the ideal alternative for those who dislike swallowing tablets, this formula ensures effective delivery of bone-supporting nutrients, including Vitamin D, Magnesium, and Zinc.
searchable.description: Osteocare Liquid Original is formulated for maximum versatility and absorption. It features the preferred D3 form of Vitamin D (Cholecalciferol), which is identical to the form naturally produced by the skin upon sun exposure, ensuring efficient calcium utilization. The liquid format provides a dairy-free and 100% fat-free option, making it suitable for those with dietary restrictions or who use soya milk, while delivering the essential co-factors required for optimal bone mineralization.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Osteocare Liquid Original

Osteocare Liquid Original is an over-the-counter (OTC) food supplement.

  • Dosage:
    • Adults (Men & Women): Two teaspoonfuls (approx. 10ml) twice daily.
    • Pregnancy & Breast-feeding: Two teaspoonfuls twice daily.
    • Children (3-12 years): Two teaspoonfuls (approx. 10ml) once daily.
  • Proper Administration: Measure the dose accurately using a measuring spoon. Can be taken directly or mixed into water or juice.
  • Best Time to Take: Ideally taken with a main meal to maximize the absorption of the fat-soluble Vitamin D.
  • Missed Dose Guidance: If you miss a dose, simply take the next dose with your next meal. Do not double the dose.
searchable.specification:
Specification

  • Pack Size: Commonly available in 200 ml bottles.
  • Active Ingredients: Calcium, Vitamin D3, Magnesium, Zinc.
  • Product Category: Food Supplement / Calcium and Co-factor Liquid
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Osteocare Liquid Original

Do NOT take Osteocare Liquid Original if you:

  • Pre-existing Medical Conditions: Suffer from hypercalcemia (high calcium in the blood), hypercalciuria (excess calcium in the urine), or severe renal (kidney) impairment.
  • Drug Allergies: Are allergic to any of the ingredients.
  • Age Restrictions: Not suitable for children under 3 years old unless directed by a doctor.
  • Pregnancy & Breastfeeding Warnings: While generally suitable, consult your doctor if you have any pre-existing medical conditions before use.

Side Effects of Osteocare Liquid Original

Osteocare Liquid Original is generally well-tolerated.

  • Common Side Effects (mild and expected): Mild constipation or stomach upset. Excessive consumption may produce laxative effects due to the Magnesium content.
  • Serious but rare side effects (that may require medical attention): Signs of high calcium levels (increased thirst, confusion, bone pain).
  • What to do if side effects occur: If serious side effects or allergic reactions occur, stop using the product immediately and contact a healthcare professional.

Precautions and Warnings of Osteocare Liquid Original

  • Before starting Osteocare Liquid Original: Consult your doctor if you have kidney stones or any other underlying medical condition.
  • During use: Do not exceed the recommended intake. Taking high doses of Calcium and Vitamin D over time can be harmful.
  • Long-term safety considerations: The formula is safe for long-term use, but if symptoms persist, consult your doctor.

searchable.name: Nivea Fresh Natural Spray
searchable.brief_info: Nivea Fresh Natural Spray 0% ACH is a high-performance deodorant designed for individuals seeking effective, long-lasting odor protection without Aluminum Chlorohydrate (ACH).
searchable.description: The Nivea Fresh Natural Spray provides a natural feeling of freshness that lasts all day. Its core feature is the 0% Aluminium (ACH) formulation, meaning it allows the skin to breathe naturally while preventing body odor. The INFINIFRESH formula is scientifically proven to target and eliminate the bacteria responsible for malodor, offering a level of freshness that goes beyond simple masking agents. This spray is dermatologically proven for skin tolerance, making it ideal .for daily use, even on sensitive underarm skin.
searchable.how_to_use:
This is an external cosmetic product used as needed.

  • Dosage: Spray lightly onto the underarm skin.
  • Proper Administration: Shake well before use. Hold the can approximately 15 cm (6 inches) from the underarm and spray.
  • Best Time to Use: Best used after showering, on clean, dry underarm skin.
  • Missed Dose Guidance: Reapply if needed, though designed for 48-hour protection.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: Commonly available in 150 ml or 200 ml aerosol cans.
  • Active Ingredients: Alcohol Denat., Ocean Extracts, Odor-Controlling Agents.
  • Product Category: Deodorant Spray (Non-Antiperspirant)
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Nivea Fresh Natural Spray 0% ACH

  • Drug Allergies: Do NOT use if you are allergic to any ingredients, particularly the Parfum components.
  • Skin Condition Warnings: Should not be applied to irritated or damaged skin.
  • Age Restrictions: Keep out of reach of children.

Side Effects of Nivea Fresh Natural Spray 0% ACH
Common Side Effects (mild and expected): None known when used as directed.

  • Serious but rare side effects (that may require medical attention): Severe local irritation, rash, or allergic dermatitis, especially in fragrance-sensitive individuals.
  • What to do if side effects occur: If irritation, redness, or swelling occurs, stop use immediately and consult a doctor or pharmacist.

Precautions and Warnings of Nivea Fresh Natural Spray 0% ACH

  • Before starting Nivea Fresh Natural Spray 0% ACH: Consult a dermatologist if you have highly reactive or broken skin.
  • During use: Do not spray into eyes. Use in short bursts in well-ventilated places.
  • Aerosol Danger: Highly pressurized and flammable container; requires strict adherence to all fire/heat warnings.

searchable.name: Supramult Junior 200ml
searchable.brief_info: Supramult Junior 200ml is a highly trusted, golden-yellow, fruity-flavored oral syrup formulated to support the comprehensive health and vitality of children and adolescents.
searchable.description: Supramult Junior 200ml is an essential Over-the-Counter (OTC) supplement that goes beyond basic nutrition by combining a spectrum of vital B-vitamins, the fat-soluble Vitamins A, C, and D, with the crucial amino acid L-Lysine, and Calcium. This unique, balanced formulation is specifically designed to rapidly address nutritional gaps, enhance appetite, and boost energy levels, making Supramult Junior a primary choice for parents committed to their children's optimal physical and cognitive development. Its liquid form ensures easy administration and absorption, making it a simple, effective solution for supporting active, growing bodies.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Supramult Junior

The dosage of Supramult Junior is strictly based on the patient's age. Take as directed by the pharmacist or physician.

  • Children under 1 year: Contraindicated.
  • Children aged 1 to 6 years: 5 - 7 mL (1-1˝ teaspoonful) daily.
  • Children aged 7 to 12 years: 10 mL (2 teaspoonfuls) daily.
  • Age 13 and above: 15 mL (3 teaspoonfuls) daily.

Proper Administration

  • Administration: Swallow the syrup orally.
  • Best Time to Take It: Always take Supramult Junior preferably with food or a milky drink. Do not take on an empty stomach.
  • Missed Dose Guidance: If you miss a dose, give it as soon as you remember. If it is almost time for the next scheduled dose, skip the missed dose and resume the normal daily schedule. Do not double the dose to make up for a missed one.
searchable.specification: Pack Size: Supramult Junior 200ml is supplied in an amber glass bottle of 200 mL of oral syrup.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Supramult Junior

Do NOT take Supramult Junior if you or the child:

  • Drug Allergies: Are allergic to any of the active ingredients (L-Lysine, Vitamins A, D, C, B-complex, Calcium) or any components of the syrup.
  • Pre-existing Medical Conditions: Have a known history of hypervitaminosis A or D (excessive accumulation of these vitamins), severe renal (kidney) insufficiency, or active Vitamin D therapy.
  • Age Restrictions: Is a child under the age of 1 year.
  • Pregnancy & Breastfeeding: This product is formulated specifically for children. Pregnant or breastfeeding women should consult their doctor for an appropriate adult multivitamin.

Side Effects of Supramult Junior

Side effects from a multivitamin taken at the recommended dose are generally mild and rare.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Mild gastrointestinal discomfort (such as nausea, stomach upset, or mild diarrhea) may occur, especially when first starting the supplement.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects: Symptoms of hypervitaminosis (e.g., bone or joint pain, excessive thirst, persistent headaches) or a severe allergic reaction (e.g., swelling of the face, tongue, or throat; difficulty breathing; severe rash). What to do if side effects occur: If you observe any serious or persistent side effects, discontinue use immediately and seek medical attention.

Precautions and Warnings of Supramult Junior

  • Before Starting Supramult Junior: Always inform your doctor or pharmacist about all other medications, prescription or OTC, and supplements the child is currently taking, to prevent accidental overdosing or interactions.
  • During Use: Do not exceed the recommended daily dose as excessive intake of fat-soluble vitamins (A and D) can lead to toxicity (hypervitaminosis).
  • Long-term Safety Considerations: If planning for long-term use, occasional check-ups with a healthcare provider are advisable to ensure nutritional balance and rule out any over-accumulation of vitamins.

searchable.name: Shaltoux 4-Way Relief Cough Syrup 100ml
searchable.brief_info: SHALTOUX 4-WAY RELIEF COUGH SYRUP 100ML is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) syrup specifically formulated to target multiple symptoms associated with the common cold, flu, allergies, and mild respiratory irritation.
searchable.description: SHALTOUX 4-WAY RELIEF COUGH SYRUP 100ML offers a comprehensive approach by combining an antihistamine, two expectorants/demulcents, and a soothing agent. This four-way action works to relieve coughs, soothe the throat, manage allergic symptoms like sneezing and watery eyes, and help clear mucus from the chest and nasal passages, providing effective temporary relief for both dry and wet cough symptoms triggered by irritation.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of SHALTOUX 4-WAY RELIEF COUGH SYRUP

Take as directed by the pharmacist or physician. The dosage is based on age and should be measured accurately (1 teaspoonful approx 5mL).

  • Adults and children above 12 years: 15 mL (1 tablespoonful) three times daily.
  • Children 6 to 12 years: 5 mL (1 teaspoonful) three times daily.
  • Children 2 to 6 years: Only use as per your physician's recommendation.

Proper Administration

  • Administration: Swallow the syrup orally.
  • Best Time to Take It: Can be taken with or without food. Due to drowsiness, consider taking the evening dose close to bedtime.
  • Missed Dose Guidance: If you miss a dose, take it as soon as you remember. If it is almost time for the next scheduled dose, skip the missed dose and resume your regular schedule. Do not take a double dose.
searchable.specification: Pack Size: SHALTOUX 4-WAY RELIEF COUGH SYRUP is supplied in a 100 mL bottle.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of SHALTOUX 4-WAY RELIEF COUGH SYRUP

Do NOT take SHALTOUX 4-WAY RELIEF COUGH SYRUP if you:

  • Drug Allergies: Are allergic (hypersensitive) to Diphenhydramine, Ammonium Chloride, Sodium Citrate, Menthol, or any component of the syrup.
  • Other Conditions: Have severe liver disease, narrow-angle glaucoma, an enlarged prostate (prostatic hypertrophy), or have difficulty urinating, as the antihistamine can worsen these conditions.
  • Taking MAOIs: Are currently taking or have taken Monoamine Oxidase Inhibitors (MAOIs) within the last 14 days (certain antidepressants).

Side Effects of SHALTOUX 4-WAY RELIEF COUGH SYRUP

Side effects are mainly due to the antihistamine component.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Drowsiness (somnolence), dizziness, headache, dry mouth or throat, blurred vision, and difficulty concentrating.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (Requires Medical Attention): Palpitations or a very fast heart rate, severe confusion, hallucinations, or signs of a severe allergic reaction (rash, swelling, severe dizziness, difficulty breathing).
  • What to do if side effects occur: If you experience severe drowsiness that is disruptive, or any of the serious side effects listed, stop taking the syrup and consult a doctor immediately.

Precautions and Warnings of SHALTOUX 4-WAY RELIEF COUGH SYRUP

  • Before Starting SHALTOUX: Inform your doctor if you have asthma, chronic bronchitis, chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD), heart disease, high blood pressure, or diabetes.
  • During Use: Exercise caution, as this syrup may cause thickening of bronchial secretions, which is problematic for patients with severe respiratory illnesses.
  • Pediatric Use: Avoid using in children under 2 years of age unless explicitly directed by a physician, due to the risk of serious side effects from cold and cough medications in this age group.

searchable.name: Becombion Syrup 300mL
searchable.brief_info: Becombion Syrup (Dr. Meyer's Becombion) is a concentrated source of essential B-Complex Vitamins, specifically designed to prevent and treat nutritional deficiencies, particularly those related to the B vitamins.
searchable.description: Becombion Syrup (Dr. Meyer's Becombion) is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) nutritional supplement formulated as a clear, golden-yellow viscous liquid with an appealing orange and pineapple flavor. It is a concentrated source of essential B-Complex Vitamins, specifically designed to prevent and treat nutritional deficiencies, particularly those related to the B vitamins. As B vitamins are crucial co-factors in energy production and metabolic processes, regular supplementation with Becombion Syrup supports general vitality, healthy nerve function, and overall body growth.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Becombion Syrup

Take as directed by the pharmacist or physician. The standard recommended dose is:

  • Children above 1 year: One teaspoonful (5 mL) once daily.
  • Adults: One teaspoonful (5 mL) two times daily. Proper Administration
  • Administration: Swallow the syrup orally. Use a proper measuring spoon or cup to ensure accurate dosing.
  • Best Time to Take It: Can be taken with or without food.
searchable.specification: Pack Size: Becombion Syrup is typically supplied in amber pet bottles of 150 mL or 300 mL.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Becombion Syrup

Do NOT take Becombion Syrup if you:

  • Drug Allergies: Are hypersensitive or allergic to any of the ingredients, particularly the B vitamins or excipients (e.g., Methyl Paraben).
  • Specific Drug Use: Consult your doctor if you are taking Levodopa for Parkinson's disease, as the Pyridoxine (B 6) in the syrup may reduce its therapeutic effect.

Side Effects of Becombion Syrup

Side effects are rare due to the water-soluble nature of the vitamins.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Mild transient stomach upset, nausea, or flushing (redness of the skin, usually associated with Niacin at higher doses).
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (Requires Medical Attention): Signs of a severe allergic reaction (rash, itching, swelling of the face/tongue/throat, severe dizziness, or difficulty breathing).
  • What to do if side effects occur: If any severe or persistent symptoms occur, especially those indicative of an allergy, discontinue use and seek professional medical assistance immediately.

Precautions and Warnings of Becombion Syrup

  • Before Starting Becombion Syrup: Consult your doctor if you have pre-existing medical conditions, such as diabetes or severe liver problems.
  • During Use: Do not exceed the recommended daily dose unless specifically advised by a healthcare professional. Excessive intake of certain B vitamins (e.g., high-dose B6) over a long period can lead to nerve damage (peripheral neuropathy).
  • Drug Interactions: Consult a doctor if taking other vitamin or nutritional supplements, or medications like certain antibiotics or antacids, as they may affect B vitamin absorption or effectiveness.

searchable.name: Becombion Syrup 150mL
searchable.brief_info: Becombion Syrup (Dr. Meyer's Becombion) is a concentrated source of essential B-Complex Vitamins, specifically designed to prevent and treat nutritional deficiencies, particularly those related to the B vitamins.
searchable.description: Becombion Syrup (Dr. Meyer's Becombion) is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) nutritional supplement formulated as a clear, golden-yellow viscous liquid with an appealing orange and pineapple flavor. It is a concentrated source of essential B-Complex Vitamins, specifically designed to prevent and treat nutritional deficiencies, particularly those related to the B vitamins. As B vitamins are crucial co-factors in energy production and metabolic processes, regular supplementation with Becombion Syrup supports general vitality, healthy nerve function, and overall body growth.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Becombion Syrup

Take as directed by the pharmacist or physician. The standard recommended dose is:

  • Children above 1 year: One teaspoonful (5 mL) once daily.
  • Adults: One teaspoonful (5 mL) two times daily.

Proper Administration

  • Administration: Swallow the syrup orally. Use a proper measuring spoon or cup to ensure accurate dosing.
  • Best Time to Take It: Can be taken with or without food.

How to Store and Dispose of Becombion Syrup

  • Storage: Store the bottle at room temperature, away from light and excessive moisture. Do not freeze, as this may cause separation. Keep the bottle tightly closed and out of reach of children.
  • Disposal: Dispose of any unused or expired syrup safely. Consult your pharmacist for safe disposal methods.
searchable.specification: Pack Size: Becombion Syrup is typically supplied in amber pet bottles of 150 mL or 300 mL.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Becombion Syrup

Do NOT take Becombion Syrup if you:

  • Drug Allergies: Are hypersensitive or allergic to any of the ingredients, particularly the B vitamins or excipients (e.g., Methyl Paraben).
  • Specific Drug Use: Consult your doctor if you are taking Levodopa for Parkinson's disease, as the Pyridoxine (B 6) in the syrup may reduce its therapeutic effect.

Side Effects of Becombion Syrup

Side effects are rare due to the water-soluble nature of the vitamins.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Mild transient stomach upset, nausea, or flushing (redness of the skin, usually associated with Niacin at higher doses).
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (Requires Medical Attention): Signs of a severe allergic reaction (rash, itching, swelling of the face/tongue/throat, severe dizziness, or difficulty breathing).
  • What to do if side effects occur: If any severe or persistent symptoms occur, especially those indicative of an allergy, discontinue use and seek professional medical assistance immediately.

Precautions and Warnings of Becombion Syrup

  • Before Starting Becombion Syrup: Consult your doctor if you have pre-existing medical conditions, such as diabetes or severe liver problems.
  • During Use: Do not exceed the recommended daily dose unless specifically advised by a healthcare professional. Excessive intake of certain B vitamins (e.g., high-dose B 6) over a long period can lead to nerve damage (peripheral neuropathy).

Drug Interactions: Consult a doctor if taking other vitamin or nutritional supplements, or medications like certain antibiotics or antacids, as they may affect B vitamin absorption or effectiveness.

searchable.name: Eucerin 5% Urea Repair Plus Cream 450mL
searchable.brief_info: Eucerin 5% Urea Repair Plus Cream 450mL is a high-quality, rich moisturizing cream scientifically formulated for the intensive care of dry to very dry, rough, and tense body skin.
searchable.description: Eucerin 5% Urea Repair Plus Cream 450mL is recognized as a highly effective emollient and is often recommended by dermatologists as adjunctive care for individuals with skin conditions such as xerosis (pathological dryness), psoriasis, and diabetes. The cream is characterized by its unique triple-action moisturizing complex that delivers immediate relief and intense, long-lasting hydration, delaying the return of dryness and roughness for up to 48 hours.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Eucerin 5% Urea Repair Plus Cream 450mL

  • Dosage: Apply a generous amount to the affected areas of the skin. There is no fixed "dose" as it is a cosmetic and therapeutic cream.
  • Administration: For external use on the skin only.
  • Best Time to Take It: Apply daily, or as often as needed. The best time to apply any heavy moisturizer is immediately after showering or bathing while the skin is still damp, to trap moisture effectively.
  • Dosing Schedule: Re-apply regularly, especially to exposed areas like hands, elbows, and feet, and after washing.
searchable.specification: Pack Size: Eucerin 5% Urea Repair Plus Cream is supplied in a large 450 mL jar or tub.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Eucerin 5% Urea Repair Plus Cream

Do NOT use Eucerin 5% Urea Repair Plus Cream if you:

  • Allergies: Are allergic to Urea, Ceramide, Lactic Acid, or any of the product's components.
  • Skin Integrity: Should generally be avoided on severely broken, bleeding, infected, or oozing skin, as this may increase irritation or absorption of ingredients.

Side Effects of Eucerin 5% Urea Repair Plus Cream

Side effects are usually mild and local, occurring during initial application.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Transient burning, stinging sensation, redness, or itching at the application site. This is often temporary, especially if the skin is very dry or cracked.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (Requires Medical Attention):
    • Allergic Reactions: Signs of a severe allergic reaction, such as generalized rash, hives, wheezing, swelling of the face/tongue, or trouble breathing.
    • Skin Infection: Signs of a new or worsening skin infection (oozing, increased pain, heat, or spreading redness).
  • What to do if side effects occur: If burning, stinging, or redness persists or worsens significantly after several days, or if any serious allergic symptoms appear, discontinue use and seek medical attention immediately.

Precautions and Warnings of Eucerin 5% Urea Repair Plus Cream

  • Before Starting Eucerin 5% Urea Repair Plus: Consult a doctor if you have severe skin cuts, large sores, or a current skin infection.
  • Increased Absorption: Urea can temporarily increase the absorption of other topical medications applied to the same area. Consult a physician before combining this cream with other active topical drugs.
  • Pregnancy and Breastfeeding: While no known harmful effects have been reported with topical use, consult your doctor before using the product if you are pregnant or breastfeeding.

searchable.name: Eucerin 10% Urea Repair Lotion 250mL
searchable.brief_info: Eucerin 10% Urea Repair Lotion 250mL is a powerful, intensive moisturizing lotion specifically formulated to provide immediate and lasting relief for very dry, rough, and flaking skin.
searchable.description: Eucerin 10% Urea Repair Lotion 250mL is contains a higher concentration of the key active ingredient, 10% Urea, making it ideal for skin with chronic dryness, tightness, and scaliness. The formula uses a unique triple-action complex—Urea, Ceramides, and Natural Moisturizing Factors (NMFs)—to repair the skin's barrier, prevent moisture loss, and deliver hydration that can delay dryness symptoms for up to 48 hours.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Eucerin 10% Urea Repair Lotion 250mL

  • Dosage: Apply a sufficient amount of the lotion to cover the affected skin area. There is no set "dose" for topical emollients.
  • Administration: For external use on the body only. Avoid contact with eyes or mucous membranes.
  • Best Time to Take It: Apply once or twice daily, or more regularly if needed. Apply immediately after showering or bathing to damp skin to maximize water retention.
  • Dosing Schedule: Gently massage the lotion into the skin until it is completely absorbed. Apply as often as required to maintain hydration.
searchable.specification: Pack Size: Eucerin 10% Urea Repair Lotion is supplied in a 250 mL bottle (often with a pump dispenser)
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Eucerin 10% Urea Repair Lotion

Do NOT use Eucerin 10% Urea Repair Lotion if you:

  • Allergies: Are allergic to Urea or any other ingredient in the product.
  • Acute Inflammation: Should not be applied to areas of excoriated (deeply scratched), acutely inflamed, broken, bleeding, or infected skin.
  • Renal Impairment: Exercise caution and consult a doctor if you have severe renal insufficiency, particularly when applying to large skin areas.

Side Effects of Eucerin 10% Urea Repair Lotion

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Local skin irritation, including a mild stinging or burning sensation, especially when applied to severely dehydrated or rough skin. Redness or itching may also occur initially.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (Requires Medical Attention):
    • Severe Allergic Reactions: Widespread rash, hives, difficulty breathing, or swelling of the face, lips, or throat.
    • Worsening Skin Condition: If the skin condition worsens significantly or signs of infection appear (pus, spreading redness, increased heat).
  • What to do if side effects occur: If irritation persists or worsens, or if any serious allergic reaction symptoms are noticed, discontinue use immediately and seek medical advice.

Precautions and Warnings of Eucerin 10% Urea Repair Lotion

  • Before Starting Eucerin 10% Urea Repair Lotion: Consult a doctor if the skin condition is severe, chronic, or if you have open wounds or sores.
  • Avoid Mucosae: Do not allow the lotion to come into contact with the eyes or mucous membranes.
  • Pediatric Use: This product is intended for adults. For dry skin in children, particularly those under the age of 12, seek medical advice for an age-appropriate formulation.
  • Pregnancy and Breastfeeding: There are no known risks, but consult your doctor or pharmacist before use.

searchable.name: Eucerin Dermo Purifyer Oil Control Cleansing Gel
searchable.brief_info: Eucerin Dermo Purifyer Oil Control Cleansing Gel (also known as DermoPurifyer Cleansing Gel or Purifying Cleanser) is a specialized, daily-use facial and body wash formulated for oily, blemish-prone, and acne-prone skin.
searchable.description: Eucerin Dermo Purifyer Oil Control Cleansing Gel (also known as DermoPurifyer Cleansing Gel or Purifying Cleanser) is designed to provide gentle yet highly effective purification. Its soap-free and fragrance-free formulation ensures excellent tolerability while working to aggressively target the root causes of blemishes: excess sebum (oiliness), dirt, and bacteria. The gel leaves the skin feeling clean, fresh, and supple without causing the tightness or over-drying associated with harsh cleansers.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Eucerin Dermo Purifyer Oil Control Cleansing Gel

  • Dosage: Apply a cherry-sized amount of the gel.
  • Administration: For external use on the face and body only.
  • Best Time to Take It: Use as the first step of your skincare routine, preferably twice daily (morning and evening).
  • Application: Work the gel into a lather in your hands with a little water. Gently massage it into your face and other affected areas, then rinse thoroughly with lukewarm water. Avoid direct contact with eyes.
searchable.specification: Pack Size: Eucerin Dermo Purifyer Oil Control Cleansing Gel is commonly supplied in 200 mL and 400 mL pump bottles.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Eucerin Dermo Purifyer Oil Control Cleansing Gel

Do NOT use Eucerin Dermo Purifyer Oil Control Cleansing Gel if you:

  • Allergies: Are allergic (hypersensitive) to any of the ingredients, including Salicylic Acid (if contained in the specific formula) or Ampho-Tensides.
  • Skin Integrity: Do not use on irritated, broken, severely wounded, or freshly excoriated (scraped/peeling) skin.

Side Effects of Eucerin Dermo Purifyer Oil Control Cleansing Gel

Side effects are rare due to the mild formulation, but can occur, especially with Salicylic Acid content.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Temporary mild dryness, mild redness, or slight peeling (often a sign of exfoliation if Salicylic Acid is present).
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (Requires Medical Attention):
    • Severe Allergic Reactions: Rash, hives, swelling of the face, lips, tongue, or throat, or difficulty breathing.
    • Excessive Dryness/Irritation: Skin becomes excessively tight, red, or painful; this may indicate the product is too strong or being overused.
  • What to do if side effects occur: If severe irritation or any signs of a serious allergic reaction occur, stop use immediately and seek medical attention.

Precautions and Warnings of Eucerin Dermo Purifyer Oil Control Cleansing Gel

  • Before Starting Eucerin Dermo Purifyer: If you are undergoing a medical acne treatment (e.g., strong retinoids), consult your doctor before using, as your skin may be significantly more sensitive.
  • Salicylic Acid Warning: If using a version containing Salicylic Acid, be mindful of using other exfoliating products (scrubs, peels) to prevent over-exfoliation and irritation.
  • Eye Contact: Avoid direct contact with eyes. If contact occurs, rinse thoroughly with water.
  • Pregnancy: The gel can be used during pregnancy, but if undergoing concurrent medical acne therapy, confirm safety with a doctor.

value.title: Eucerin Dermo Purifyer Oil Control Cleansing Gel

searchable.name: Ayrtons Pure Cod Liver Oil 150mL
searchable.brief_info: Ayrtons Pure Cod Liver Oil 150mL is a high-quality, trusted dietary supplement is a rich source of essential Omega-3 fatty acids (EPA and DHA) and vital Vitamins A and D.
searchable.description: Ayrtons Pure Cod Liver Oil 150mL is sourced from the liver of fresh cod fish, this pure liquid formula is an easy and effective way to bridge nutritional gaps in your diet. It is a long-standing choice for promoting overall health, particularly supporting healthy bones, joints, vision, and immune function. Choose Ayrtons Pure Cod Liver Oil 150mL for a reliable daily boost of nature's best nutrients.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Ayrtons Pure Cod Liver Oil 150mL

This is an Over-The-Counter (OTC) product.

  • Adults and Children over 5 years: Take 10mL (two 5mL spoonfuls) daily.
  • Children 1-5 years: Take 5mL (one 5mL spoonful) daily.

Proper Administration

  • Administration: Ayrtons Pure Cod Liver Oil 150mL is for oral administration only. Use a measuring spoon or cup to ensure the correct dosage.
  • Best Time to Take: It can be taken at any time of the day, but taking it with or immediately after a meal can help reduce the potential for a fishy aftertaste and aids the absorption of the fat-soluble vitamins.
  • Missed Dose Guidance: If you miss a dose, simply take the next dose at the usual time. Do not take a double dose to make up for a missed one.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Ayrtons Pure Cod Liver Oil 150mL

Do NOT take Ayrtons Pure Cod Liver Oil 150mL if you:

  • Drug Allergies: Have a known allergy or hypersensitivity to cod liver oil, fish products, or any of the inactive ingredients. Ayrtons Pure Cod Liver Oil 150mL contains fish oil.
  • Pre-existing Conditions: Have hypercalcaemia (too much calcium in the blood), hypervitaminosis A or D (excessive levels of Vitamins A or D), or known blood clotting disorders.
  • Pregnancy & Breastfeeding Warnings: While Omega-3s are beneficial, high doses of Vitamin A can be teratogenic (cause birth defects). Consult your doctor before using Ayrtons Pure Cod Liver Oil 150mL during pregnancy or while breastfeeding to ensure safe dosage levels are maintained.

Side Effects of Ayrtons Pure Cod Liver Oil 150mL

While generally well-tolerated at recommended doses, some individuals may experience side effects:

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): The most frequent side effects are a fishy aftertaste or "burps," mild nausea, acid reflux, or loose stools/diarrhea. Taking the oil with food, chilling it, or taking it right before bed can help minimize the fishy taste. These mild symptoms usually subside with continued use.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (Requires Medical Attention): These include signs of an allergic reaction (rash, hives, severe dizziness, swelling of the face/throat, trouble breathing), or signs of excessive Vitamin A or D (e.g., severe headache, joint pain, peeling skin). If any serious side effects occur, stop use immediately and seek emergency medical attention.

Precautions and Warnings of Ayrtons Pure Cod Liver Oil 150mL

  • Before Starting Ayrtons Pure Cod Liver Oil 150mL: Consult your doctor or pharmacist if you are taking blood thinners (anticoagulants), blood pressure medication, or other vitamin supplements containing high levels of Vitamin A or D, as Cod Liver Oil may interact with these.
  • During Use: Do not exceed the recommended daily dosage. Overconsumption, especially when combined with other supplements, can lead to Vitamin A or D toxicity over time.
  • Long-term Safety Considerations: For individuals on long-term daily supplementation with Ayrtons Pure Cod Liver Oil 150mL, periodic health checks with your physician are advisable to monitor blood levels of fat-soluble Vitamins A and D.

searchable.name: Cusson Baby Soft & Smooth Lotion 200mL
searchable.brief_info: Nurture your baby's delicate skin with Cussons Baby Soft & Smooth Lotion 200mL, a trusted choice for daily moisturization.
searchable.description: Baby skin is significantly thinner than adult skin, making it highly susceptible to dryness and irritation. This specialized lotion is formulated to counteract this, providing deep, lasting hydration while maintaining the skin’s natural moisture balance. Infused with a blend of natural oils, Cussons Baby Soft & Smooth Lotion 200mL ensures your baby's skin feels beautifully soft, supple, and healthy. Its mild, dermatologically tested, and pH-balanced formula makes it an essential part of your baby care routine.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Cussons Baby Soft & Smooth Lotion 200mL

This is a topical cosmetic product for infant care.

  • Dosage: Apply a small, adequate amount of the lotion to cover the desired skin area. Use as often as needed, especially after bathing.

Proper Administration

  • Administration: Apply topically by gently smoothing the lotion over your baby's entire body. The lightweight, non-greasy texture ensures easy application and quick absorption.
  • Best Time to Use: The best time to apply Cussons Baby Soft & Smooth Lotion 200mL is immediately after washing/bathing, while the baby's skin is still slightly damp. Patting the skin partially dry before application helps lock in maximum moisture.
  • Missed Dose Guidance: As this is a personal care product, there is no missed dose guidance. Simply use it at the next desired time to maintain the softness and hydration of your baby's skin.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Cussons Baby Soft & Smooth Lotion 200mL

Cussons Baby Soft & Smooth Lotion 200mL is generally safe for external use on infant skin. However, you should NOT use it if your baby:

  • Drug Allergies: Has a known allergy or hypersensitivity to any of the specific ingredients, particularly Almond Oil, other nut derivatives, or any perfume components.
  • Broken or Irritated Skin: Avoid applying directly to severe cuts, open wounds, or highly inflamed skin. While soothing, it should not be used as a primary medical treatment for severe skin conditions unless directed by a pediatrician.

Side Effects of Cussons Baby Soft & Smooth Lotion 200mL

As a dermatologically tested and mild formulation, side effects are rare and typically limited to minor skin reactions.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): None are expected when used as directed. In very sensitive individuals, a mild, localized rash or slight redness may occur.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (Requires Medical Attention): Signs of a severe allergic reaction, such as generalized hives, widespread rash, or swelling of the face, tongue, or breathing difficulties. If these occur, discontinue use immediately and seek medical advice.

Precautions and Warnings of Cussons Baby Soft & Smooth Lotion 200mL

  • Before Starting: Perform a patch test on a small area of the baby’s skin (e.g., behind the ear or on the wrist) before the first full application to confirm compatibility, especially if your baby has a history of skin sensitivity.
  • During Use: This product is for external use only. Avoid contact with the baby’s eyes. If lotion gets into the eyes, rinse immediately with clean water. Ensure the cap is securely fastened after use.
  • Long-term Safety Considerations: Cussons Baby Soft & Smooth Lotion 200mL is formulated for regular, long-term use. Its pH-balanced and paraben-free status supports the maintenance of the skin's natural protective barrier over time.

searchable.brief_info: Cussons Baby Soft & Smooth Lotion 200mL, a trusted choice for daily moisturization.

  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (Requires Medical Attention): Signs of a severe allergic reaction, such as generalized hives, widespread rash, or swelling of the face, tongue, or breathing difficulties. If these occur, discontinue use immediately and seek medical advice.

searchable.name: CeraVe Skin Resurfacing Retinol Serum
searchable.brief_info: CeraVe Skin Resurfacing Retinol Serum is your gentle yet highly effective solution for achieving smoother, more even-toned skin
searchable.description: CeraVe Skin Resurfacing Retinol Serum is specifically designed to address the lasting reminders of breakouts: post-acne marks (hyperpigmentation) and enlarged pores. Unlike harsher retinol formulas, this CeraVe serum uses encapsulated retinol for steady, non-irritating delivery, ensuring the benefits without compromising your skin barrier. Enriched with three essential Ceramides, soothing Niacinamide, and brightening Licorice Root Extract, this fast-absorbing, lightweight serum helps refine skin texture, minimize the look of pores, and restore overall radiance for a healthy complexion. It’s non-comedogenic, paraben-free, and fragrance-free, making it ideal for mild acne-prone, combination, and oily skin types.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of CeraVe Skin Resurfacing Retinol Serum

This is a potent serum for nightly use only.

  • Dosage: Use one pump or a small, pea-sized amount to cover the entire face.

Proper Administration

  • Administration: Apply evenly to the entire face. Use the pump applicator to dispense the product onto your fingers.
  • Best Time to Take: Use once daily in the evening only.
  • Missed Dose Guidance: If you miss an application, simply apply it on the next scheduled evening. Do not double the amount to compensate for a missed dose.
  • Retinol Sandwich Technique (Tip for Sensitive Skin): If you experience dryness, apply a layer of moisturizer first, then the retinol serum, and finish with another layer of moisturizer.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of CeraVe Skin Resurfacing Retinol Serum

  • Pregnancy & Breastfeeding Warnings: Retinoids are generally contraindicated (must be avoided) during pregnancy and breastfeeding due to potential risks. If you are pregnant, planning to become pregnant, or breastfeeding, consult your physician before use.
  • Pre-existing Skin Conditions: Do not apply to open wounds, severely compromised skin barriers, or areas with active eczema or rosacea flare-ups, as the retinol may cause significant irritation.
  • Allergies: Do not use if you have a known allergy to any ingredients, including Vitamin A derivatives (retinoids).

Side Effects of CeraVe Skin Resurfacing Retinol Serum

Retinoids require an adjustment period, even in gentle formulas like this one.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected - Retinization): Dryness, mild flaking, slight redness, or a temporary tingling sensation upon initial application. This is a sign the product is working and your skin is adjusting.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (That May Require Medical Attention): Severe, persistent redness, blistering, or swelling. If irritation is prolonged, painful, or does not subside after reducing frequency, stop use and consult a dermatologist.
  • Acne Flare-up (Purging): Some individuals may experience a temporary increase in breakouts during the first few weeks as retinol speeds up the cell turnover process, bringing underlying blemishes to the surface faster. This usually subsides.

Precautions and Warnings of CeraVe Skin Resurfacing Retinol Serum

  • Sun Sensitivity: Retinol increases photosensitivity. Daily use of a broad-spectrum sunscreen (SPF 30 or higher) is mandatory while using this serum and for a week afterward, regardless of the weather.
  • Gradual Introduction: Start slowly! Use the serum 1-2 times per week for the first few weeks. Only gradually increase application frequency as your skin tolerance builds. Do not rush to daily use.
  • Combination Warning: Avoid using this serum at the same time (i.e., on the same evening) as other harsh chemical exfoliants (like high-concentration Glycolic or Salicylic Acids, or physical scrubs) to prevent over-exfoliation and damaging the skin barrier.
  • Application: Apply to cleansed, completely dry skin. Applying to damp skin can increase absorption and irritation. Avoid contact with eyes and lips.

searchable.name: Cussons Baby Soft & Smooth Powder
searchable.brief_info: Cussons Baby Soft & Smooth Powder Keeps your baby's skin comfortably dry, smooth, and fragrantly fresh.
searchable.description: Cussons Baby Soft & Smooth Powder is designed for delicate skin, especially in warm climates where perspiration is common, this powder is expertly formulated to absorb excess wetness and prevent the discomfort of chafing and skin irritation. The formulation is enhanced with the skin-conditioning power of Almond Milk and the aromatic, calming effect of Rose Oil. Cussons Baby Soft & Smooth Powder is dermatologically tested, mild, and free from colorants or preservatives, making it a soothing, safe, and essential part of your daily baby care routine.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Cussons Baby Soft & Smooth Powder

This is a topical cosmetic product for daily use.

  • Dosage: Apply a light dusting of powder to the desired areas whenever needed.

Proper Administration

  • Application Method: Shake a small amount of Cussons Baby Soft & Smooth Powder onto your own hand (away from the baby's face) and gently pat it onto the baby's skin, focusing on natural folds, creases, and the diaper area.
  • Best Time to Use: Ideal for use after bathing, after changing diapers, and any time the baby is sweating due to hot weather.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: Varies (Commonly 100g or 200g bottles)
  • Form: Fine Topical Powder
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Cussons Baby Soft & Smooth Powder

Do NOT use Cussons Baby Soft & Smooth Powder if your baby:

  • Known Allergies: Has a known allergy or sensitivity to any ingredient, such as Almond Milk, Rose Oil, or the powder base (talc/cornstarch).
  • Broken or Weeping Skin: Avoid use on broken, infected, or weeping skin, as the powder can trap moisture and worsen the condition.

Side Effects of Cussons Baby Soft & Smooth Powder

Side effects are rare with topical, proper use.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): None expected.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (That May Require Medical Attention): A localized, spreading rash or increased redness/irritation that does not clear up after cleansing may indicate sensitivity. The most serious concern is inhalation. Immediate medical attention is required if the baby inhales a large amount of powder, showing signs of choking, coughing, or difficulty breathing.
  • What to do if side effects occur: If a rash persists, discontinue use and consult a healthcare professional.

Precautions and Warnings of Cussons Baby Soft & Smooth Powder

  • INHALATION HAZARD (Crucial Warning): Always keep the powder container away from the baby's face, nose, and mouth. Never shake the powder directly onto the baby's body. Gently shake a small amount of powder into your hand first, away from the baby, and then apply it onto the baby’s skin folds.
  • External Use Only: This product is for external, topical use only.
  • Residue: Ensure any residual powder build-up in skin folds is regularly cleaned off to prevent caking or irritation.
  • Storage: Keep the powder container securely closed and out of the reach of children at all times to prevent accidental inhalation or ingestion.

searchable.name: Cusson Baby Mild & Gentle Powder
searchable.brief_info: Cussons Baby Mild & Gentle Powder keeps your baby's delicate skin perfectly dry, fresh, and silky soft with
searchable.description: Cussons Baby Mild & Gentle Powder is specifically formulated for newborns and babies with sensitive skin, this powder is expertly formulated to absorb excess perspiration and wetness, particularly in skin folds and areas prone to chafing. It is uniquely enriched with the nourishing power of Milk and the soothing properties of Chamomile to care for the skin while it dries. Cussons Baby Mild & Gentle Powder features a mild formulation, is dermatologically tested, and free from colorants or preservatives, making it a trusted choice for daily comfort and care, leaving behind a classic, comforting baby fragrance.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Cussons Baby Mild & Gentle Powder

This is a topical cosmetic product for daily comfort.

  • Dosage: Use a light dusting of powder. Do not over-apply.

Proper Administration

  • Application Method: Shake a small amount of Cussons Baby Mild & Gentle Powder into your hand, away from the baby. Gently pat the powder onto the baby's clean, dry skin, focusing on natural folds, creases, and the diaper area.
  • Best Time to Use: Ideal times are after bathing (to lock in dryness) and during diaper changes to prevent chafing and wetness.
  • Missed Dose Guidance: No medication dosage applies. Reapply as often as necessary to keep the baby dry and comfortable.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: Varies (Commonly 100g or 200g bottles)
  • Form: Fine Topical Powder
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Cussons Baby Mild & Gentle Powder

  • Known Allergies: Do NOT use if your baby has a known allergy or sensitivity to any ingredient, such as Milk proteins, chamomile, or the powder base.
  • Severe Skin Damage: Avoid use on weeping wounds, open cuts, or severely infected skin areas.

Side Effects of Cussons Baby Mild & Gentle Powder

While dermatologically tested for mildness, caution must be exercised due to the nature of powder products.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): None expected with proper use.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (That May Require Medical Attention): The most serious hazard is inhalation. Immediate medical attention is required if the baby inhales a substantial amount of powder, showing signs of distress, coughing, or difficulty breathing, as this can lead to lung irritation.
  • What to do if side effects occur: If you notice a persistent skin reaction (rash, redness) that doesn't improve with cleansing, stop using the powder and consult a healthcare professional.

Precautions and Warnings of Cussons Baby Mild & Gentle Powder

  • INHALATION HAZARD (Crucial Warning): Never shake the powder directly onto the baby or near their face. Inhalation of fine particles poses a risk of lung irritation. Gently shake a small amount of powder onto your hand first, well away from the baby, and then softly pat it onto the desired areas.
  • External Use Only: This product is strictly for external, topical use.
  • Keep Out of Reach: Always keep the powder container securely closed and out of the reach of all children (including toddlers who may play with it) to prevent accidental inhalation.

searchable.name: Sorepills Lozenges (Orange Flavour) x24
searchable.brief_info: Sorepills Lozenges (Orange Flavour) are formulated with a powerful combination of two antiseptic ingredients that provide symptomatic relief for minor mouth and throat infections.
searchable.description: Find fast and effective relief from the pain and discomfort of a scratchy throat with Sorepills Lozenges (Orange Flavour) x24. The dual-action formula allows the lozenge to kill the bacteria associated with throat infections while the action of sucking lubricates and soothes the painful area. Infused with a bright, refreshing Orange Flavour, these lozenges are a popular Over-The-Counter (OTC) solution, often containing a boost of Vitamin C to support your immune system while providing up to two hours of targeted relief per lozenge.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Sorepills Lozenges (Orange Flavour) 

This is an Over-The-Counter (OTC) medicine.

  • Adults and Children over 6 years old: Dissolve one lozenge slowly in the mouth every 2 to 3 hours.
  • Maximum Dosage: Do not exceed a maximum of 12 lozenges in 24 hours.

Proper Administration

  • Administration: Place the lozenge in the mouth and allow it to dissolve completely and slowly. This ensures the active ingredients saturate the throat tissue for maximum relief.
  • Best Time to Take: Take a lozenge when the throat pain or irritation is most severe.
  • Missed Dose Guidance: Do not take a double dose. Continue the regular dosing schedule.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Sorepills Lozenges (Orange Flavour)

  • Known Allergies: Do NOT take if you are allergic to 2,4-dichlorobenzyl alcohol, amylmetacresol, any other lozenge ingredients (e.g., coloring agents, flavouring components), or Vitamin C.
  • Age Restriction: Not suitable for children under 6 years old. Young children can choke on lozenges.
  • Sugar Intolerance: Patients with rare hereditary problems of fructose intolerance, glucose-galactose malabsorption, or sucrose-isomaltose insufficiency should consult a doctor, as these lozenges often contain sucrose and glucose.

Side Effects of Sorepills Lozenges (Orange Flavour) 

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): None are typically common.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (That May Require Medical Attention): Hypersensitivity reactions (severe allergic reactions) such as rash, hives, swelling of the face, neck, or throat (angioedema), or difficulty breathing. Also report persistent itching or severe oral discomfort. If any of these occur, stop use immediately and consult a doctor.

Precautions and Warnings of Sorepills Lozenges (Orange Flavour)

  • Duration of Use: Consult a doctor or pharmacist if symptoms persist, have not improved, or have worsened after 3 days of use. This is crucial to ensure the infection is not serious.
  • Diabetes: Be aware that this medicine contains sugar (sucrose and glucose), which must be accounted for by patients with diabetes mellitus.
  • Pregnancy and Breastfeeding: Use with caution. Consult a doctor or pharmacist before using this product if you are pregnant, planning to become pregnant, or breastfeeding.
  • Administration: Dissolve the lozenge slowly in the mouth; do not chew or swallow it whole.

searchable.name: Eucerin SPF 50+ Sun Lotion 150mL
searchable.brief_info: Eucerin SPF 50+ Sun Lotion 150mL is an advanced, broad-spectrum sun protection formula specifically designed for the body, offering very high factor protection (SPF 50+) against both UVA and UVB radiation.
searchable.description: Eucerin SPF 50+ Sun Lotion 150mL unlike many sunscreens, this Eucerin lotion incorporates the brand's unique Advanced Spectral Technology, which combines photostable UV filters with Licochalcone A to neutralize free radicals caused by UV and High-Energy Visible (HEVIS) light. The lotion is non-greasy, water-resistant, and suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin. Eucerin SPF 50+ Sun Lotion 150mL provides daily defense against sunburn and long-term sun-induced damage, helping to reduce the risk of photo-aging.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Eucerin SPF 50+ Sun Lotion 150mL

This is a topical sun protection product.

  • Dosage: Apply generously and evenly to the skin before sun exposure. Use a sufficient amount to cover all exposed skin areas.

Proper Administration

  • Application: Massage the lotion smoothly over all exposed skin of the body, ensuring even coverage.
  • Timing: Apply the lotion generously before sun exposure (ideally 20 minutes prior).
  • Reapplication: Reapply frequently and generously (every 2 hours) to maintain the original protection, especially after swimming, towel drying, or sweating.
  • Missed Dose Guidance: Sunscreen should be applied consistently. If you miss reapplication time, apply immediately, and ensure you reapply every 2 hours thereafter.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: 150 mL Bottle
  • Form: Sun Protection Lotion (Topical)
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Eucerin SPF 50+ Sun Lotion 150mL

  • Known Allergies: Do NOT use if you have a known allergy or hypersensitivity to any of the ingredients, including specific chemical UV filters or Licochalcone A.
  • Broken Skin: Avoid applying to broken, irritated, or severely damaged skin.

Side Effects of Eucerin SPF 50+ Sun Lotion 150mL

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): None are typically common. If applied too generously without rubbing in, a temporary white cast may be noticeable, particularly on darker skin tones.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (That May Require Medical Attention): Allergic contact dermatitis, persistent itching, or a spreading rash. If severe irritation occurs, discontinue use immediately and consult a dermatologist.

Precautions and Warnings of Eucerin SPF 50+ Sun Lotion 150mL

  • Do Not Skimp: Apply sunscreen generously. The manufacturer's stated SPF protection level is only achieved when 2 mg/cm ^2 is applied (approximately two finger-lengths of product for the entire body). Applying less significantly reduces the protection level.
  • Infants and Young Children: Keep babies and young children out of direct sunlight. Do not expose them to the sun, even with high-SPF protection.
  • Staining: Avoid contact with clothing and hard surfaces to prevent staining. Allow the lotion to dry completely before dressing.
  • Eye Contact: Avoid contact with eyes. If the product gets into your eyes, rinse immediately and thoroughly with water.
  • Sunscreen is NOT Unlimited Time: Sunscreen does not offer 100% protection. Limit sun exposure during peak hours (10 am – 4 pm).

searchable.name: Vitabiotics Feroglobin Liquid 200mL
searchable.brief_info: Vitabiotics Feroglobin Liquid 200mL is the original, best-selling gentle iron and nutrient formula, designed to help maintain health and vitality by reducing tiredness and fatigue.
searchable.description: Vitabiotics Feroglobin Liquid 200mL delivers an easily absorbed, organic form of iron (Ferric Ammonium Citrate) complemented by essential blood-building micronutrients, including Folate, Vitamins B6, B12, and Vitamin C. Expertly blended with delicious natural Orange Extract, Honey, and Swiss Alpine Malt, Feroglobin Liquid is gentle on the stomach and easy to take. It provides comprehensive nutritional support that contributes to the normal formation of red blood cells and hemoglobin, making it an ideal choice for the whole family, including children over 3, women during pregnancy, and athletes.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Vitabiotics Feroglobin Liquid 200mL

This is an Over-The-Counter (OTC) nutritional supplement. (1 teaspoonful approx 5 mL)

  • Adults (Men and Women): Take one teaspoonful (5 mL) two times daily (total10 mL).
  • Children (7-12 Years): Take one teaspoonful (5 mL) one to two times daily.
  • Children (3-6 Years): Take 1/2 (half) a teaspoonful twice daily.

Proper Administration

  • Administration: Shake the bottle well before each use. The liquid can be taken directly or mixed with water or fruit juice.
  • Best Time to Take: Take the liquid with or immediately after a main meal to reduce the risk of stomach upset and enhance absorption.
  • Missed Dose Guidance: If you miss a dose, simply take the next dose as usual with your next main meal. Do not take a double dose.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Vitabiotics Feroglobin Liquid 200mL

  • Known Allergies: Do NOT take if you have a known allergy or hypersensitivity to any of the ingredients, including iron compounds, B vitamins, honey, or barley malt extract.
  • Age Restriction: Not recommended for children under 3 years old unless specifically advised by a physician.
  • Pre-existing Conditions: Individuals with conditions causing iron overload (e.g., Haemochromatosis) or certain types of anaemia should consult a doctor before use.

Side Effects of Vitabiotics Feroglobin Liquid 200mL

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Darkening of stools (which is normal due to unabsorbed iron) and mild, temporary upset stomach, nausea, or constipation. These effects are generally mild due to the gentle iron formulation.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (That May Require Medical Attention): Severe gastrointestinal irritation, persistent vomiting, or signs of an allergic reaction (e.g., rash, swelling). If severe symptoms occur, stop use immediately and seek medical advice.

Precautions and Warnings of Vitabiotics Feroglobin Liquid 200mL

  • Keep Out of Reach of Children: THIS PRODUCT CONTAINS IRON, WHICH IF TAKEN IN EXCESS, MAY BE HARMFUL TO VERY YOUNG CHILDREN. Store the bottle securely out of their sight and reach.
  • Overdose Risk: Do not exceed the recommended daily dosage. Consult your doctor or pharmacist if you are under medical supervision or taking other supplements.
  • Absorption Interference: Avoid taking the liquid with tea, coffee, or dairy products (milk) as they can significantly reduce iron absorption. Maintain a gap of at least one hour.
  • Storage After Opening: Refrigerate after opening and consume within three months to maintain freshness and efficacy.

searchable.name: Vitabiotics Omega-H3 Liquid 200mL
searchable.brief_info: Vitabiotics Omega-H3 Liquid 200mL is an internationally renowned, advanced comprehensive liquid bio-formula designed to support overall energy, vitality, and well-being.
searchable.description: Vitabiotics Omega-H3 Liquid 200mL is goes beyond a standard multivitamin, this liquid formulation provides a carefully balanced blend of 18 bio-elements, including a wide spectrum of B vitamins, minerals, and essential amino acids (such as L-Lysine and L-Histidine), combined with the natural goodness of Swiss Alpine Malt. Omega-H3 Liquid is specifically formulated to help combat fatigue and support cellular protection from oxidative stress. With a great-tasting natural orange-chocolate flavor, this easy-to-take liquid is an ideal alternative for individuals of all ages (over 3) seeking daily nutritional safeguard and sustained energy release.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Vitabiotics Omega-H3 Liquid 200mL

This is an Over-The-Counter (OTC) nutritional supplement. (1 teaspoonful approx 5 mL)

  • Adults (Men and Women): Take one teaspoonful (5 mL) two times daily (total 10 mL).
  • Children (7-12 Years): Take one teaspoonful (5 mL) one to two times daily.
  • Children (3-6 Years): Take half a teaspoonful twice daily.

Proper Administration

  • Administration: Take orally, using a measuring spoon. It can be taken directly or mixed with water or fruit juice.
  • Best Time to Take: Take the liquid with or immediately after a main meal (like lunch or dinner) to aid absorption and palatability.
  • Missed Dose Guidance: If you miss a dose, simply take the next dose as usual. Do not take a double dose.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Vitabiotics Omega-H3 Liquid 200mL

  • Known Allergies: Do NOT take if you have a known allergy or hypersensitivity to any of the ingredients, including yeast, or Malt Extract (from Barley).
  • Iron Overload: Individuals with conditions causing iron overload (e.g., Haemochromatosis) should consult a doctor before use.
  • Age Restriction: This liquid is generally recommended for adults and children over 3 years of age, but follow the specific dosage for children strictly.
  • Thyroid Conditions: Consult your doctor if you have a thyroid condition, as the iodine content may require monitoring.

Side Effects of Vitabiotics Omega-H3 Liquid 200mL

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Mild stomach upset, nausea, or a change in taste. Darkening of the stools may occur due to unabsorbed iron.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (That May Require Medical Attention): Signs of severe allergic reaction (rash, itching, swelling of the face/throat). If any severe or persistent symptoms occur, stop use immediately and seek medical advice.

Precautions and Warnings of Vitabiotics Omega-H3 Liquid 200mL

  • Keep Out of Reach of Children: Iron-containing supplements are a leading cause of accidental poisoning in children. Store the bottle securely out of their sight and reach.
  • Overdose Risk: Do not exceed the recommended daily intake. This supplement is comprehensive and replaces other standard multivitamins; do not take alongside them, as this could lead to excessive intake of certain vitamins (like B1, D, and Iron).
  • Food Timing: Take the liquid with or immediately after a main meal to maximize the absorption of fat-soluble vitamins (D and E) and minimize the risk of stomach irritation.
  • Shaking: Shake the bottle well before use, as natural ingredients may settle.

searchable.name: Kedi Re-vive Capsules 400mg
searchable.brief_info: Kedi Revive Capsules 400mg are a highly regarded traditional herbal supplement formulated to boost vitality, energy, and overall immune function.
searchable.description: Kedi Revive Capsules 400mg contains a concentrated extract of Cordyceps Sinensis, a highly valued medicinal mushroom known in traditional Chinese medicine for its powerful adaptogenic and restorative properties. Specifically chosen for its capacity to enhance physical stamina, improve oxygen utilization, and support the body's natural defenses, Kedi Revive Capsules 400mg are an ideal supplement for individuals experiencing fatigue, low energy, or those looking to optimize respiratory and athletic performance. This supplement is manufactured to ensure quality and potency, offering natural, sustained support for whole-body health.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Kedi Revive Capsules 400mg

Take as directed by the pharmacist or physician.

  • Adults: Take 1 to 2 capsules once or twice daily, or as advised by a healthcare practitioner.

Proper Administration

  • Administration: Swallow the capsule whole with water.
  • Best Time to Take: It is generally recommended to take the capsules with or after meals to enhance absorption and minimize any minor stomach upset. Many users prefer morning and midday doses to maximize energy benefits throughout the day.
  • Missed Dose Guidance: If you miss a dose, simply take the next scheduled dose as usual. Do not take a double dose to compensate.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: Varies (Commonly 10 or 60 Capsules)
  • Form: Oral Capsule
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Kedi Revive Capsules 400mg

  • Known Allergies: Do NOT take if you have a known allergy or hypersensitivity to Cordyceps mushroom or any related fungal species.
  • Autoimmune Diseases: Individuals with autoimmune diseases (such as multiple sclerosis, lupus, or rheumatoid arthritis) should consult their physician before use, as Cordyceps may stimulate the immune system.
  • Bleeding Disorders/Surgery: Consult a doctor if you have a bleeding disorder or are scheduled for surgery, as Cordyceps may slow blood clotting.

Side Effects of Kedi Revive Capsules 400mg

As a natural herbal supplement, Kedi Revive Capsules are generally well-tolerated.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Mild stomach discomfort, nausea, or diarrhea, usually occurring only when initiating treatment.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (That May Require Medical Attention): Signs of severe allergic reaction (rash, hives, difficulty breathing). If you experience severe side effects, stop use immediately and seek medical advice.

Precautions and Warnings of Kedi Revive Capsules 400mg

  • Before Starting (Medication Interactions): Consult a healthcare professional if you are taking medications to suppress the immune system (immunosuppressants, corticosteroids) or medications that slow blood clotting (anticoagulants, antiplatelet drugs).
  • Duration: Consult a doctor if you plan to use this supplement for periods exceeding several months continuously.
  • Diabetes: Cordyceps may affect blood sugar levels. Individuals with diabetes should monitor their blood glucose closely when starting this supplement.
  • Pregnancy and Breastfeeding: Safety has not been established. Consult a doctor before using Kedi Revive Capsules during pregnancy or while breastfeeding.

searchable.name: Nature's Field L-Arginine 500mg Capsules
searchable.brief_info: Nature's Field L-Arginine 500mg Capsules is a premium dietary supplement containing the essential amino acid L-Arginine, a crucial building block of protein recognized for its significant role in cardiovascular health and physical performance.
searchable.description: Nature's Field L-Arginine 500mg Capsules is a precursor to Nitric Oxide (NO), this supplement is vital for improving blood flow throughout the body. Nature's Field L-Arginine 500mg Capsules supports vasodilation (the widening of blood vessels), promoting optimal circulation to muscles, organs, and the genital area. It is an ideal supplement for athletes seeking enhanced endurance, men looking to support sexual health, and individuals focused on maintaining healthy heart function and blood pressure already within a normal range.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Nature's Field L-Arginine 500mg Capsules

This is an Over-The-Counter (OTC) nutritional supplement.

  • Adults: Take 1 to 2 capsules daily, or as directed by your healthcare professional. Dosage may be increased based on specific goals (e.g., athletic performance, sexual health) under medical supervision.

Proper Administration

  • Administration: Swallow the capsule whole with water.
  • Best Time to Take: L-Arginine is often best taken on an empty stomach (e.g., 30 minutes before meals or 2 hours after) to maximize absorption. For fitness goals, it can be taken 30-60 minutes before exercise.
  • Missed Dose Guidance: If you miss a dose, simply take the next scheduled dose as usual. Do not take a double dose.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Nature's Field L-Arginine 500mg Capsules

  • Known Allergies: Do NOT take if you have a known allergy or hypersensitivity to L-Arginine or any other ingredients in the capsule.
  • Low Blood Pressure (Hypotension): Because L-Arginine promotes vasodilation, individuals with already low blood pressure should exercise caution, as it may lower it further.
  • Recent Heart Attack: If you have recently suffered a myocardial infarction (heart attack), consult your physician before taking L-Arginine supplements.
  • Herpes Virus: Individuals prone to herpes outbreaks (cold sores or genital herpes) should consult a doctor, as L-Arginine can potentially trigger outbreaks by competing with L-Lysine, another amino acid that inhibits the herpes virus.

Side Effects of Nature's Field L-Arginine 500mg Capsules

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): High doses may sometimes cause mild gastrointestinal discomfort, such as nausea, diarrhea, or bloating.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (That May Require Medical Attention): Signs of severe allergic reaction (rash, hives, swelling) or symptoms of excessively low blood pressure (dizziness, fainting). If these occur, stop use immediately and seek medical advice.

Precautions and Warnings of Nature's Field L-Arginine 500mg Capsules

  • Drug Interactions (Crucial): Consult your doctor or pharmacist if you are taking medications for high blood pressure or nitrates (for chest pain/angina). L-Arginine's NO-boosting effect may enhance the effect of these medications, leading to dangerously low blood pressure.
  • Asthma: Individuals with asthma should use L-Arginine with caution, as high doses may worsen breathing, although this is rare.
  • Diabetes: L-Arginine can affect blood sugar levels. Individuals with diabetes should monitor their blood glucose closely.
  • Surgery: Stop taking L-Arginine at least two weeks before scheduled surgery due to its potential effect on blood pressure and blood flow.

searchable.name: Nature's Field Joint Renew Advance 10 x 10
searchable.brief_info: Nature's Field Joint Renew Advance (10 X 10 Tablets) is an advanced, high-strength dietary supplement specifically formulated to promote long-term joint mobility, flexibility, and comfort
searchable.description: Nature's Field Joint Renew Advance (10 X 10 Tablets) is a powerful blend of traditional joint-support compounds and modern herbal extracts. By nourishing cartilage, promoting optimum joint structure, and increasing joint fluid, the tablets work to support the rebuilding of worn-out joint tissues and guarantee painless movement. Joint Renew Advance is the ideal choice for individuals suffering from joint stiffness, chronic pain, or those diagnosed with conditions like Osteoarthritis, offering comprehensive support for holistic joint health. The 10 X 10 strip packaging provides a convenient 100-day supply (based on single tablet dosage).
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Nature's Field Joint Renew Advance

This is an Over-The-Counter (OTC) nutritional supplement.

  • Adults: Take 1 tablet once daily, or as directed by a healthcare professional.

Proper Administration

  • Administration: Swallow the tablet whole with a glass of water. Do not crush or chew.
  • Best Time to Take: The tablet is best taken with a meal to enhance absorption and minimize the potential for stomach discomfort.

Missed Dose Guidance: If you miss a dose, simply take the next scheduled dose as usual. Do not take a double dose to compensate
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: 100 Tablets (10 strips of 10 tablets)
  • Form: Oral Tablet
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Nature's Field Joint Renew Advance

  • Known Allergies: Do NOT take if you have a known allergy to Glucosamine (often derived from shellfish), MSM, Chondroitin, or any other ingredients in the tablets.
  • Pregnancy and Breastfeeding: Consult a healthcare professional before use, as safety has not been established in these populations.
  • Children: Not recommended for children under 18 years of age.

Side Effects of Nature's Field Joint Renew Advance

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Mild gastrointestinal discomfort, including nausea, heartburn, or diarrhea, usually temporary.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (That May Require Medical Attention): Allergic reactions (e.g., swelling of the throat/face, hives), or severe, persistent gastrointestinal upset. If these occur, discontinue use immediately and seek medical advice.
  • Note: Glucosamine may affect blood sugar levels; individuals with diabetes should monitor their blood glucose closely.

Precautions and Warnings of Nature's Field Joint Renew Advance

  • Shellfish Allergy: Individuals with a known shellfish allergy should be cautious and verify the source of the Glucosamine HCL.
  • Blood Thinners (Anticoagulants): Consult your doctor or pharmacist if you are taking blood-thinning medications (e.g., Warfarin), as Glucosamine and Chondroitin may potentially increase the risk of bleeding.
  • Diabetes: Monitor blood glucose carefully, as high doses of Glucosamine may impact insulin sensitivity.
  • Duration: Joint supplements typically require consistent daily use over a long period (several weeks to months) to achieve noticeable benefits. Do not expect instant pain relief.
