searchable.name: DHA Emulsion 100mL
searchable.brief_info: DHA Emulsion 100mL is a high-quality, palatable liquid supplement specifically formulated to deliver essential Docosahexaenoic Acid (DHA), a crucial Omega-3 fatty acid, along with supportive Vitamins A, D, and E.
searchable.description: DHA Emulsion 100mL is vital for the development and function of the brain, eyes, and nervous system, particularly in growing children. The active ingredients are delivered in a unique emulsion format, which breaks down the oily components into tiny droplets. This method not only improves the taste and ease of administration but also significantly enhances the absorption and bioavailability of the DHA and fat-soluble vitamins compared to standard oils. DHA Emulsion 100mL ensures your family receives these critical nutrients for optimal growth and cognitive health.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of DHA Emulsion 100mL

This is an Over-The-Counter (OTC) nutritional supplement.

  • Infants (under 1 year): Administer as advised by a paediatrician.
  • Children (1-5 years): Typically 5 mL (1 teaspoonful) once daily.
  • Children (over 5 years) and Adults: Typically 10 mL (2 teaspoonfuls) once daily, or as directed by a healthcare professional.

Proper Administration

  • Administration: Shake the bottle well before each use. Measure the dose accurately using a medicine spoon or cup and take orally.
  • Best Time to Take: Can be taken at any time, but taking it with or after a meal may enhance absorption and minimize any aftertaste.
  • Missed Dose Guidance: If a dose is missed, simply take the next scheduled dose as usual. Do not take a double dose.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: 100 mL Bottle
  • Form: Oral Liquid Emulsion
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of DHA Emulsion 100mL

  • Known Allergies: Do NOT take if there is a known allergy or hypersensitivity to any of the ingredients, particularly fish/marine products (the source of Omega-3) or any components of the emulsion.
  • Hypervitaminosis: Individuals with pre-existing conditions causing an overload of Vitamin A or D (hypervitaminosis) should consult a doctor before use.

Side Effects of DHA Emulsion 100mL

Omega-3 supplements are usually well-tolerated, especially in an emulsion format.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Mild gastrointestinal upset, loose stools, or a slight aftertaste (often reduced significantly by the emulsion format and flavouring).
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (That May Require Medical Attention): Signs of severe allergic reaction (rash, hives, swelling) or symptoms of excessive Vitamin A or D intake (e.g., severe headache, appetite loss, fatigue). If severe symptoms occur, discontinue use immediately and seek medical advice.

Precautions and Warnings of DHA Emulsion 100mL

  • Overdose Risk: Do not exceed the recommended daily dosage, especially concerning Vitamins A and D. Excessive intake of these fat-soluble vitamins can accumulate in the body and be harmful.
  • Medication Interactions: Consult a healthcare professional if the individual is taking blood thinners (anticoagulants), as high doses of Omega-3 may slightly affect blood clotting.
  • Storage Integrity: The emulsion is susceptible to spoilage. Adhere strictly to the refrigeration instructions after opening and consume within the stated timeframe.
  • Combination Supplements: Be careful when combining with other multivitamin supplements to avoid stacking and over-dosing on Vitamins A or D.

searchable.name: Brett Gold Mouthwash 400mL
searchable.brief_info: Brett Gold Mouthwash 400mL is a powerful antiseptic and refreshing daily oral rinse formulated for effective, comprehensive oral hygiene.
searchable.description: Brett Gold Mouthwash 400mL contains active ingredients that target plaque and bacteria, this mouthwash is designed to reach areas brushing alone might miss. Brett Gold Mouthwash works to reduce the formation of plaque, combat gingivitis, and neutralize the bacteria responsible for persistent bad breath. With its large size and invigorating, clean flavor, it provides a crucial addition to your daily routine, leaving your mouth feeling fresh, clean, and protected for hours. It is an ideal choice for maintaining gum health and ensuring long-lasting breath confidence.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Brett Gold Mouthwash 400mL

This is an Over-The-Counter (OTC) therapeutic mouthwash.

  • Adults and Children over 6 years old: Rinse with 10 mL to15 mL (usually one capful, check bottle) of undiluted mouthwash.

Proper Administration

  • Administration: Pour the required amount of mouthwash into the cup. Swish the mouthwash around the mouth and gargle for 30 to 60 seconds. Spit out the solution completely. Do not rinse with water afterward.
  • Best Time to Take: Use twice daily, morning and evening, after brushing.
  • Food/Drink Restrictions: To maintain the active ingredients' binding and protective effect, avoid eating or drinking for at least 30 minutes after rinsing.

Missed Dose Guidance: If you miss a dose, simply use the mouthwash at your next scheduled time.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Brett Gold Mouthwash 400mL

  • Known Allergies: Do NOT use if you have a known allergy or hypersensitivity to Cetylpyridinium Chloride, Chlorhexidine, or any other ingredients, flavorings, or colorings in the mouthwash.
  • Age Restriction: Generally not recommended for children under 6 years old due to the high risk of swallowing the product.
  • Severe Wounds: Avoid use immediately after severe dental/oral surgery unless advised by a dentist.

Side Effects of Brett Gold Mouthwash 400mL

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): A temporary alteration of taste perception (metallic taste) or a mild, transient burning/stinging sensation.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (That May Require Medical Attention): Severe allergic reaction (rash, hives, swelling of the mouth/throat), or persistent, severe redness or pain in the gums/mouth. If severe symptoms occur, stop use immediately and seek medical advice.
  • Note (Chlorhexidine Only): If Chlorhexidine is the active ingredient, prolonged use can cause reversible staining of the teeth and tongue.

Precautions and Warnings of Brett Gold Mouthwash 400mL

  • DO NOT SWALLOW: The mouthwash is for oral rinsing only. Do not swallow the solution. Swallowing large amounts, especially by children, can cause stomach upset or systemic absorption.
  • Supervision: Children over 6 years old should be supervised to ensure they rinse correctly and spit out the mouthwash.
  • Use After Brushing: To maximize plaque control, use the mouthwash after brushing. If Chlorhexidine is the active ingredient, wait 30 minutes after using toothpaste (which contains SLS/Sodium Lauryl Sulfate) before rinsing, or rinse thoroughly with water between brushing and rinsing.
  • Long-Term Use: Consult your dentist if symptoms persist or if you plan to use this mouthwash continuously for more than four weeks.

searchable.name: Nature's Field Joint Renew Capsules X30
searchable.brief_info: Nature's Field Joint Renew Capsules x30 is a comprehensive dietary supplement formulated to nourish joint cartilage, improve flexibility, and provide relief from joint pain and stiffness.
searchable.description: Nature's Field Joint Renew Capsules combines high-potency doses of the essential building blocks of cartilage: Glucosamine and Chondroitin, along with other joint-supporting nutrients like MSM (Methylsulfonylmethane). Designed to restore joint fluid, aid in the repair of connective tissue, and reduce inflammation, Joint Renew Capsules are an excellent choice for individuals experiencing symptoms of degenerative joint disease, such as osteoarthritis, or for athletes looking to protect their joint health. The convenient 30-capsule pack is ideal for starting a focused joint renewal regimen.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Nature's Field Joint Renew Capsules

This is an Over-The-Counter (OTC) nutritional supplement.

  • Adults: Take 1 capsule daily, or as directed by a healthcare professional.

Proper Administration

  • Administration: Swallow the capsule whole with a full glass of water. Do not crush or chew.
  • Best Time to Take: The capsule should be taken with a meal to optimize the absorption of the ingredients and minimize potential stomach upset.

Missed Dose Guidance: If you miss a dose, simply take the next scheduled dose as usual with your next meal. Do not take a double dose.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Nature's Field Joint Renew Capsules 

  • Known Allergies: Do NOT take if you have a known allergy or hypersensitivity to shellfish (Glucosamine is commonly derived from this source) or any other component of the capsule.
  • Pregnancy and Breastfeeding: Consult a healthcare professional before use, as safety has not been established in these populations.
  • Children: Not recommended for individuals under 18 years of age.

Side Effects of Nature's Field Joint Renew Capsules 

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Mild gastrointestinal upset, nausea, heartburn, or diarrhea. Taking the capsules with food usually minimizes these effects.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (That May Require Medical Attention): Allergic reactions (e.g., severe itching, swelling of the face/throat).7 If any severe symptoms occur, discontinue use immediately and seek medical advice.
  • Note: Glucosamine may affect blood sugar levels; individuals with diabetes should monitor their blood glucose closely.

Precautions and Warnings of Nature's Field Joint Renew Capsules 

  • Shellfish Warning: Individuals with a known shellfish allergy must check the specific source of Glucosamine listed on the package before use.
  • Blood Thinners (Anticoagulants): Consult your doctor or pharmacist if you are taking blood-thinning medications (e.g., Warfarin), as Glucosamine and Chondroitin may potentially affect blood clotting and increase the risk of bleeding.8
  • Duration: Joint supplements require long-term, consistent use to be effective.9 Do not discontinue use if you do not feel immediate relief.
  • Medical Diagnosis: If joint pain is severe, sudden, or accompanied by redness and heat, seek medical diagnosis before relying solely on supplementation.

searchable.brief_info: Nature's Field Joint Renew Maximum Strength x90 is a premium, high-potency dietary supplement formulated to deliver the highest level of support for severe joint pain, stiffness, and deteriorated cartilage.
searchable.description: Nature's Field Joint Renew Maximum Strength concentrates the three most essential joint compounds—Glucosamine, Chondroitin, and MSM (Methylsulfonylmethane)—to provide superior nourishment and protection. By supplying the crucial building blocks for cartilage repair and significantly boosting the joint's natural lubrication (synovial fluid), the capsules work intensively to restore comfort and mobility. The 90-capsule count provides a substantial, convenient supply for individuals diagnosed with advanced Osteoarthritis or those requiring intensive long-term joint support.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Nature's Field Joint Renew Maximum Strength x90

This is an Over-The-Counter (OTC) nutritional supplement.

  • Adults: Take 1 to 2 capsules daily, or as directed by a healthcare professional, based on the severity of the joint condition.

Proper Administration

  • Administration: Swallow the capsule whole with a full glass of water. Do not chew or crush the capsule.
  • Best Time to Take: The capsules should be taken with a meal to optimize the absorption of the nutrients and significantly reduce the likelihood of stomach discomfort.
  • Missed Dose Guidance: If you miss a dose, simply take the next scheduled dose as usual with your next meal. Do not take a double dose.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Nature's Field Joint Renew Maximum Strength x90

  • Known Allergies: Do NOT take if you have a known allergy to shellfish (Glucosamine is commonly sourced from this), or any other ingredients in the capsule.
  • Pregnancy and Breastfeeding: Consult a healthcare professional before use, as safety has not been established.
  • Children: Not recommended for individuals under 18 years of age.

Side Effects of Nature's Field Joint Renew Maximum Strength x90

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Digestive disturbances, including mild nausea, heartburn, or diarrhea/constipation. Taking the capsules with food usually minimizes these effects.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (That May Require Medical Attention): Allergic reactions (especially severe rash or swelling in those with shellfish allergies). If severe symptoms occur, discontinue use immediately and seek medical advice.
  • Note: Due to the Glucosamine content, individuals with diabetes should monitor blood glucose levels closely.

Precautions and Warnings of Nature's Field Joint Renew Maximum Strength x90

  • Shellfish Warning: Individuals with a known shellfish allergy must exercise extreme caution or avoid this product entirely, depending on the source of the Glucosamine.
  • Blood Thinners (Anticoagulants): Consult your doctor or pharmacist if you are taking blood-thinning medications (e.g., Warfarin), as Glucosamine and Chondroitin may potentially increase the risk of bleeding.
  • Diabetes: Glucosamine may affect insulin sensitivity. Inform your doctor that you are taking this supplement and monitor blood sugar levels diligently.
  • Duration of Use: Do not expect immediate results. This is a supplement for long-term structural renewal and should be taken consistently for at least 3-6 months to assess full efficacy.

searchable.name: Strepsils Lozenges (Orange Flavour with Vitamin C) X24
searchable.brief_info: Strepsils Lozenges Orange Flavour with Vitamin C offer rapid, dual-action relief from the discomfort and pain of a sore throat.
searchable.description: Strepsils Lozenges Orange Flavour with Vitamin C is a popular Over-The-Counter (OTC) medicine contains two powerful, mild antiseptic ingredients that work locally to target and fight bacteria associated with mouth and throat infections. The unique formulation includes a soothing dose of Vitamin C (100 mg) to help support immune function during a cold or flu. By dissolving slowly in the mouth, Strepsils Lozenges deliver the active ingredients directly to the infected area, providing effective pain relief, lubrication, and a boost of immune support in a refreshing orange flavour.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Strepsils Lozenges Orange Flavour with Vitamin C

This is an Over-The-Counter (OTC) medicine.

  • Adults and Children over 6 years old: Dissolve one lozenge slowly in the mouth every 2 to 3 hours.
  • Maximum Dosage: Do not exceed a maximum of 12 lozenges in 24 hours.

Proper Administration

  • Administration: Allow the lozenge to dissolve completely in the mouth. This maximizes contact time with the throat and mouth tissue.
  • Best Time to Take: Use when the throat is most painful. Ensure consistent use throughout the day during waking hours.

Missed Dose Guidance: Do not take a double dose. Continue to use the medicine according to the recommended schedule.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: 2 lozenges per sachet, 12 Sachets per Box.
  • Form: Oral Lozenge (Hard Candy)
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Strepsils Lozenges Orange Flavour with Vitamin C

  • Known Allergies: Do NOT take if you are allergic (hypersensitive) to 2,4-dichlorobenzyl alcohol, amylmetacresol, Vitamin C, or any of the inactive ingredients, flavorings, or colorings.
  • Age Restriction: Not suitable for children under 6 years old due to the risk of choking on the lozenge.
  • Sugar Intolerance: Patients with rare hereditary problems of fructose intolerance or malabsorption should consult a doctor, as these lozenges often contain glucose and sucrose.

Side Effects of Strepsils Lozenges Orange Flavour with Vitamin C

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): None are typically common. Mild local irritation or temporary alteration of taste perception may occur.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (That May Require Medical Attention): Signs of severe allergic reaction (rash, swelling of the mouth/face, difficulty breathing). Report persistent, severe soreness or oral pain. If any severe symptoms occur, stop use immediately and consult a doctor.

Precautions and Warnings of Strepsils Lozenges Orange Flavour with Vitamin C

  • Duration of Use: Consult a doctor or pharmacist if your symptoms persist, do not improve, or worsen after 3 days of using the lozenges. This is crucial to ensure the infection is not serious.
  • Diabetes: This medicine contains sucrose and glucose. Patients with diabetes mellitus must consider this carbohydrate content in their daily intake.
  • Pregnancy and Breastfeeding: Consult a doctor or pharmacist before using this product if you are pregnant, planning to become pregnant, or breastfeeding.

Administration: Dissolve the lozenge slowly and fully in the mouth; do not chew or swallow it whole, as this reduces the effectiveness in the throat.

searchable.name: Reptogel Mosquito Repellant 25g
searchable.brief_info: Reptogel Mosquito Repellent 25g protects your family from irritating mosquito bites and the diseases they transmit.
searchable.description: Reptogel Mosquito Repellent 25g. This popular topical repellent is formulated as a light, easy-to-apply gel that provides an effective barrier against biting insects, including mosquitoes that carry Malaria, Dengue, and Chikungunya. The active ingredient works by masking the human scent, deterring mosquitoes from landing and biting. Reptogel Mosquito Repellent 25g is designed to offer long-lasting protection and is often preferred for its non-sticky, non-greasy feel compared to creams. It is a reliable, convenient option for comprehensive protection during outdoor activities and indoor use, especially during peak mosquito hours.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Reptogel Mosquito Repellent 25g

This is a topical repellent.

  • Dosage: Apply a thin, adequate layer sufficient to cover all exposed skin areas.

Proper Administration

  • Application: Squeeze a small amount of gel onto the palm. Rub your hands together and spread the gel evenly over all exposed skin. Avoid applying heavily; a thin layer is effective.
  • Best Time to Use: Apply before going into mosquito-prone areas, especially during dawn and dusk.
  • Reapplication: Reapply after approximately 4 to 8 hours (depending on the specific active ingredient concentration and environmental conditions) or immediately after swimming, toweling, or excessive sweating.
  • Face Application: Apply to the face sparingly, avoiding the immediate eye and mouth areas.

How to Store and Dispose of Reptogel Mosquito Repellent 25g

  • Storage: Store below 30 degree C in a cool, dry place. Keep the tube tightly closed.
  • Disposal: Dispose of the empty tube via regular household waste.

Quick Tips for Reptogel Mosquito Repellent 25g

  • Clean Hands First: Apply the gel to your hands first before treating children or sensitive areas.
  • Wash Off Later: Always wash the treated skin with soap and water once protection is no longer needed.
  • Sunscreen Rule: If using sunscreen, apply the sunscreen first, allow it to absorb fully, and then apply the repellent on top.
  • Non-Greasy: The gel formulation is excellent for comfortable use in humid climates as it feels light and non-sticky.
  • Avoid Overuse: A thin, even layer is sufficient for the stated protection period.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Reptogel Mosquito Repellent 25g

  • Known Allergies: Do NOT use if you have a known allergy or hypersensitivity to the active repellent ingredient (DEET, DEPA, or Picaridin) or any other components of the gel.
  • Damaged Skin: Avoid applying to cuts, wounds, broken skin, irritated skin, rashes, or sunburn.

Side Effects of Reptogel Mosquito Repellent 25g

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Temporary, mild skin irritation, redness, or a faint chemical odor.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (That May Require Medical Attention): Signs of severe allergic reaction (rash, hives, significant swelling of the face/throat), or chemical sensitivity (blistering, severe burning sensation). If severe symptoms occur, discontinue use immediately and seek medical advice.

Precautions and Warnings of Reptogel Mosquito Repellent 25g

  • External Use Only: This product is for external application only. Do not ingest.
  • Avoid Sensitive Areas: Do not apply to the eyes, lips, inside the nose, or mouth. If contact occurs, rinse immediately and thoroughly with water.
  • Application to Children (Crucial): When applying to children, apply the gel to your own hands first and then apply to the child's exposed skin. DO NOT apply directly to a child's hands or fingers, as they may transfer the product to their eyes or mouth. Use sparingly on young children.

Wash Off: Wash treated skin with soap and water once you are indoors and no longer need protection.

searchable.name: Sudocream Skin Care Cream 250g
searchable.brief_info: Sudocrem Skin Care Cream 250g is a globally trusted, multi-purpose antiseptic cream for the whole family, clinically proven to soothe, heal, and protect irritated and sensitive skin.
searchable.description: Sudocrem Skin Care Cream 250g is a unique, emulsified water-in-oil cream that has remained a staple in households for decades. Its rich, protective formula creates a water-repellent barrier on the skin's surface, shielding it from irritants like moisture, urine, and chemicals. This cream is specifically formulated not just to protect, but also to aid healing, reduce discomfort, and prevent infection. The distinctive composition makes Sudocrem Skin Care Cream 250g highly effective for treating a wide range of common skin irritations, providing rapid, visible results.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Sudocrem Skin Care Cream 250g

Sudocrem Skin Care Cream 250g is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) product.

Apply a thin layer as required.

The same application method and frequency apply to adults, children, and the elderly.

Proper Administration

  • Route: Cutaneous (Topical) use.
  • How to Apply: Ensure the affected area is clean and dry. Apply a thin layer of the cream to the affected area. Gently massage the cream into the skin until it disappears, leaving a translucent film. If the area remains white, you have applied too much.
  • Frequency: Renew application as required, typically 2 to 3 times a day, or at every nappy change for babies.

Missed Dose Guidance

  • As this is a topical product used as needed, there is no missed dose guidance. Simply renew application when required to maintain the protective barrier.
searchable.specification: The active ingredients in this cream are Zinc Oxide, Anhydrous Hypoallergenic Lanolin, and Benzyl Alcohol, along with Benzyl Benzoate and Benzyl Cinnamate. The cream is a white, emulsified water-in-oil cream supplied in a 250g pot. It is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) product.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Sudocrem Skin Care Cream 250g

Do NOT use Sudocrem Skin Care Cream 250g if you have a known hypersensitivity or allergy to Zinc Oxide, Lanolin, Benzyl Alcohol, or any other ingredient listed in the cream.

Pregnancy & Breastfeeding Warnings

  • Pregnancy and Breastfeeding: There are no known contraindications for using Sudocrem Skin Care Cream 250g during pregnancy or breastfeeding, as it is a topical cream with minimal systemic absorption. Consult a healthcare professional if you have any concerns.

Side Effects of Sudocrem Skin Care Cream 250g

Side effects are rare due to the gentle nature of the cream.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): None reported for normal use.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (that may require medical attention): Local hypersensitivity reactions, such as an increase in irritation, rash, itching, or burning at the site of application.

What to do if side effects occur:

  • If you notice a local hypersensitivity reaction (e.g., irritation worsens, persistent redness, itching), stop using the cream immediately and consult a doctor or pharmacist.

Precautions and Warnings of Sudocrem Skin Care Cream 250g

  • External Use Only: Sudocrem Skin Care Cream 250g is for external use only. Avoid contact with the eyes and mucous membranes.
  • Allergy Check: If you have highly sensitive skin, perform a patch test on a small area before extensive application.
  • Fire Hazard Warning: Fabric (clothing, bedding, etc.) that has been in contact with this product burns more easily. Do not smoke or go near naked flames.
  • Swallowing: If swallowed accidentally, seek immediate medical advice, as large amounts may cause vomiting or CNS stimulation.
  • Newborns: The excipient Sodium Benzoate may cause local irritation and may increase jaundice in newborn babies (up to 4 weeks old).

searchable.name: Maldox Suspension 15mL
searchable.brief_info: Maldox Suspension 15mL is a powerful combination antimalarial drug, trusted for the treatment and prevention of malaria in specific regions and populations.
searchable.description: Maldox Suspension 15mL is a fast-acting, high-efficacy antimalarial medication. It contains a combination of two potent drugs, Sulfadoxine and Pyrimethamine, designed to work synergistically to fight the malaria parasite. This suspension formulation is especially important for patients who have difficulty swallowing tablets, such as children, allowing for precise and easy administration. Maldox Suspension 15mL is typically reserved for treating or preventing serious malaria infections, particularly in areas where the malaria parasite has developed resistance to other first-line drugs.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Maldox Suspension 15mL

Maldox Suspension 15mL is a Prescription Only Medicine (POM).

Take as directed by the pharmacist or physician.

Dosage, particularly for children and for prophylaxis, is based strictly on body weight and specific medical guidelines. Overdose is especially hazardous.

Proper Administration

  • Route: Oral suspension.
  • How to Take: Shake the bottle well before use. Measure the prescribed dose carefully using the provided measuring device (e.g., spoon or syringe). It can be taken with or without food.
  • Best Time of Day: For malaria prophylaxis, it should be taken on a regular schedule, preferably on the same day each week. For treatment, follow your doctor's exact timing instructions.

Missed Dose Guidance

  • If you miss a dose, take it as soon as you remember.
  • If it is almost time for your next scheduled dose, skip the missed dose and continue with your regular schedule.
  • Do not take a double dose to compensate for a missed dose.
searchable.specification: The active ingredients in this oral suspension are Sulfadoxine and Pyrimethamine. It is supplied in a 15mL bottle. It is a Prescription Only Medicine (POM). The concentration is typically 500 mg Sulfadoxine and 25 mg Pyrimethamine per 5 mL of suspension.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Maldox Suspension 15mL

Do NOT take Maldox Suspension 15mL if you:

  • Have a known allergy or hypersensitivity to Sulfadoxine, Pyrimethamine, or other sulfa drugs.
  • Have megaloblastic anemia due to folate deficiency.
  • Have certain blood cell disorders (blood dyscrasias).
  • Have severe liver or kidney failure, particularly if prolonged prophylactic use is intended.
  • Are an infant less than 2 months of age.
  • Are in the first trimester of pregnancy (due to potential risk to the fetus) or at term (late pregnancy).

Pregnancy & Breastfeeding Warnings

  • Pregnancy: Maldox Suspension should be avoided during the first trimester. It is used for intermittent preventive treatment in pregnant women during the second and third trimesters only when the benefit is considered to outweigh the risks, and only under strict medical direction.
  • Breastfeeding: Both active ingredients are excreted in human milk. Maldox Suspension is generally compatible with breastfeeding, but it should be avoided in premature infants and in infants with hyperbilirubinemia or glucose-6-phosphate dehydrogenase (G6PD) deficiency.

Side Effects of Maldox Suspension 15mL

This medication can cause serious side effects, which require immediate attention.

  • More Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Diarrhea, headache, anxiety, drowsiness, nervousness, mild stomach pain, loss of appetite, and dizziness.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (that may require medical attention):
    • Severe Skin Reactions: The first sign of any skin rash (no matter how mild), severe blistering, peeling, or a red skin rash (may signal life-threatening conditions like Stevens-Johnson syndrome).
    • Blood Disorders: Pale skin, easy bruising or bleeding, fever, chills, sore throat, or unusual tiredness (signs of blood dyscrasias).
    • Liver/Kidney Problems: Jaundice (yellowing of the skin or eyes), dark urine, urinating less than usual, or swelling.
    • Other: Convulsions (seizures), hallucinations, or a swollen tongue.

What to do if side effects occur:

  • For common side effects, consult your doctor if they persist or become bothersome.
  • For any serious side effect, especially the first sign of any skin rash or sore throat, stop taking Maldox Suspension 15mL immediately and seek emergency medical attention.

Precautions and Warnings of Maldox Suspension 15mL

  • Stop Immediately: Discontinue the medication if you notice a skin rash, sores in the mouth, sore throat, or severe bruising, as these can be early signs of serious complications.
  • Folate Deficiency: If you have an existing folate deficiency, your doctor must monitor your condition closely.
  • G6PD Deficiency: Use with caution if you have Glucose-6-Phosphate Dehydrogenase (G6PD) deficiency, as there is a risk of hemolytic anemia.
  • Sun Sensitivity: Maldox Suspension 15mL can make your skin more sensitive to sunlight. Avoid direct sunlight, sunlamps, or tanning beds while taking this medication. Wear protective clothing and use sunscreens.
  • Drug Interactions: Avoid concomitant use with Trimethoprim, Sulfamethoxazole/Trimethoprim, or any other sulfonamide, as this can severely increase the risk of adverse hematological (blood) and cutaneous (skin) reactions.
dosage_values: 500 mg Sulfadoxine and 25 mg Pyrimethamine per 5 mL

searchable.name: Dettol Antiseptic Liquid 750mL
searchable.brief_info: Dettol Antiseptic Liquid is a highly trusted, concentrated solution that is essential for every home, providing maximum protection against illness-causing germs for first aid, personal hygiene, and household disinfection.
searchable.description: Dettol Antiseptic Liquid is a concentrated, clear amber liquid with a distinctive pine oil odour. It is known for its ability to produce a milky white emulsion when diluted with water. Containing the potent active ingredient Chloroxylenol, Dettol Antiseptic Liquid is a versatile and reliable antiseptic and disinfectant. This large 1-Litre format ensures you have sufficient supply for comprehensive home hygiene, protecting your family from harmful bacteria, fungi, and certain viruses. Its efficacy and trusted status have made it a recommended choice by medical professionals for generations.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Dettol Antiseptic Liquid 750mL

Dettol Antiseptic Liquid 750mL is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) product. Do not use undiluted.

Use according to the dilution instructions provided on the packaging.

Typical Dilution Guidelines (Always use a measuring device for accuracy):

  • Wound Cleansing (Cuts, Bites, etc.): Dilute one tablespoonful of Dettol (approx. 15 mL) in one pint (approx. 500 mL) of water.
  • Personal Hygiene (Bathing): Use two teaspoonfuls of Dettol (approx. 10 mL) diluted in two pints (approx. 1 Litre) of warm water.
  • Household Disinfection (Surfaces/Floors): Use 1 capful (13.5 mL) of Dettol in 270 mL of water (or a capful per bucket for general mopping).

Proper Administration

  • Route: Topical (skin application, bathing, surface cleaning).
  • How to Use: Add the required amount of Dettol concentrate to the correct volume of clean water. Apply the diluted solution by washing, bathing, or wiping the surface.
  • Frequency: Use as needed for hygiene and cleaning tasks.

Missed Dose Guidance

  • Not applicable, as this is an antiseptic and disinfectant used on demand.
searchable.specification: The active ingredient in this liquid is Chloroxylenol, typically at a concentration of 4.8% w/v. It is a clear amber, concentrated liquid supplied in a 750 mL bottle. It is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) Antiseptic and Disinfectant.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Dettol Antiseptic Liquid

Do NOT use Dettol Antiseptic Liquid if you:

  • Have a known hypersensitivity or allergy to Chloroxylenol or any of the other ingredients (such as Pine oil, d-limonene, or Benzyl alcohol).
  • Have eczema or similar dry skin conditions.
  • NEVER USE UNDILUTED on the skin.
  • DO NOT SWALLOW.

Pregnancy & Breastfeeding Warnings

  • Pregnancy: Dettol Antiseptic Liquid 705mL can be used during pregnancy, as systemic exposure from topical use of Chloroxylenol is negligible.
  • Breastfeeding: The application of the liquid to the breast is not recommended during breastfeeding, as it is unknown whether the active ingredient or its metabolites are excreted in human milk.

Side Effects of Dettol Antiseptic Liquid

Side effects are generally limited to localized skin reactions.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Mild local irritation, especially if used undiluted or in high concentrations.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (that may require medical attention):
    • Hypersensitivity/Allergic Reactions: Skin sensitization, contact dermatitis, or skin discolouration.
    • Systemic Effects: If accidentally swallowed, it is poisonous and may cause severe consequences.

What to do if side effects occur:

  • If redness, irritation, or a rash develops, stop using the product immediately.
  • If swallowed: Wash out the mouth and drink plenty of water or milk. Consult your doctor immediately and take the bottle with you.
  • If contact is made with eyes: Wash thoroughly with cold water and consult your doctor.

Precautions and Warnings of Dettol Antiseptic Liquid

  • External Use Only: This product is for external use only.
  • Dilution is Essential: Always dilute the liquid according to the instructions before application to the skin to avoid irritation.
  • Avoid Sensitive Areas: Not for use around eyes, ear, nose, or mouth.
  • Large Areas: Do not use on large areas of the body or on highly sensitive skin.
  • Toxicity: Dettol is toxic and potentially fatal if swallowed or aspirated. Keep it strictly out of the sight and reach of children.
  • Pet Warning: The product is toxic to many animals, especially cats, due to their inability to fully metabolize phenolic compounds.

searchable.name: Salvon Antiseptic Liquid 2 L
searchable.brief_info: Savlon Antiseptic Liquid 2L is a trusted, non-stinging, dual-action solution that kills over 99.9% of common germs, making it an essential purchase for comprehensive family hygiene, wound care, and household disinfection.
searchable.description: Savlon Antiseptic Liquid is a clear, orange-yellow concentrated liquid designed for gentle yet effective germ protection. Unlike some harsh alternatives, Savlon's non-stinging formula is gentle enough for use on delicate skin but tough enough to eliminate a broad spectrum of illness-causing bacteria and fungi. This large 2-Litre size offers long-lasting value, ensuring a consistent supply for continuous first aid, bathing, and cleaning needs. Savlon Antiseptic Liquid helps protect your family by cleaning wounds and sterilizing surfaces, contributing to a healthier and germ-free home environment.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Savlon Antiseptic Liquid

Savlon Antiseptic Liquid is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) product. Do not use undiluted.

Use according to the dilution instructions provided on the packaging.

Typical Dilution Guidelines (Always use a clean, accurate measuring device):

  • Minor Cuts, Grazes, and Wounds (First Aid): Dilute 1 part of Savlon Antiseptic Liquid with 15 parts of clean water (e.g., 5 mL in 75 mL of water).
  • Personal Hygiene (Bathing): Add 1 spoonful (approx. 5 mL) of Savlon to a bucket of water (approx. 10 Litres).
  • General Antiseptic Cleansing: Dilute 60 mL to 90 mL in 1.0 to 1.5 litres of water.

Proper Administration

  • Route: Topical application (skin) or surface cleaning.
  • How to Use: Add the concentrate to water to create the correct dilution. Apply the diluted solution gently to the affected area using a clean cotton ball or cloth. Do not apply any dressing or bandage unless advised by a doctor.
  • Frequency: Use as needed for wound cleaning or personal hygiene.

Missed Dose Guidance

  • Not applicable, as this is an antiseptic and disinfectant used on demand.
searchable.specification: The active ingredients in this liquid are Cetrimide (typically 3.0% w/v) and Chlorhexidine Gluconate (typically 0.3% w/v). It is a clear, orange-yellow concentrated liquid supplied in a 2L (2000 mL) bottle. It is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) General Sales List (GSL) Antiseptic and Disinfectant.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Savlon Antiseptic Liquid 

Do NOT use Savlon Antiseptic Liquid if you:

  • Have a known hypersensitivity or allergy to Chlorhexidine Gluconate, Cetrimide, or any other ingredient in the liquid.
  • NEVER USE UNDILUTED on the skin, as it can cause irritation or chemical burns.
  • DO NOT USE in body cavities, or near the middle ear, brain, or meninges.
  • DO NOT SWALLOW.

Pregnancy & Breastfeeding Warnings

  • Pregnancy: Consult your doctor. Information regarding the use of Savlon Antiseptic Liquid during pregnancy is generally limited, but it is typically considered safe for topical use when correctly diluted.
  • Breastfeeding: Consult your doctor. If used as an antiseptic cleanser by a breastfeeding mother, the treated area (e.g., nipples) should be thoroughly rinsed with water before commencing breastfeeding.

Side Effects of Savlon Antiseptic Liquid 

Side effects are rare when the product is used correctly.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Mild skin irritation or redness may occur, particularly if the liquid is used undiluted or in high concentrations.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (that may require medical attention):
    • Hypersensitivity Reactions: Severe allergic reactions, including rash, swelling of the face/throat, or difficulty breathing (anaphylaxis).
    • Chemical Skin Burns: May occur if the product is used undiluted or if wet dressings are left in contact with the skin for too long.

What to do if side effects occur:

  • If skin irritation or redness persists or worsens, stop using the product immediately and seek medical advice.
  • If swallowed: Wash out the mouth and drink plenty of water or milk. Consult your doctor immediately and show them the container.
  • If contact is made with eyes: Wash the open eye thoroughly with water for at least ten minutes and seek medical advice.

Precautions and Warnings of Savlon Antiseptic Liquid

  • External Use Only: This product is strictly for external use.
  • Dilution is Essential: Always dilute Savlon Antiseptic Liquid  as instructed before application to the skin to avoid irritation and skin burns.
  • Avoid Sensitive Areas: Avoid contact with the eyes, ears, nose, and mouth.
  • Incompatibility: Soap and organic matter (like blood) can reduce the activity of Savlon. Ensure the wound is rinsed before applying the diluted antiseptic.
  • Discolouration: The use of hypochlorite bleaches during laundry can cause brown stains on fabrics previously in contact with Savlon.
  • Children: Use with care in newborn babies, especially those born prematurely.

searchable.name: Dettol Antiseptic Liquid 75mL
searchable.brief_info: Dettol Antiseptic Liquid is the iconic, concentrated solution that is a trusted essential for protection against illness-causing germs in first aid, personal hygiene, and household disinfection. This convenient, travel-friendly size ensures germ protection is always within reach.
searchable.description: Dettol Antiseptic Liquid is a concentrated, clear amber liquid with a distinctive pine oil odour. When diluted with water, it produces a characteristic milky white emulsion. Containing the potent active ingredient Chloroxylenol (4.8% w/v), Dettol Antiseptic Liquid is a versatile and reliable antiseptic and disinfectant. This compact 75mL size is ideal for fitting into first aid kits, luggage, or small storage spaces. Its proven efficacy against a wide range of bacteria, fungi, and certain viruses makes it a time-honoured choice for minimizing infection risk and maintaining a hygienic environment.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Dettol Antiseptic Liquid

Dettol Antiseptic Liquid is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) product. Do not use undiluted.

Use according to the dilution instructions provided on the packaging.

Typical Dilution Guidelines:

  • Wound Cleansing (Cuts, Bites, etc.): Dilute 1 part Dettol to 20 parts clean water (e.g., 5 mL of Dettol in 100 mL of water).
  • Personal Hygiene (Bathing): Use a measured amount (e.g., 5-10 mL) diluted in 1 Litre of warm bathwater.
  • Household Disinfection (Surfaces): Use 1 capful in 270 mL of water (consult packaging for precise cap size and water ratio).

Proper Administration

  • Route: Topical (skin application, bathing, surface cleaning).
  • How to Use: Add the required amount of Dettol concentrate to the correct volume of clean water. Apply the diluted solution by washing, bathing, or wiping the surface.
  • Frequency: Use as needed for hygiene and cleaning tasks.

Missed Dose Guidance

  • Not applicable, as this is an antiseptic and disinfectant used on demand.
searchable.specification: The active ingredient in this liquid is Chloroxylenol, typically at a concentration of 4.8% w/v. It is a clear amber, concentrated liquid supplied in a 75mL bottle. It is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) Antiseptic and Disinfectant.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Dettol Antiseptic Liquid

Do NOT use Dettol Antiseptic Liquid if you:

  • Have a known hypersensitivity or allergy to Chloroxylenol or any other ingredient (e.g., Pine oil, Benzyl alcohol).
  • Have eczema or similar dry skin conditions.
  • Are an infant under 1 year of age.
  • NEVER USE UNDILUTED on the skin.
  • DO NOT SWALLOW.

Pregnancy & Breastfeeding Warnings

  • Pregnancy: Consult your doctor. Use is anticipated to be safe since systemic absorption from topical use is negligible.
  • Breastfeeding: Consult your doctor. It is unknown whether Chloroxylenol is excreted in human milk. Avoid application to the breast area during breastfeeding.

Side Effects of Dettol Antiseptic Liquid

Side effects are rare when the product is used correctly and diluted properly.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Mild local irritation, which may occur if the solution is too concentrated or used on sensitive skin.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (that may require medical attention):
    • Hypersensitivity Reactions: Skin sensitization, contact dermatitis, or localized allergic reactions.
    • Systemic Toxicity: If accidentally swallowed, it is poisonous and can cause severe health consequences.

What to do if side effects occur:

  • If redness, irritation, or a rash develops, stop using the product immediately.
  • If swallowed: Wash out the mouth and drink plenty of water or milk. Consult your doctor immediately and take the bottle with you.
  • If contact is made with eyes: Wash thoroughly with cold water for an extended period and consult your doctor.

Precautions and Warnings of Dettol Antiseptic Liquid

  • External Use Only: This product is for external use only.
  • Dilution is Essential: Always dilute the liquid according to the instructions before application to the skin to prevent severe irritation.
  • Avoid Sensitive Areas: Not for use around eyes, ears, nose, or mouth.
  • Large Areas: Do not use on large areas of the body or on highly sensitive skin.
  • Toxicity: Dettol Antiseptic Liquid 75mL is toxic if swallowed. Keep it strictly out of the sight and reach of children.

Pet Warning: The product is toxic to many animals, especially cats. Ensure animals do not ingest the product or come into contact with it when highly concentrated.

  • Have a known hypersensitivity or allergy to Chloroxylenol or any other component (e.g., Pine oil, Benzyl alcohol).
  • Have eczema or similar dry skin conditions.
  • Are an infant under 1 year of age.
  • NEVER USE UNDILUTED on the skin, as it can cause severe irritation.
  • DO NOT SWALLOW.

Pregnancy & Breastfeeding Warnings

  • Pregnancy: Consult your doctor. Given the minimal systemic absorption from proper topical use, it is generally considered safe for use during pregnancy.
  • Breastfeeding: Consult your doctor. Avoid applying the liquid to the breast area during breastfeeding, as information on its excretion in human milk is limited.

Side Effects of Dettol Antiseptic Liquid

Side effects are infrequent when the product is used correctly and diluted properly.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Mild local irritation or redness, which may occur if the solution is too concentrated or used on highly sensitive skin.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (that may require medical attention):
    • Hypersensitivity Reactions: Skin sensitization, contact dermatitis, or localized allergic reactions.
    • Systemic Toxicity: The concentrate is poisonous if accidentally swallowed and requires urgent medical intervention.

What to do if side effects occur:

  • If redness, irritation, or a rash develops, stop using the product immediately.
  • If swallowed: Wash out the mouth and drink plenty of water or milk. Consult your doctor immediately and take the bottle with you.
  • If contact is made with eyes: Wash the open eye thoroughly with cold water for an extended period and seek medical consultation.

Precautions and Warnings of Dettol Antiseptic Liquid

  • External Use Only: This product is strictly for external use.
  • Dilution is Essential: Always dilute the liquid according to the instructions before applying it to the skin to prevent chemical irritation.
  • Avoid Sensitive Areas: Do not use near eyes, ears, nose, or mouth.
  • Toxicity: Dettol Antiseptic Liquid 250mL is toxic if swallowed. Keep it strictly out of the sight and reach of children.
  • Pet Warning: The product is toxic to many animals, particularly cats. Ensure pets do not ingest the product or come into contact with concentrated residue.

searchable.name: Rhinathiol Promethazine Syrup
searchable.brief_info: Rhinathiol Promethazine Syrup offers a dual-action formula to relieve coughs by thinning phlegm and controlling associated allergic symptoms like sneezing and runny nose.
searchable.description: Rhinathiol Promethazine Syrup is a combined medication formulated to provide symptomatic relief for coughs associated with respiratory conditions, such as bronchitis, the common cold, or allergies, particularly when mucus is thick and difficult to clear. It brings together two active ingredients: a potent antihistamine and an effective mucolytic. The combination not only helps the airways clear out excess phlegm but also soothes irritation and controls allergic reactions often accompanying respiratory illnesses. This syrup formulation is easy to swallow and is commonly used when a cough is troublesome and keeps the patient awake.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Rhinathiol Promethazine Syrup

Rhinathiol Promethazine Syrup is a Prescription Only Medicine (POM).

Take as directed by the pharmacist or physician.

Dosage is strictly determined based on the patient's age and weight, and the severity of the symptoms. Do not exceed the prescribed dose or frequency.

Proper Administration

  • Route: Oral suspension.
  • How to Take: Shake the bottle well before use. Measure the exact prescribed dose using a proper measuring device (e.g., measuring spoon or cup). It can be taken with or without food.
  • Best Time of Day: Due to the strong sedative effect, it is typically recommended to take the syrup at night (bedtime) to control nocturnal coughs and allow for uninterrupted sleep. If prescribed during the day, use caution.

Missed Dose Guidance

  • If you miss a dose, take it as soon as you remember.
  • If it is almost time for your next scheduled dose, skip the missed dose and continue with your regular dosing schedule.
  • Do not double the dose to make up for a missed one.
searchable.specification: The active ingredients in this syrup are Promethazine Hydrochloride and Carbocisteine. It is supplied as an oral syrup in a 125mL bottle. It is a Prescription Only Medicine (POM).
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Rhinathiol Promethazine 125mL Syrup

Do NOT take Rhinathiol Promethazine Syrup if you:

  • Have a known allergy or hypersensitivity to Promethazine, Carbocisteine, or any other ingredient in the syrup.
  • Are taking or have recently taken Monoamine Oxidase Inhibitors (MAOIs), including within the last 14 days.
  • Have narrow-angle glaucoma or conditions causing urinary retention (e.g., prostate problems).
  • Have a history of agranulocytosis (a severe reduction in white blood cells).
  • Have severe liver disease.
  • Are treating a cough in children under 2 years of age (due to the risk of respiratory depression).

Pregnancy & Breastfeeding Warnings

  • Pregnancy: Consult your doctor. This medication is generally not recommended during the first trimester. Use in later stages is only advised if the expected benefit outweighs the potential risk.
  • Breastfeeding: Consult your doctor. Promethazine passes into breast milk and may cause sedation or irritability in the infant. It may also suppress lactation. Use is generally not advised while breastfeeding.

Side Effects of Rhinathiol Promethazine Syrup

Due to the Promethazine component, side effects are common and often pronounced.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Drowsiness/Sedation (very common), dizziness, dry mouth, blurred vision, difficulty urinating, and constipation.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (that may require medical attention):
    • Allergic Reactions: Severe rash, swelling of the face, lips, or throat, or difficulty breathing.
    • Central Nervous System (CNS) Effects: Tremors, confusion, hallucinations, or unusual excitement (paradoxical excitation, especially in children).
    • Respiratory Depression: Severe difficulty breathing (a risk, especially in very young children or high doses).

What to do if side effects occur:

  • For common drowsiness, avoid driving or operating heavy machinery.
  • For any serious or sudden adverse effects (especially a rash or difficulty breathing), stop the medication immediately and seek emergency medical attention.

Precautions and Warnings of Rhinathiol Promethazine Syrup

  • Sedation Risk: This medication causes significant drowsiness. Do not drive, operate heavy machinery, or perform complex tasks after taking this syrup.
  • Alcohol Interaction: Avoid consuming alcohol while taking this medication, as it significantly enhances the sedative effect, which can be dangerous.
  • Asthma and Respiratory Disease: Use with extreme caution in patients with asthma, chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD), or other breathing difficulties, as it can worsen respiratory depression.
  • Epilepsy/Seizures: Use with caution in patients with a history of epilepsy or seizure disorders, as it may lower the seizure threshold.
  • Elderly Patients: Use with caution, as elderly individuals are more susceptible to side effects like confusion, dizziness, and urinary retention.
  • Drug Interactions: Inform your doctor about all other medications you are taking, especially other sedatives, tranquilizers, antidepressants (TCAs, SSRIs), or cold/flu medicines, as the sedative effects can be dangerously increased.

searchable.name: La Roche - Posay Mela B3 Serum 30mL
searchable.brief_info: La Roche-Posay Mela B3 Serum 30mL is a new-generation anti-hyperpigmentation treatment clinically proven to correct the appearance of dark spots, including stubborn and persistent ones, while promoting a more even and radiant skin tone.
searchable.description: La Roche-Posay Mela B3 Serum 30mL is an intense anti-dark spot serum co-developed with leading dermatologists and pigmentation experts. This advanced formula champions a breakthrough, multi-patented active ingredient, Melasyl™, combined with a high concentration of 10% Niacinamide (Vitamin B3). Unlike many conventional brighteners that only target melanin after it’s fully formed, this serum acts earlier in the melanin synthesis process, intercepting excess pigmentation before it marks the skin. The ultra-lightweight, peach-coloured gel-serum texture absorbs quickly without stickiness, making it suitable for all skin tones and types, including sensitive skin.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of La Roche-Posay Mela B3 Serum 30mL

La Roche-Posay Mela B3 Serum 30mL is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) dermatological product.

Apply 3-4 drops morning and/or evening, or as directed by a skincare professional.

Proper Administration

  • Route: Topical application to the skin.
  • How to Use: Apply 3-4 drops of the peach-coloured gel-serum to the face, neck, and décolleté (upper chest area) after cleansing and toning. Gently massage into the skin until fully absorbed.
  • Timing: Can be applied once daily (morning or evening) or twice daily (morning and evening).
    • Morning: If used in the morning, MUST be followed immediately by a broad-spectrum SPF 30+ product.
    • Evening: Apply before your moisturizer.

Missed Dose Guidance

  • If you miss an application, simply resume your routine with the next scheduled dose. There is no need to double the quantity applied.
searchable.specification: The active ingredients in this serum include Melasyl™ (multi-patented), 10% Niacinamide, Lipo-Hydroxy Acid (LHA), and Retinyl Palmitate. It is supplied as a peach-coloured gel-serum in a 30mL dropper bottle. It is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) Dermatological Serum.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of La Roche-Posay Mela B3 Serum 30mL

Do NOT use La Roche-Posay Mela B3 Serum 30mL if you:

  • Have a known allergy or hypersensitivity to Melasyl™, Niacinamide, Retinyl Palmitate, or any other ingredient in the serum.

Pregnancy & Breastfeeding Warnings

  • Pregnancy: Consult your doctor. As the formula contains Retinyl Palmitate (a Retinol derivative), expert guidance is advised. While topical application is generally lower risk than oral intake, it is best to consult your healthcare provider before use during pregnancy.
  • Breastfeeding: Consult your doctor. Use is generally advised only after consulting a healthcare professional.

Side Effects of La Roche-Posay Mela B3 Serum 30mL

Side effects are generally mild and may be related to the exfoliating and active ingredients.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Mild redness, temporary stinging, or slight flakiness (due to the exfoliating action of LHA and Retinyl Palmitate), especially during the first few weeks of use.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (that may require medical attention):
    • Severe Irritation/Rash: Persistent burning, itching, intense redness, or a localized reaction resembling eczema.

What to do if side effects occur:

  • For mild, temporary irritation, reduce the frequency of application (e.g., use every other night) until the skin adjusts.
  • For severe or persistent irritation, discontinue use immediately and consult a dermatologist or physician.
  • Eye Contact: Avoid direct contact with eyes. In case of accidental contact, rinse eyes immediately and thoroughly with water.

Precautions and Warnings of La Roche-Posay Mela B3 Serum 30mL

  • Sun Protection is NON-NEGOTIABLE: Due to the presence of exfoliating agents and the nature of hyperpigmentation treatment, daily use of a broad-spectrum sunscreen (SPF 30 or higher) is mandatory in the morning, regardless of the weather. Sun exposure can reverse the serum's effects and worsen hyperpigmentation.
  • External Use Only: This serum is strictly for external, topical application.
  • Avoid Eye Area: Do not apply directly to the eye contour area.
  • Discontinue Use: If severe skin irritation develops or persists, stop using the product.
  • Non-Comedogenic: The formula is non-comedogenic, meaning it is formulated not to clog pores.

searchable.name: Ascorbion C Syrup 100mL
searchable.brief_info: Ascorbion C Syrup provides a concentrated dose of Vitamin C, a powerful antioxidant crucial for boosting the immune system, promoting healthy tissues, and supporting overall vitality.
searchable.description: Ascorbion C Syrup is a pleasant-tasting, liquid formulation of Ascorbic Acid (Vitamin C), a vital water-soluble vitamin. It is primarily designed to meet the daily nutritional requirements of Vitamin C, especially in individuals, infants, and children whose diets may be lacking. This syrup format ensures easy and accurate dosing for all age groups, particularly those who struggle with pills. As a potent antioxidant, Ascorbion C Syrup helps protect the body's cells from damage caused by free radicals, supporting robust immune function and overall health.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Ascorbion C Syrup

Ascorbion C Syrup is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) supplement.

Take as advised by your doctor or follow the dosage instructions on the package.

Typical therapeutic and deficiency doses for adults and teenagers are often 500 mg daily for at least two weeks, but specific syrup concentrations vary.

Proper Administration

  • Route: Oral liquid (syrup).
  • How to Take: Shake the bottle well before use. Measure the exact dose using a dedicated measuring spoon or cup provided with the package. The syrup may be taken directly or mixed with fruit juice, cereal, or other food.
  • Timing: Can be taken with or without food, usually once or twice a day.

Missed Dose Guidance

  • If you miss a dose, take it as soon as you remember.
  • If it is almost time for your next scheduled dose, skip the missed dose and continue with your regular schedule.
  • Do not double the dose to make up for a missed one.
searchable.specification: The active ingredient is Ascorbic Acid (Vitamin C). It is supplied as an oral liquid syrup in a bottle (common sizes are 60mL or 100mL). The concentration is typically 100 mg or higher per 5 mL. It is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) Vitamin Supplement.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Ascorbion C Syrup

Do NOT take Ascorbion C Syrup if you:

  • Have a known allergy or hypersensitivity to Ascorbic Acid or any other ingredient in the syrup.
  • Have a history of kidney stones, as high doses of Vitamin C may increase the risk of stone formation in susceptible individuals.

Pregnancy & Breastfeeding Warnings

  • Pregnancy: Ascorbion C Syrup is generally considered safe for use during pregnancy, as Vitamin C is essential for fetal development. However, pregnant individuals should not exceed 1 gram (1000 mg) daily unless prescribed by a doctor. Consult your doctor for appropriate dosing.
  • Breastfeeding: Use is generally safe. Vitamin C is essential for both milk production and infant development. Follow recommended daily intake guidelines.

Side Effects of Ascorbion C Syrup

Ascorbic Acid is generally well-tolerated at recommended doses, but high doses can cause digestive issues.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Diarrhoea, nausea, heartburn, stomach cramps, and gas. These effects typically occur with higher doses (above 1000 mg/day).
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (that may require medical attention):
    • Kidney Problems: Painful urination, blood in urine (especially with a history of kidney stones).
    • Hemolytic Anemia: In people with the genetic condition Glucose-6-Phosphate Dehydrogenase (G6PD) deficiency, high doses may cause a breakdown of red blood cells.

What to do if side effects occur:

  • For mild gastrointestinal upset, try taking the syrup with food. If symptoms persist or you suspect any severe reaction or kidney symptoms, discontinue use and consult a physician immediately.

Precautions and Warnings of Ascorbion C Syrup

  • Diabetes: High doses (over 2 grams daily) may interfere with the accuracy of certain blood and urine glucose tests. Inform your doctor or laboratory personnel that you are taking this supplement.
  • G6PD Deficiency: Use with caution if you have this enzyme deficiency, and avoid high doses.
  • Iron Metabolism: Since Vitamin C enhances iron absorption, individuals with conditions related to iron overload (like hemochromatosis) should use this supplement with caution and under medical supervision.

Scheduled Surgery: You may be asked to stop taking high doses of Vitamin C 2-3 weeks before any surgery or medical procedure, so inform your healthcare team.

searchable.name: Brett Mouthwash 400mL
searchable.brief_info: Brett Mouthwash 400mL is a trusted antiseptic and anti-plaque rinse designed to fight germs, eliminate bad breath, and reach areas of the mouth inaccessible to brushing alone.
searchable.description: Brett Mouthwash 400mL is a concentrated, therapeutic oral rinse formulated to provide comprehensive protection against the primary causes of poor oral health. It is an antiseptic and anti-plaque solution that features a penetrating flavor (often Minty or Gold) and works by destroying bacteria that lead to plaque build-up, gingivitis, and persistent bad breath. This mouthwash is particularly effective at tackling the residual smells of spicy foods, alcohol, and tobacco. The Brett Mouthwash 400mL bottle offers a practical size for regular, twice-daily use, providing all-day freshness and supporting the effects of daily brushing and flossing.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Brett Mouthwash 400mL

Brett Mouthwash 400mL is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) therapeutic mouthwash.

Rinse mouth or gargle with about 20 mL for 30 seconds, twice daily.

Proper Administration

  • Route: Oral rinse/gargle.
  • How to Use:
    1. Pour the required amount (approx. 20 mL, usually marked on the dispensing cup provided) into the cup.
    2. Swish the mouthwash around the mouth and gargle for 30 seconds (or 10 to 20 seconds, as per some packaging instructions).
    3. Spit out the solution completely. Do not swallow.
  • Best Time to Use: Use twice daily (morning and evening) after brushing and flossing for a full day's protection against plaque build-up and bad breath.

Missed Dose Guidance

  • Not applicable, as this is a hygiene product. Simply resume your twice-daily rinsing routine as soon as possible.
searchable.specification: The active ingredient is primarily Thymol, often combined with Ethanol (alcohol) and sometimes Sodium Fluoride. It is supplied as a concentrated oral liquid mouthwash in a 400mL bottle. It is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) Antiseptic and Anti-plaque solution.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Brett Mouthwash 400mL

Do NOT use Brett Mouthwash 400mL if you:

  • Have a known allergy or hypersensitivity to Thymol or any other ingredient in the mouthwash.
  • Are children under 8 years of age (due to the high risk of accidental swallowing).

Pregnancy & Breastfeeding Warnings

  • Pregnancy and Breastfeeding: Consult your doctor or pharmacist. While topical rinsing carries minimal risk, the safety of ingesting even small, residual amounts of a high-alcohol mouthwash is not definitively established. Use only when advised by a healthcare professional.

Side Effects of Brett Mouthwash 400mL

Side effects are generally minor, but users should be aware of the potential for irritation due to the high alcohol content.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): A burning or tingling sensation in the mouth, dryness of the mouth (due to alcohol content), and altered taste sensation. These often subside after use.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (that may require medical attention):
    • Severe Allergic Reactions: Swelling of the face, tongue, or throat, or difficulty breathing.
    • Alcohol Intoxication: Due to the high alcohol content, swallowing large amounts, especially by children, can lead to signs of intoxication (slurred speech, vomiting, severe drowsiness).

What to do if side effects occur:

  • For persistent dryness or irritation, consider rinsing with water after use, though this may lessen the anti-plaque effect, or switch to an alcohol-free alternative.
  • If swallowed in large amounts: Do not induce vomiting. Seek emergency medical help immediately and take the bottle with you.

Precautions and Warnings of Brett Mouthwash 400mL

  • DO NOT SWALLOW: The mouthwash is for rinsing and gargling only. Swallowing the solution, particularly in large quantities, can be dangerous due to the alcohol content.
  • Dilution: Do not dilute the mouthwash unless specifically instructed by a dentist or doctor, as this may compromise its efficacy.
  • Children Supervision: Children over 8 years old should be supervised to ensure they spit out the mouthwash completely.
  • Use After Brushing: To maximize plaque control, use the mouthwash after brushing and flossing.
  • Long-Term Use: Consult your dentist if symptoms of gingivitis or bad breath persist, or if you plan to use the mouthwash continuously for more than four weeks.

searchable.name: Ciklavit Syrup 200mL
searchable.brief_info: Ciklavit Syrup is the first indigenous nutritional supplement formulated with potent anti-sickling properties, designed to support the effective management and overall well-being of individuals living with Sickle Cell Anaemia.
searchable.description: Ciklavit Syrup is a unique, herbal-based nutritional supplement derived from a potent natural extract of the Cajanus cajan (pigeon pea) seed, which is rich in essential amino acids, vitamins, and minerals. This syrup is specifically developed as an adjuvant therapy for the management of Sickle Cell Anaemia (SCA). Its formulation is believed to possess anti-sickling properties, which help to stabilize the red blood cells and improve their deformability. By targeting the fundamental pathology of red cell sickling, Ciklavit Syrup helps reduce the frequency and severity of painful vaso-occlusive crises, leading to an overall improved quality of life for patients.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Ciklavit Syrup

Ciklavit Syrup is a Nutritional Supplement used as supportive care for a chronic medical condition.

For use under medical supervision. Take as directed by the pharmacist or physician.

Typical Dosage Guidelines (Always confirm with the physician based on the patient's age and weight):

  • Adults and Children (typically above 5 years): Take 2 tablespoonfuls (20 mL) twice daily.
  • Children (typically below 5 years): Take 2 teaspoonfuls (10 mL) twice daily.

Proper Administration

  • Route: Oral liquid (syrup).
  • How to Take: Shake the bottle well before use. Measure the exact prescribed dose using a proper measuring spoon or cup. The syrup may be taken directly.
  • Timing: Typically taken twice daily, preferably with meals to enhance absorption and minimize any mild stomach upset.
  • Consistency: For the best possible reduction in crisis frequency, Ciklavit Syrup must be used consistently as part of a daily routine.

Missed Dose Guidance

  • If you miss a dose, take it as soon as you remember.
  • If it is almost time for your next scheduled dose, skip the missed dose and continue with your regular dosing schedule.
  • Do not double the dose to make up for a missed one.
searchable.specification: The active ingredient is Cajanus cajan seed extract, fortified with essential vitamins (e.g., Vitamin C, B vitamins) and minerals. It is supplied as an oral herbal syrup (commonly in a 200mL bottle). It is a Nutritional Supplement for the management of Sickle Cell Anaemia.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Ciklavit Syrup

Do NOT use Ciklavit Syrup if you:

  • Have a known allergy or hypersensitivity to Cajanus cajan (pigeon pea) or any other component of the syrup.

Pregnancy & Breastfeeding Warnings

  • Pregnancy: Consult your doctor. While the primary component is derived from a common food source, the safety of Ciklavit Syrup as a therapeutic supplement during pregnancy must be confirmed by a healthcare professional. Use only under medical supervision.
  • Breastfeeding: Consult your doctor. Use only under medical supervision.

Side Effects of Ciklavit Syrup

The active extracts are primarily derived from food sources, and major adverse effects are considered rare.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): No common adverse effects have been widely reported in literature. Mild gastrointestinal changes are theoretically possible, as with any food supplement.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (that may require medical attention): Severe allergic reactions to the herbal or vitamin components.

What to do if side effects occur:

  • If you experience any unexpected or severe reactions, particularly signs of an allergy, discontinue use immediately and consult a physician.

Precautions and Warnings of Ciklavit Syrup

  • Medical Supervision: Ciklavit Syrup is a supplementary therapy and is not a substitute for core sickle cell treatments (like Hydroxyurea or regular medical check-ups). Use should be under the medical supervision of a physician experienced in managing sickle cell disorder.
  • Herb-Drug Interactions: Consult your doctor or pharmacist if the patient is taking other medications, especially other supplements or prescription drugs, as there is potential for interaction.
  • Persistence of Symptoms: Continue monitoring for sickle cell crises. If crisis episodes increase in frequency or severity, consult your physician.
  • Accuracy: Follow the recommended dosage precisely; do not exceed the suggested intake.

searchable.name: Day by Day Vitamin C plus Glucose
searchable.brief_info: Day by Day Vitamin C plus Glucose Tablets offer a vital combination of antioxidant support for the immune system and a quick energy boost, making them an excellent choice for combating fatigue and preventing Vitamin C deficiency.
searchable.description: Day by Day Vitamin C plus Glucose Tablets are chewable tablets formulated to deliver two essential components: the potent antioxidant Vitamin C and the immediate energy source, Glucose. This unique combination ensures the body receives support for tissue health and immune function while simultaneously providing a rapid increase in blood sugar for quick energy. This makes the tablets particularly useful during times of illness, fatigue, or when a quick boost is needed. The tablet form, often chewable, is convenient for all ages, making Day by Day Vitamin C plus Glucose Tablets a practical addition to your daily wellness routine.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Day by Day Vitamin C plus Glucose Tablets

Day by Day Vitamin C plus Glucose Tablets is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) food supplement.

Adults and Children: Take 4 to 10 chewable tablets daily, or as advised by your healthcare professional. (Note: Dosage is high due to the low concentration of Ascorbic Acid per tablet, as noted in the search results for similar products).

Proper Administration

  • Route: Oral, typically chewable tablets (check package instructions).
  • How to Take: If chewable, chew the tablet completely before swallowing. If a plain tablet, dissolve it slowly in the mouth. It can be taken with or without food.
  • Timing: Can be taken at regular intervals throughout the day for sustained energy and immune support.

Missed Dose Guidance

  • Not applicable, as this is a supplement. Simply resume taking the tablets as part of your regular daily routine.
searchable.specification: The active ingredients are Ascorbic Acid (Vitamin C) 50 mg and Glucose 150 mg. It is supplied as an oral tablet (typically chewable). It is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) Vitamin Supplement.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Day by Day Vitamin C plus Glucose Tablets

Do NOT take Day by Day Vitamin C plus Glucose Tablets if you:

  • Have a known allergy or hypersensitivity to Ascorbic Acid, Glucose, or any other ingredient in the tablets.
  • Have been diagnosed with Hyperglycaemia (high blood sugar) or poorly controlled Diabetes Mellitus, due to the high glucose content, unless specifically directed for emergency management of hypoglycaemia.

Pregnancy & Breastfeeding Warnings

  • Pregnancy: Consult your doctor. While Vitamin C is essential, individuals should follow established guidelines for total daily intake. Consult a physician for appropriate dosing during pregnancy.
  • Breastfeeding: Use is generally safe at recommended doses. Follow professional dietary advice.

Side Effects of Day by Day Vitamin C plus Glucose Tablets

Side effects are generally mild and related to the digestive system or blood sugar.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): High doses of Vitamin C may cause mild gastrointestinal symptoms, such as diarrhoea, nausea, or heartburn.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (that may require medical attention):
    • Hyperglycaemia: Unusually high blood sugar levels, particularly in diabetic patients if not managed correctly.
    • Kidney Stones: Very high, prolonged intake of Vitamin C may increase the risk in susceptible individuals.
    • Allergic Reactions: Skin rash, itching, or swelling.

What to do if side effects occur:

  • For mild stomach upset, try taking the tablet with food.
  • If you experience any severe or persistent side effects, or any signs of an allergic reaction, discontinue use and consult a physician immediately.

Precautions and Warnings of Day by Day Vitamin C plus Glucose Tablets

  • Diabetic Patients: Due to the glucose content, diabetic patients must exercise extreme caution. High doses of Vitamin C can also interfere with the accuracy of certain blood and urine glucose tests. Inform your doctor that you are taking this supplement.
  • Kidney Stones: Patients with a history of kidney stones should not take large or prolonged doses of Vitamin C.
  • Not a Substitute: This supplement does not replace the need for a balanced diet.
  • Swallowing: If chewable, ensure the tablet is chewed completely before swallowing.
