searchable.name: Ginsomin Eve Capsules
searchable.brief_info: Ginsomin Eve is a premium daily supplement combining the proven energy-boosting power of Korean Panax Ginseng with a unique blend of vitamins and nutrients tailored to support women's vitality, hormone balance, and overall well-being.
searchable.description: Ginsomin Eve are formulated as a comprehensive daily supplement designed specifically to meet the nutritional demands of active women. The core of the formula is the highly standardized Korean Panax Ginseng Extract, which is internationally recognized for its adaptogenic properties that help the body cope with physical and mental stress. This is combined with essential vitamins (A, B complex, C, D, E), minerals (Calcium, Iron, Zinc, Selenium), and often Evening Primrose Oil (EPO). This powerful combination works to restore energy, combat fatigue, support the immune system, and address female-specific concerns like skin health and hormonal fluctuations, making Ginsomin Eve a holistic approach to female vitality.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Ginsomin Eve 

Ginsomin Eve  is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) supplement.

Take 1 softgel capsule daily, or as directed by a physician.

Proper Administration

  • Route: Oral capsule.
  • How to Take: Swallow the softgel capsule whole with a glass of water. Do not crush or chew.
  • Timing: Take once daily, preferably with or immediately after a meal (breakfast or lunch) to maximize absorption of the fat-soluble vitamins and minimize digestive upset.

Missed Dose Guidance

  • If you miss a dose, simply take the next capsule the following day with your meal. Do not take two capsules on the same day.
searchable.specification: The active ingredients include Korean Panax Ginseng Extract, essential Vitamins (A, B, C, D, E), Minerals (Iron, Zinc, Selenium, Calcium), and often Evening Primrose Oil (EPO). It is supplied as an oral softgel capsule. It is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) Dietary Supplement for women's health.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Ginsomin Eve 

Do NOT take Ginsomin Eve Softgel Capsules if you:

  • Have a known allergy or hypersensitivity to Ginseng, any of the vitamins or minerals, or any other component of the softgel (e.g., soy, gelatin, or EPO).
  • Have high blood pressure (uncontrolled hypertension), as Ginseng can occasionally affect blood pressure.
  • Have an autoimmune condition (due to Ginseng's immune-modulating properties), unless approved by a physician.

Pregnancy & Breastfeeding Warnings

  • Pregnancy: Consult your doctor. The use of Ginseng and high doses of certain vitamins and minerals is generally discouraged during pregnancy unless specifically directed by a healthcare professional.
  • Breastfeeding: Consult your doctor. Use only under medical supervision.

Side Effects of Ginsomin Eve Softgel Capsules

Side effects are generally mild and related to the energizing nature of the product.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Insomnia (difficulty sleeping, if taken late in the day), mild digestive upset, or headache.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (that may require medical attention):
    • Hypertension/Palpitations: Worsening of high blood pressure or irregular heart rhythm.
    • Allergic Reactions: Rash, severe itching, or swelling.
    • Bleeding Risk: Ginseng may have mild anti-platelet effects, increasing the risk of bleeding, especially if combined with other blood thinners.

What to do if side effects occur:

  • To avoid insomnia, do not take Ginsomin Eve in the evening or close to bedtime.
  • If you experience symptoms of high blood pressure, palpitations, or a severe rash, discontinue use immediately and consult a physician.

Precautions and Warnings of Ginsomin Eve Softgel Capsules

  • Timing of Dose: Take the capsule in the morning or early afternoon to prevent potential insomnia associated with Ginseng.
  • Blood Pressure: Individuals with a history of high blood pressure should monitor their blood pressure regularly while taking this supplement.
  • Drug Interactions: Consult your doctor or pharmacist if taking:
    • Blood Thinners (Anticoagulants): Ginseng may increase the risk of bleeding.
    • Diabetes Medications: Ginseng may lower blood sugar, requiring dose adjustments of diabetic medication.
    • Immunosuppressants: Ginseng may counteract the effects of immunosuppressant drugs.

Discontinue Before Surgery: It is generally recommended to stop taking Ginseng-containing supplements like Ginsomin Eve at least 2 weeks prior to any scheduled surgery due to the potential effect on blood pressure and bleeding.

searchable.name: Glucose D Powder 175G Evans
searchable.brief_info: Glucose D Powder is a fast-acting energy mix containing high-grade glucose fortified with essential vitamins and minerals, specifically designed to provide an instant energy boost and combat fatigue.
searchable.description: Glucose D Powder is an instant energy formula, typically containing over 99% pure Glucose (Dextrose), which is the body's primary source of energy. This readily soluble powder is mixed with water to create a refreshing, revitalizing drink. The key feature of Glucose D Powder is its rapid action—the simple sugar is absorbed almost instantly into the bloodstream, making it highly effective at quickly replenishing energy lost due to physical exertion, hot weather, or general fatigue. Furthermore, it is often fortified with essential nutrients like Vitamin D and Calcium to support bone health and overall well-being.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Glucose D Powder

Glucose D Powder is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) supplement.

Adults and Children: Mix 2 to 4 teaspoons (approximately 15-35 grams) in one glass of water (200-250 ml) and consume once or twice daily, or as directed by a physician.

Proper Administration

  • Route: Oral liquid (dissolved powder).
  • How to Prepare: Add the recommended amount of Glucose D Powder to a glass of water (room temperature or chilled). Stir well until the powder is completely dissolved. Consume immediately.
  • Timing: Can be taken at any time of the day when an energy boost is needed: before, during, or after physical activity, or during periods of illness.

Missed Dose Guidance

  • Not applicable, as this is an energy supplement used on demand.
searchable.specification: The active ingredient is Glucose (Dextrose Monohydrate) (typically >99%). It is fortified with Calcium, Phosphorus, and Vitamin D. It is supplied as a powder in a jar or canister (common sizes are 100g, 250g, 500g, 1kg). It is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) Energy and Hydration Supplement.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Glucose D Powder

Do NOT consume Glucose D Powder if you:

  • Have Diabetes Mellitus (except for the emergency treatment of confirmed hypoglycemia under medical direction), due to the product's high glucose content, which can cause significant blood sugar spikes.
  • Have a known allergy or hypersensitivity to Glucose, Vitamin D, Calcium, or any other ingredient in the powder.

Pregnancy & Breastfeeding Warnings

  • Pregnancy and Breastfeeding: Consult your doctor. While glucose and the fortifying vitamins are generally safe, individuals should follow recommended daily intake guidelines. Consult a physician, especially if you have gestational diabetes or specific nutritional concerns.

Side Effects of Glucose D Powder

Side effects are generally related to the rapid sugar intake.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Temporary feelings of high blood sugar, such as a sugar rush, followed by a sudden crash. Excessive, regular consumption may lead to weight gain.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (that may require medical attention):
    • Severe Hyperglycaemia: Dangerously high blood sugar levels, especially in undiagnosed or poorly managed diabetic patients.
    • Allergic Reactions: Rash, swelling, or difficulty breathing.

What to do if side effects occur:

  • If you experience symptoms suggesting high blood sugar (excessive thirst, frequent urination) or a severe allergic reaction, discontinue use immediately and consult a physician.
  • Consume the powder strictly within the recommended serving size to avoid excess calorie intake and potential weight gain.

Precautions and Warnings of Glucose D Powder

  • Diabetes: Crucial Warning: This product contains nearly pure glucose and can rapidly raise blood sugar. Diabetics should only consume this for emergency management of low blood sugar (hypoglycemia) under strict medical guidance.
  • Teeth: Frequent consumption may lead to tooth decay due to the high sugar content. Use sparingly and maintain good oral hygiene.
  • Swallowing: It is not recommended to consume the powder dry as it can cause choking and irritation. Always dissolve it completely in water before drinking.
  • Storage: Always store the powder in an airtight container in a cool, dry place to prevent moisture ingress, which can cause clumping and spoilage.

searchable.brief_info: Glucose D Powder is a fast-acting energy mix containing high-grade glucose fortified with essential vitamins and minerals, specifically designed to provide an instant energy boost and combat fatigue.

searchable.name: Givther Plus Tablets X6
searchable.brief_info: Givther Plus Tablets offer a powerful, fixed-dose combination of Artemether and Lumefantrine, the gold standard in treating acute, uncomplicated Plasmodium falciparum malaria.
searchable.description: Givther Plus Tablets contain a fixed-dose combination of Artemether and Lumefantrine, utilizing two highly potent antimalarial agents to achieve rapid parasite clearance and ensure the complete elimination of residual parasites. This combination therapy (ACT) is vital for combating the aggressive P. falciparum parasite, especially in regions facing drug resistance. The Artemether component works rapidly to quickly resolve the fever and initial symptoms, while the Lumefantrine component ensures a longer duration of action, preventing relapse. Givther Plus Tablets are prescribed for a strict, short-term regimen to achieve a reliable cure for uncomplicated malaria.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Givther Plus Tablets

Givther Plus Tablets is a Prescription Only Medicine (POM).

Take as directed by the physician. Dosage is strictly based on the patient's body weight.

The regimen consists of six doses over 60 hours (3 days): Initial Dose, Second Dose (8 hours later), and then two doses daily (morning and evening) on Days 2 and 3.

Standard Adult/High-Weight Dose (Typically age 35 kg):

  • Dosage: The number of tablets per dose depends on the exact strength (e.g., if 20/120mg strength, the adult dose is four tablets per dose for a total of 24 tablets in the course). Consult the physician for the exact number of tablets per dose for the prescribed strength.

Proper Administration

  • Route: Oral tablet.
  • How to Take: Swallow the tablet whole with a glass of water. The tablets may be crushed and mixed with a small amount of water for patients unable to swallow, followed immediately by food.
  • Food Requirement: The medicine must be immediately followed by food or a fatty drink (e.g., milk, yogurt, pudding) to improve absorption.
  • Timing: Follow the precise 0-8-24-36-48-60 hour schedule accurately.

Missed Dose Guidance

  • If you miss a dose, give the missed dose as soon as you realize it. Do not give a double dose.
  • It is crucial to give all six doses to ensure complete parasite clearance.
searchable.specification: The active ingredients are Artemether and Lumefantrine. It is supplied as an oral tablet, typically in a blister pack of 6, 12, or 24 tablets depending on the strength and weight category. It is indicated for the treatment of uncomplicated P. falciparum malaria. It is a Prescription Only Medicine (POM).
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Givther Plus Tablets

Do NOT take Givther Plus Tablets if the patient:

  • Has a known allergy or hypersensitivity to Artemether, Lumefantrine, or any other component of the tablet.
  • Has severe or complicated malaria (e.g., cerebral malaria, pulmonary oedema, or renal failure).
  • Has a known history of QT prolongation (a heart rhythm abnormality) or has disturbances of electrolyte balance (e.g., severe hypokalemia).
  • Is currently taking other medicines that are known to prolong the QT interval (e.g., certain anti-arrhythmics or antipsychotics).

Pregnancy & Breastfeeding Warnings

  • Pregnancy: Consult your doctor immediately. While the combination is recommended for use in the second and third trimesters, the benefit-risk profile must be carefully assessed by a physician, especially during the first trimester.
  • Breastfeeding: Consult your doctor. Both active ingredients can pass into breast milk. A physician must weigh the risks and benefits before deciding to continue the medication or breastfeeding.

Side Effects of Givther Plus Tablets

Side effects are common, especially gastrointestinal upset due to the required dosing schedule.

  • Very Common Side Effects (Expected): Headache, dizziness, loss of appetite, vomiting, nausea, abdominal pain, cough, joint pain (arthralgia), muscle pain (myalgia), and palpitations.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (that may require medical attention):
    • Cardiac Problems: Fast, pounding, or irregular heartbeats, or fainting (may indicate QT prolongation).
    • Severe Allergic Reaction: Rash, itching, swelling of the face, or trouble breathing.
    • Worsening Symptoms: If malaria symptoms worsen or persist after treatment, or if the patient develops signs of severe vomiting or inability to eat.

What to do if side effects occur:

  • For common side effects like vomiting, ensure the patient repeats the dose if vomiting occurs within one to two hours of administration.
  • For any severe symptoms, including signs of heart rhythm problems or severe allergic reactions, stop the medication immediately and seek emergency medical attention.

Precautions and Warnings of Givther Plus Tablets

  • Food is Critical: The tablets must be taken with food or a fatty drink (e.g., milk, pudding, broth, or porridge) to ensure maximum absorption of Lumefantrine. Taking it without food severely compromises the drug's effectiveness.
  • Complete the Course: It is absolutely essential to take all six doses over the full 60-hour period, even if the patient feels better, to achieve a complete cure and prevent drug resistance.
  • Contraceptive Warning: This medication can reduce the effectiveness of hormonal contraceptives (pills, patches, rings). Patients must use a reliable barrier method (e.g., condoms) during treatment and for at least one cycle afterwards.
  • Cardiac Risks: Use caution in patients with a history of heart conditions or electrolyte imbalances.
  • Grapefruit Avoidance: Avoid consuming grapefruit or grapefruit juice, as it can increase the concentration of the medicine in the body.

searchable.name: Immunboost KIds Multi Gummies
searchable.brief_info: Immunboost Kids Multi Gummies provide a balanced profile of essential vitamins and nutrients in a delicious, chewable format, trusted for supporting healthy growth, development, and optimum immune function in children aged 4-12.
searchable.description: Immunboost Kids Multi Gummies are a comprehensive multivitamin supplement formulated specifically to meet the unique nutritional needs of growing children. Recognizing that tablets can be difficult for children, these supplements are provided as non-sticky, delicious, and chewable gummies, often available in child-friendly flavors like orange, strawberry, and pineapple. The core function of Immunboost Kids Multi Gummies is to fill common nutritional gaps that arise from picky eating habits, busy schedules, or consumption of processed foods. By providing essential vitamins and minerals, the gummies help build a strong foundation for physical and mental health, ensuring optimal development and fortified immunity.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Immunboost Kids Multi Gummies

Immunboost Kids Multi Gummies is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) supplement.

Children 4 years of age and older: Chew 2 gummies daily, or as directed by a paediatrician.

Proper Administration

  • Route: Oral (chewable gummy).
  • How to Take: Children should chew the gummies thoroughly before swallowing. The gummies can be taken directly, with or without food.
  • Timing: Can be taken at any time of day. Taking it with a meal (e.g., breakfast) can establish a consistent daily routine and improve the absorption of some nutrients.

Missed Dose Guidance

  • If you miss a dose, simply resume the regular dosage the following day. Consistency is more important than making up a missed dose.
searchable.specification: The active ingredients include multiple vitamins (C, D, B-Complex, A) and minerals (Zinc, Iodine, Selenium, Chromium), often with Choline. It is supplied as chewable gummies, typically in a bottle containing 60 or 90 gummies. It is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) Multivitamin Dietary Supplement for children aged 4-12.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Immunboost Kids Multi Gummies

Do NOT give Immunboost Kids Multi Gummies if the child:

  • Has a known allergy or hypersensitivity to any of the vitamins, minerals, flavors, or excipients (e.g., pectin, organic cane sugar).
  • Is under 4 years of age, unless specifically advised by a paediatrician.

Pregnancy & Breastfeeding Warnings

  • General: This product is not intended for use by pregnant or breastfeeding women (separate adult multivitamins should be used).

Side Effects of Immunboost Kids Multi Gummies

Side effects are rare when the product is used as directed.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): May produce laxative effects or mild digestive upset (gas/bloating) if consumed in excess, as the product may contain some sugar alcohols or high levels of certain vitamins.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (that may require medical attention):
    • Hypervitaminosis: Rare, but chronic consumption of significantly high doses (far exceeding the recommended dose) of fat-soluble vitamins (A, D, E) can lead to toxicity.
    • Allergic Reactions: Rash, swelling, or difficulty breathing due to sensitivity to ingredients.

What to do if side effects occur:

  • If the child experiences persistent digestive upset or diarrhea, ensure they are strictly adhering to the recommended dosage.
  • For any severe or persistent adverse effects, discontinue use immediately and consult a physician.

Precautions and Warnings of Immunboost Kids Multi Gummies

  • Dosage Limit: Do NOT exceed the recommended daily dosage (typically 2 gummies daily for ages 4 and up) to avoid potential overdose of fat-soluble vitamins.
  • Choking Hazard: The gummies must be chewed thoroughly before swallowing, especially in younger children (ages 4-8), to prevent choking.
  • Keep Out of Reach: Since the gummies are palatable and resemble candy, they must be stored safely out of the reach of children to prevent accidental overdose.

Not a Meal Substitute: This is a supplement and does not replace the necessity of a varied, balanced diet.

searchable.name: Libmax Capsules
searchable.brief_info: Libmax Capsules are marketed as a dietary supplement intended to support male sexual health, vitality, and performance.
searchable.description: Libmax Capsules are typically marketed as a fast-acting male sexual health supplement. These types of products are generally formulated with a blend of herbal extracts (often including ingredients like Ginseng, Maca, or L-Arginine) and vitamins, aimed at improving erectile function, boosting libido, and enhancing stamina and performance. The goal of Libmax Capsules is to support overall male sexual vitality and confidence.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Libmax Capsules

Libmax Capsules is marketed as an OTC supplement.

Take strictly as directed on the package, and only after consulting a physician.

Proper Administration

  • Route: Oral capsule.
  • How to Take: Swallow the capsule whole with water.
  • Timing: Typically taken 30-60 minutes before anticipated sexual activity.

Missed Dose Guidance

  • Not applicable, as this is an as-needed product.
searchable.specification: This product is a dietary supplement for male sexual health. It is supplied as an oral capsule. Due to lack of official verification, assume it is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) product that may contain undeclared prescription drugs.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Libmax Capsules

Do NOT take Libmax Capsules if you:

  • Have a known allergy or hypersensitivity to any component (declared or undeclared).
  • Are taking nitrate prescription drugs (e.g., nitroglycerin for chest pain), as the combination with hidden PDE-5 inhibitors can cause a life-threatening drop in blood pressure.
  • Have heart disease, high blood pressure, diabetes, high cholesterol, or a history of stroke.
  • Are taking any medications for erectile dysfunction prescribed by a doctor.

Pregnancy & Breastfeeding Warnings

  • General: This product is not intended for use by women.

Side Effects of Libmax Capsules

If the product contains hidden PDE-5 inhibitors, the following side effects may occur:

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Headaches, body aches, dizziness (due to blood pressure changes), flushing (skin warmth and redness), nasal congestion, and digestive upset (indigestion/diarrhea).
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (that may require medical attention):
    • Severe Hypotension: Dangerous drop in blood pressure, leading to fainting or cardiovascular complications.
    • Priapism: Erections lasting more than four hours (requires immediate emergency medical attention).
    • Vision Problems: Sudden vision loss or severe vision changes.
    • Hearing Problems: Abrupt changes in hearing.

What to do if side effects occur:

  • For any severe side effect, especially chest pain, severe dizziness, vision changes, or an erection lasting more than four hours, seek emergency medical treatment immediately.
  • If you experience mild side effects, stop using the product and consult a physician to verify the ingredients.

Precautions and Warnings of Libmax Capsules

  • Medical Clearance: Consult a physician before using this product, particularly if you have any pre-existing health conditions or are taking prescription medications.
  • Nitrates Interaction: The risk of interaction with nitrates is the most critical warning. NEVER combine this product with nitrate drugs.
  • Discontinue Use: If you experience any rapid or significant effect immediately after taking the capsule, discontinue use, as this strongly suggests the presence of an undeclared active pharmaceutical ingredient (API).

Dietary Supplements are Unregulated: Be aware that supplements in this category are often poorly regulated and may contain hidden ingredients that pose serious health risks.

searchable.name: M2 Tone Capsules
searchable.brief_info: M2 Tone Tablets are a powerful, non-hormonal formulation trusted for restoring hormonal balance, regulating menstrual cycles, enhancing fertility, and improving overall reproductive and emotional wellness in women.
searchable.description: M2 Tone Tablets are an authentic Ayurvedic formulation designed as a comprehensive tonic for female reproductive health. Unlike synthetic hormone treatments, this tablet utilizes a blend of traditional herbs and purified minerals (like Ashoka, Lodhra, Shatavari, and various Bhasmas) to holistically address the root causes of menstrual and hormonal irregularities. The tablet's primary mechanism involves optimizing ovarian function and maintaining the structural integrity and tone of the uterus (uterine tonic). M2 Tone Tablets are a clinically tested solution for women seeking to normalize their menstrual rhythm, reduce period-related discomfort, and improve their chances of conception.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of M2 Tone Tablets

M2 Tone Tablets is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) Ayurvedic Supplement.

Take 1 tablet twice a day, or as directed by the pharmacist or physician.

Proper Administration

  • Route: Oral tablet.
  • How to Take: Swallow the tablet whole with water. Do not crush or chew.
  • Timing: Typically taken twice daily, preferably after meals (breakfast and dinner) to minimize stomach discomfort.
  • Consistency: Consistent use for at least 3 to 6 cycles is advised for effective results in regulating menstruation.

Missed Dose Guidance

  • If you miss a dose, take it as soon as you remember.
  • If it is almost time for your next scheduled dose, skip the missed dose and continue with your regular schedule. Do not take a double dose.
searchable.specification: The active ingredients include multiple herbal extracts (Ashoka, Lodhra, Shatavari, Jatamansi) and purified mineral compounds. It is supplied as an oral Ayurvedic tablet (typically in blister packs of 30 or 40 tablets). It is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) Ayurvedic Female Health Tonic.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of M2 Tone Tablets

Do NOT take M2 Tone Tablets if you:

  • Have a known allergy or hypersensitivity to Ashoka, Lodhra, Shatavari, any other herbal components, or the mineral compounds in the tablet.

Pregnancy & Breastfeeding Warnings

  • Pregnancy: Consult your doctor. M2 Tone Tablets are generally not recommended for ingestion during confirmed pregnancy. Consult a physician before use, especially if you are actively trying to conceive or suspect pregnancy.
  • Breastfeeding: Consult your doctor. There is limited information on safety during lactation; use only under medical supervision.

Side Effects of M2 Tone Tablets

M2 Tone is an Ayurvedic product generally considered safe for long-term use under supervision.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Mild gastrointestinal discomfort, slight bloating, stomach upset, or diarrhoea may occasionally occur as the body adjusts to the herbal ingredients.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (that may require medical attention):
    • Unexpected Hormonal Changes: Although rare and designed to be balancing, unexpected changes in hormonal symptoms should be reported.
    • Severe Allergic Reactions: Rash or persistent dermatological reactions.

What to do if side effects occur:

  • For mild stomach upset, try taking the tablets immediately after meals instead of before.
  • If side effects persist, worsen, or if you experience any severe allergic symptoms, discontinue use and consult a physician immediately.

Precautions and Warnings of M2 Tone Tablets

  • Medical Supervision: While an OTC supplement, M2 Tone Tablets address complex hormonal issues. They should be taken under the guidance of a physician, particularly when managing conditions like PCOS or infertility.
  • Drug Interactions: Consult your doctor or pharmacist if you are taking any other medications, especially:
    • Hormone Therapy: Including oral contraceptives or hormone replacement therapy (HRT).
    • Other Supplements: Certain Ayurvedic herbs can interact with modern medicines.
  • Duration of Use: For effective regulation of the menstrual cycle or fertility support, the tablets must be taken consistently for the full duration advised by the physician, typically 3 to 6 menstrual cycles (months).
  • Diabetes/Liver/Kidney: If you have severe liver impairment, kidney impairment, or diabetes, consult your doctor before starting.

searchable.name: Nature's Field L & K Capsules
searchable.brief_info: Nature's Field L & K Capsules are a potent, synergistic formula of herbal extracts trusted to promote the natural cleansing and detoxification of the body’s vital organs, supporting healthy liver function and kidney/bladder health.
searchable.description: Nature's Field L & K Capsules (L&K Cap) are a premium dietary supplement specifically formulated as a Liver and Kidney Cleanser. The capsules utilize two well-researched botanical extracts, Milk Thistle and Cranberry, to target the elimination of accumulated toxins, chemicals, and pollutants resulting from lifestyle factors like heavy alcohol consumption, smoking, overuse of medications, and poor hydration. The liver acts as the body's main filter, and the kidneys are crucial for waste removal and electrolyte balance. This supplement is designed to support the natural detoxifying functions of these two essential organs, helping to maintain healthy liver and kidney tissues and boosting overall wellness.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Nature's Field L & K Capsules

Nature's Field L & K Capsules is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) Dietary Supplement.

Take 1 capsule daily, or as directed by a physician.

Proper Administration

  • Route: Oral capsule.
  • How to Take: Swallow the capsule whole with a full glass of water. Do not crush or chew.
  • Timing: Take once daily, preferably with a meal (e.g., breakfast or lunch) to aid absorption of the active components (which can be fat-soluble) and minimize stomach upset.

Missed Dose Guidance

  • If you miss a dose, simply take the next capsule the following day with your meal. Do not take two capsules on the same day.
searchable.specification: The active ingredients include Milk Thistle Extract and Cranberry Extract. It is supplied as an oral capsule, typically in a bottle of 60 capsules. It is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) Dietary Supplement for Liver and Kidney health.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Nature's Field L & K Capsules

Do NOT take Nature's Field L & K Capsules if you:

  • Have a known allergy or hypersensitivity to Milk Thistle (Silybum marianum), Cranberry, or any other ingredient in the capsule.
  • Have severe, pre-existing liver disease or kidney failure (consult a specialist first).

Pregnancy & Breastfeeding Warnings

  • Pregnancy: Consult your doctor. The safety of high-concentration herbal extracts during pregnancy has not been definitively established. Use only under the strict guidance of a healthcare professional.
  • Breastfeeding: Consult your doctor. Use only under medical supervision.

Side Effects of Nature's Field L & K Capsules

Side effects are generally mild and related to the digestive system.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Mild gastrointestinal discomfort, slight diarrhoea, bloating, or nausea. These are usually temporary as the body adjusts to the detoxifying properties.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (that may require medical attention):
    • Severe Allergic Reactions: Rash, hives, swelling, or difficulty breathing (anaphylaxis).
    • Herb-Drug Interactions: Potential interaction with medications metabolized by the liver.

What to do if side effects occur:

  • For mild digestive upset, take the capsule immediately after a meal. If severe or persistent, discontinue use and consult a physician.
  • If you experience any signs of a severe allergic reaction, stop the medication immediately and seek emergency medical attention.

Precautions and Warnings of Nature's Field L & K Capsules

  • Drug Interactions: Consult your doctor or pharmacist if you are taking any prescription medications, especially:
    • Blood Thinners (Warfarin): Milk Thistle may affect the metabolism of Warfarin, increasing the risk of bleeding.
    • Medications metabolized by the liver (e.g., certain statins, antidiabetic drugs): Milk Thistle may interfere with their action.
  • Not a Substitute: This supplement is intended for cleansing and maintenance and is not a substitute for medical treatment for active liver or kidney diseases (e.g., Hepatitis, Chronic Kidney Disease).
  • Hydration: Ensure adequate daily water intake to support the detoxification and flushing properties of the ingredients, especially Cranberry.

Duration of Use: Use as directed for the duration advised by a healthcare professional.

searchable.name: Nature's Field Myo-Inositol & D-Chiro-Inositol
searchable.brief_info: Nature's Field Myo-Inositol is an unmatched, potent inositol formula trusted for naturally restoring hormonal balance, improving ovulation quality, and supporting overall reproductive and metabolic health in women, particularly those managing PCOS.
searchable.description: Nature's Field Myo-Inositol (often combined with D-Chiro Inositol) is a powerful dietary supplement formulated to address the metabolic and hormonal challenges faced by many women, especially those with Polycystic Ovarian Syndrome (PCOS). The key ingredients, Myo-Inositol (MI) and D-Chiro Inositol (DCI), are two vital forms of inositol (often referred to as Vitamin B8) that act as cellular second messengers. This supplement is scientifically formulated with the ideal 40:1 ratio of MI to DCI (e.g., $2000\text{ mg}$ MI to $50\text{ mg}$ DCI), a ratio proven in clinical studies to be optimal for restoring normal ovarian function and improving insulin sensitivity. By addressing the root cause of many PCOS symptoms—insulin resistance—Nature's Field Myo-Inositol helps normalize hormone levels and support fertility goals.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Nature's Field Myo-Inositol

Nature's Field Myo-Inositol is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) Dietary Supplement.

Take 2 capsules twice daily (Total of 4 capsules daily), providing the 40:1 ratio, or as directed by a physician.

Proper Administration

  • Route: Oral capsule/tablet.
  • How to Take: Swallow the capsules whole with a glass of water. Do not crush or chew.
  • Timing: Typically taken twice daily, split into two doses (e.g., after breakfast and after dinner) to ensure sustained metabolic support throughout the day. Taking it with meals aids absorption and reduces the potential for gastric upset.
  • Duration: Consistent use for at least 3 to 6 months is required to observe the full therapeutic benefits, particularly for menstrual regularity and ovulation.

Missed Dose Guidance

  • If you miss a dose, take it as soon as you remember. If it is close to the next scheduled dose, skip the missed dose and continue with your regular schedule. Do not double the dose.
searchable.specification: The active ingredients are Myo-Inositol (MI) and D-Chiro Inositol (DCI), supplied in the optimal 40:1 ratio (e.g., 2000mg MI and 50mg DCI per full daily dose). It is supplied as oral capsules/tablets, typically in a bottle of 60 or 120 units. It is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) Dietary Supplement for female hormonal and reproductive health.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Nature's Field Myo-Inositol

Do NOT use Nature's Field Myo-Inositol if you:

  • Have a known allergy or hypersensitivity to Myo-Inositol, D-Chiro Inositol, or any other component of the supplement.
  • Have been diagnosed with Bipolar Disorder, as high doses of inositol may potentially trigger manic or hypomanic episodes.

Pregnancy & Breastfeeding Warnings

  • Pregnancy: Consult your doctor. While inositols are used to prevent gestational diabetes, you should consult your healthcare provider before starting or continuing this supplement during pregnancy to ensure safety and appropriate dosage.
  • Breastfeeding: Consult your doctor. Breast milk is naturally rich in inositol, but consult a physician before using the supplement during lactation.

Side Effects of Nature's Field Myo-Inositol

Inositols are generally well-tolerated, but minor side effects may occur, typically at very high doses.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Mild gastrointestinal discomfort, such as nausea, gas, or stomach pain. These are usually mild and may resolve over time.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (that may require medical attention):
    • Hypoglycemia: Rare, but possible if used by diabetic patients already taking insulin or other strong blood-sugar-lowering medications, due to enhanced insulin sensitivity.
    • Allergic Reactions: Persistent rash, itching, or swelling.

What to do if side effects occur:

  • For mild nausea or gas, try taking the supplement immediately after a meal.
  • If you experience symptoms of low blood sugar (dizziness, excessive sweating) or any severe, persistent adverse effect, discontinue use and consult a physician immediately.

Precautions and Warnings of Nature's Field Myo-Inositol

  • Diabetic Monitoring: If you have diabetes or insulin resistance, monitor your blood glucose levels closely when starting this supplement, as it can potentiate the effects of antidiabetic drugs.
  • Consult Specialist: This product is designed to manage complex hormonal and metabolic issues; consultation with a gynaecologist or endocrinologist is strongly recommended before starting.
  • Not a Substitute: This supplement is an adjunct and does not replace the necessity of lifestyle modifications (diet, exercise) in PCOS management.

Dosage Limit: Adhere strictly to the recommended daily dosage to avoid potential digestive side effects associated with extremely high doses.

searchable.name: Nature's Field Pre-Workout Blend
searchable.brief_info: Nature's Field Pre-Workout Blend is a superior formula trusted by athletes and fitness enthusiasts to unleash massive energy, razor-sharp focus, and unbeatable endurance, helping you maximize every workout session.
searchable.description: Nature's Field Pre-Workout Blend is a high-performance powdered supplement formulated to deliver optimal fuel and mental drive before exercise. It combines a potent mix of amino acids, muscle supporters, and stimulants to initiate an ergogenic effect—enhancing athletic performance and maximizing workout capacity. The blend utilizes ingredients like Creatine and Beta-Alanine to buffer muscle fatigue and increase strength, while Caffeine and N-Acetyl-L-Tyrosine sharpen focus and provide explosive energy. Nature's Field Pre-Workout Blend is the ideal solution for both occasional and frequent gym-goers who prioritize endurance, muscle-building, and rapid recovery, ensuring you fight fatigue before you even enter the gym.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Nature's Field Pre-Workout Blend

Nature's Field Pre-Workout Blend is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) Dietary Supplement.

Adults: Mix 1 scoop (full serving) with 8-12 ounces of water. Do NOT exceed 1 serving per 24 hours.

Proper Administration

  • Route: Oral powder, mixed with water.
  • How to Prepare: Mix one scoop of the powder thoroughly with 8-12 ounces (approx. 240-350 mL) of cold water in a shaker bottle or glass. Stir or shake well until the powder is fully dissolved.
  • Timing: Consume the mixed solution approximately 30 to 45 minutes before starting your workout. This allows sufficient time for the active ingredients (Caffeine, Beta-Alanine) to reach optimal levels in your bloodstream.
searchable.specification: The active ingredients include Caffeine Anhydrous, Beta-Alanine, Creatine Monohydrate, L-Citrulline Malate, L-Arginine, N-Acetyl-L-Tyrosine, and Vitamin B6. It is supplied as an oral powder, typically in a tub (e.g., 225g). It is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) Dietary Supplement for athletic performance.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Nature's Field Pre-Workout Blend

Do NOT use Nature's Field Pre-Workout Blend if you:

  • Have a known allergy or hypersensitivity to any ingredients, particularly Caffeine.
  • Have severe, uncontrolled high blood pressure (hypertension) or pre-existing heart conditions (e.g., arrhythmias).
  • Are pregnant or breastfeeding.
  • Are under 18 years of age.

Pregnancy & Breastfeeding Warnings

  • General: This product is not intended for use by pregnant or breastfeeding women due to the high stimulant and active amino acid content.

Side Effects of Nature's Field Pre-Workout Blend

Side effects are generally related to the stimulating components and high amino acid doses.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected):
    • Paresthesia (Tingling/Itching): A temporary "pins and needles" sensation usually felt on the face, neck, or hands, caused by Beta-Alanine. This is harmless and subsides as the body adapts.
    • Jitters and Anxiety: Caused by the high dose of Caffeine Anhydrous.
    • Digestive Issues: Nausea, bloating, diarrhea, or stomach pain.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (that may require medical attention):
    • Cardiovascular Issues: Heart palpitations, irregular heartbeat, or severe spikes in blood pressure.

What to do if side effects occur:

  • For tingling (Paresthesia), the sensation is harmless. To reduce it, try splitting the dose or mixing it with more water.
  • For severe jitters or heart palpitations, discontinue use immediately and consult a physician.
  • For digestive issues, ensure adequate water intake and try taking the blend with a light, easily digestible snack.

Precautions and Warnings of Nature's Field Pre-Workout Blend

  • Caffeine Overload: Do NOT exceed the recommended single dose and be mindful of your total daily caffeine intake (coffee, tea, energy drinks) to avoid severe side effects like anxiety, insomnia, or heart issues.
  • Timing: Avoid taking this supplement within 6-8 hours of bedtime due to the high caffeine content, which can cause severe insomnia.
  • Hydration: The stimulant content can be diuretic. Ensure you drink plenty of water before, during, and after your workout to prevent dehydration, which can lead to headaches and muscle cramps.
  • Start Low: If you are a first-time user of pre-workout supplements, begin with half a scoop to assess your body's tolerance to the ingredients, particularly the high caffeine content and Beta-Alanine.

Underlying Conditions: Consult a doctor if you have any pre-existing heart, blood pressure, or anxiety conditions.

searchable.name: Nivea Body Lotion Nourishing Cocoa
searchable.brief_info: NIVEA Body Lotion Nourishing Cocoa is a deeply moisturizing cream infused with natural Cocoa Butter and Vitamin E, trusted for transforming dry skin into radiant, healthy-looking, and intensely nourished skin.
searchable.description: NIVEA Body Lotion Nourishing Cocoa is a richly formulated daily body moisturizer designed to address the needs of dry, dull, and dehydrated skin. It delivers 48 hours of deep moisture by utilizing a creamy texture that melts into the skin. The formula combines NIVEA's unique deep moisture serum with two skin-loving ingredients: natural Cocoa Butter and Vitamin E. This powerful synergy not only provides intense hydration but also helps to restore the skin's barrier function, trapping moisture beneath the surface. The lotion leaves behind a luxurious, uplifting cocoa scent and a visible, non-greasy radiance, making NIVEA Body Lotion Nourishing Cocoa an indulgent step in any self-care routine.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of NIVEA Body Lotion Nourishing Cocoa

NIVEA Body Lotion Nourishing Cocoa is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) cosmetic product.

Apply liberally to the body as often as needed for desired skin moisture.

Proper Administration

  • Route: Topical application to the skin of the body (avoiding the face if prone to acne).
  • How to Use: Dispense an adequate amount of lotion into your palm. Gently massage the lotion all over your body, focusing on particularly dry areas like elbows, knees, and heels. Rub in thoroughly until absorbed.
  • Timing: Apply daily or twice daily (morning and evening). Best results are achieved when applied immediately after a shower or bath while the skin is still slightly damp, to lock in maximum moisture.

Missed Dose Guidance

  • Not applicable. Reapply as soon as you notice skin dryness.
searchable.specification: The key ingredients include Cocoa Butter, Vitamin E, and NIVEA's Deep Moisture Serum (including Glycerin). It is supplied as a moisturizing body lotion in various pump bottles (e.g., 250mL, 400mL). It is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) Cosmetic/Body Care Product.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of NIVEA Body Lotion Nourishing Cocoa

Do NOT use NIVEA Body Lotion Nourishing Cocoa if you:

  • Have a known allergy or hypersensitivity to Cocoa Butter, Vitamin E, or any other ingredient in the lotion (e.g., specific fragrances).
  • Are applying it to severely broken, infected, or weeping skin lesions.

Pregnancy & Breastfeeding Warnings

  • Pregnancy and Breastfeeding: NIVEA Body Lotion Nourishing Cocoa is generally considered safe for topical application during pregnancy and breastfeeding. It can be particularly helpful for managing skin tightness and stretch marks (though results vary).

Side Effects of NIVEA Body Lotion Nourishing Cocoa

Side effects are rare when the product is used correctly.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): None typically expected.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (that may require medical attention):
    • Folliculitis/Acne: If applied excessively, particularly in hot, humid climates, the rich, occlusive nature (Cocoa Butter) may rarely cause clogged pores in susceptible individuals.
    • Allergic Contact Dermatitis: Rash, persistent itching, or hives due to fragrance or a specific component.

What to do if side effects occur:

  • If you suspect the lotion is causing body acne or a rash, discontinue use and switch to a lighter, non-comedogenic formula.
  • For any severe or persistent allergic reaction, consult a physician immediately.

Precautions and Warnings of NIVEA Body Lotion Nourishing Cocoa

  • External Use Only: This product is strictly for external use on the body. Do not ingest.
  • Face Use: The rich composition is typically not recommended for use on the face for individuals prone to breakouts, as the cocoa butter and high oil content may clog facial pores.
  • Sun Protection: This lotion does NOT contain SPF and does not protect against sunburn. Always apply a separate, broad-spectrum sunscreen when heading outdoors.

Discontinue Use: If severe skin irritation develops or persists, stop using the product.

searchable.name: Nivea Body Lotion Rich Nourishing
searchable.brief_info: NIVEA Body Lotion Rich Nourishing is a powerful daily solution trusted to transform dry to very dry skin into noticeably smoother, softer, and intensely hydrated skin for up to 72 hours.
searchable.description: NIVEA Body Lotion Rich Nourishing is an intensively hydrating daily body milk formulated specifically to combat the roughness and discomfort of dry to very dry skin. The formula is infused with the patented NIVEA Deep Moisture Serum and enriched with natural ingredients like Almond Oil and Vitamin E (or Pure Hyaluron in the latest formulation). This unique, non-greasy composition works in synergy to not only provide moisture to the skin's surface but also to bind and hold water in the deeper layers. By creating a protective barrier and replenishing the skin's natural moisturizing factors, NIVEA Body Lotion Rich Nourishing prevents moisture loss, reduces roughness, and ensures deep, lasting hydration, promoting healthy-looking skin with every use.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of NIVEA Body Lotion Rich Nourishing

NIVEA Body Lotion Rich Nourishing is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) cosmetic product.

Apply liberally to the body as often as needed for desired skin moisture.

Proper Administration

  • Route: Topical application to the skin of the body (avoiding the face if prone to acne).
  • How to Use: Dispense an adequate amount of lotion into your palm. Gently massage the lotion all over your body, focusing on particularly dry areas like elbows, knees, and heels. Rub in thoroughly until absorbed.
  • Timing: Apply daily or twice daily (morning and evening). For optimal results, apply immediately after a shower or bath while the skin is still slightly damp, to seal in maximum moisture.

Missed Dose Guidance

  • Not applicable. Reapply as soon as you notice skin dryness.
searchable.specification: The key ingredients include the NIVEA Deep Moisture Serum, Natural Almond Oil, and Vitamin E (with Pure Hyaluron in newer variants). It is supplied as a moisturizing body lotion in various pump bottles (e.g., 250mL, 400mL). It is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) Cosmetic/Body Care Product.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of NIVEA Body Lotion Rich Nourishing

Do NOT use NIVEA Body Lotion Rich Nourishing if you:

  • Have a known allergy or hypersensitivity to Almond Oil, Hyaluron, Vitamin E, or any other ingredient in the lotion (e.g., specific fragrances or preservatives).
  • Are applying it to severely broken, infected, or weeping skin lesions.

Pregnancy & Breastfeeding Warnings

  • Pregnancy and Breastfeeding: NIVEA Body Lotion Rich Nourishing is generally considered safe for topical application during pregnancy and breastfeeding, as it is non-medicated. It is helpful for managing skin tightness and dryness.

Side Effects of NIVEA Body Lotion Rich Nourishing

Side effects are rare when the product is used correctly.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): None typically expected.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (that may require medical attention):
    • Comedogenicity/Acne: The richness and presence of ingredients might rarely cause clogged pores or body acne in susceptible, very oily skin types if applied excessively.
    • Allergic Contact Dermatitis: Rash, persistent itching, or hives due to fragrance or a specific component.

What to do if side effects occur:

  • If you suspect the lotion is causing body acne or a persistent rash, discontinue use and switch to a lighter, non-comedogenic formula.
  • For any severe or persistent allergic reaction, consult a physician immediately.

Precautions and Warnings of NIVEA Body Lotion Rich Nourishing

  • External Use Only: This product is strictly for external use on the body. Do not ingest.
  • Face Use: Due to its rich, occlusive nature, this lotion is typically not recommended for facial use for those with acne-prone or highly oily skin.
  • Sun Protection: This lotion does NOT contain SPF and does not protect against sunburn. Always apply a separate, broad-spectrum sunscreen when heading outdoors.
  • Discontinue Use: If severe skin irritation develops or persists, stop using the product.

searchable.name: Normagut Capsules
searchable.brief_info: Normagut contains Saccharomyces boulardii 250mg, a clinically studied friendly yeast trusted for restoring the balance of the intestinal flora, effectively treating and preventing various forms of diarrhea.
searchable.description: Normagut Probiotic Capsules contain a high concentration of freeze-dried Saccharomyces boulardii (at least $2.5\text{ billion}$ viable cells per $250\text{ mg}$ capsule), a unique probiotic yeast that is structurally different from common bacteria-based probiotics. This distinction gives it several advantages: notably, it is naturally resistant to antibiotics and gastric acid, ensuring that the beneficial yeast cells reach the intestines alive and fully functional. Normagut works powerfully to fight pathogenic organisms and neutralize their toxins, helping to restore the normal functioning of the intestinal lining and significantly reducing the duration and severity of diarrhea.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Normagut Probiotic Capsules

Normagut Probiotic Capsules is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) supplement.

Adults and children over 12 years: Take 1 capsule, 1-2 times a day, or as directed by a physician.

Children aged 2 to 12 years: Take 1 capsule, 1-2 times a day, or as directed by a physician.

Proper Administration

  • Route: Oral capsule (or mixed powder for children).
  • How to Take (Adults/Older Children): Swallow the capsule whole with water. Do not chew or crush.
  • How to Take (Younger Children): If the child cannot swallow the capsule, open the capsule and pour the contents into a small amount of water, milk, or juice. Ensure the child drinks the entire mixture.
  • Timing: Can be taken before, during, or after meals. If taking with antibiotics, space the doses out (e.g., take Normagut 2 hours after the antibiotic).

Missed Dose Guidance

  • If you miss a dose, take it as soon as you remember.
  • Continue with your regular dosing schedule. Do not double the dose.
searchable.specification: The active ingredient is Freeze-dried Saccharomyces boulardii (250 mg, min. 2.5 billion viable cells). It is supplied as an oral capsule (or the contents as powder). Common pack sizes are 10 or 30 capsules. It is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) Probiotic/Antidiarrhoeal.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Normagut Probiotic Capsules

Do NOT use Normagut Probiotic Capsules if you:

  • Have a known allergy or hypersensitivity to Saccharomyces boulardii (yeast) or any other component of the product (including lactose, if present).
  • Have a central venous catheter or are a severely immunocompromised patient (e.g., undergoing chemotherapy or living with HIV/AIDS), due to a rare but serious risk of fungemia (yeast in the bloodstream).

Pregnancy & Breastfeeding Warnings

  • Pregnancy: Consult your doctor. There is insufficient reliable information to definitively confirm its safety during pregnancy. It is advised to consult a physician before use.
  • Breastfeeding: Consult your doctor. Use only under medical supervision.

Side Effects of Normagut Probiotic Capsules

Side effects are generally mild and localized to the digestive system.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Increased stomach gas, flatulence, or mild bloating, especially upon initial use. Rarely, headache or dry mouth.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (that may require medical attention):
    • Fungemia: Very rare cases of yeast infection in the bloodstream (fungemia) reported mainly in critically ill or immunocompromised patients.
    • Allergic Reactions: Rash, hives, swelling, or difficulty breathing.

What to do if side effects occur:

  • For common gas or bloating, if it persists or is bothersome, notify your doctor.
  • If diarrhea does not improve after 2 days of treatment, consult your doctor.
  • For any signs of a severe allergic reaction, stop the medication immediately and seek emergency medical attention.

Precautions and Warnings of Normagut Probiotic Capsules

  • Antifungals Interaction: Do NOT take Normagut simultaneously with oral or systemic antifungal medications (e.g., Fluconazole, Ketoconazole), as the antifungal will kill the Saccharomyces boulardii yeast, reducing its effectiveness. Separate the timing by a few hours, or consult your doctor.
  • Hydration: Normagut is a complement to therapy. It must be taken alongside adequate oral rehydration solution (ORS) or other fluids to restore lost electrolytes and prevent dehydration, especially during severe diarrhea.
  • Temperature Sensitivity: DO NOT mix the capsule contents with liquids or foods hotter than 50 degree C or too cold (ice water), or with alcohol, as this will destroy the live yeast cells.
  • Infants: For children under 2 years old, use only as directed by a doctor.

searchable.name: PIC Thermogel Reusable Cushion 20x30cm
searchable.brief_info: The PIC Thermogel Reusable Cushion 20x30cm is a large, non-freezing gel pack trusted for delivering targeted, flexible, and comfortable cold and heat therapy to effectively manage pain, swelling, and muscle stiffness across large areas of the body.
searchable.description: The PIC Thermogel Reusable Cushion 20x30cm is a practical, reusable gel pad (maxi size) designed for high-quality thermotherapy (heat) and cryotherapy (cold). Its unique gel formulation remains flexible even when frozen, allowing the cushion to easily adapt and mold to the contours of large body areas, such as the back, shoulders, thighs, and stomach, without slipping. This dual-action cushion provides relief without medication by utilizing the natural therapeutic power of temperature. The large 20x30 cm size ensures comprehensive coverage, and it typically comes with a protective cover and adjustable elastic straps to secure the cushion comfortably to the affected area.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of PIC Thermogel Reusable Cushion 20x30cm

PIC Thermogel Reusable Cushion 20x30cm is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) device.

Apply for 15-20 minutes per session, 2 to 3 times a day, as needed for symptom relief.

Proper Administration

  • Route: Topical application (Thermotherapy or Cryotherapy).
  • How to Prepare (Cold): Place the cushion in the freezer for at least 2 hours. Remove and insert it into the protective cover before application.
  • How to Prepare (Heat - Bain-Marie): Immerse the cushion in hot water (maximum 60 degree C for 5 to 10 minutes. Test temperature, then insert into the cover.
  • How to Prepare (Heat - Microwave): Place the cushion in a microwave-safe container, cover completely with water, and heat carefully (follow specific wattage instructions). Test temperature and insert into the cover.
  • How to Apply: Secure the cushion to the affected area (back, stomach, shoulder, thigh) using the adjustable elastic strap.
  • Timing: Apply for a maximum of 20 minutes per session.
searchable.specification: The product is a reusable gel cushion for hot/cold therapy. Dimensions are 20x30 cm (Large Maxi size). It includes a protective cover and elastic bands. The gel formulation does not freeze solid. It is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) Medical Device.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of PIC Thermogel Reusable Cushion 20x30cm

Do NOT use the PIC Thermogel Reusable Cushion 20x30cm if the patient:

  • Cold Therapy: Do not use on people with Raynaud's disease, severe circulation problems, or cold hypersensitivity.
  • Heat Therapy: Do not use on open wounds, acute inflammation, or bleeding areas. Do not use if you have severe nerve damage or impaired skin sensation (e.g., due to diabetes).

Pregnancy & Breastfeeding Warnings

  • General: Use is generally safe, but avoid applying excessive heat or cold directly to the abdomen during pregnancy without consulting a doctor.

Side Effects of PIC Thermogel Reusable Cushion 20x30cm

Side effects occur only due to improper application or excessive heat/cold duration.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Temporary redness or a tingling/numbness sensation (due to cold).
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (that may require medical attention):
    • Thermal Burns: Applying heat that is too hot, or applying the frozen pack directly to the skin without the cover for too long, can cause localized severe burns or frostbite.
    • Aggravated Inflammation: Applying heat to a recent, acute injury (within 48 hours) will worsen inflammation and swelling.

What to do if severe symptoms occur:

  • If the skin turns deep red, blanches, or blistering occurs, remove the cushion immediately and seek emergency medical treatment.
  • If dizziness or fainting occurs, remove the heat and rest.

Precautions and Warnings of PIC Thermogel Reusable Cushion 20x30cm

  • NEVER APPLY DIRECTLY TO SKIN: Always insert the Thermogel cushion into the provided cover or wrap it in a thin towel before application to prevent thermal injury (burns/frostbite).
  • Temperature Check: Always test the temperature of the cushion with your hand before applying it to the treatment area.
  • Limit Duration: Each application should not exceed 20 minutes. Wait at least 20 minutes before repeating the application.
  • Microwave Safety: Follow microwave instructions precisely to prevent the gel pack from rupturing or overheating.
  • Do Not Ingest: The gel contents are non-toxic but should not be ingested. If the sachet breaks, dispose of the gel and sachet safely.

searchable.name: PIC Thermogel Reusable Cushion 10x26cm
searchable.brief_info: The PIC Thermogel Reusable Cushion 10x26cm is a medium-sized, non-freezing gel pack trusted for delivering targeted, flexible, and comfortable cold and heat therapy to effectively manage acute pain, swelling, and muscle stiffness on specific joints and localized areas.
searchable.description: The PIC Thermogel Reusable Cushion 10x26cm is a practical, reusable gel pad (medium size) designed for high-quality thermotherapy (heat) and cryotherapy (cold). Its unique gel formulation remains flexible even when frozen, allowing the cushion to easily adapt and mold to the contours of areas like the knee, elbow, ankle, or neck, providing maximum contact. This dual-action cushion provides relief without medication by utilizing the natural therapeutic power of temperature. The 10x26 cm size ensures comprehensive coverage for medium-sized joints and muscles, and it typically comes with a protective cover and sometimes an adjustable elastic strap to secure the cushion comfortably to the affected area.

Side effects occur only due to improper application or excessive heat/cold duration.

searchable.specification: The product is a reusable gel cushion for hot/cold therapy. Dimensions are 10x26cm (Medium size). It typically includes a protective cover and elastic bands (in some variants). The gel formulation does not freeze solid. It is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) Medical Device.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Dosage of PIC Thermogel Reusable Cushion 10x26cm

PIC Thermogel Reusable Cushion 10x26cm is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) device.

Apply for 15-20 minutes per session, 2 to 3 times a day, as needed for symptom relief.

Proper Administration

  • Route: Topical application (Thermotherapy or Cryotherapy).
  • How to Prepare (Cold): Place the cushion in the freezer for at least 2 hours. Remove and insert it into the protective cover before application.
  • How to Prepare (Heat - Boiling Water): Immerse the cushion in hot water (maximum 60 degree C) for 5 to 10 minutes. Test temperature, then insert into the cover.
  • How to Prepare (Heat - Microwave): Heat carefully (follow specific wattage instructions on the pack). Test temperature and insert into the cover.
  • How to Apply: Secure the cushion to the affected area (e.g., elbow, knee, ankle) using the adjustable elastic strap (if included) or manual placement.
  • Timing: Apply for a maximum of 20 minutes per session.

searchable.name: Ruzu Black Capsules
searchable.brief_info: Ruzu Black Capsules are marketed as a potent polyherbal formula designed to restore and enhance male sexual power, boost energy, and improve overall vitality and reproductive health.
searchable.description: Ruzu Black Capsules are typically marketed as a fast-acting male sexual health supplement. These types of products are generally formulated with a proprietary blend of 100% natural herbs and aphrodisiacs traditionally used to support the male reproductive system. The supplement is marketed as a natural solution to age-related decline in sexual function. By working to naturally boost hormone levels and improve blood circulation, Ruzu Black Capsules aim to enhance erection quality, increase sexual stamina, and reduce fatigue post-intercourse.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Ruzu Black Capsules

Ruzu Black Capsules is marketed as an OTC supplement.

Take 2 capsules daily, or before engaging in sexual intercourse, as directed by the package. Use only after consulting a physician.

Proper Administration

  • Route: Oral capsule.
  • How to Take: Swallow the capsule whole with a glass of water.
  • Timing: The package typically suggests taking two capsules daily or before sexual activity. Follow the exact dose on the leaflet.

Missed Dose Guidance

  • Not applicable, as this is either a daily tonic or an as-needed product.
searchable.specification: This product is a dietary supplement for male sexual health. It is supplied as an oral capsule (e.g., bottle of 60 capsules). Due to lack of official verification, assume it is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) product that may contain undeclared prescription drugs.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Ruzu Black Capsules

Do NOT take Ruzu Black Capsules if you:

  • Have a known allergy or hypersensitivity to any component (declared or undeclared).
  • Are taking nitrate prescription drugs (e.g., nitroglycerin for chest pain), as the combination with hidden PDE-5 inhibitors can cause a life-threatening drop in blood pressure.
  • Have pre-existing heart disease, severe high blood pressure, diabetes, or high cholesterol.
  • Are taking any medications for erectile dysfunction prescribed by a doctor.

Pregnancy & Breastfeeding Warnings

  • General: This product is not intended for use by women.

Side Effects of Ruzu Black Capsules

If the product contains hidden PDE-5 inhibitors, the following side effects may occur:

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Headaches, body aches, flushing (skin warmth and redness), dizziness (due to blood pressure changes), nasal congestion, and digestive upset.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (that may require medical attention):
    • Severe Hypotension: Dangerous drop in blood pressure, leading to fainting or cardiovascular complications.
    • Priapism: Erections lasting more than four hours (requires immediate emergency medical attention).
    • Vision/Hearing Problems: Sudden vision loss or severe changes.

What to do if side effects occur:

  • For any severe side effect, especially chest pain, severe dizziness, or an erection lasting more than four hours, seek emergency medical treatment immediately.
  • If you experience rapid, strong, or unexpected effects immediately after consumption, stop using the product and consult a physician.

Precautions and Warnings of Ruzu Black Capsules

  • Medical Clearance is Essential: Consult a physician before using this product, particularly if you have any pre-existing health conditions or are taking prescription medications.
  • Nitrates Warning: The interaction with nitrates is the most dangerous risk in this category. NEVER combine this product with nitrate drugs.
  • Stop Use: If you experience any severe discomfort or unexpected effects, discontinue use immediately.
  • Herb-Drug Interactions: Herbal ingredients may interact with medications for diabetes, high blood pressure, or blood thinning (anticoagulants).
  • Unregulated Ingredients: Consumers must be aware that products in this category are vulnerable to contamination with unlisted pharmaceutical ingredients that bypass regulatory testing.

searchable.name: Wellbaby Multivitamin Drops
searchable.brief_info: Wellbaby Multivitamin Drops is a unique liquid formula trusted by parents and recommended by health experts to provide a safe and balanced nutritional safeguard for babies aged 4 to 24 months, supporting their rapid growth, development, and immune system function.
searchable.description: Wellbaby Multivitamin Drops is a unique liquid formulation that provides a comprehensive range of up to 16 essential vitamins and minerals, carefully balanced for infants and young children. Designed with a baby's special needs in mind, this supplement is often recommended by health departments to safeguard intake of crucial nutrients like Vitamins A, C, and D during the first few years of life, when dietary requirements are high relative to body size. The formula includes Iron for cognitive development and Vitamin D3 for bone growth. The drops have a pleasant, natural orange flavour and include a calibrated measuring syringe for safe, accurate, and easy administration directly onto the baby's tongue or mixed with milk/juice.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Wellbaby Multivitamin Drops

Wellbaby Multivitamin Drops is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) supplement.

Babies (from 4 to 24 months): Administer 0.5 ml twice daily, as marked on the syringe, or as directed by a paediatrician.

Proper Administration

  • Route: Oral liquid drops.
  • How to Use:
    1. Shake the bottle well before use.
    2. Insert the syringe into the bottle, then hold the bottle upside down.
    3. Draw out 0.5 ml of liquid as marked on the syringe.
    4. Carefully administer the drops onto the baby's tongue, ideally just before a feed.
    5. Rinse the syringe thoroughly with clean water and dry it after each use.
  • Timing: Administer twice daily, ensuring consistent spacing.

Missed Dose Guidance

  • If you miss a dose, simply resume the regular dosage ($0.5\text{ ml}$ twice daily) the following day. Do not take two doses at once.
searchable.specification: The active ingredients include 16 nutrients: Vitamins A, C, D3, E, B-Complex, Iron, Zinc, and Swiss Alpine Malt extract. It is supplied as an oral liquid in a 30 ml bottle with a measuring syringe. It is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) Multivitamin Dietary Supplement for babies (4-24 months).
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Wellbaby Multivitamin Drops

Do NOT give Wellbaby Multivitamin Drops if the baby:

  • Is under 4 months of age (unless advised otherwise by a paediatrician).
  • Has a known allergy or hypersensitivity to any of the ingredients (including iron, vitamins, or malt extract).
  • Is already drinking 500 ml (approx. 1 pint) or more of infant formula daily, as the formula already has vitamins added.

Pregnancy & Breastfeeding Warnings

  • General: This product is for infants and children and is not intended for use by pregnant or breastfeeding women.

Side Effects of Wellbaby Multivitamin Drops

Side effects are rare when the product is used as directed.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): In rare cases, some infants may experience mild gastrointestinal discomfort (upset stomach, minor change in stool colour/consistency) due to the iron content.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (that may require medical attention):
    • Iron Overdose: CRITICAL WARNING: This product contains iron, which if taken in excess, is seriously harmful to very young children. DO NOT exceed the recommended daily dose.
    • Allergic Reactions: Persistent rash, swelling, or difficulty breathing.
    • Staining: The iron content may cause minor, temporary staining of teeth or gums, which can be minimized by administering the drops before a feed.

What to do if side effects occur:

  • For mild stomach upset, ensure the drops are given with or after a feed.
  • If you suspect an overdose (e.g., severe vomiting, drowsiness) or observe any signs of a severe allergic reaction, seek emergency medical attention immediately.
  • Wipe any spillage immediately, as the iron content can stain skin or fabric.

Precautions and Warnings of Wellbaby Multivitamin Drops

  • Dosage Limit: Do NOT exceed the recommended daily dosage ($0.5\text{ ml}$ twice daily, total $1\text{ ml}$/day) to prevent iron and Vitamin D toxicity.
  • Keep Out of Reach: Due to the risk of iron overdose, store safely out of the sight and reach of children at all times.
  • Syringe Use: Use the included measuring syringe to ensure accurate dosing ($0.5\text{ ml}$ marked). Rinse and dry the syringe immediately after use.
  • Mixing: The liquid can be mixed with the baby's milk or water, or administered directly onto the tongue just before a feed.
  • Formula Fed Infants: If the baby is drinking infant formula, consult a paediatrician before administering the drops, as formula already contains vitamins.

searchable.name: Woods' Peppermint Lozenges Cherry Flavour
searchable.brief_info: Woods' Peppermint Lozenges Cherry Flavour offers soothing relief for the throat and cough, utilizing a blend of natural oils to loosen phlegm while providing a refreshing, minty cherry sensation.
searchable.description: Woods' Peppermint Lozenges Cherry Flavour are a traditional medicated throat lozenge known for their fast-acting soothing relief. The lozenges combine the strong clearing power of natural peppermint oil and menthol with the pleasant taste of cherry. This dual action is crucial: as the lozenge dissolves slowly in the mouth, it releases vapours that provide a soothing, cooling sensation to the irritated throat. Simultaneously, the natural oils act as an antiseptic and expectorant, helping to loosen and break up thick phlegm in the lungs. This makes Woods' Peppermint Lozenges Cherry Flavour an effective choice for managing symptoms of colds, coughs, and minor throat discomfort while leaving breath minty fresh.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Woods' Peppermint Lozenges Cherry Flavour

Woods' Peppermint Lozenges Cherry Flavour is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) medicine.

Slowly dissolve one (1) lozenge in the mouth as required, typically 3-4 times a day.

Proper Administration

  • Route: Oral (slow dissolution).
  • How to Use: Place one lozenge in your mouth and allow it to dissolve slowly. Do not chew or swallow the lozenge whole. Avoid drinking liquids immediately after the lozenge dissolves to maximize the soothing effect.
  • Timing: Use as needed for cough or throat discomfort.
searchable.specification: The active ingredients include Peppermint Essential Oil and Menthol, Anise Oil. It is supplied as hard lozenges, typically in small sachets or packs of 6 to 18 pieces. It is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) Cough Suppressant/Soothing Lozenge.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Woods' Peppermint Lozenges Cherry Flavour

Do NOT use Woods' Peppermint Lozenges Cherry Flavour if you:

  • Have a known allergy or hypersensitivity to Menthol, Peppermint Oil, Anise Oil, or any other ingredient in the lozenge.
  • Have been told by a doctor that you have an intolerance to some sugars (Sucrose/Glucose syrup).
  • Have a severe, persistent, or chronic cough, or other chronic lung conditions (e.g., severe asthma or emphysema), without consulting a doctor.

Pregnancy & Breastfeeding Warnings

  • Pregnancy and Breastfeeding: Consult your doctor. The safety of the lozenges during pregnancy and breastfeeding has not been definitively established. Use only when advised by a healthcare professional.

Side Effects of Woods' Peppermint Lozenges Cherry Flavour

Side effects are rare when the product is used as directed.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Temporary mild irritation, burning discomfort, or altered taste sensation in the mouth.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (that may require medical attention):
    • Hypersensitivity: Symptoms like erythematous skin rash (red rash), severe burning discomfort, or severe dizziness.
    • Overdose: Ingestion of an overdose of menthol may cause severe abdominal pain, nausea, vomiting, dizziness, or drowsiness (ataxia).

What to do if side effects occur:

  • If you experience persistent severe burning, swelling, or blistering, discontinue use immediately and consult a physician.
  • If accidentally swallowed in large amounts: Seek emergency medical assistance.

Precautions and Warnings of Woods' Peppermint Lozenges Cherry Flavour

  • Not for Young Children: Not recommended for children under 6 years of age due to the risk of choking and the strength of the menthol.
  • Symptom Monitoring: If symptoms persist or worsen, reoccur, or are accompanied by a fever, rash, or persistent headache, discontinue use and consult a healthcare provider.
  • Diabetics: The lozenges contain sugar (Sucrose and Glucose Syrup). Diabetic patients should use sugar-free lozenges only, or factor the sugar content into their daily intake.
  • Do Not Chew: The lozenge should be allowed to dissolve slowly in the mouth. Do not chew or swallow whole.
  • Limit Intake: Do not exceed the recommended daily dosage.
