searchable.name: Elastoplast Extra Tough Plasters
searchable.brief_info: Elastoplast Extra Tough Plasters are the first heavy fabric plasters trusted to combine 100% waterproof protection with flexible, quick-drying fabric, making them the ultimate choice for securing minor wounds in demanding environments.
searchable.description: Elastoplast Extra Tough Waterproof Plasters are engineered for individuals who need maximum wound protection during activities like DIY, sports, outdoor work, or frequent hand washing. These plasters utilize the innovative Hi-DRY TEX Technology, a three-layer system designed for superior durability. The core benefits are provided by a robust, quick-drying fabric backing, a waterproof yet breathable inner membrane, and a super-strong adhesive. This combination ensures the plaster stays securely in place for longer, reliably protecting the wound from water, dirt, and bacteria without leaving sticky residues upon removal. The flexible fabric construction allows the plaster to move with the skin, making it ideal for joints and active areas.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Elastoplast Extra Tough (Waterproof) Plasters

Elastoplast Extra Tough Plasters are an Over-the-Counter (OTC) consumable.

Use one plaster per wound, once daily, or as needed.

Proper Administration

  • Route: Topical application to the skin.
  • How to Use:
    1. Clean the wound and dry the skin around the cut or graze very carefully.
    2. Remove the backing film from the adhesive side of the plaster.
    3. Apply the plaster pad side down onto the wound without stretching, ensuring the pad covers the wound completely.
    4. Press down firmly to ensure all edges are securely sealed against the skin.
  • Timing: Apply immediately after cleansing the wound.
searchable.specification: The plasters are made of durable, flexible, waterproof, and breathable fabric, utilizing Hi-DRY TEX Technology. They feature a super strong, skin-friendly adhesive and a non-stick wound pad. They are typically supplied in boxes of assorted strips (e.g., 12 or 15 assorted strips). It is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) Medical Consumable.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Elastoplast Extra Tough (Waterproof) Plasters

Do NOT use Elastoplast Extra Tough Plasters if:

  • The wound is deep, severely bleeding, or shows clear signs of active infection (increased redness, pus, pain, warmth).
  • You are allergic to the adhesive material or the plaster fabric.
  • You are attempting to reuse the plaster (use only once).

Pregnancy & Breastfeeding Warnings

  • General: As a non-medicated external plaster, Elastoplast Extra Tough Plasters are safe for use during pregnancy and breastfeeding.

Side Effects of Elastoplast Extra Tough (Waterproof) Plasters

Side effects are rare and typically related to skin sensitivity to the strong adhesive.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Temporary redness or mild irritation upon removal, especially if the plaster is left on for too long.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (that may require medical attention):
    • Allergic Contact Dermatitis: Persistent redness, itching, or swelling underneath or around the plaster (requires immediate removal and consultation).

What to do if side effects occur:

  • If irritation or rash occurs, remove the plaster immediately, gently clean the skin, and use an alternative sensitive-skin plaster or sterile dressing.

Precautions and Warnings of Elastoplast Extra Tough (Waterproof) Plasters

  • Clean Wound First: Always clean the wound with an antiseptic (like Elastoplast Wound Spray) and gently dry the surrounding skin before applying the plaster to ensure both hygiene and maximum adhesion.
  • Change Regularly: Change the plaster every 24 to 48 hours, or more often if the wound pad is heavily saturated or the seal has been compromised by prolonged water exposure.
  • Application Technique: Apply the plaster without stretching it or creating creases, as this can compromise the waterproof seal.
  • Latex Warning: If you have a latex allergy, double-check the packaging to ensure the product is 100% latex-free, as some older packaging may contain latex.
  • Consult Doctor: Seek medical professional help for deep cuts, animal bites, serious burns, or wounds that show no sign of healing.

searchable.name: Nutra Elderberry & Echinacea Tea
searchable.brief_info: Nutra Elderberry & Echinacea Tea is a powerful, naturally caffeine-free herbal infusion trusted to bolster the immune system, aid recovery from cold and flu symptoms, and provide a rich source of protective antioxidants.
searchable.description: Nutra Elderberry & Echinacea Tea is a premium herbal tea blend (typically 60% Elderberry and 40% Echinacea) created to naturally support the body's defence system. It combines the centuries-old traditional wisdom of two of the most popular immune-boosting herbs. The tea provides a comforting, slightly tart berry flavour balanced by the earthy, floral notes of Echinacea, making it a pleasant drink for chilly mornings or when feeling run down. This infusion is 100% pure herbs, often pharmacist-formulated, and is free from artificial colours, flavours, and added sugars. It is an ideal addition to your daily routine for proactive immune support and to help speed up recovery during seasonal illnesses.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Nutra Elderberry & Echinacea Tea

Nutra Elderberry & Echinacea Tea is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) Food Supplement.

Drink 1 cup per day, or up to 3 times a day for temporary immune support, or as directed by a healthcare professional.

Proper Administration

  • Route: Oral beverage (infusion).
  • How to Prepare: Pour 200 ml of boiling water over 1 tea bag. Squeeze the tea bag gently to release all the goodness. Allow to steep for 4-5 minutes.
  • Timing: Can be enjoyed at any time of day, as it is naturally caffeine-free.
  • Reusability: The tea bags are often designed to be reused up to three times per day with minimal impact on potency.

Missed Dose Guidance

  • Not applicable. Consistency is key for immune support.
searchable.specification: The active ingredients are Elderberry (60%) and Echinacea (40%). It is supplied as herbal tea bags (typically 20 bags per box). It is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) Herbal Tea/Food Supplement.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Nutra Elderberry & Echinacea Tea

Do NOT consume Nutra Elderberry & Echinacea Tea if you:

  • Have a known allergy or hypersensitivity to Elderberry, Echinacea, or plants in the Daisy/Aster family (e.g., ragweed, marigolds).
  • Have an autoimmune disease (such as Lupus, Multiple Sclerosis, or Rheumatoid Arthritis), as Echinacea may stimulate the immune system, potentially increasing symptoms.
  • Are undergoing treatment with immunosuppressant medication (e.g., following an organ transplant), as Echinacea may counteract the drug's effects.

Pregnancy & Breastfeeding Warnings

  • Pregnancy and Breastfeeding: Consult your doctor. There is limited reliable safety information regarding the high concentration of these herbs during pregnancy and lactation. It is recommended to seek advice from a healthcare professional for personalized guidance.

Side Effects of Nutra Elderberry & Echinacea Tea

Side effects are rare when the tea is consumed as directed.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): None typically expected.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (that may require medical attention):
    • Autoimmune Flare: Potential to exacerbate symptoms of autoimmune diseases.
    • Severe Allergic Reactions: Rash, hives, swelling of the face, or difficulty breathing.
    • Gastrointestinal Distress: Nausea, vomiting, or diarrhea (rare in commercial tea bags).

What to do if side effects occur:

  • If you experience any persistent or severe adverse effects, or signs of an allergic reaction, discontinue use immediately and consult a physician.

Precautions and Warnings of Nutra Elderberry & Echinacea Tea

  • Dosage Limit: Do not exceed the recommended daily intake (often advised to be no more than three cups per day).
  • Diabetic Patients: Consult your doctor. Elderberry may increase the effects of antidiabetic medications, potentially increasing the risk of hypoglycemia (low blood sugar).
  • Not a Substitute: This tea is a supplement and is not intended to prevent, treat, or cure any disease or medical condition. Do not use it as a substitute for prescribed cold or flu medication.
  • Chronic Conditions: If you suffer from high blood pressure or are on prescribed medication, seek medical advice before drinking this tea.
  • Preparation: Ensure the tea bag is steeped correctly in boiling water for the specified time (typically 4-5 minutes).

searchable.name: Nutra Lemon Grass & Ginger Tea
searchable.brief_info: Nutra Lemon Grass & Ginger Tea is a naturally caffeine-free blend trusted to bolster the immune system, soothe digestive discomfort, and promote relaxation with its unique citrus-spice flavour.
searchable.description: Nutra Lemon Grass & Ginger Tea is a premium herbal tea blend (typically 50% Lemongrass and 50% Ginger) formulated to deliver therapeutic benefits using only potent, hand-harvested ingredients. This infusion is a comforting elixir that perfectly balances the zesty, bright notes of lemongrass with the warming, spicy kick of ginger. Unlike standard teas, this blend is naturally caffeine-free and contains no added flavourings or oils (in high-quality variants). It is designed to be a daily wellness beverage, supporting the body's natural processes, from enhancing digestion and reducing bloating to providing a rich source of antioxidants that fight oxidative stress and support immunity.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Nutra Lemon Grass & Ginger Tea

Nutra Lemon Grass & Ginger Tea is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) Food Supplement.

Drink 1 cup daily for wellness, or up to 3 cups per day for temporary immune or digestive support.

Proper Administration

  • Route: Oral beverage (infusion).
  • How to Prepare: Pour 200 ml of freshly boiled water over 1 tea bag. Allow to steep for 4-5 minutes. Squeeze the tea bag gently to release all the active compounds before removing.
  • Timing: Can be enjoyed at any time of day. For digestive benefits, consume 20 minutes before meals. For relaxation, drink 1-2 hours before bedtime.
  • Reusability: High-quality tea bags can often be reused up to 3 times on the same day for a milder brew.

Missed Dose Guidance

  • Not applicable. Consistency is key for digestive and immune support.
searchable.specification: The active ingredients are Lemongrass (typically 50%) and Ginger (typically 50%). It is supplied as herbal tea bags (e.g., 20 bags per box). It is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) Herbal Tea/Food Supplement.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Nutra Lemon Grass & Ginger Tea

Do NOT consume Nutra Lemon Grass & Ginger Tea if you:

  • Have a known allergy or hypersensitivity to Lemongrass, Ginger, or plants in the Ginger or Grass family.

Pregnancy & Breastfeeding Warnings

  • Pregnancy: Consult your doctor. While ginger can relieve nausea, Lemongrass is sometimes cited to potentially stimulate uterine and menstrual flow in large quantities. It is advised to limit ginger intake to 1 gram per day and seek personalized medical advice before using this tea during pregnancy.
  • Breastfeeding: Consult your doctor. There is insufficient reliable information on safety during breastfeeding; avoid use unless medically supervised.

Side Effects of Nutra Lemon Grass & Ginger Tea

Side effects are generally mild and related to excessive consumption or sensitivity.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Excessive intake may cause heartburn, stomach irritation, acid reflux, or mild diarrhoea/bloating.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (that may require medical attention):
    • Drug Interactions: Both ginger and lemongrass may interact with prescription medications, potentially enhancing or reducing their effects.
    • Severe Allergic Reactions: Rash, hives, swelling of the face, or difficulty breathing.

What to do if side effects occur:

  • If you experience persistent heartburn or severe digestive upset, reduce consumption to one cup daily or discontinue use and consult a physician.

Precautions and Warnings of Nutra Lemon Grass & Ginger Tea

  • Blood Thinners (Anticoagulants): Consult your doctor or pharmacist. Ginger has anti-platelet activity and may interact with blood-thinning medications (like Warfarin), potentially increasing the risk of bleeding.
  • Blood Pressure/Diabetes Medications: Both herbs may affect blood pressure (Lemongrass may lower it) or blood sugar. Monitor blood pressure and glucose levels closely if you are on prescription medication for these conditions.
  • Gallstones: People with gallstones should use ginger-containing products with caution.
  • Preparation: Use freshly boiled water and steep for the recommended time (4-5 minutes) to extract maximum therapeutic compounds.
  • Limit Intake: Avoid exceeding 3 cups per day for prolonged periods without professional advice.

searchable.name: Halls Cough & Throat Relief Drops
searchable.brief_info: Halls Cough & Throat Relief Drops are a trusted medicated lozenge that provides fast, penetrating relief from coughs, soothes sore throats, and helps clear nasal passages with its strong cooling vapours.
searchable.description: Halls Cough & Throat Relief Drops are hard, medicated lozenges formulated to provide quick and powerful relief for cough and throat pain symptoms. The efficacy of the drops lies in the high concentration of Menthol, a topical anaesthetic and vapour-releasing agent. As the lozenge dissolves slowly in the mouth, it releases strong cooling vapours that act on two fronts: locally, by numbing and soothing the irritated tissues of the throat; and through inhalation, by clearing and cooling the nasal and bronchial passages. This dual-action provides effective temporary relief from coughing fits and the burning sensation of a sore throat, making Halls Drops an essential item for symptom management during colds, flu, and allergy season.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Halls Cough & Throat Relief Drops

Halls Cough & Throat Relief Drops is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) medicine.

Slowly dissolve one (1) drop in the mouth every 2 hours as needed, or as directed by a doctor.

Proper Administration

  • Route: Oral (slow dissolution).
  • How to Use: Place one drop in your mouth and allow it to dissolve slowly. Do not chew or swallow the drop whole. Avoid drinking liquids immediately after the drop dissolves to maximize the soothing effect.

Timing: Use as needed for cough or throat discomfort.
searchable.specification: The active ingredient is Menthol (typically 7 mg to 10 mg). It is supplied as hard medicated lozenges in a bag or pack (common sizes are 9 drops or 30 drops). It is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) Oral Cough Suppressant/Analgesic.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Halls Cough & Throat Relief Drops

Do NOT consume Halls Cough & Throat Relief Drops if you:

  • Have a known allergy or hypersensitivity to Menthol or any other ingredient in the drops.
  • Have a persistent or chronic cough (such as occurs with asthma, smoking, or emphysema), or a cough accompanied by excessive phlegm, without consulting a doctor.

Pregnancy & Breastfeeding Warnings

  • Pregnancy and Breastfeeding: Consult your doctor. While generally used for temporary relief, individuals should consult a healthcare professional before relying on any medicated lozenge during pregnancy or lactation.

Side Effects of Halls Cough & Throat Relief Drops

Side effects are rare when the product is used as directed.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Temporary mild irritation or stinging sensation in the mouth/throat (due to the strong menthol).
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (that may require medical attention):
    • Severe Allergic Reactions: Persistent rash, hives, swelling of the mouth/throat, or difficulty breathing.
    • Paradoxical Reaction: Very rarely, the strong menthol vapours can, in sensitive individuals, trigger or worsen a breathing issue.

What to do if side effects occur:

  • If you experience persistent sore throat symptoms for more than 7 days, or if you notice any signs of a severe allergic reaction, discontinue use and consult a physician immediately.

Precautions and Warnings of Halls Cough & Throat Relief Drops

  • Not for Young Children: Not recommended for children under 4 years of age (or 6 years, depending on the pack), due to the high risk of choking and the strength of the menthol vapour.
  • Symptom Monitoring: If the sore throat is severe, persists for more than 2 days, or is accompanied by fever, headache, or nausea, consult a healthcare provider.
  • Diabetics: Most Halls drops contain sugar (Sucrose/Glucose Syrup) unless specifically labelled "Sugar-Free." Diabetic patients must factor the sugar content into their daily intake.
  • Do Not Chew: The lozenge should be allowed to dissolve slowly in the mouth. Do not chew or swallow whole.

Limit Intake: Do not exceed the maximum recommended daily dosage.

searchable.name: Halls Immune System Defense Drops
searchable.brief_info: Halls Immune System Defense Drops are a unique supplement that combines the proven throat-soothing relief of a Halls lozenge with high-potency Vitamin C and Zinc to actively support and strengthen your body's natural immune system.
searchable.description: Halls Immune System Defense Drops are a medicated lozenge formulated to serve as both an immediate throat soother and a critical daily source of immune-boosting micronutrients. Unlike traditional cough drops that focus solely on symptom relief, this product is designed for daily wellness and proactive defence. It delivers high doses of Vitamin C and Zinc, two nutrients essential for immune cell function, in a palatable, easy-to-consume form. As the lozenge dissolves slowly in the mouth, it releases soothing vapours (often containing mild menthol) that calm the throat and nasal passages, while the vitamins and minerals are absorbed to support the body’s systemic defences.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Halls Immune System Defense Drops

Halls Immune System Defense Drops is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) dietary supplement.

Slowly dissolve one (1) drop in the mouth as required, up to the maximum daily limit specified on the package. (Limit is typically 3-6 drops daily).

Proper Administration

  • Route: Oral (slow dissolution).
  • How to Use: Place one drop in your mouth and allow it to dissolve slowly. Do not chew or swallow the drop whole. Avoid drinking liquids immediately after the drop dissolves to maximize the soothing effect.
  • Timing: Can be consumed at any time of day, ideally spread out to maintain consistent levels of Vitamin C and Zinc.
searchable.specification: The active ingredients include high-potency Vitamin C and Zinc, often with low-level Menthol. It is supplied as hard lozenges in a bag or pack (common sizes are 9 drops or 30 drops). It is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) Dietary Supplement/Throat Lozenge.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Halls Immune System Defense Drops

Do NOT consume Halls Immune System Defense Drops if you:

  • Have a known allergy or hypersensitivity to Vitamin C, Zinc, Menthol, or any other ingredient in the drops.
  • Have a severe, persistent, or chronic cough, or symptoms that worsen (consult a doctor first).

Pregnancy & Breastfeeding Warnings

  • Pregnancy and Breastfeeding: Consult your doctor. While Vitamin C and Zinc are essential nutrients, consult a healthcare professional before taking high-dose supplements during pregnancy or lactation to ensure adherence to safe upper intake levels.

Side Effects of Halls Immune System Defense Drops

Side effects are rare when the product is used as directed.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Excessive consumption (significantly over the recommended daily amount) of Vitamin C and Zinc may cause stomach upset, nausea, vomiting, or altered taste sensation.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (that may require medical attention):
    • Choking Hazard: Risk of choking, especially in young children if swallowed whole.
    • Allergic Reactions: Persistent rash, hives, swelling of the mouth/throat, or difficulty breathing.

What to do if side effects occur:

  • If you experience persistent stomach upset or severe irritation, discontinue use and consult a physician.
  • For any signs of a severe allergic reaction, seek emergency medical assistance immediately.

Precautions and Warnings of Halls Immune System Defense Drops

  • Dosage Limit: Adhere strictly to the recommended daily dosage (check the package for the maximum number of drops per day) to avoid over-consumption of Zinc and Vitamin C, which can cause toxicity.
  • Choking Risk: Not recommended for children under 4 years of age due to the high risk of choking. Adults should supervise young children while consuming.
  • Symptom Monitoring: If throat symptoms persist for more than 7 days, or if they are accompanied by high fever or headache, consult a healthcare provider.

Diabetics: Most drops contain sugar (Sucrose/Glucose Syrup) unless specifically labelled "Sugar-Free." Diabetic patients must factor the sugar content into their daily intake.

searchable.name: Nature Made Vitamin C 250mg Gummies
searchable.brief_info: Nature Made Vitamin C 250mg Gummies offer a delicious, easy-to-take way to support the immune system, provide powerful antioxidant protection, and aid in collagen formation for healthy skin.
searchable.description: Nature Made Vitamin C 250mg Gummies are a high-quality dietary supplement formulated to deliver the essential nutrient Vitamin C (Ascorbic Acid) in a highly palatable, chewable gummy form. Each gummy typically contains 250 mg of Vitamin C, a significant dose designed to meet daily requirements and provide an extra boost for immune health. The soft, fruit-flavored gummy makes it an excellent option for adults and adolescents who have difficulty swallowing traditional tablets or capsules. This supplement is an easy and effective way to ensure consistent daily intake of this powerful antioxidant, supporting the body's natural defenses against free radicals and environmental stress.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Nature Made Vitamin C 250mg Gummies

Nature Made Vitamin C 250mg Gummies is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) dietary supplement.

Adults: Chew 1 to 2 gummies daily, or as directed by a healthcare professional.

Proper Administration

  • Route: Oral (chewable gummy).
  • How to Take: Chew the gummy completely before swallowing. Do not swallow the gummy whole.
  • Timing: Can be taken at any time of day. Taking it with a meal can help minimize stomach upset.

Missed Dose Guidance

  • Not applicable. Consistency is key for immune support. Simply take the next scheduled dose as usual.
searchable.specification: The active ingredient is Ascorbic Acid (Vitamin C 250mg) per gummy. It is supplied as fruit-flavored chewable gummies, typically in bottles of 150 or 200 count. It is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) Dietary Supplement.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Nature Made Vitamin C 250mg Gummies

Do NOT take Nature Made Vitamin C 250mg Gummies if you:

  • Have a known allergy or hypersensitivity to Ascorbic Acid or any other ingredients in the gummy (e.g., specific gelatin, corn syrup, or flavourings).
  • Have a history of kidney stones or are prone to them, as high doses of Vitamin C may increase the risk in susceptible individuals.

Pregnancy & Breastfeeding Warnings

  • Pregnancy and Breastfeeding: Consult your doctor. While Vitamin C is essential, consult a physician before taking any supplement during pregnancy or lactation to ensure the dosage is appropriate and within recommended limits.

Side Effects of Nature Made Vitamin C 250mg Gummies

Side effects are rare when the product is used as directed.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Excessive consumption (significantly over the recommended dose) may cause mild gastrointestinal upset, such as diarrhoea, nausea, or heartburn.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (that may require medical attention):
    • Hypervitaminosis: Rare, but chronic, extremely high doses may increase the risk of oxalate kidney stone formation.
    • Allergic Reactions: Persistent rash, hives, swelling of the mouth/throat, or difficulty breathing.

What to do if side effects occur:

  • If you experience persistent severe gastrointestinal upset, discontinue use and consult a physician.
  • For any signs of a severe allergic reaction, seek emergency medical assistance immediately.

Precautions and Warnings of Nature Made Vitamin C 250mg Gummies

  • Dosage Limit: Do NOT exceed the recommended daily dosage (typically 1-2 gummies daily for adults) to avoid gastrointestinal upset and the long-term risk of kidney stones associated with high Vitamin C intake.
  • Sugar Content: The gummies contain sugar (often corn syrup and sucrose). Diabetics or individuals on controlled-sugar diets must factor the sugar and caloric content into their daily intake.
  • Choking Hazard: The gummies should be chewed thoroughly before swallowing, especially by adolescents or younger users, to prevent choking.
  • Keep Out of Reach: The appealing taste can make children prone to accidental overdose. Store safely out of the sight and reach of children due to the potential toxicity of high-dose vitamins.
  • G6PD Deficiency: Individuals with this enzyme deficiency should consult a doctor before taking high doses of Vitamin C.

searchable.name: Viaderma Diffuser Sandalwood Oil
searchable.brief_info: Viaderma Diffuser Sandalwood Oil is a concentrated aromatic oil trusted for creating a soothing, grounding, and tranquil atmosphere, ideal for large rooms and prolonged relaxation sessions.
searchable.description: Viaderma Diffuser Sandalwood Oil is a high-volume aromatic liquid designed for long-lasting diffusion. Given the size and application, this product is typically a blend of a natural or nature-identical sandalwood fragrance base diluted in a carrier oil or solvent. It is formulated to consistently release the deep, rich, woody, and sweet aroma associated with Sandalwood, known for its ability to calm the mind and promote emotional balance. The large 100mL size offers exceptional value and convenience, requiring less frequent replenishment in your diffuser. Diffusion of this oil helps to create a tranquil, meditative environment, effectively reducing daily tension and promoting a sense of well-being in your home or workspace.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Viaderma Diffuser Sandalwood Oil

Viaderma Diffuser Sandalwood Oil 100mL is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) aromatherapy product.

Use 3 to 5 drops in an electric diffuser, per diffusion session.

Proper Administration

  • Route: Inhalation via diffusion.
  • How to Use (Electric Diffuser):
    1. Fill the diffuser reservoir with the recommended amount of clean water.
    2. Add 3 to 5 drops of Viaderma Diffuser Sandalwood Oil.
    3. Turn on the diffuser for a maximum of 60 minutes.

Timing: Diffuse during periods of stress, while meditating, or 1 hour before bedtime to promote relaxation.
searchable.specification: The active ingredient is a Sandalwood Aromatic Blend (containing Santalols). It is supplied as a concentrated aromatic liquid in a 100mL bottle. It is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) Aromatherapy/Fragrance Oil.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Viaderma Diffuser Sandalwood Oil

Do NOT use Viaderma Diffuser Sandalwood Oil if you:

  • Have a known allergy or hypersensitivity to Sandalwood or any components of the oil blend.
  • Are applying it undiluted directly to the skin or mucous membranes.
  • Are using it internally (do not swallow).

Pregnancy & Breastfeeding Warnings

  • Pregnancy and Breastfeeding: Consult your doctor. Many essential oils are advised against during pregnancy and lactation. Use of Viaderma Diffuser Sandalwood Oil should only occur after professional medical consultation.

Side Effects of Viaderma Diffuser Sandalwood Oil

Side effects are generally rare and linked to sensitivity or improper use.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Mild skin irritation or redness if applied to the skin undiluted. Excessive inhalation in a small, unventilated room may cause mild headaches or nausea.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (that may require medical attention):
    • Severe Allergic Reactions: Persistent rash, hives, or difficulty breathing.
    • Systemic Toxicity: Severe symptoms (vomiting, confusion) if the concentrated oil is swallowed.

What to do if side effects occur:

  • For mild irritation, reduce the diffusion time or dilute the oil more heavily.
  • If accidentally swallowed: Seek emergency medical attention immediately. Do not induce vomiting.
  • If severe allergic symptoms occur, discontinue use and consult a physician immediately.

Precautions and Warnings of Viaderma Diffuser Sandalwood Oil

  • External Use Only: This oil is for diffusion and topical application (when diluted). Do not swallow.
  • Dilution is Required for Skin: CRUCIAL WARNING: NEVER apply the oil directly to the skin, eyes, or mucous membranes without properly diluting it in a suitable carrier oil.
  • Children and Pets: Use caution in households with young children (under 6 years) and pets, as essential oils can be toxic to them. Diffuse for short periods only in well-ventilated areas, and keep the bottle safely out of reach.
  • Diffusion Duration: Do not diffuse continuously. Limit diffusion sessions to 30-60 minutes at a time, followed by a break of at least 30 minutes.

Flammability: The oil may be flammable. Keep the bottle away from heat, sparks, and open flames.

searchable.name: Viaderma Diffuser Lavander Oil
searchable.brief_info: Viaderma Diffuser Lavender Oil 100mL is a concentrated aromatic oil trusted for promoting deep relaxation, reducing insomnia, and creating a peaceful, tranquil atmosphere in your home or workspace.
searchable.description: Viaderma Diffuser Lavender Oil 100mL is a high-volume aromatic liquid designed for long-lasting, continuous diffusion. Given the large size, this product is typically a blend of natural or nature-identical lavender fragrance base diluted in a carrier oil or solvent. It is formulated to consistently release the classic, soothing floral aroma of Lavender (Lavandula angustifolia), known for its immediate effects on the nervous system. The diffusion of this oil creates a serene, stress-free environment, effectively reducing nervous tension, anxiety, and agitation. The large 100mL size offers exceptional value and convenience, requiring less frequent replenishment in your diffuser.

  • Are applying it undiluted directly to the skin or mucous membranes.

Pregnancy & Breastfeeding Warnings

Side Effects of Viaderma Diffuser Lavender Oil

Side effects are generally rare and linked to sensitivity or improper use.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Mild skin irritation or redness if applied to the skin undiluted. Excessive inhalation in a small, unventilated room may cause mild headaches or nausea.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (that may require medical attention):
    • Severe Allergic Reactions: Persistent rash, hives, or difficulty breathing.
    • Systemic Toxicity: Severe symptoms (vomiting, confusion) if the concentrated oil is swallowed.

What to do if side effects occur:

  • For mild irritation, reduce the diffusion time or dilute the oil more heavily.
  • If accidentally swallowed: Seek emergency medical attention immediately. Do not induce vomiting.
  • If severe allergic symptoms occur, discontinue use and consult a physician immediately.

Precautions and Warnings of Viaderma Diffuser Lavender Oil

  • External Use Only: This oil is for diffusion and topical application (when diluted). Do not swallow.
  • Dilution is Required for Skin: CRUCIAL WARNING: NEVER apply the oil directly to the skin, eyes, or mucous membranes without properly diluting it in a suitable carrier oil.
  • Children and Pets: Use caution in households with young children (under 6 years) and pets. Diffuse for short periods only in well-ventilated areas, and keep the bottle safely out of reach.
  • Diffusion Duration: Do not diffuse continuously. Limit diffusion sessions to 30-60 minutes at a time, followed by a break of at least 30 minutes.

Flammability: The oil may be flammable. Keep the bottle away from heat, sparks, and open flames.

searchable.name: Nutra Joint Tea
searchable.brief_info: Nutra Joint Tea is an expertly formulated herbal blend designed to nourish your joints, maintain flexibility, and promote overall musculoskeletal well-being.
searchable.description: Nutra Joint Tea is a distinctive herbal infusion created to support and maintain the health of your joints and bones. Developed by pharmacists and nutritionists, the efficacy of this blend lies in its carefully selected 100% pure herbal ingredients, prominently featuring Curcumin (from Turmeric), Green Tea, and Piperine. Unlike many supplements, this tea offers a convenient and easily absorbed method to integrate powerful anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds into your daily regimen. Nutra Joint Tea is an ideal choice for anyone seeking a natural, warming, and functional beverage to promote joint flexibility and reduce stiffness.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Nutra Joint Tea

Nutra Joint Tea is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) herbal food supplement.

  • Dosage: Enjoy two to three cups daily as part of a balanced diet. Do not exceed three cups per day.

Proper Administration

  • Route: Oral (infusion).
  • How to Use: Pour approximately 200 ml of freshly boiled water over a single tea bag.
  • Steeping Time: Let the tea steep for four to five minutes to allow full release of the active ingredients.
  • Reusability: Each tea bag can be reused up to three times per day to maximise the herbal benefit.
  • Timing: Can be enjoyed anytime of the day, with or without food.
  • Missed Dose Guidance: Not applicable, as this is a daily food supplement and not a prescription medication with strict dosing times. Simply resume your normal daily use.
searchable.specification:
Product Name: Nutra Joint Tea

Type: Herbal Tea Infusion/Food Supplement

Active Ingredients: Curcumin (50%), Green Tea (30%), Piperine (20%)

Pack Size: Typically supplied as 20 enveloped tea bags.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Nutra Joint Tea

Do NOT consume Nutra Joint Tea if you:

  • Have a known allergy or hypersensitivity to Curcumin, Green Tea, Piperine, or any components of the blend.
  • Are on prescribed medication with a narrow therapeutic index or blood-thinning medications (anticoagulants), as Curcumin may interfere with blood clotting. Consult a doctor first.
  • Suffer from high blood pressure or specific heart conditions, due to the caffeine content in the Green Tea component.

Pregnancy & Breastfeeding Warnings

  • Pregnancy and Breastfeeding: Consult your doctor. While herbal, the high concentration of certain ingredients requires professional medical advice before consumption during pregnancy or lactation.

Side Effects of Nutra Joint Tea

Side effects are uncommon when consumed as directed and are generally mild.

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Mild digestive issues such as slight stomach upset, nausea, or diarrhea, particularly if consumed on an empty stomach or in excessive quantities.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (that may require medical attention):
    • Hypersensitivity Reactions: Symptoms like a persistent rash, severe itching, or swelling of the face/throat.
    • Interaction with Medication: Increased risk of bleeding if taken alongside blood thinners without supervision.
  • What to do if side effects occur:
    • If you experience symptoms of a severe allergic reaction or persistent digestive discomfort, discontinue use and consult a healthcare professional immediately.

Precautions and Warnings of Nutra Joint Tea

  • Before starting: If you are on prescribed medication, suffer from any chronic health condition (especially liver or gallbladder issues, blood clotting disorders, or high blood pressure), or are unsure about its suitability, consult a healthcare professional.
  • Diabetics: This tea is typically sugar-free, but always verify the label if you are managing blood sugar levels.
  • Limit Intake: Do not consume more than three cups per day, as excessive intake of Curcumin or Green Tea can lead to unwanted side effects.
  • Avoid Substitution: Nutra Joint Tea is a dietary supplement/herbal beverage and should not be used as a substitute for a varied diet or prescribed medication for joint conditions.

searchable.name: Immunity Booster Effervescent Tablet (Lignel)
searchable.brief_info: Immunity Booster Effervescent Tablet for your immune system support, reducing cold symptoms, antioxidant protection and general wellness.
searchable.description: Elevate your daily health defense with Immunity Booster Effervescent Tablet (Lignel). This powerful effervescent formula combines a high-potency dose of Vitamin C (1000mg) with the essential mineral Zinc, creating a synergistic blend proven to support robust immune function. Designed for rapid dissolution and quick absorption, Lignel provides a refreshing, bioavailable way to fortify your body against environmental challenges, helping to reduce the duration and severity of common colds and maintain overall vitality.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Immunity Booster Effervescent Tablet (Lignel)

Over The Counter (OTC): Adults and children 12 years and over:

  • One tablet daily, dissolved completely in a glass of water (150ml to 200ml).
  • Proper Administration: Drop one tablet into a glass of plain water. Wait until the tablet is fully dissolved before consuming the entire drink.
  • Best Time: Can be taken at any time of day, ideally with a meal to optimize mineral absorption.
  • Missed Dose Guidance: Take the next dose as scheduled the following day. Do not double the dose.
searchable.specification:
• Active Ingredients: Vitamin C (1000mg), Zinc (e.g., 10mg to 15mg)
  • Pack Size: [Placeholder: Available Pack Sizes, e.g., Tube of 10 or 20 Effervescent Tablets]
  • Storage Temperature: Store below 30°C, tightly sealed.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Immunity Booster Effervescent Tablet (Lignel)

Do NOT take Immunity Booster Effervescent Tablet (Lignel) if you have:

  • Drug Allergies: Known hypersensitivity to Ascorbic Acid, Zinc, or any component of the effervescent tablet.
  • Pre-existing Medical Conditions: A history of kidney stones (renal calculi), as high-dose Vitamin C may increase the risk in susceptible individuals.

Side Effects of Immunity Booster Effervescent Tablet (Lignel)

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): High doses of Vitamin C may cause mild diarrhea, nausea, or abdominal cramps. High doses of Zinc may cause temporary stomach upset.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects: Large, chronic zinc intake (well above 40mg daily) can lead to copper deficiency. Kidney stone formation is rare but possible with excessive Vitamin C intake.
  • What to do: If gastrointestinal upset occurs, try taking the supplement with a meal. Discontinue use and consult a doctor if severe abdominal pain or persistent nausea occurs.

Precautions and Warnings of Immunity Booster Effervescent Tablet (Lignel)

  • Maximum Dose: Do not exceed the maximum recommended daily dose. Long-term intake of high-dose Zinc should be monitored by a doctor.
  • Storage: Keep the tablet container tightly sealed to prevent moisture from affecting the effervescence.

Before Starting: Consult your doctor if you have kidney problems, are taking blood thinners, or are pregnant/breastfeeding.

searchable.name: Lemsip Max Cold & Flu Blackcurrant X5
searchable.brief_info: Lemsip Max Cold & Flu Blackcurrant gives you quick relieve from the toughest cold and flu symptoms.
searchable.description: Lemsip Max Cold & Flu Blackcurrant X5 is provided in convenient sachets, this maximum strength formulation delivers a comforting hot drink with a powerful combination of Paracetamol (1000mg) to target pain and fever, and Phenylephrine Hydrochloride (12.2mg) to clear nasal congestion. The soothing blackcurrant flavour makes the medicine easy to take, providing comprehensive relief to help you feel like yourself again. Lemsip Max Cold & Flu Blackcurrant X5 is the trusted choice for adults seeking effective symptom management.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Lemsip Max Cold & Flu Blackcurrant X5

Over The Counter (OTC): Adults and children 16 years and over:

  • One sachet every 4 to 6 hours as required.
  • Do not take more than 4 sachets in 24 hours.
  • Proper Administration: Empty the contents of one sachet into a standard mug. Fill the mug with hot water (not boiling). Stir until dissolved and drink the hot solution.
  • Best Time: Can be taken at any time, but be aware that the decongestant may interfere with sleep if taken close to bedtime.

Missed Dose Guidance: Take the next dose when symptoms return, ensuring at least 4 hours have passed since the previous dose.
searchable.specification:
• Active Ingredients: Paracetamol 1000mg, Phenylephrine HCl 12.2mg
  • Pack Size: 5 Sachets
  • Storage Temperature: Store below 25°C, protected from moisture.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Lemsip Max Cold & Flu Blackcurrant X5

Do NOT take Lemsip Max Cold & Flu Blackcurrant X5 if you have:

  • Severe Health Conditions: Serious heart disease, high blood pressure (hypertension), an overactive thyroid (hyperthyroidism), or severe liver/kidney disease.
  • Drug Interactions: Are taking or have taken Monoamine Oxidase Inhibitors (MAOIs) for depression within the last 14 days, or are taking other Paracetamol-containing products.
  • Drug Allergies: Known hypersensitivity to Paracetamol, Phenylephrine, or any other ingredient.

Side Effects of Lemsip Max Cold & Flu Blackcurrant X5

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Headache, nervousness, and trouble sleeping (insomnia) due to the decongestant.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects: Severe allergic reactions (rash, swelling), fast or irregular heartbeat, or signs of liver damage (yellowing of eyes/skin, dark urine).
  • What to do: Stop use immediately and seek medical attention if you experience severe symptoms, signs of liver damage, or a very rapid heartbeat.

Precautions and Warnings of Lemsip Max Cold & Flu Blackcurrant X5

  • Maximum Dose: NEVER exceed the recommended dosage. The Paracetamol dose (1000mg per sachet) carries a high risk of severe liver damage if the maximum daily limit is exceeded.
  • Existing Conditions: Consult a doctor before use if you have diabetes, glaucoma, or non-severe heart/liver/kidney conditions.
  • Duration Limit: Do not take for more than 7 days without consulting your doctor.

searchable.name: Xpel Mosquito & Insect Repellant Spray
searchable.brief_info: Xpel Mosquito & Insect Repellant Spray is used for effective and long-lasting protection against Mosquito and other biting insects.
searchable.description: Xpel Mosquito & Insect Spray is a high-performance repellent is formulated to deter mosquitoes, ticks, flies, and other biting insects, helping to prevent uncomfortable bites and minimize the risk of insect-borne illnesses. Containing a reliable active ingredient (typically DEET or Picaridin), Xpel Mosquito & Insect Spray provides a dependable defense barrier, making it an essential item for outdoor activities, travel, and everyday use in insect-prone environments.
searchable.how_to_use:
Usage Instructions

General Use (OTC): Hold the bottle 15 to 20cm away from the skin and spray evenly onto all exposed skin.

  • Proper Administration: Ensure the spray covers all exposed skin. Use hands to spread the liquid evenly.
  • Best Time: Apply repellent after applying sunscreen, if using both. Reapply only as directed (e.g., every 4-8 hours) or if swimming or sweating excessively.
  • Duration of Protection: Protection typically lasts between 4 and 8 hours, depending on the concentration of the active ingredient.

How to Store and Dispose of Xpel Mosquito & Insect Spray

  • Storage: Store Xpel Mosquito & Insect Spray in a cool, dry place, away from excessive heat and direct sunlight. Keep the container tightly closed and out of the reach of children.

Disposal: Dispose of the empty container according to local disposal guidelines for chemical containers.
searchable.specification:
• Product Type: Topical Insect Repellent Spray
  • Active Ingredient: [Placeholder: Active Ingredient, e.g., DEET 20% or Picaridin]
  • Pack Size: [Placeholder: Available Container Sizes, e.g., 100ml aerosol or pump spray]
  • Storage Temperature: Store below 30°C, away from heat.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Xpel Mosquito & Insect Spray

Do NOT use Xpel Mosquito & Insect Spray if:

  • Drug/Chemical Allergies: Known hypersensitivity or allergy to the active ingredient or any other component.
  • Open Wounds/Cuts: Do not apply to cuts, wounds, severely sunburnt skin, or irritated skin.
  • Clothing Application: Do not apply under clothing.

Side Effects of Xpel Mosquito & Insect Spray

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Mild stinging if applied to broken skin, or temporary sticky/oily residue.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects: Allergic skin reactions (rash, swelling, itching), or eye irritation if sprayed near the face.
  • What to do: If a rash develops, wash the area with soap and water and discontinue use. If contact with eyes or mouth occurs, rinse thoroughly with water.

Precautions and Warnings of Xpel Mosquito & Insect Spray

  • External Use Only: Do not spray directly onto the face. To apply to the face, spray a small amount into the palms first, then gently apply, avoiding the eyes and mouth.
  • Child Application: Do not apply to the hands of young children, as they frequently put their hands in their mouths. Adults should apply it to the child's exposed skin.

Wash Off: When no longer needed, wash the treated skin thoroughly with soap and water, especially before bedtime.

searchable.name: Vaseline Petroleum Jelly 50mL
searchable.brief_info: Vaseline 50ml Petroleum Jelly for active skin protection and deep moisturization.
searchable.description: Discover the original solution for skin protection and deep moisture with Vaseline 50ml Petroleum Jelly. Trusted for generations, this intensive, occlusive ointment is made from 100% pure triple-purified petroleum jelly, ensuring the highest quality and safety for even the most sensitive skin. The 50ml size is perfect for travel or keeping handy in a purse or pocket. Vaseline 50ml creates a powerful protective barrier that locks in moisture and accelerates the skin's natural healing process for dry, cracked, and irritated areas.
searchable.how_to_use:
Usage Instructions

General Use (OTC): Scoop a small amount of Vaseline 50ml with a clean fingertip and apply to the affected area.

  • Proper Administration: Apply a thin layer to cover the skin completely. A thick layer is usually unnecessary and may feel heavy.
  • Best Time: Ideal for use immediately after bathing or washing hands/feet while the skin is slightly damp to lock in maximum moisture.

Application Frequency: Reapply as needed, particularly after the skin has been exposed to water or irritants.
searchable.specification:
• Product Type: Topical Skin Protectant Ointment
  • Active Ingredient: White Petrolatum (Petroleum Jelly) 100%
  • Pack Size: 50ml Jar
  • Storage Temperature: Store below 30 degree C.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Vaseline 50ml

Do NOT use Vaseline 50ml if:

  • Allergies: Known hypersensitivity or allergy to petrolatum (rare).
  • Deep/Puncture Wounds: Do not apply to deep, bleeding wounds, animal bites, or serious burns without consulting a doctor.
  • Acne-Prone Areas: Avoid liberal use on the face if you have severe acne, as its heavy occlusive properties may clog pores.

Side Effects of Vaseline 50ml

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Temporary greasy or heavy feeling on the skin.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects: Allergic contact dermatitis. If used excessively on the face, it may rarely cause milia or exacerbate acne in susceptible individuals.
  • What to do: If a rash, redness, or persistent irritation occurs, discontinue use.

Precautions and Warnings of Vaseline 50ml

  • External Use Only: Strictly for external, topical application. Do not ingest.
  • Avoid Eyes: Avoid contact with eyes.
  • Application on Infections: Consult a doctor before applying to skin infections, as the occlusive barrier could potentially trap bacteria.

Clothing Stains: Petroleum jelly can stain fabrics; allow a few minutes for a thin layer to absorb before dressing.

searchable.name: Cold and Flu Kit
searchable.brief_info: This OneHealth Essential Cold and Flu Kit brings together key products for health management, relief, and hygiene, including Loratadine for allergies, Strepsils for throat pain, Disposable Face Mask for barrier protection, Hand Sanitizer for germ control, Panadol for fever/pain, Nutrify Effervescent Vitamin plus Zinc for immune support, and Lemsip Max Cold & Flu Blackcurrant for maximum symptom relief. This trusted collection ensures you are fully equipped to manage common symptoms, protect your health, and maintain high standards of hygiene for yourself and your family.
searchable.description:
This kit addresses a range of everyday health needs:

  • Loratadine (e.g., 10mg tablets): Used for 24-hour relief from symptoms of allergic rhinitis (hay fever) like sneezing, runny nose, and itchy eyes/throat.
  • Strepsils (Original): Used for soothing relief from sore throat pain and for treating minor mouth and throat infections.
  • Disposable Face Mask (2-Ply): Used as a physical barrier to reduce the spread of respiratory droplets from the wearer (source control) and for basic environmental protection.
  • Hand Sanitizer (Alcohol =60%): Used for rapid, waterless sanitation to kill 99.9% of common germs and viruses on hands.
  • Panadol (Paracetamol 500mg): Used for the temporary relief of headaches, general pain, and lowering fever.
  • Nutrify Effervescent Vitamin plus Zinc: Used as a daily supplement to support the immune system and promote general vitality.
  • Lemsip Max Cold & Flu Blackcurrant: Used for maximum strength relief of severe cold/flu symptoms, including body aches and nasal congestion.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Components

  • Loratadine (10mg): One tablet once daily. Swallow whole with water.
  • Strepsils: Dissolve one lozenge slowly in the mouth every 2-3 hours. Do not exceed 12 lozenges in 24 hours.
  • Panadol (500mg): 1 to 2 tablets every 4 to 6 hours as needed. Do not exceed 8 tablets (4000mg) in 24 hours.
  • Lemsip Max Cold & Flu: One sachet every 4 to 6 hours. Do not exceed 4 sachets in 24 hours. Empty sachet into a mug, add hot water, stir, and drink.
  • Nutrify Effervescent Vitamin plus Zinc: One tablet daily, dissolved completely in a glass of water.
  • Disposable Face Mask: Apply over nose and mouth, secure ear loops.
  • Hand Sanitizer: Apply a palmful of gel, rub all surfaces of hands for 20 seconds until dry.

How to Store and Dispose of Components

  • Medications/Supplements: Store below 30°C, away from heat and moisture. Keep Nutrify cap tightly sealed.
  • Disposal: Dispose of expired medicines and used masks safely in a bin. Return expired medication to a pharmacy.

Quick Tips for Essential Wellness Kit

  • The best way to use Panadol and Lemsip Max is to strictly follow the dosage interval (min. 4 hours apart).
  • Loratadine should be taken once a day for sustained allergy relief.
  • Strepsils are most effective when dissolved slowly.
  • Common mistake to avoid: Do not assume Nutrify provides instant immunity; benefits are cumulative with daily use.
  • Disposable Face Mask must cover both your nose and mouth completely.
  • Complementary treatments: Use ORS with Panadol/Lemsip if fever causes dehydration.
  • Use Hand Sanitizer only when soap and water are not available.

Additional Information

  • Good to know: Loratadine is non-drowsy for most people. Lemsip Max uses a decongestant to actively clear stuffiness.
  • Allergy information: Check labels for common allergens (lactose, gluten, gelatin) in tablets/sachets.
  • Secondary Benefits: Nutrify’s Vitamin C and Zinc support skin health. Panadol is generally gentle on the stomach.
  • Recommended frequency of use: Daily for Loratadine and Nutrify during relevant periods. As needed for Strepsils, Panadol, Lemsip Max.
searchable.specification:
• Product Type: Cold and Flu Kit
  • Loratadine: 10mg tablets
  • Strepsils: Antiseptic Lozenges
  • Panadol: 500mg tablets
  • Lemsip Max Cold & Flu: 1000mg Paracetamol + Decongestant Sachets
  • Nutrify Effervescent Vitamin plus Zinc: Effervescent tablets
  • Disposable Face Mask: 2-Ply Non-woven Pack
  • Hand Sanitizer: Alcohol-based Gel
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications

  • Medications (Loratadine, Panadol, Lemsip Max): Do NOT use if you have severe liver or kidney disease, or known allergy to the active ingredients (Loratadine, Paracetamol, Phenylephrine).
  • Lemsip Max Cold & Flu: Contraindicated if taking MAOIs (for depression) or other Paracetamol products.
  • Strepsils: Avoid if allergic to antiseptics or if the child is under 6 (choking hazard).
  • Nutrify Vitamin + Zinc: Consult a doctor if you have a history of kidney stones (due to Vitamin C).
  • Hand Sanitizer: Do not use near open flames or on broken skin.

Side Effects

  • Common Side Effects: Drowsiness (Loratadine, though mild), mild GI upset (Panadol/Nutrify), tingling in the mouth (Strepsils), temporary skin dryness (Hand Sanitizer), or insomnia/nervousness (Lemsip Max due to Phenylephrine).
  • Serious Side Effects: Severe allergic reaction (rash, swelling) to any component. Lemsip Max/Panadol: Overdose can cause fatal liver damage.
  • What to do: For severe allergic symptoms or signs of liver damage (yellow skin/eyes), discontinue and seek emergency medical care immediately. Never exceed the maximum dose of Paracetamol.

Precautions and Warnings

  • Oral Medications: Do NOT combine Panadol or Lemsip Max with any other Paracetamol product. Adults must not exceed 4000mg Paracetamol in 24 hours.
  • Loratadine: Discontinue 48 hours before any allergy skin tests.
  • Disposable Face Mask: Single-use only. Do not touch the front of the mask when removing.
  • Hand Sanitizer: Highly flammable. Keep away from heat and out of children's reach.
  • Pregnancy & Breastfeeding: Consult your doctor before using any of the oral medications or supplements.
  • Age Restrictions: Loratadine, Panadol, and Lemsip Max are typically for ages 12+. Strepsils are for ages 6+.

searchable.name: Daravit Omega Plus
searchable.brief_info: The term Daravit Omega Plus refers to a comprehensive, multi-ingredient supplement that combines essential Omega-3 fatty acids with a broad spectrum of vitamins and minerals. Based on available product information, this formula is designed for general vitality, targeting heart, brain, and immune health. I will generate a detailed description based on this composite formula.
searchable.description: Daravit Omega Plus Softgels offer a unique, integrated approach to daily nutrition, combining the well-established benefits of essential Omega-3 fatty acids (like EPA and DHA from Fish Oil or Flax Seed Oil) with a powerful blend of vitamins and trace minerals (such as A, D, E, Zinc, and Selenium). This advanced bioactive formula is meticulously crafted to support optimal health and energy levels, moving beyond basic supplementation. Daravit Omega Plus is the preferred choice for individuals seeking to enhance their cardiovascular performance, boost cognitive function, fortify their immune system, and maintain general cellular vitality in one convenient daily softgel.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Daravit Omega Plus Softgels

This is an Over-The-Counter (OTC) nutritional supplement.

  • Adults: Take one softgel daily, or as directed by a healthcare professional.

Proper Administration

  • Administration: Swallow the softgel whole with water. Do not crush or chew.
  • Best Time to Take: Daravit Omega Plus must be taken with your main meal (e.g., lunch or dinner). Taking this multivitamin/Omega-3 blend with food is essential as it significantly improves the absorption of the fat-soluble vitamins and Omega-3 oils, while also minimizing the risk of stomach irritation.

Missed Dose Guidance: If a dose is missed, simply take the next scheduled dose as usual with your meal. Do not take two capsules at once to compensate for a missed dose.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Daravit Omega Plus Softgels

  • Known Allergies: Do NOT take Daravit Omega Plus if you have a known allergy or hypersensitivity to fish (if derived from fish oil), soy, or any other ingredients in the softgel capsule.
  • Hypervitaminosis: Avoid use if you are concurrently taking other high-dose supplements containing the fat-soluble vitamins (A and D) to prevent hypervitaminosis.


Side Effects of Daravit Omega Plus Softgels

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Mild gastrointestinal discomfort, slight nausea, or a faint "fishy burp" (common with Omega-3s). These are generally reduced when taken strictly with a meal.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (That May Require Medical Attention): Signs of excessive bleeding or bruising, or a severe allergic reaction (rash, swelling of the face/throat). Stop use immediately and seek medical attention if severe symptoms occur.

Precautions and Warnings of Daravit Omega Plus Softgels

  • Medication Interactions: Consult a doctor or pharmacist if you are taking any blood-thinning medications (anticoagulants) or blood pressure medication, as Omega-3s can have a mild cumulative effect.
  • Overdose Risk: Strictly adhere to the recommended dosage. Excessive intake of multivitamins, particularly Vitamins A and D, can lead to serious health issues.
  • Pregnancy & Breastfeeding: While essential, pregnant or breastfeeding women should consult a physician before using Daravit Omega Plus to ensure the vitamin and mineral levels meet the specific requirements for their stage.

searchable.name: Daravit Regular
searchable.brief_info: Daravit Regular is the base-level, standard daily multivitamin and multimineral supplement within the Daravit product line. It is formulated to provide comprehensive, moderate-dose nutritional support, helping to prevent dietary deficiencies and maintain general health and energy.
searchable.description: Daravit Regular Softgels is a well-balanced, essential daily nutritional supplement providing a wide spectrum of vitamins and minerals necessary for optimal body function. This moderate-strength formula is designed to bridge the gap between dietary intake and nutritional requirements, especially for individuals with varied eating habits, busy lifestyles, or those needing general health maintenance. By supplying key B-vitamins for energy, antioxidants for immune defense, and minerals like Iron and Zinc, Daravit Regular acts as a dependable, foundational safeguard for overall well-being, sustained vitality, and support for the body's natural processes.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Daravit Regular Softgels

This is an Over-The-Counter (OTC) nutritional supplement.

  • Adults: Take one softgel daily, or as directed by a healthcare professional.

Proper Administration

  • Administration: Swallow the softgel whole with water. Do not crush or chew.
  • Best Time to Take: Daravit Regular should ideally be taken with a meal (e.g., breakfast or lunch). Taking multivitamins with food enhances the absorption of fat-soluble vitamins (A, D, E) and minimizes the risk of stomach upset from minerals like Iron.
  • Missed Dose Guidance: If you miss a dose, take the next scheduled dose as usual with your next meal. Do not take a double dose.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Daravit Regular Softgels

  • Known Allergies: Do NOT take if you have a known allergy or hypersensitivity to any of the ingredients, including the softgel components.
  • Iron Overload: Avoid use if you have conditions causing iron accumulation (e.g., Haemochromatosis).
  • Hypervitaminosis: Avoid combining with other supplements that contain high doses of fat-soluble vitamins (A, D) to prevent excessive intake.

Side Effects of Daravit Regular Softgels

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Mild stomach upset, nausea, or constipation (due to the Iron content). Urine may appear bright yellow due to the harmless excretion of Riboflavin (Vitamin B2).
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (That May Require Medical Attention): Signs of severe allergic reaction (rash, hives, swelling), or persistent severe stomach pain. Stop use immediately and seek urgent medical advice if severe symptoms occur.

Precautions and Warnings of Daravit Regular Softgels

  • Accidental Poisoning Risk: Iron-containing products can be fatal to young children. Store Daravit Regular securely out of their reach at all times.
  • Medication Interactions: Consult a doctor or pharmacist if you are taking blood-thinning medications, thyroid medication, or certain antibiotics (Tetracyclines, Quinolones), as minerals like Iron and Calcium can interfere with their absorption. Separate doses by at least four hours.

Medical Check-up: If chronic fatigue persists despite consistent use, consult a doctor to rule out underlying medical causes beyond simple nutritional deficiencies.

searchable.name: Beechams All in One Liquid
searchable.brief_info: Beechams All in One Liquid is a non-drowsy, oral solution formulated to provide comprehensive relief from the major symptoms of cold, flu, and chills, including the presence of a chesty cough. Its triple-action formula is designed to address multiple symptoms simultaneously, making it a highly effective all-in-one treatment.
searchable.description: Beechams All in One Liquid is a powerful cold and flu remedy that utilizes three distinct active ingredients to combat a wide array of symptoms. It is specifically recommended when a single painkiller or decongestant is insufficient, providing relief from headache, fever, sore throat, blocked nose, and the often-bothersome chesty cough. This easy-to-take liquid solution acts quickly to soothe discomfort, clear congestion, and help loosen phlegm, allowing you to breathe easier and recover faster without causing drowsiness.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Beechams All in One Liquid

This is an Over-The-Counter (OTC) medicine.

  • Adults and Children aged 16 years and over: Fill the measure cup to the 20 ml mark and take one 20 ml dose.
  • Do not exceed four doses in any 24 hours.

Proper Administration

  • Administration: For oral use only. Measure the dose precisely using the cup provided.
  • Frequency: Repeat the dose every 4 hours as necessary.
  • Duration: Do not take continuously for more than 5 days without consulting a doctor.

Children: Do not give to children under 16 years of age except on medical advice.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: Varies (e.g., 160 ml or 240 ml bottle)
  • Form: Oral Solution
  • Active Ingredients (per 20 ml dose): Paracetamol 500 mg, Guaifenesin 200 mg, Phenylephrine Hydrochloride 10 mg.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Beechams All in One Liquid

  • Known Allergies: Do NOT take if you have a known allergy to paracetamol, guaifenesin, phenylephrine, or any of the inactive ingredients.
  • Serious Medical Conditions: Do NOT take if you have severe kidney or liver problems (including alcoholic liver disease), severe hypertension (high blood pressure), severe heart disease, phaeochromocytoma, closed-angle glaucoma, or an enlarged prostate gland.
  • MAOIs/Beta-Blockers: Do NOT take if you are currently taking or have taken a Monoamine Oxidase Inhibitor (MAOI) in the last two weeks, or if you are taking beta-blocking drugs.

Side Effects of Beechams All in One Liquid

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Raised blood pressure, headache, dizziness, difficulty sleeping (insomnia), nervousness, anxiety, or mild gastrointestinal discomfort.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (That May Require Medical Attention): Signs of an allergic reaction (rash, difficulty breathing, swelling), visual disturbances, or an irregular/very fast heartbeat. Seek immediate medical attention if you take too much medicine, even if you feel well, due to the risk of delayed, severe liver damage from paracetamol.

Precautions and Warnings of Beechams All in One Liquid

  • Liver Damage: Taking more than the recommended dose, or taking it with other paracetamol products, can cause fatal liver damage.
  • Driving: This product may cause dizziness. If affected, do not drive or operate heavy machinery.
  • Chronic Conditions: Consult your doctor before taking this medicine if you have chronic cough or asthma, or if you are taking any prescribed medicines.

Pregnancy & Breastfeeding: Talk to your doctor or pharmacist before taking this product if you are pregnant or breastfeeding.

searchable.name: Nature's Truth Fish oil 2400mg
searchable.brief_info: Nature's Truth Fish Oil is a premium dietary supplement providing essential Omega-3 fatty acids, Eicosapentaenoic Acid (EPA) and Docosahexaenoic Acid (DHA). This product is widely available in different potencies (e.g., 1200 mg, 2000 mg, or Triple Strength), with a consistent focus on purification and a natural lemon flavor to eliminate the common "fish burp" side effect.
searchable.description: Nature's Truth Fish Oil Softgels are formulated to deliver highly purified fish oil rich in naturally occurring Omega-3 fatty acids. These essential fats are vital for numerous bodily functions but cannot be efficiently synthesized by the body. The fish oil used is typically sourced from cold-water fish (such as anchovy, mackerel, and sardine) and undergoes rigorous purification processes to eliminate common contaminants like mercury and other heavy metals. Presented in a quick-release softgel format with a pleasant natural lemon flavor, Nature's Truth Fish Oil is a convenient and effective way to support cardiovascular, cognitive, and visual health, making it an essential addition to any wellness routine.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Nature's Truth Fish Oil Softgels

This is an Over-The-Counter (OTC) nutritional supplement.

  • Adults: Take one (1) to two (2) quick release softgels daily, or two (2) softgels two times daily, preferably with meals. Dosage varies significantly based on the specific product strength (e.g., Mini, Regular, or Triple Strength). Always follow the serving size instructions on your specific Nature's Truth bottle.

Proper Administration

  • Administration: Swallow the softgel whole with water. Do not crush or chew.
  • Best Time to Take: Always take the softgels with a meal. The absorption of Omega-3 fatty acids and the reduction of the fishy aftertaste are significantly improved when taken with food containing fat.

Missed Dose Guidance: If a dose is missed, take the next scheduled dose as usual with your next meal. Do not take a double dose.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: Varies (e.g., 60, 100, 120 softgels)
  • Form: Quick Release Softgel
  • Active Ingredients: Purified Fish Oil, typically delivering EPA and DHA Omega-3 Fatty Acids.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Nature's Truth Fish Oil Softgels

  • Known Allergies: Do NOT use if you have a known allergy to fish (anchovy, mackerel, sardine) or any other softgel ingredients.
  • Bleeding Risk: Use with extreme caution if you have a known bleeding disorder or are taking anti-coagulant/anti-platelet medications.

Side Effects of Nature's Truth Fish Oil Softgels

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Fishy aftertaste (or "fish burps," though minimized by the lemon flavor), mild nausea, loose stools, or mild indigestion.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (That May Require Medical Attention): Increased bleeding (e.g., nosebleeds, easy bruising) or signs of a severe allergic reaction. If these occur, stop use and seek medical advice.

Precautions and Warnings of Nature's Truth Fish Oil Softgels

  • Medication Interactions: Consult your doctor or pharmacist if you are taking any medications, particularly blood thinners (e.g., Warfarin) or high blood pressure medication, as high doses of Omega-3 may have additive effects.
  • Surgical Procedures: Stop taking this supplement at least two weeks before any planned medical or surgical procedure due to the potential effect on blood clotting.

Pregnancy & Breastfeeding: Consult a healthcare provider before use. Omega-3s are beneficial, but a doctor should approve the specific dosage.

searchable.name: Motrin Dual Action
searchable.brief_info: Motrin Dual Action is an advanced, Over-The-Counter (OTC) pain relief medication that combines two distinct active ingredients to target pain through two different mechanisms. It provides faster and more comprehensive relief than single-ingredient painkillers for various sources of pain.
searchable.description: Motrin Dual Action is a powerful combination tablet designed to deliver enhanced pain relief by utilizing the strengths of two proven medications: Ibuprofen (a Non-Steroidal Anti-Inflammatory Drug or NSAID) and Paracetamol (an analgesic/antipyretic). By simultaneously reducing inflammation at the site of injury and blocking pain signals in the central nervous system, Motrin Dual Action offers superior relief compared to taking either ingredient alone. This medication is a trusted choice for managing persistent or inflammatory pain, such as muscle aches, joint discomfort, and severe headaches.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Motrin Dual Action Tablets

This is an Over-The-Counter (OTC) medicine.

  • Adults (18 years and over): Take one tablet. If pain persists, take one tablet every 6 hours.
  • Do not exceed 6 tablets (3000 mg Paracetamol / 1200 mg Ibuprofen) in any 24 hours.

Proper Administration

  • Administration: Swallow the tablet whole with a glass of water. Do not chew or crush.
  • Best Time to Take: Take the tablet with or immediately after food. Taking NSAIDs like Ibuprofen with food significantly reduces the risk of stomach irritation and gastrointestinal side effects.

Duration: Do not use continuously for more than 3 days without consulting a doctor, due to the risk of long-term side effects from both Paracetamol and Ibuprofen.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: Varies (e.g., 10, 20, or 30 tablets)
  • Form: Oral Tablet
  • Active Ingredients: Ibuprofen 200 mg and Paracetamol 500 mg
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Motrin Dual Action Tablets

  • Known Allergies: Do NOT take if you have a known allergy to Ibuprofen, Paracetamol, Aspirin, other NSAIDs, or any other ingredients.
  • Gastrointestinal Issues: Do NOT take if you have a current or previous history of stomach or duodenal ulceration, bleeding, or perforation.
  • Severe Organ Impairment: Do NOT take if you have severe heart, kidney, or liver failure.
  • Other NSAIDs/Paracetamol: Do NOT take with other Paracetamol-containing or NSAID-containing products.

Side Effects of Motrin Dual Action Tablets

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Nausea, vomiting, indigestion, heartburn, or headache.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (That May Require Medical Attention): Signs of stomach bleeding (black, tarry stools, vomiting blood), severe allergic reaction (rash, difficulty breathing), worsening of asthma, or signs of liver damage (yellowing of eyes/skin). Seek urgent medical attention immediately if an overdose is suspected.

Precautions and Warnings of Motrin Dual Action Tablets

  • Cardiovascular Risk: Use with caution if you have high blood pressure, heart problems, or stroke risk, as Ibuprofen can slightly increase the risk of adverse cardiovascular events.
  • Liver Damage: Exceeding the Paracetamol dose (especially when combined) can lead to irreversible liver failure.
  • Asthma: If you have asthma, consult a physician, as NSAIDs can trigger an asthma attack.
  • Medication Interactions: Consult a doctor or pharmacist if you are taking blood thinners (anticoagulants, e.g., Warfarin), lithium, methotrexate, or certain blood pressure medications, as Ibuprofen can interfere with these.

Pregnancy & Breastfeeding: Consult a doctor. Avoid using Ibuprofen during the last trimester of pregnancy.

searchable.name: Swift Ovulation Test Strips
searchable.brief_info: Swift Ovulation Test Strips are a simple, accurate, and cost-effective Over-The-Counter (OTC) diagnostic tool designed to help women predict their most fertile window. They work by detecting the surge in Luteinizing Hormone (LH) that precedes ovulation.
searchable.description: Swift Ovulation Test Strips are a highly sensitive and reliable diagnostic device used for in-vitro (outside the body) testing to determine the ideal time for conception. The test strips are designed to detect the spike in Luteinizing Hormone (LH) that occurs in a woman’s urine approximately 24 to 36 hours before an egg is released (ovulation). By clearly identifying the LH surge, Swift Ovulation Test Strips allow couples to time intercourse precisely, significantly increasing their chances of becoming pregnant within a given menstrual cycle.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Swift Ovulation Test Strips

This is an Over-The-Counter (OTC) in-vitro diagnostic device.

  • Adult Women: Use one strip daily around the predicted time of ovulation until a positive result is obtained.

Proper Administration

  • Timing: Begin testing a few days before the expected LH surge (calculated based on cycle length). Test once daily.
  • Urine Sample: Collect a urine sample in a clean, dry cup. Do NOT use first-morning urine, as LH is synthesized overnight and may not be accurately detected until later in the day. The ideal time to test is generally between 10 AM and 8 PM.
  • Testing: Dip the strip vertically into the urine up to the "MAX" line for the time specified (usually 5–10 seconds).

Reading Results: Lay the strip flat and read the result after the specified reading time (usually 5–10 minutes). A positive result (LH surge) occurs when the Test Line is as dark as or darker than the Control Line.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: Varies (e.g., 5, 10 strips)
  • Form: Diagnostic Test Strip
  • Principle: Lateral flow immunoassay for LH detection.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Swift Ovulation Test Strips

  • Hormonal Medications: Results may be affected if the user is currently taking fertility drugs containing LH or hCG.
  • Existing Conditions: Results may be unreliable if the user has been diagnosed with Polycystic Ovary Syndrome (PCOS) or menopause, as baseline LH levels can be high.

Side Effects of Swift Ovulation Test Strips

  • None: There are no physical side effects associated with using the test strips, as they are non-invasive.

Precautions and Warnings of Swift Ovulation Test Strips

  • For External Use Only: The strips are for in-vitro diagnostic use only. Do not ingest.
  • Accuracy: Follow instructions precisely. Improper timing or fluid intake prior to testing can lead to inaccurate results.
  • Not Contraception: The strips are designed to assist with conception; they do not prevent pregnancy or protect against Sexually Transmitted Infections (STIs).

searchable.name: Health Aid Haemovit Liquid Gold
searchable.brief_info: Haemovit Liquid Gold (produced by HealthAid) is a premium, multi-ingredient liquid nutritional tonic specifically formulated to support healthy blood formation, combat fatigue, and boost overall energy and vitality.
