searchable.description: Haemovit Liquid Gold is a unique, great-tasting liquid supplement containing a synergistic blend of essential B-Vitamins, high-strength Iron, Zinc, Vitamin C, electrolytes, and natural botanical extracts like Ginkgo Biloba and Sarsaparilla. This complex formulation works to ensure the efficient production of red blood cells (haematinic support), enhance oxygen utilization, and boost energy metabolism. By delivering key nutrients often deficient in the diet, Haemovit Liquid Gold provides a systemic boost to health, helping to reduce tiredness and fatigue while supporting immune and nervous system function. The liquid format makes it easy to take for those who have difficulty swallowing tablets.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Haemovit Liquid Gold

This is an Over-The-Counter (OTC) food supplement.

  • Adults and Children over 6 years: Take 10 ml (two teaspoonfuls/one tablespoonful) daily.
  • Children 3-6 years: Take 5 ml (one teaspoonful) daily.
  • Do not exceed the recommended daily intake unless advised by a healthcare professional.

Proper Administration

  • Administration: Shake the bottle well before use. Measure the dose using a medicine spoon or cup.
  • Best Time to Take: Preferably take with food (during a meal) to minimize stomach upset from the Iron content and enhance nutrient absorption.

Duration: Can be used long-term, but consult a doctor if severe fatigue or symptoms of anaemia persist.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: Varies (Commonly 200 ml)
  • Form: Oral Liquid Tonic
  • Key Ingredients: Iron, Vitamins B1?, B2?, B3?, B5?, B6?, Folic Acid, B12?, Vitamin C, Zinc, Iodine, plus herbal extracts.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Haemovit Liquid Gold

  • Known Allergies: Do NOT take if you have a known allergy to any of the ingredients, including Iron, B-Vitamins, or herbal extracts (Ginkgo, Sarsaparilla, Birch).
  • Iron Overload: Do NOT use if you have conditions causing iron accumulation (e.g., Haemochromatosis).
  • Anticoagulants: Concomitant use with anticoagulants (blood thinners, e.g., Warfarin) is contraindicated due to the presence of Ginkgo Biloba, which may increase bleeding risk.

Side Effects of Haemovit Liquid Gold

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Expected): Gastrointestinal upset, constipation, or dark/black stools (due to Iron).
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (That May Require Medical Attention): Signs of allergic reaction (rash, difficulty breathing). Stop use and consult a doctor immediately if severe symptoms occur.

Precautions and Warnings of Haemovit Liquid Gold

  • Drug Interactions: Consult your doctor or pharmacist if you are taking blood thinners, antiepileptic drugs, or any medications for high blood pressure, as herbal components or high vitamin doses may interact.
  • Diabetes: Due to the presence of honey and malt extract, individuals with diabetes should monitor their blood glucose levels closely.
  • Pregnancy & Breastfeeding: Consult a healthcare provider before use to ensure the dosage of all vitamins and minerals is appropriate for your specific needs.

searchable.name: Nature's Field Daily Probiotics
searchable.brief_info: Nature's Field Daily Probiotics is a dietary supplement formulated to support digestive balance, gut health, and immune function. It typically contains a blend of beneficial bacteria strains designed to colonize the intestinal tract.
searchable.description: Nature's Field Daily Probiotics provides a carefully selected blend of beneficial live microorganisms (probiotics), measured in Colony Forming Units (CFUs). These "good bacteria" are essential for maintaining a healthy intestinal ecosystem. The supplement is formulated to replenish the natural gut flora that can be depleted by stress, poor diet, illness, or antibiotic use. By restoring this balance, Nature's Field Daily Probiotics supports proper digestion, nutrient absorption, and contributes significantly to the body's immune defense, as a large part of the immune system resides in the gut.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Nature's Field Daily Probiotics Capsules

This is an Over-The-Counter (OTC) food supplement.

  • Adults: Take one (1) capsule daily, or as directed by a healthcare professional.

Proper Administration

  • Administration: Swallow the capsule whole with water.
  • Best Time to Take: The best time is typically in the morning, with or just after a meal, to buffer the bacteria against stomach acid. Alternatively, some brands recommend taking it at night before bed. Follow the specific instruction on the Nature's Field label.
  • During Antibiotics: If taking antibiotics, take the probiotic dose at least 2 to 3 hours before or after the antibiotic dose to prevent the antibiotic from killing the beneficial bacteria.

Consistency: Take consistently every day for optimal gut colonization and maintenance.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: Varies (e.g., 30 or 60 capsules)
  • Form: Oral Capsule
  • Active Ingredients: Multi-Strain Probiotic Blend (measured in CFUs)
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Nature's Field Daily Probiotics Capsules

  • Known Allergies: Do NOT use if you have a known allergy or hypersensitivity to any ingredients (e.g., potential traces of dairy or soy, depending on the culture media used).

Side Effects of Nature's Field Daily Probiotics Capsules

  • Common Side Effects (Mild and Temporary): Initial mild digestive discomfort, such as temporary bloating or gas. This usually resolves within a few days as the body adjusts to the new bacteria.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects: Signs of a severe allergic reaction.

Precautions and Warnings of Nature's Field Daily Probiotics Capsules

  • Immunocompromised Individuals: Individuals who are severely immunocompromised (e.g., those undergoing chemotherapy or with central venous catheters) should consult a doctor before taking probiotics, due to a theoretical risk of infection.
  • Severe Illness: If you have severe, acute diarrhea, consult a doctor to rule out infectious causes before starting probiotics.
  • Medical Consult: If gas, bloating, or diarrhea persists for more than two weeks, consult a physician.

searchable.name: Advil Junior Chew Grape Tablets
searchable.brief_info: Advil Junior Chewable Tablets (Grape flavor) are an Over-The-Counter (OTC) medication specifically formulated for children aged 2 to 11 years. They contain Ibuprofen, a non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drug (NSAID), which provides fast and effective relief from pain and fever in a convenient, pleasant-tasting chewable format.
searchable.description: Advil Junior Chewable Tablets deliver Ibuprofen in a measured dose appropriate for children. The appealing grape flavour and chewable format make it easier for children who may struggle to swallow liquid suspensions or whole tablets. Ibuprofen is known for its strong anti-inflammatory properties, providing triple-action relief: reducing pain, lowering fever, and easing inflammation. This product is a trusted choice for parents seeking symptomatic relief for common childhood illnesses and injuries.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Advil Junior Chewable Tablets

The dosage is based on the child's weight or age. Always consult the product packaging or your doctor/pharmacist, especially if dosing by weight.

Dosage Instructions (Based on typical 100 mg tablet strength):

  • Ages 2 - 3 years (Approx. 10.9-15.9\kg): Take 1 tablet.
  • Ages 4 - 5 years (Approx. 16.0-21.7\kg): Take 1 or 2 tablets.
  • Ages 6 - 8 years (Approx. 21.8-27.2\kg): Take 2 tablets.
  • Ages 9 - 10 years (Approx. 27.3-32.6\kg): Take 2 or 3 tablets.
  • Ages 11 years (Approx. 32.7-43.2\kg): Take 3 tablets.

Frequency and Limits:

  • Repeat the dose every 6 to 8 hours as needed.
  • Do not exceed 4 doses (400 mg) in 24 hours for children aged 2-3 years.
  • Do not exceed 6 doses (600 mg) in 24 hours for children aged 4-11 years (based on maximum tablets per dose).
  • Do not exceed 40 mg/kg of body weight in 24 hours.

Proper Administration

  • Administration: Ensure the child chews the tablet thoroughly before swallowing. Do not swallow whole.
  • Food: Can be taken with or without food. Taking it with food may help reduce the chance of stomach upset.
  • Duration: Do not use for more than 3 days for fever or 5 days for pain without consulting a doctor.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: Varies (e.g., 24 or 36 tablets)
  • Form: Chewable Tablet
  • Active Ingredient: Ibuprofen 100 mg per tablet
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Advil Junior

  • Known Allergies: Do NOT give if the child is allergic to Ibuprofen, Aspirin, or other NSAIDs.
  • Stomach Issues: Do NOT give if the child has active stomach ulceration or gastrointestinal bleeding.
  • Severe Organ Impairment: Do NOT give if the child has severe heart, liver, or kidney problems.
  • Dehydration: Avoid use in severely dehydrated children (e.g., from severe vomiting or diarrhea).

Side Effects of Advil Junior

  • Common Side Effects (Mild): Nausea, vomiting, indigestion, or abdominal pain.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (Seek Immediate Attention): Signs of stomach bleeding (black, tarry stools), severe allergic reaction (hives, difficulty breathing), or worsening of asthma. Overdose of Ibuprofen can be very harmful; seek urgent medical help if too many tablets are taken.

Precautions and Warnings of Advil Junior

  • Asthma: Consult a doctor before giving if the child has asthma, as NSAIDs can sometimes trigger an attack.
  • Fluid Intake: Encourage plenty of fluids, especially if the child is unwell.
  • Medication Interactions: Consult a doctor if the child is taking any other medication, especially blood thinners or steroids.

searchable.name: Valu Health Allergy Tablets
searchable.brief_info: Valu Health Allergy Tablets contain Diphenhydramine Hydrochloride, a classic H1? antihistamine used to treat various allergy symptoms, motion sickness, and as a sleep aid due to its pronounced sedative effects.
searchable.description: Valu Health Allergy Tablets are a quick-acting antihistamine that works by blocking the effects of histamine, a chemical released by the body during an allergic reaction. This action provides effective, temporary relief from common allergy symptoms. Because Diphenhydramine crosses the blood-brain barrier easily, it causes significant drowsiness, which is a common side effect but also makes the product useful as a nighttime sleep aid (though it is not labeled specifically for this purpose unless indicated on the packaging).
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Valu Health Allergy Tablets

This is an Over-The-Counter (OTC) medicine.

  • Adults and Children 12 years and over: Take 1 or 2 tablets (25 mg or 50 mg) every 4 to 6 hours as needed.
  • Children 6 to 11 years: Take 1 tablet (25 mg) every 4 to 6 hours as needed.
  • Maximum Daily Dose: Do not exceed 12 tablets (300 mg) in any 24-hour period unless directed by a physician.

Proper Administration

  • Administration: Swallow the tablet whole with water.
  • Timing: Take as needed for symptoms. Be mindful that the effect lasts several hours and will cause drowsiness.

Duration: Use only for temporary symptomatic relief. If symptoms persist for more than 7 days, consult a doctor.
searchable.specification:
• Form: Oral Tablet (often film coated)
  • Active Ingredient: Diphenhydramine Hydrochloride 25 mg
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Valu Health Allergy Tablets

  • Children's Sleep: Do NOT use this product to try and make a child sleepy.
  • Known Allergies: Do NOT take if you have a known allergy to Diphenhydramine or any of the inactive ingredients.
  • Specific Health Issues: Consult a doctor before use if you have glaucoma, trouble urinating due to an enlarged prostate gland, or a breathing problem (such as asthma, emphysema, or chronic bronchitis).

Side Effects of Valu Health Allergy Tablets

  • Common Side Effects (Expected): Drowsiness, dizziness, dry mouth, nose, and throat, blurred vision, and difficulty urinating.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects (Medical Attention Needed): Nervousness, agitation, confusion (especially in the elderly), or signs of a severe allergic reaction.

Precautions and Warnings of Valu Health Allergy Tablets

  • Sedation Risk: Be aware that the sedative effects can last into the next morning, potentially impairing judgment and coordination.
  • Elderly Patients: Use caution in the elderly, as they are more likely to experience side effects like dizziness, sedation, and confusion.

Drug Interactions: Consult a doctor or pharmacist if you are taking sedatives, tranquilizers, or any other medications that cause drowsiness, as the combination can amplify the effects.

searchable.name: Youtheory Ashwagandha
searchable.brief_info: Youtheory Ashwagandha is a premium dietary supplement designed to help the body adapt to the mental and physical rigors of modern life.
searchable.description: Youtheory Ashwagandha is a full-spectrum adaptogenic formula containing organic Ashwagandha root extract (KSM-66®) and whole root powder. This supplement is designed to help the body maintain homeostasis (internal balance) when faced with physical or emotional stress. By supporting the endocrine system, it helps regulate energy levels and promotes a sense of well-being. Its reputation as a trusted choice stems from its use of clinically backed ingredients that ensure high potency and bioavailability.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Youtheory Ashwagandha Take as directed by the pharmacist or physician. The standard recommended adult dosage is two (2) capsules daily, taken together or in divided doses.

Proper Administration

  • Method: Swallow capsules whole with a full glass of water.
  • Timing: Can be taken at any time of day. Many users prefer evening use to support relaxation, while others take it in the morning for sustained stress support.
  • Food Interaction: May be taken with or without food; however, taking it with a light meal may prevent mild stomach upset in sensitive individuals.
  • Missed Dose: If you miss a dose, take it as soon as you remember. If it is nearly time for your next dose, skip the missed one. Do not double the dose.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: 180 Capsules
  • Form: Vegetable Capsules
  • Strength: 1,000 mg Ashwagandha blend per serving
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Youtheory Ashwagandha

  • Pregnancy & Breastfeeding: Do NOT use; Ashwagandha is linked to potential uterine contractions and has not been cleared for breastfeeding safety.
  • Allergies: Avoid if you are allergic to nightshades (Solanaceae family), such as eggplant or peppers.

CAge Restrictions: Not intended for use by persons under the age of 18.

Side Effects of Youtheory Ashwagandha

  • Common: Mild drowsiness, nausea, or loose stools.
  • Serious but Rare: Signs of liver distress (yellowing of eyes/skin) or severe allergic reactions (difficulty breathing).
  • Action: If gastrointestinal upset persists, try taking the supplement with food. If a severe reaction occurs, seek medical attention immediately.

Precautions and Warnings

  • Autoimmune Conditions: Consult a doctor if you have Lupus, MS, or Rheumatoid Arthritis, as Ashwagandha may stimulate the immune system.
  • Surgery: Stop taking at least 2 weeks before a scheduled surgery as it may affect the central nervous system when combined with anesthesia.
  • Drug Interactions: Use caution if taking immunosuppressants, sedatives (e.g., benzodiazepines), or thyroid medications.

searchable.name: Amber Moisturising Hand Cream (Beauty Formulas)
searchable.brief_info: Amber Moisturising Hand Cream is a travel-friendly, intensive treatment designed to hydrate and soothe dry, overworked hands. It blends a rich, warm amber fragrance with nourishing ingredients to restore softness and maintain the skin’s natural moisture barrier.
searchable.description: This moisturising hand cream is part of Beauty Formulas' targeted hand care range. It features a non-greasy, lightweight formula that absorbs quickly into the skin, providing immediate relief from dryness without leaving a slippery residue. The "Amber" variant is distinguished by its warm, sophisticated scent and its focus on deep nourishment.
searchable.how_to_use:
Application Method

  • Step 1: Ensure hands are clean and dry before application.
  • Step 2: Squeeze a small, pea-sized amount onto the back of your hand.
  • Step 3: Massage the cream into the backs of both hands, then work it through your fingers, knuckles, and especially the cuticles.
  • Step 4: Continue rubbing until the cream is fully absorbed and the skin feels soft.

Proper Administration

  • Frequency: Apply as needed throughout the day. It is highly recommended to reapply after every handwash to replace lost natural oils.
  • Overnight Treatment: For more intensive repair, apply a slightly thicker layer before bed and allow it to nourish your skin while you sleep.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: 30ml Travel-Friendly Tube
  • Form: Topical Cream
  • Fragrance: Warm Amber
  • Skin Type: Suitable for all skin types, particularly dry and combination skin.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications

  • Known Allergies: Do NOT use if you have a known sensitivity to any listed fragrance components (e.g., Benzyl Salicylate, Linalool, or Limonene).
  • Broken Skin: Do not apply to skin that is severely irritated, bleeding, or inflamed.

Side Effects

  • Sensitivities: While rare, some users may experience mild redness or itching if they have an allergy to specific perfume components. If irritation occurs, discontinue use immediately.

Precautions and Warnings

  • External Use Only: Not for ingestion. Keep away from children and pets.
  • Avoid Eyes: In case of contact with eyes, rinse immediately with plenty of clean water.

Storage: Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight and excessive heat to prevent the formula from separating or the fragrance from fading.

searchable.name: Cranberry Moisturising Hand Cream (Beauty Formulas)
searchable.brief_info: Cranberry Moisturising Hand Cream is a revitalizing treatment formulated to provide deep hydration while protecting the skin with the natural power of fruit extracts. It combines a vibrant, fruity scent with a fast-absorbing formula to leave hands feeling refreshed and silky smooth.
searchable.description: This moisturising hand cream is designed for those who need effective hydration with the added benefit of antioxidants. The cranberry-infused formula helps to neutralize environmental stressors that can age the skin on the hands. Its lightweight texture is specifically engineered to absorb rapidly, making it ideal for frequent use throughout the day.
searchable.how_to_use:
Application Method

  • Step 1: Start with clean, dry hands.
  • Step 2: Dispense a small amount of cream onto the back of your hand.
  • Step 3: Massage the cream into the skin, focusing on the driest areas such as the knuckles and the skin surrounding the fingernails.
  • Step 4: Rub until the cream is fully absorbed and the refreshing fruity scent is released.

Proper Administration

  • Frequency: Use as often as desired. For the best results, apply immediately after washing your hands to seal in the moisture while the skin is still slightly hydrated.
  • Travel Use: The compact tube is designed for portability; keep it in your bag or car for hydration on the go.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: 30ml Travel Tube
  • Form: Topical Cream
  • Fragrance: Fresh Cranberry
  • Skin Type: Suitable for all skin types, especially those looking for an antioxidant boost.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications

  • Known Allergies: Do NOT use if you have a known allergy to cranberries or any of the synthetic fragrance components.
  • Severe Dermatitis: If you have broken or weeping skin, consult a pharmacist before applying scented hand creams.

Side Effects

  • Minor Irritation: Users with extremely sensitive skin may experience a slight tingling due to the fruit acid/extract content. If redness or a rash develops, stop use.

Precautions and Warnings

  • External Use Only: Avoid contact with the mouth and internal membranes.
  • Avoid Eyes: If the cream enters the eyes, rinse thoroughly with cool water.
  • Storage: Store below 25°C in a dry place. Keep the cap tightly closed when not in use to prevent the cream from drying out.

searchable.name: Neurozan Plus
searchable.brief_info: Neurozan Plus is an advanced dual-pack supplement designed to provide comprehensive nutritional support for the "most complex machine ever built"—the human brain. It combines high-potency micronutrient tablets with high-purity Omega-3 DHA capsules. This expert formula helps safeguard the intake of nutrients essential for maintaining normal brain function, cognitive performance, and mental vitality.
searchable.description: Neurozan Plus is a premium, research-based supplement that goes beyond standard multivitamins. Each pack contains two distinct components: a specialized micronutrient tablet and a high-purity Omega-3 capsule providing 300mg of DHA. Together, they deliver a synergistic blend of vitamins, minerals, and specialist nutrients like Ginkgo Biloba, 5-HTP, and Phosphatidylserine. It is the ideal choice for individuals seeking to support their memory, concentration, and long-term neurological health.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Neurozan Plus Take as directed by the pharmacist or physician. The standard adult dosage is one (1) micronutrient tablet (purple blister) AND one (1) Omega-3 capsule (pink blister) per day.

Proper Administration

  • Administration: Swallow each with water or a cold drink. Do not chew.
  • Best Time: Take during or immediately after your main meal.
  • Food Interaction: Must be taken on a full stomach to ensure maximum absorption of fat-soluble vitamins and to prevent stomach upset.
  • Missed Dose: If you miss a dose, take it as soon as you remember with food. Do not take a double dose to make up for a missed one.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: 56 units (28 Tablets + 28 Capsules)
  • Form: Dual-pack (Solid Tablet and Softgel Capsule)
  • Key Components: 300mg DHA, Ginkgo Biloba, 5-HTP, 1000 IU Vitamin D3
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Neurozan Plus

  • Allergies: Contains fish oil and soya. Do not use if you are allergic to fish, soya, or any of the listed ingredients.
  • Age Restrictions: Not suitable for children under 12 years of age.
  • Medical Conditions: Not recommended for individuals with a history of epilepsy without medical consultation.

Side Effects of Neurozan Plus

  • Common Side Effects: Mild stomach upset, headache, or a metallic taste in the mouth.
  • Serious but Rare Side Effects: Signs of an allergic reaction (rash, swelling) or interference with blood clotting.
  • Action: If you experience persistent gastrointestinal discomfort, ensure you are taking it with a large meal. If a rash develops, discontinue use immediately.

Precautions and Warnings

  • Blood Thinners: Contains Ginkgo Biloba and Omega-3, which may have a mild blood-thinning effect. Consult your doctor if you are taking anticoagulants (e.g., Warfarin or Aspirin).
  • Iron Content: This product contains iron, which can be harmful to very young children if ingested in large quantities.
  • Pregnancy & Breastfeeding: Consult your doctor or pharmacist before use. While generally safe, higher doses of certain nutrients should be monitored during pregnancy.

searchable.name: Ginsomin: Korean Panax Ginseng with Multivitamins and Minerals
searchable.brief_info: Ginsomin is a premium daily energy and health supplement that combines the potent revitalizing properties of high-quality Korean Panax Ginseng extract with a comprehensive range of 19 essential vitamins and minerals. It is designed to help the body combat fatigue, manage daily stress, and maintain peak physical and mental performance in a demanding modern lifestyle.
searchable.description: Ginsomin is an advanced formula specifically crafted to address the "tiredness and run-down" feeling associated with physical and mental over-exertion. The core of its effectiveness lies in the standardized Korean Panax Ginseng, an ancient adaptogen renowned for its ability to balance the body's systems. This botanical power is supported by a robust blend of antioxidants, B-vitamins, and minerals that work together to nourish cells and optimize metabolic energy production.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of GinsominTake as directed by the pharmacist or physician.

  • Typical Adult Dose: One capsule daily, preferably with breakfast.

Proper Administration

  • Administration: Swallow the capsule whole with a full glass of water. Do not chew or break the capsule.
  • Best Time: Taking it in the morning is recommended due to its energy-boosting properties; taking it late in the evening may interfere with sleep in sensitive individuals.
  • Food Interaction: Always take with food (preferably a substantial breakfast) to enhance the absorption of fat-soluble vitamins and prevent stomach upset.
  • Missed Dose: If you miss a dose, take it as soon as you remember. If it is nearly time for your next dose, skip the missed one.

How to Store and Dispose of Ginsomin

  • Storage: Store in a cool, dry place below 25°C. Protect from direct heat and moisture. Keep the blister pack in its original box.
  • Disposal: Keep out of reach of children. Dispose of any unused medication by returning it to your local pharmacy.

Quick Tips for Ginsomin

  • Cycle Your Use: Many experts recommend taking Ginseng for 2–3 months followed by a 1–2 week "rest" period to maintain its effectiveness.
  • Morning Routine: Pair your daily Ginsomin with a healthy breakfast for sustained energy throughout the day.
  • Avoid Other Multivitamins: Ginsomin is comprehensive; taking other multivitamins alongside it may lead to an excessive intake of certain minerals like Iron or Zinc.
  • Be Patient: While B-vitamins work quickly, the adaptogenic benefits of Ginseng often peak after 2–4 weeks of consistent use.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: 30 Capsules (Blister strips).
  • Form: Softgel Capsule.
  • Key Ingredients: Panax Ginseng Extract, 11 Vitamins, and 9 Minerals.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Safety and Precautions

Contraindications of Ginsomin

  • Medical Conditions: Do NOT use if you have high blood pressure (hypertension) that is not well-controlled, heart rhythm disorders, or acute infections.
  • Known Allergies: Do NOT use if you are allergic to ginseng or any of the vitamins/minerals listed in the formula.
  • Hormone-Sensitive Conditions: Consult a doctor before use if you have conditions like endometriosis or uterine fibroids.

Side Effects of Ginsomin

  • Common: Mild insomnia, nervousness, or gastrointestinal upset (if taken on an empty stomach).
  • Serious but Rare: Skin rash, rapid heartbeat (palpitations), or a significant rise in blood pressure.
  • Action: If you experience severe headaches or chest pain, stop use and seek medical attention.

Precautions and Warnings

  • Caffeine: Limit caffeine intake (coffee/tea) while taking Ginsomin, as the combination may lead to increased jitteriness or palpitations.
  • Diabetes: Ginseng may lower blood sugar levels; monitor your glucose levels closely if you are on diabetic medication.
  • Blood Thinners: Consult your doctor if you are taking anticoagulants (like Warfarin or Aspirin), as Ginseng can interfere with blood clotting.
  • Pregnancy & Breastfeeding: Not recommended for use during pregnancy or lactation unless specifically advised by a doctor.
