searchable.name: NAT B Capsules
searchable.brief_info: NAT B is a high-potency Vitamin B-Complex supplement specifically formulated to provide therapeutic levels of all essential B vitamins. It is designed to support the nervous system, boost energy metabolism, and help the body cope with the physical and mental demands of a high-stress lifestyle. By replenishing vital nutrients that are easily depleted by stress and poor diet, NAT B helps restore vitality and mental clarity.
searchable.description: NAT B provides a "mega-dose" of B-complex vitamins, which are water-soluble nutrients that the body cannot store in large amounts. These vitamins act as essential co-factors in hundreds of chemical reactions within the body. NAT B is particularly effective for individuals who experience frequent fatigue, work in high-pressure environments, or suffer from nerve-related discomforts such as tingling or numbness.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of NAT B Take as directed by the pharmacist or physician.

  • Adults: The typical dose is one capsule daily.

Proper Administration

  • Method: Swallow the capsule whole with a glass of water.
  • Best Time: Take your capsule in the morning with breakfast. Taking B vitamins at night may cause vivid dreams or interfere with sleep in some individuals due to the energy boost.
  • Food Interaction: Taking it with a meal reduces the risk of stomach upset and improves the absorption of certain B vitamins.
  • Missed Dose: Take it as soon as you remember. If it is almost time for your next dose, skip the missed one.

How to Store and Dispose of NAT B

  • Storage: Store in a cool, dry place below 25°C. Keep the bottle tightly closed and protect from direct sunlight and moisture.
  • Disposal: Keep out of reach of children. Return unused or expired capsules to a pharmacy for safe disposal.

Quick Tips for NAT B

  • Bright Urine: Do not be alarmed if your urine turns a bright, neon-yellow color. This is a harmless side effect of Vitamin B2 (Riboflavin) being processed by your body.
  • Consistency: For nerve-related issues, it may take 2–4 weeks of consistent use to notice a significant improvement.
  • Avoid Over-supplementation: Because NAT B is high-potency, you usually do not need to take another multivitamin unless specifically advised.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: 30 or 100 Capsules.
  • Form: Softgel Capsule.
  • Category: Therapeutic Vitamin B-Complex.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Safety and Precautions

Contraindications of NAT B

  • Hypersensitivity: Do NOT use if you are allergic to any of the B-group vitamins.
  • Specific Conditions: Consult your doctor if you have Leber’s disease (a rare eye condition) before taking B12.

Side Effects of NAT B

  • Common: Mild stomach upset, nausea, or a slight "vitamin" aftertaste.
  • Rare: Skin rash, itching, or dizziness.
  • Action: If you experience any signs of an allergic reaction (swelling or difficulty breathing), seek medical attention immediately.

Precautions and Warnings

  • Medication Interaction: Vitamin B6 can interfere with the effectiveness of certain medications like Levodopa (for Parkinson's disease). Consult your doctor if you are on long-term medication.
  • Kidney/Liver Health: If you have severe kidney or liver impairment, consult a healthcare provider for appropriate dosing.
  • Pregnancy & Breastfeeding: Generally safe, but consult your doctor to ensure the high-potency levels are appropriate for your specific needs.

searchable.name: Safi tonic blood purifier
searchable.brief_info: Safi is a time-tested, herbal Unani medicine renowned for its ability to naturally detoxify the body. By acting as a comprehensive blood purifier, it addresses the root cause of skin problems from within. Formulated with a blend of 28 essential herbal extracts, Safi helps clear the blood of toxins, leading to glowing skin, improved digestion, and better overall health.
searchable.description: Safi is more than just a skin treatment; it is a holistic detoxifier. It works by supporting the body's natural elimination organs—the liver, kidneys, and skin. By ensuring that toxins are effectively filtered and removed from the bloodstream, Safi prevents the "breakouts" and dullness associated with internal impurities. It is particularly famous for its bitter taste, which is a hallmark of its potent, blood-cleansing herbal ingredients.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Safi For Adults and Adolescents:

  • Typical Dose: 10ml (two teaspoonfuls) once daily.
  • Duration: For chronic acne, it is usually taken for at least 21 days to see a visible difference.

Proper Administration

  • With Water: Mix the 10ml dose in a full glass of water (approx. 250ml) and drink.
  • Timing: For best results, take it in the morning on an empty stomach or before bedtime.
  • Consistency: Take it at the same time every day to allow the herbs to work consistently in your system.

How to Store and Dispose of Safi

  • Storage: Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. Keep the bottle tightly closed after every use.
  • Disposal: Keep out of reach of children. Dispose of the empty bottle according to local recycling guidelines.

Quick Tips for Safi

  • The "Bitter" Truth: The taste is quite bitter. Mixing it with a little more water or a small amount of honey can make it easier to consume.
  • Hydration: Drink at least 8–10 glasses of water daily while on Safi to help your kidneys flush out the toxins the medicine is releasing.
  • Diet Matters: While taking Safi, avoid excessive oily, spicy, and high-sugar foods, as these contribute to the toxin load in your blood.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: 100ml, 200ml, or 500ml Bottle.
  • Form: Liquid Tonic (Syrup).
  • Category: Unani/Herbal Medicine.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Safety and Precautions

Contraindications of Safi

  • Pregnancy & Breastfeeding: Not recommended for use during pregnancy or lactation without medical advice.
  • Diarrhea: Avoid use if you have severe diarrhea or abdominal pain, as the Senna content has a laxative effect.
  • Children: Not usually recommended for very young children unless prescribed by a physician.

Side Effects of Safi

  • Common: Increased frequency of bowel movements (due to its laxative nature) and a temporary "purge" where skin may break out slightly before clearing up.
  • Rare: Stomach cramps or mild nausea.
  • Action: If you experience severe abdominal pain or allergic reactions, discontinue use and consult a healthcare professional.

Precautions and Warnings

  • Diabetes: Some formulations of Safi contain a syrup base with sugar. Diabetic patients should look for the sugar-free version or consult their doctor.
  • Pre-existing Conditions: If you have chronic kidney or liver disease, consult your doctor before starting a detoxification regimen.
  • Weight Loss: Do not use Safi solely as a weight-loss product; it should be part of a balanced lifestyle.

searchable.name: Ruzu Black Syrup for Men
searchable.brief_info: Ruzu Black Syrup for Men is a specially formulated, 100% natural herbal supplement designed to enhance male vitality, stamina, and overall physiological health. Building on the legendary "Ruzu" detoxifying foundation, this "Black" variant is enriched with specific phyto-nutrients that target male-specific wellness needs. It works by combining deep internal cleansing with potent energy-boosting herbs to restore peak performance and reproductive health.
searchable.description: Ruzu Black Syrup is a concentrated herbal bitters blend that addresses the root causes of male health challenges. It functions as a "system restorer," purging the body of oxidative stress and toxins that can impede blood flow and hormonal balance. Unlike chemical stimulants, it provides a holistic approach to wellness, improving everything from digestion and blood sugar levels to libido and physical endurance.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Ruzu Black Shake well before use.

  • Adult Men: Take 2 to 4 tablespoonfuls (approx. 30ml - 60ml) daily.
  • Timing: For best results, take it twice daily—once in the morning (before breakfast) and once at night (before bed).

Proper Administration

  • Method: Drink the syrup directly or mix it with a small amount of warm water if you find the bitter taste too intense.
  • Consistency: Use consistently for at least 2 to 4 weeks to experience the full systemic benefits.
  • Hydration: Drink plenty of water throughout the day to help your body flush out the toxins released by the syrup.

How to Store and Dispose of Ruzu Black

  • Storage: Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. Ensure the cap is tightly closed to maintain the potency of the herbal extracts.
  • Disposal: Keep out of reach of children. Dispose of the empty bottle according to local recycling guidelines.

Quick Tips for Ruzu Black

  • The "Healing Crisis": During the first few days, you may experience frequent bowel movements. This is a normal part of the detoxification process.
  • Avoid Excessive Sugar: To maximize the effects of Ruzu Black on your stamina and blood sugar, try to reduce your intake of sugary drinks and processed foods.
  • Lifestyle Pairing: Combine use with light exercise to further improve blood circulation and vitality.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: 200ml or 500ml Bottle.
  • Form: Liquid Herbal Syrup.
  • Category: Herbal Supplement / Alternative Medicine.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Safety and Precautions

Contraindications of Ruzu Black

  • Children: This specific "Black" formulation is strictly for adult men.
  • Severe Illness: Consult your doctor if you have severe kidney or liver disease before starting a detoxification regimen.
  • Allergies: Do NOT use if you have a known hypersensitivity to any of the herbal ingredients.

Side Effects of Ruzu Black

  • Common: Increased frequency of urination and bowel movements (laxative effect).
  • Rare: Mild stomach cramps or slight nausea if taken on an empty stomach.
  • Action: If you experience severe abdominal pain or persistent dizziness, reduce the dosage or consult a healthcare professional.

Precautions and Warnings

  • Not a "Quick Fix": While some notice immediate energy shifts, Ruzu Black is a curative herbal supplement intended for long-term health restoration rather than an instant stimulant.
  • Medication Interaction: If you are on prescribed medications for hypertension or diabetes, monitor your levels closely and consult your doctor to ensure compatibility.
  • Alcohol: Limit alcohol intake while using the syrup, as alcohol can neutralize some of the beneficial herbal properties.

searchable.name: Zedex Cold Capsule
searchable.brief_info: Zedex Cold Capsule is a comprehensive multi-ingredient formula designed to provide fast and effective relief from the symptoms of the common cold, hay fever, and other upper respiratory allergies. By combining a pain reliever, a nasal decongestant, and an antihistamine, Zedex targets the most bothersome aspects of a cold—including nasal congestion, runny nose, and body aches—helping you return to your daily activities with greater comfort.
searchable.description: Zedex Cold is a "combination therapy" medication. Instead of taking multiple separate pills for different symptoms, this capsule provides a coordinated approach to cold relief. It is formulated to dry up nasal secretions, shrink swollen nasal passages, and lower the fever or pain that often accompanies a viral infection.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Zedex Cold For Adults and Children over 12 years:

  • Typical Dose: One capsule every 4 to 6 hours as needed.
  • Maximum Dose: Do NOT exceed 4 capsules in any 24-hour period.
  • Duration: Should not be used for more than 5 consecutive days without consulting a doctor.

Proper Administration

  • Method: Swallow the capsule whole with a glass of water.
  • Timing: Can be taken with or without food. However, taking it with food may reduce the chance of stomach upset.
  • Consistency: Take only when symptoms are present. If symptoms persist or worsen, seek medical advice.
  • Avoid "Double-Dosing": Do not take this with any other products containing Paracetamol or decongestants.

How to Store and Dispose of Zedex Cold

  • Storage: Store in a cool, dry place below 30°C. Protect from direct sunlight and moisture.
  • Disposal: Keep out of reach of children. Return unused or expired capsules to a pharmacy for safe disposal.

Quick Tips for Zedex Cold

  • Check the Label: Many over-the-counter "Night" or "Day" cold medicines contain the same ingredients. Always check labels to ensure you aren't exceeding daily safety limits.
  • Hydration: Drink plenty of fluids (water, broth, or tea) to help thin the mucus in your sinuses while taking this medication.
  • Drowsiness: The antihistamine in this formula may cause drowsiness. Use caution when driving or operating machinery.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: 10 capsules per pack.
  • Form: Oral Capsule.
  • Key Ingredients: Paracetamol, Phenylephrine HCl, Chlorpheniramine Maleate.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Safety and Precautions

Contraindications of Zedex Cold

  • High Blood Pressure: Do NOT use if you have severe hypertension or uncontrolled coronary artery disease (due to the decongestant).
  • MAOIs: Do NOT use if you are currently taking or have taken a Monoamine Oxidase Inhibitor (antidepressant) in the last 14 days.
  • Allergies: Do NOT use if you are allergic to Paracetamol, Chlorpheniramine, or Phenylephrine.

Side Effects of Zedex Cold

  • Common: Drowsiness, dry mouth, dizziness, or mild nervousness/insomnia.
  • Less Common: Blurred vision, nausea, or a rapid heartbeat.
  • Action: If you experience difficulty urinating, a severe skin rash, or a very fast/irregular heartbeat, stop use and see a doctor.

Precautions and Warnings

  • Alcohol: Avoid alcohol while taking Zedex, as it can significantly increase the sedative (drowsy) effect and the risk of liver damage from Paracetamol.
  • Underlying Conditions: Consult a doctor before use if you have glaucoma, an enlarged prostate, diabetes, or thyroid disease.
  • Pregnancy & Breastfeeding: Consult your healthcare provider before use; decongestants are generally used with caution during pregnancy.

searchable.name: Uniplex Cough Syrup
searchable.brief_info: Uniplex Cough Syrup is a versatile, multi-action formulation designed to provide rapid relief from symptoms associated with the common cold, hay fever, and upper respiratory tract infections. By combining an antihistamine, a decongestant, and an expectorant, Uniplex addresses both the irritating "tickle" of a cough and the congestion that makes breathing difficult, helping to clear your airways and soothe your throat.
searchable.description: Uniplex is an integrated liquid medication that simplifies the treatment of cold symptoms. It works by thinning and loosening mucus in the chest, shrinking swollen nasal membranes, and stopping the allergic triggers that cause sneezing and a runny nose. The syrup format is particularly effective at coating the throat, providing an immediate soothing sensation to irritated tissues.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Uniplex Always use the provided measuring cup for an accurate dose.

  • Adults and Children over 12 years: 10ml to 20ml every 4 to 6 hours as needed.
  • Children (6–12 years): 5ml to 10ml every 4 to 6 hours.
  • Maximum Dose: Do NOT exceed 4 doses in any 24-hour period.
  • Consult a doctor before giving to children under 6 years.

Proper Administration

  • Timing: Can be taken with or without food.
  • Method: Swallow the syrup directly.
  • Hydration: For the expectorant (Guaifenesin) to work effectively, drink a full glass of water with each dose. Staying well-hydrated helps thin the mucus further.
  • Duration: Do not use for more than 7 days. If the cough persists or is accompanied by a persistent fever, consult a physician.

How to Store and Dispose of Uniplex

  • Storage: Store in a cool, dry place below 30°C. Protect from direct sunlight. Ensure the cap is tightly closed after every use.
  • Disposal: Keep out of reach of children. Return unused or expired syrup to a pharmacy for safe disposal.

Quick Tips for Uniplex

  • Shake Well: Always shake the bottle before use to ensure the active ingredients are evenly distributed.
  • Nighttime Use: Because of the antihistamine content, some people find this syrup helps them sleep better during a cold, but be aware of potential daytime drowsiness.
  • Identify Your Cough: This is best for "wet" or "chesty" coughs. For a purely dry, hacking cough without mucus, a suppressant-only syrup may be preferred.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: 100ml or 200ml Bottle.
  • Form: Oral Syrup.
  • Key Ingredients: Guaifenesin, Phenylephrine HCl, Chlorpheniramine Maleate.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Safety and Precautions

Contraindications of Uniplex

  • MAOIs: Do NOT take if you are currently taking, or have taken in the last 14 days, a Monoamine Oxidase Inhibitor (antidepressant).
  • High Blood Pressure: Use with caution if you have severe hypertension or heart disease due to the decongestant.
  • Narrow-Angle Glaucoma: Antihistamines can increase pressure within the eye.

Side Effects of Uniplex

  • Common: Drowsiness, dry mouth, blurred vision, or mild stomach upset.
  • Less Common: Restlessness (especially in children) or a slight increase in heart rate.
  • Action: If you experience difficulty urinating, confusion, or a severe skin rash, stop use and contact a doctor.

Precautions and Warnings

  • Drowsiness: This medication can cause significant sleepiness. Avoid driving or operating heavy machinery until you know how it affects you.
  • Alcohol: Avoid alcohol, as it can dangerously increase the sedative effects of the antihistamine.
  • Underlying Conditions: Consult a doctor if you have diabetes, thyroid disease, or an enlarged prostate before use.

searchable.name: Rulox Tablet
searchable.brief_info: Rulox Tablet is a trusted antacid formulation designed to provide rapid relief from the discomfort of excess stomach acid. Containing a balanced combination of Magnesium Trisilicate and Aluminium Hydroxide, it works by neutralizing acid on contact. These chewable tablets are a convenient solution for managing the burning sensation of heartburn and the "heavy" feeling of indigestion, especially after spicy or heavy meals.
searchable.description: Rulox is a non-systemic antacid, meaning it works locally in the stomach to neutralize acid without being absorbed into the bloodstream. The combination of magnesium and aluminium salts is intentional: aluminium can sometimes cause constipation, while magnesium can have a mild laxative effect. By combining them, Rulox provides effective relief while maintaining normal bowel regularity.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Rulox TabletsFor Adults and Children over 12 years:

  • Typical Dose: 1 to 2 tablets to be chewed as needed.
  • Frequency: Can be taken up to 4 times a day, usually after meals and at bedtime.
  • Maximum Dose: Do not exceed the recommended daily limit stated on the pack.

Proper Administration

  • Chew Thoroughly: Do not swallow these tablets whole. For the antacid to work effectively, the tablets must be chewed thoroughly before swallowing. This increases the surface area for the medicine to neutralize stomach acid.
  • Timing: For best results, take Rulox 1 hour after meals and before going to bed, as this is when acid production is typically highest.
  • Follow with Water: You may drink a small sip of water after chewing to help wash the medicine down.

How to Store and Dispose of Rulox Tablets

  • Storage: Store in a cool, dry place below 30°C. Protect from moisture and light. Keep the tablets in their original blister pack.
  • Disposal: Keep out of reach of children. Return unused or expired tablets to your pharmacist.

Quick Tips for Rulox Tablets

  • Lifestyle Check: If you find yourself needing Rulox every day for more than two weeks, consult your doctor to rule out more serious conditions like GERD.
  • Trigger Foods: Identify and avoid foods that trigger your acid (e.g., caffeine, chocolate, fatty foods, or citrus).
  • Late Night Eating: Try to finish your last meal at least 3 hours before lying down to prevent nighttime heartburn.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: 16 Tablets (2 x 8 blister strips).
  • Manufacturer: SKG Pharma.
  • Form: Chewable Tablet.
  • Key Ingredients: Aluminium Hydroxide, Magnesium Trisilicate.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Safety and Precautions

Contraindications of Rulox Tablets

  • Kidney Disease: Use with extreme caution if you have kidney impairment, as magnesium and aluminium can accumulate in the body.
  • Phosphate Levels: Do not use if you have low phosphate levels (hypophosphatemia), as aluminium can further lower these levels.
  • Allergies: Do not use if you are allergic to any of the ingredients.

Side Effects of Rulox Tablets

  • Common: Chalky taste in the mouth or mild change in bowel movements.
  • Rare: Stomach cramps or nausea.
  • Action: If you experience persistent constipation or diarrhea, stop use and consult a pharmacist.

Precautions and Warnings

  • Drug Interactions: Antacids can stop your body from absorbing other medicines. Wait at least 2 hours between taking Rulox and other medications (especially antibiotics like Ciprofloxacin or Tetracycline, and heart medicines).
  • Sodium Content: If you are on a salt-restricted diet, check the label or ask your pharmacist about the sodium content.
  • Pregnancy: Generally considered safe for occasional use, but always consult your doctor first.

searchable.name: Oxy 10 Maximum Strength
searchable.brief_info: Oxy 10 is a high-potency topical medication containing 10% Benzoyl Peroxide. It is specifically formulated to treat the most persistent and stubborn acne that has not responded to milder treatments. By delivering a concentrated dose of oxygen deep into the pores, Oxy 10 kills acne-causing bacteria on contact, dries up excess oil, and helps clear even the most difficult pimples and blackheads.
searchable.description: Oxy 10 is a "Vanishing Gel" that disappears as it is rubbed into the skin. Its active formula works in three ways: it kills 99% of acne bacteria (P. acnes), it acts as a keratolytic to peel away dead skin cells that clog pores, and it absorbs excess sebum (oil). Because this is a Maximum Strength formula, it is intended for use on tougher skin areas like the back or for moderate-to-severe facial acne.
searchable.how_to_use:
Proper Administration

  1. Cleanse: Wash the affected area with a mild cleanser and pat dry gently.
  2. Test: If you are using this for the first time, apply a tiny amount to a small restricted area for three days to test for sensitivity.
  3. Apply: If no reaction occurs, apply a thin layer of Oxy 10 to the affected areas.
  4. Frequency: Start with one application daily. If no bothersome dryness or peeling occurs, you may gradually increase to two or three times daily if needed or as directed by a doctor.
  5. Moisturize: Because 10% is very strong, it is highly recommended to follow up with a non-comedogenic (oil-free) moisturizer to prevent excessive peeling.

How to Store and Dispose of Oxy 10

  • Storage: Store in a cool, dry place below 25°C. Keep the tube tightly closed.
  • Disposal: Keep out of reach of children. Dispose of the tube according to local household waste regulations.

Quick Tips for Oxy 10

  • Watch Your Fabrics: Warning: Benzoyl Peroxide is a bleaching agent. It will bleach hair and dyed fabrics (towels, pillowcases, and clothing). Use white towels and bedsheets while using this product.
  • Sun Protection: This medication can make your skin more sensitive to the sun. Always wear a broad-spectrum sunscreen during the day.
  • Less is More: You do not need a thick layer. A thin, even film is sufficient for the active ingredient to penetrate the pores.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: 10g or 25g Tube.
  • Form: Vanishing Cream/Gel.
  • Active Ingredient: Benzoyl Peroxide 10%.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Safety and Precautions

Contraindications of Oxy 10

  • Sensitive Skin: Avoid use if you have very sensitive skin or are prone to eczema.
  • Allergy: Do NOT use if you have a known allergy to Benzoyl Peroxide.

Side Effects of Oxy 10

  • Common: Mild stinging, redness, and peeling of the skin are expected during the first few days.
  • Less Common: Severe burning, blistering, or swelling.
  • Action: If excessive redness or painful irritation occurs, reduce the frequency of use. If a severe allergic reaction (swelling of the face/hives) occurs, stop use immediately and see a doctor.

Precautions and Warnings

  • External Use Only: Keep away from eyes, lips, and the sensitive lining of the nose. If contact occurs, rinse thoroughly with water.
  • Combination Therapy: Avoid using other harsh skin treatments (like Retinoids or high-strength Salicylic Acid) at the same time unless advised by a dermatologist, as this will cause extreme irritation.
  • Pregnancy: Consult your doctor before use; while topical absorption is low, it is best to seek medical guidance.

searchable.name: Polygel Antacid Dual 200ml
searchable.brief_info: Polygel Antacid Dual is an advanced oral suspension designed for superior management of gastroesophageal reflux (GERD) and severe indigestion. Unlike standard antacids, the "Dual" formula provides both a chemical neutralizer and a physical barrier. By combining Sodium Alginate with high-quality antacids, it creates a protective "raft" that prevents stomach acid from rising into the esophagus, providing rapid and long-lasting comfort.
searchable.description: Polygel Dual is specifically formulated for patients whose main symptom is acid reflux (heartburn). While the antacid components neutralize existing acid, the Sodium Alginate reacts with stomach acid to form a thick, buoyant gel layer (the raft). This raft sits on top of the stomach contents, physically blocking acid from splashing back up into the throat, which is especially helpful after heavy meals or when lying down.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Polygel Dual

  • Adults and Children 12 years and over: 10ml to 20ml (two to four 5ml spoonfuls).
  • Frequency: Taken after meals and at bedtime (up to four times a day).
  • Children under 12 years: Should only be taken on medical advice.

Proper Administration

  • Shake Well: Vigorously shake the bottle before use to ensure the alginate is properly distributed.
  • Timing is Key: For the best results, take Polygel Dual after you have finished your meal. This allows the "raft" to sit on top of the food you just ate.
  • Undiluted: Do not mix with water or juice, as this can weaken the strength of the protective raft.

How to Store and Dispose of Polygel Dual

  • Storage: Store below 30°C. Do not refrigerate or freeze (cold temperatures can change the consistency of the gel).
  • Shelf Life: Check the expiry date on the bottle. Use within 6 months of opening.
  • Disposal: Keep out of reach of children.

Quick Tips for Polygel Dual

  • Nighttime Reflux: If you suffer from "silent reflux" or coughing at night, take your final dose right before getting into bed.
  • Gravity Helps: Even with Polygel Dual, try to wait 2–3 hours after eating before lying completely flat.
  • The "Raft" Duration: The protective layer can last for several hours, providing longer relief than tablets alone.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: 200ml Bottle.
  • Form: Oral Suspension.
  • Key Ingredients: Sodium Alginate, Sodium Bicarbonate, Calcium Carbonate.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Safety and Precautions

Contraindications of Polygel Dual

  • Severe Renal Impairment: Due to the calcium and sodium content, use with caution if you have kidney disease.
  • Sodium-Restricted Diets: This product contains significant sodium; consult your doctor if you are on a low-salt diet (e.g., for hypertension or heart failure).
  • Hypercalcemia: Avoid if you have high calcium levels in the blood.

Side Effects of Polygel Dual

  • Common: Very rarely, mild bloating or flatulence as the "raft" forms.
  • Less Common: Constipation (due to calcium carbonate).
  • Action: If you experience an unusual skin rash or difficulty breathing, you may be allergic to one of the ingredients; stop use immediately.

Precautions and Warnings

  • Drug Interactions: The "raft" can trap other medicines or prevent them from being absorbed. Wait at least 2 hours between taking Polygel Dual and other medications (especially antibiotics like Ciprofloxacin or heart medicines like Digoxin).
  • Persistent Symptoms: If symptoms do not improve after 7 days, see a doctor to ensure there is no underlying damage to the esophagus.

searchable.name: Jobelyn 100 Capsules (Health Forever)
searchable.brief_info: Jobelyn is a scientifically researched, multi-functional herbal supplement containing a 100% natural extract of Sorghum bicolor. Produced by Health Forever Product Limited, it is internationally recognized for its exceptionally high antioxidant capacity (ORAC value). Jobelyn is primarily used as a powerful blood builder and immune system booster, helping to revitalize the body during recovery from illness, manage chronic conditions, and maintain overall vitality.
searchable.description: Jobelyn is derived from a unique variety of Sorghum bicolor leaf sheaths. It contains a dense concentration of polyphenols and anthocyanins—natural compounds that protect cells from oxidative stress. Its rapid action in increasing packed cell volume (PCV) and hemoglobin levels makes it a trusted natural alternative for blood enrichment and immune support.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Jobelyn

  • For General Wellness: 1 capsule two times daily (Morning and Night).
  • For Blood Building/Anemia: 2 capsules three times daily, or as directed by a healthcare professional.
  • For Children (under 12): Consult a pediatrician. Often, the capsule is opened and half the powder is mixed with food or honey.

Proper Administration

  • Timing: Can be taken with or without food. However, taking it with a glass of water after a meal is often best for absorption.
  • Consistency: For chronic conditions or blood building, it is important to take Jobelyn consistently for at least 30 days to see significant results in blood tests.

How to Store and Dispose of Jobelyn

  • Storage: Store in a cool, dry place below 30°C. Ensure the bottle is tightly closed after use to protect the capsules from moisture.
  • Disposal: Keep out of reach of children. Dispose of the empty bottle in accordance with local plastic recycling guidelines.

Quick Tips for Jobelyn

  • The "Color" Note: Because of the high concentration of natural pigments, you may notice your stool becomes darker while taking Jobelyn. This is normal and expected.
  • Hydration: Drink plenty of water throughout the day to help your body process the antioxidants efficiently.
  • Monitor Progress: If taking Jobelyn for anemia, schedule a follow-up PCV or Full Blood Count (FBC) test after 2 weeks to monitor your improvement.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: 100 Capsules per bottle.
  • Manufacturer: Health Forever Product Ltd.
  • Form: Herbal Capsule.
  • Active Ingredient: Sorghum bicolor extract.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Safety and Precautions

Contraindications and Restrictions

  • Allergy: Do not use if you have a known hypersensitivity to Sorghum bicolor or any of the ingredients.
  • Pregnancy & Breastfeeding: While Jobelyn is a natural food-based supplement, always consult your doctor or midwife before starting any new supplement during pregnancy.

Side Effects of Jobelyn

  • Common: Jobelyn is generally very well-tolerated. Some individuals may experience mild stomach changes as the body adjusts to the high antioxidant load.
  • Action: If you experience an unusual skin rash or persistent diarrhea, discontinue use and consult your pharmacist.

Precautions and Warnings

  • Do Not Replace Medical Treatment: While Jobelyn is an excellent supportive therapy for conditions like Sickle Cell or Cancer, it should not replace prescribed medications (like hydroxyurea or chemotherapy) without a doctor's supervision.
  • Surgery: Inform your doctor that you are taking a high-antioxidant supplement if you have a scheduled surgery.

searchable.name: Jobelyn Suspension for Children
searchable.brief_info: Jobelyn Suspension is a scientifically formulated, 100% natural herbal supplement specifically designed for pediatric use. Containing the powerful extract of Sorghum bicolor, this liquid version of the world-renowned Jobelyn provides children with a palatable and easy-to-swallow way to boost their blood levels and strengthen their natural defenses. It is particularly valued in pediatric care for its ability to rapidly improve Packed Cell Volume (PCV) and hemoglobin levels during recovery from malaria, surgery, or in the management of chronic conditions.
searchable.description: Jobelyn Suspension harnesses the high antioxidant capacity (ORAC) of Sorghum bicolor in a child-friendly liquid format. Rich in polyphenols and anthocyanins, it works as a powerful "biological response modifier," meaning it helps the child's body adapt to stress and fight off infections more effectively. Its deep red color is entirely natural, derived from the high concentration of antioxidants within the plant sheath.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Jobelyn Suspension

  • Children 1 – 5 years: 5ml (one teaspoonful) twice daily.
  • Children 6 – 12 years: 10ml (two teaspoonfuls) twice daily.
  • Under 1 year: Only as directed by a pediatrician.
  • Note: For severe cases of anemia, a doctor may recommend increasing the frequency to three times daily for a short period.

Proper Administration

  • Shake Well: Always shake the bottle vigorously before each dose, as the natural herbal particles may settle at the bottom.
  • Measurement: Use the measuring cup or spoon provided with the bottle to ensure an accurate dose.
  • Consistency: For best results in blood building, maintain the schedule for at least 2 to 4 weeks.
  • Mixing: If the child finds the taste too strong, the dose can be mixed into a small amount of fruit juice or honey.

How to Store and Dispose of Jobelyn Suspension

  • Storage: Store in a cool, dry place below 30°C. Protect from direct sunlight. Once opened, ensure the cap is tightly closed.
  • Disposal: Keep out of reach of children. Dispose of the empty bottle responsibly in a plastic recycling bin.

Quick Tips for Jobelyn

  • Natural Staining: The suspension is a deep red color. Be careful during administration, as it may stain clothes.
  • Stool Color: Do not be alarmed if your child’s stool appears darker; this is a normal result of the natural pigments in the Sorghum bicolor.
  • Hydration: Ensure the child drinks plenty of water to help the body utilize the high antioxidant content effectively.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: Usually 100ml or 200ml Bottle.
  • Manufacturer: Health Forever Product Ltd.
  • Form: Oral Suspension.
  • Active Ingredient: Sorghum bicolor extract.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Safety and Precautions

Contraindications and Restrictions

  • Allergy: Do not give to children with a known hypersensitivity to Sorghum bicolor.
  • Medical Consult: If your child is on other chronic medications, inform your pharmacist or pediatrician before starting Jobelyn.

Side Effects of Jobelyn Suspension

  • Common: Jobelyn is exceptionally safe and well-tolerated. Occasionally, a child may experience a mild change in bowel habits as their system adjusts.
  • Action: If the child develops a skin rash or persistent diarrhea, stop the supplement and consult your healthcare provider.

Precautions and Warnings

  • Not a Substitute for Malaria Treatment: While Jobelyn is excellent for building blood after malaria, it does not kill the malaria parasite. Always complete the prescribed antimalarial course first.
  • Monitor Blood Levels: For children with chronic anemia, regular PCV checks are recommended to track progress.

searchable.name: Cofex cough syrup
searchable.brief_info: Cofex Cough Syrup is a potent, multi-action liquid medication designed to provide rapid relief from irritating coughs and associated respiratory symptoms. By combining an effective antitussive (cough suppressant) with a powerful antihistamine, Cofex targets both the urge to cough and the underlying allergic triggers or nasal secretions that often cause "tickly" throats. It is a trusted solution for managing symptoms of the common cold, upper respiratory allergies, and minor throat irritations.
searchable.description: Cofex is formulated to address the discomfort of unproductive (dry) coughs. Its liquid base provides an immediate soothing coating for the inflamed tissues of the throat, while its active ingredients work systemically to suppress the cough reflex in the brain and dry up excess secretions in the nasal and throat passages.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Cofex

  • Adults and Children over 12 years: Usually 5ml to 10ml (1 to 2 teaspoonfuls) every 4 to 6 hours.
  • Children 6 to 12 years: 2.5ml to 5ml (˝ to 1 teaspoonful) every 6 hours.
  • Maximum Dose: Do not exceed 4 doses in a 24-hour period.
  • Note: Not recommended for children under 6 years unless specifically directed by a pediatrician.

Proper Administration

  • Measurement: Always use the measuring cup or spoon provided with the bottle to ensure an accurate dose. Do not use a standard kitchen spoon.
  • Method: Take the syrup undiluted. For a soothing effect on the throat, avoid drinking water immediately after taking the dose.
  • Timing: If the cough interferes with sleep, take the final dose of the day about 30 minutes before bedtime.

How to Store and Dispose of Cofex

  • Storage: Store in a cool, dry place below 30°C. Protect from direct sunlight. Ensure the cap is tightly closed to maintain the syrup's integrity.
  • Disposal: Keep out of reach of children. Return any expired or unused syrup to your local pharmacy for safe disposal.

Quick Tips for Cofex

  • Stay Hydrated: Drink plenty of water throughout the day. While Cofex suppresses the cough, hydration helps thin any existing mucus.
  • Honey and Lemon: You can supplement Cofex with warm honey and lemon water for additional throat-soothing benefits.
  • Monitor Symptoms: If a cough persists for more than 7 days, or is accompanied by a high fever or rash, consult a doctor.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: 100ml Bottle.
  • Form: Oral Syrup.
  • Active Ingredients: Dextromethorphan HBr, Chlorpheniramine Maleate.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Safety and Precautions

Contraindications and Restrictions

  • MAOIs: Do NOT use if you have taken a Monoamine Oxidase Inhibitor (antidepressant) in the last 14 days.
  • Asthma/COPD: Use with caution if you have chronic respiratory conditions; cough suppressants are generally avoided if the cough is "productive" (bringing up a lot of mucus).
  • Narrow-Angle Glaucoma: Antihistamines may increase intraocular pressure.

Side Effects of Cofex

  • Common: Drowsiness, dizziness, dry mouth, or blurred vision.
  • Less Common: Mild stomach upset or constipation.
  • Action: If you experience severe tremors, confusion, or difficulty urinating, stop use and contact your pharmacist.

Precautions and Warnings

  • Alertness: Because Cofex causes drowsiness, do not drive, operate heavy machinery, or engage in hazardous activities after taking a dose.
  • Alcohol: Avoid alcohol while taking Cofex, as it can significantly increase the sedative effects of the antihistamine.
  • Drug Interactions: Inform your doctor if you are taking other sedatives, tranquilizers, or medications for blood pressure.

searchable.name: Emprofen 200mg (Ibuprofen) X 10 Tablets
searchable.brief_info: Emprofen is a reliable Non-Steroidal Anti-Inflammatory Drug (NSAID) containing Ibuprofen (200mg). It is designed to provide fast and effective relief from mild to moderate pain while simultaneously reducing inflammation and swelling. Whether you are dealing with a nagging headache, muscular aches, or a fever, Emprofen works at the site of the problem to provide comfort and restore your daily mobility.
searchable.description: Emprofen is a versatile analgesic that acts by blocking the chemicals in the body that signal pain. Unlike plain paracetamol, ibuprofen has strong anti-inflammatory properties, making it particularly effective for pains that involve swelling, such as sports injuries, dental issues, or menstrual cramps.1 This 10-tablet pack is a convenient size for a first-aid kit or travel bag.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Emprofen

  • Adults and Children over 12 years: 1 to 2 tablets every 4 to 6 hours as needed.
  • Maximum Dose: Do not exceed 6 tablets (1200mg) in a 24-hour period.6
  • Children (under 12 years): Use only as directed by a pediatrician (pediatric suspensions are usually preferred for younger children).

Proper Administration

  • With Food: IMPORTANT: Always take Emprofen with or immediately after a meal or with a glass of milk. This helps protect the stomach lining from irritation.
  • Method: Swallow the tablet whole with a full glass of water. Do not lie down for at least 15–30 minutes after taking the dose to prevent throat irritation.
  • Duration: Use the lowest effective dose for the shortest duration necessary to relieve symptoms.7

How to Store and Dispose of Emprofen

  • Storage: Store in a cool, dry place below 30°C. Protect from moisture and direct sunlight.
  • Disposal: Keep out of reach of children. Return any expired medication to your local pharmacy for safe disposal.

Quick Tips for Emprofen

  • Hydration: Drink plenty of fluids, especially if you are taking Emprofen for a fever.
  • Identify the Pain: If your pain involves swelling (like a sprained ankle), Emprofen is often a better choice than paracetamol because it treats the inflammation.8
  • Avoid "Doubling Up": Do not take Emprofen with other NSAIDs (like Aspirin, Diclofenac, or Naproxen) as this increases the risk of side effects.9
searchable.famasi_advice:
Safety and Precautions

Contraindications and Restrictions

  • Stomach Ulcers: Do not use if you have an active stomach ulcer or a history of gastrointestinal bleeding.
  • Asthma: Use with caution; some people with asthma may experience "aspirin-sensitive" bronchospasm with NSAIDs.10
  • Kidney/Heart Issues: Consult your doctor if you have severe heart failure, kidney disease, or high blood pressure.
  • Allergy: Do not use if you are allergic to Ibuprofen or Aspirin.

Side Effects of Emprofen

  • Common: Indigestion, heartburn, or nausea (minimized when taken with food).
  • Serious (Rare): Black or tarry stools (sign of stomach bleeding), skin rash, or shortness of breath.
  • Action: If you notice any unusual bruising, swelling of the face, or severe stomach pain, stop use and consult a doctor immediately.

Precautions and Warnings

  • Pregnancy: Avoid use during the last 3 months of pregnancy unless directed by a doctor, as it may affect the baby’s circulation.
  • Alcohol: Limit alcohol intake while taking Emprofen to reduce the risk of stomach irritation.
  • Elderly Patients: Should use with caution due to an increased risk of kidney and stomach-related side effects.

searchable.name: Mecure Cimetidine 400mg (X 20 Tablets)
searchable.brief_info: Mecure Cimetidine is an effective Histamine $H_{2}$-receptor antagonist designed to manage conditions caused by excess stomach acid. By reducing the production of gastric acid, it helps relieve the painful symptoms of heartburn and promotes the healing of the stomach and intestinal lining.1 This 20-tablet pack provides a reliable solution for those suffering from acid-related gastrointestinal discomfort and ulcers.
searchable.description: Mecure Cimetidine works by blocking the action of histamine on the parietal cells in the stomach.2 Unlike antacids that merely neutralize existing acid, Cimetidine stops the acid from being produced in the first place. It is a well-established treatment for both short-term relief and the long-term management of chronic acid conditions.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Mecure Cimetidine

This is a Prescription-Only Medicine (POM).

  • For Active Ulcers: Usually 400mg twice daily (morning and bedtime) or 800mg once daily at bedtime for 4–8 weeks.
  • For Heartburn/Indigestion: Typically one 400mg tablet when symptoms occur, or as directed by your doctor.
  • Maintenance: A lower dose (400mg at bedtime) may be prescribed to prevent ulcers from returning.

Proper Administration

  • With Meals: Cimetidine can be taken with food or on an empty stomach.12 Taking it with meals may help prolong its effect.
  • Consistency: If prescribed a course, finish the entire duration even if you start to feel better after a few days.
  • Avoid Antacid Overlap: Do not take an antacid within 1 hour of taking Cimetidine, as it can reduce the absorption of the medicine.

How to Store and Dispose of Mecure Cimetidine

  • Storage: Store in a cool, dry place below 30°C, away from direct sunlight.
  • Disposal: Keep out of reach of children. Return any unused or expired tablets to your local pharmacist.

Quick Tips for Acid Relief

  • Smoking Cessation: Smoking increases stomach acid production and can interfere with the healing of ulcers.13
  • Dietary Choices: Avoid "trigger" foods like caffeine, chocolate, spicy dishes, and alcohol while your stomach is healing.
  • Late Night Snacks: Avoid eating within 3 hours of going to bed to reduce nighttime acid production.14
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: 20 Tablets (2 x 10 Blisters).
  • Strength: 400mg per tablet.
  • Manufacturer: Mecure Industries Ltd.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Safety and Precautions

Contraindications and Restrictions

  • Allergy: Do not use if you are allergic to Cimetidine or other $H_{2}$ blockers (like Famotidine).
  • Kidney/Liver Issues: Dosage may need adjustment if you have significant kidney or liver impairment.15

Side Effects of Mecure Cimetidine

  • Common: Headache, dizziness, diarrhea, or mild muscle pain.16
  • Rare (with high doses): Confusion (especially in the elderly) or reversible breast enlargement in men (gynecomastia).
  • Action: If you experience a persistent rash or unusual bruising, stop use and consult your doctor.

Precautions and Warnings

  • Drug Interactions: IMPORTANT: Cimetidine can interact with many other drugs (like Warfarin, Phenytoin, and Theophylline).17 Always inform your pharmacist of all medications you are currently taking.
  • Pregnancy: Consult your doctor before use; it should only be used if clearly needed.
  • Masking Symptoms: If you have unintended weight loss or difficulty swallowing, see a doctor immediately, as Cimetidine can mask the symptoms of more serious conditions.

searchable.name: Renerve Plus Softgel Capsules
searchable.brief_info: Renerve Plus is a high-potency nutritional supplement specifically formulated to support nerve health and enhance cellular metabolism. Combining the powerful neuro-protective properties of Methylcobalamin with essential antioxidants and minerals, these softgel capsules are designed to repair damaged nerves, improve blood flow, and combat oxidative stress. It is a preferred choice for managing various neuropathies and maintaining the overall integrity of the nervous system.
searchable.description: Renerve Plus is more than just a Vitamin B supplement; it is a "neuro-antioxidant" complex. It provides a synergistic blend of ingredients that work together to regenerate nerve fibers and improve nerve conduction. The softgel form ensures superior absorption and bioavailability, making it highly effective for those with chronic nerve conditions or nutritional deficiencies.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage and Administration

  • Adults: Take one (1) softgel capsule daily.
  • Method: Swallow the capsule whole with a full glass of water. Do not crush or chew the softgel.
  • Timing: It is best taken after a meal (like breakfast or lunch) to maximize the absorption of the nutrients and prevent any minor stomach upset.

Proper Usage Tips

  • Be Patient: Nerve repair is a gradual process. While some may feel an energy boost quickly, it often takes 2 to 4 weeks of consistent use to notice an improvement in numbness or nerve pain.
  • Consistency: Take your capsule at the same time each day to maintain a steady level of nutrients in your system.
  • Avoid Alcohol: Excessive alcohol consumption can interfere with the absorption of B-vitamins and can further damage nerves.

How to Store and Dispose of Renerve Plus

  • Storage: Store in a cool, dry place below 25°C. Keep away from direct sunlight and heat, as softgels can melt or stick together in hot environments.
  • Disposal: Keep out of reach of children. Dispose of empty blister packs in regular household waste.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: 10 Softgel Capsules per strip.
  • Form: Soft Gelatin Capsule.
  • Strength: High-potency Neurotropic blend.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Safety and Precautions

Contraindications and Restrictions

  • Allergy: Do not use if you are allergic to Methylcobalamin, Alpha Lipoic Acid, or any other ingredients in the formula.
  • Diabetes Medication: If you are taking medication for diabetes, monitor your blood sugar closely, as Alpha Lipoic Acid can enhance the effect of insulin or oral drugs.

Side Effects of Renerve Plus

  • Common: Mild nausea, diarrhea, or a harmless yellowing of the urine.
  • Rare: Skin rash or itching.
  • Action: If you experience any severe allergic reactions like swelling of the face or difficulty breathing, stop use immediately and seek medical help.

Precautions and Warnings

  • Pregnancy & Breastfeeding: Consult your doctor before use; while these nutrients are essential, high-dose supplements should be medically supervised.
  • Kidney Health: If you have severe kidney disease, consult a healthcare professional before starting this supplement.

searchable.name: Nurofen 400mg (Maximum Strength) X 12 Tablets
searchable.brief_info: Nurofen 400mg is a high-strength formulation of the trusted anti-inflammatory painkiller, Ibuprofen. Designed for those who need more powerful relief than standard 200mg doses, it targets the source of pain to provide up to 8 hours of comfort. Whether you are managing intense muscular pain, a severe headache, or a stubborn fever, Nurofen 400mg works efficiently to reduce inflammation and get you back on your feet.
searchable.description: Nurofen 400mg belongs to a group of medicines called Non-Steroidal Anti-Inflammatory Drugs (NSAIDs). It is particularly effective for pain that is associated with swelling or redness. By providing a 400mg dose in a single tablet, it offers a convenient way to manage significant discomfort without the need to take multiple pills at once.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage and Administration

  • Adults and Children over 12 years: Take one (1) tablet with water.
  • Frequency: If needed, take one tablet every 4 to 6 hours.
  • Maximum Dose: Do not exceed 3 tablets (1200mg) in any 24-hour period.
  • Note: This product is for short-term use only. If symptoms persist for more than 3 days (fever) or 10 days (pain), consult your doctor.

Proper Usage Tips

  • Take with Food: IMPORTANT: To minimize the risk of stomach irritation, always take Nurofen 400mg with or immediately after a meal, or with a glass of milk.
  • Swallow Whole: Do not chew or crush the tablets.
  • Lowest Effective Dose: Always use the lowest dose necessary to relieve your symptoms to reduce the risk of side effects.

How to Store and Dispose of Nurofen

  • Storage: Store in a cool, dry place below 25°C.
  • Disposal: Keep out of reach of children. Return unused tablets to your local pharmacy for safe disposal.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Safety and Precautions

Contraindications and Restrictions

  • Stomach Health: Do not use if you have an active stomach ulcer, a history of gastrointestinal bleeding, or perforation.
  • Allergy: Do not use if you are allergic to Ibuprofen, Aspirin, or other NSAIDs.
  • Heart/Kidney Disease: Consult your doctor if you have severe heart, kidney, or liver failure.

Side Effects of Nurofen 400mg

  • Common: Heartburn, indigestion, or nausea (less likely if taken with food).
  • Serious (Rare): Signs of stomach bleeding (black stools), skin rash, or sudden wheezing.
  • Action: If you experience any signs of an allergic reaction or severe abdominal pain, stop taking the medicine immediately and seek medical help.

Precautions and Warnings

  • Asthma: Some people with asthma may find that NSAIDs trigger a "flare-up." Use with caution.
  • Pregnancy: Do not take Nurofen during the last 3 months of pregnancy. Consult your doctor if you are in the first 6 months or breastfeeding.
  • Avoid Interactions: Do not take this with other NSAIDs (like Naproxen or Diclofenac) or low-dose Aspirin unless specifically told to do so by a doctor.

searchable.name: OvaBoost for Women (120 Capsules)
searchable.brief_info: OvaBoost is a scientifically formulated dietary supplement by Fairhaven Health, specifically designed to support female reproductive health and enhance egg quality. By combining a powerful blend of antioxidants, vitamins, and specialized nutrients, OvaBoost helps protect egg cells from the damaging effects of oxidative stress and supports healthy ovarian function. This 120-capsule bottle provides a full 30-day supply for women who are actively trying to conceive or preparing for fertility treatments like IVF.
searchable.description: The quality of a woman's eggs is a critical factor in fertility and the health of a pregnancy. As women age, egg quality naturally declines due to oxidative damage. OvaBoost features a "trio" of ingredients—Myo-Inositol, Folate, and Melatonin—which have been clinically studied for their ability to improve egg health and insulin sensitivity. This formula is particularly popular among women with PCOS or those over the age of 30.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage and Administration

  • Dosage: Take four (4) capsules daily.
  • Method: Swallow capsules with water. You can take all four at once or divide them (e.g., 2 in the morning and 2 in the evening).
  • Timing: For best results, take with a meal. This improves the absorption of fat-soluble ingredients like Co-Q10 and Vitamin E and reduces the chance of stomach upset.

Proper Usage Tips

  • Start Early: It takes approximately 90 days for an egg to mature before ovulation. For maximum benefit, start taking OvaBoost at least 3 months before you plan to conceive.
  • Consistency: Take it every day at the same time to maintain steady nutrient levels in your system.
  • Combine with Prenatals: OvaBoost is designed to be taken alongside a comprehensive prenatal vitamin like PeaPod Prenatal.

How to Store and Dispose of OvaBoost

  • Storage: Store in a cool, dry place. Keep the bottle tightly closed to protect the capsules from moisture.
  • Disposal: Keep out of reach of children. Dispose of the empty plastic bottle in your local recycling bin.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Safety and Precautions

Contraindications and Restrictions

  • Pregnancy: Once a pregnancy is confirmed by a blood or urine test, you should discontinue OvaBoost and switch to a standard prenatal vitamin.
  • Pre-existing Conditions: If you are taking medication for depression or anxiety, or if you have a known medical condition, consult your doctor before use.

Side Effects of OvaBoost

  • Common: Some women may experience mild stomach upset or a change in sleep patterns (due to the Melatonin).
  • Action: If sleepiness occurs, try taking the full dose in the evening before bed. If you experience a persistent headache, reduce the dose and consult your doctor.

Precautions and Warnings

  • Hormonal Interaction: Because OvaBoost supports hormonal balance, it may slightly shift your ovulation date. It is recommended to use ovulation predictor kits (OPKs) to track your cycle.
  • Not a Cure: This is a nutritional supplement and is not intended to diagnose or cure infertility. It should be used as part of a healthy lifestyle.

searchable.name: Motility Boost for Men (60 Capsules)
searchable.brief_info: MotilityBoost is a premium dietary supplement by Fairhaven Health, specifically designed for men who have been diagnosed with low sperm motility (the ability of sperm to swim properly). Sperm motility is a critical factor in male fertility, as sperm must travel a significant distance to reach and fertilize the egg. MotilityBoost provides a targeted blend of antioxidants, vitamins, and amino acids that have been scientifically shown to improve sperm energy and swimming speed.
searchable.description: Even with a high sperm count, conception can be difficult if the sperm cannot move effectively. MotilityBoost is not a standalone multivitamin but a specialized "add-on" supplement. It targets the mitochondria (the powerhouses) of the sperm cells, providing them with the cellular fuel needed for better forward progression and velocity.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage and Administration

  • Dosage: Take two (2) capsules daily.
  • Method: Swallow with water. You can take them both at once or split the dose (one in the morning and one in the evening).
  • Timing: For best results, take with a meal to enhance the absorption of the antioxidants.

Proper Usage Tips

  • The 3-Month Rule: Because it takes approximately 74–90 days for new sperm to be produced and mature, you should take MotilityBoost consistently for at least 3 months to see a measurable improvement in sperm parameters.
  • The Fertility Foundation: This product is designed to be taken alongside FertilAid for Men. FertilAid provides the baseline minerals (like Zinc and Selenium), while MotilityBoost provides the extra push for movement.
  • Healthy Habits: Avoid excessive heat (tight underwear, saunas), reduce stress, and eliminate smoking to provide the best environment for your sperm to improve.

How to Store and Dispose of MotilityBoost

  • Storage: Store in a cool, dry place. Keep the bottle tightly closed.
  • Disposal: Keep out of reach of children. Recycle the empty bottle according to local guidelines.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Safety and Precautions

Contraindications and Restrictions

  • Medical Conditions: If you are taking medication for high blood pressure or have a history of heart conditions, consult your doctor before use.
  • Not for Women: This product is formulated exclusively for male reproductive health.

Side Effects of MotilityBoost

  • Common: Generally very well tolerated with no significant side effects. Some users may experience mild digestive upset if taken on an empty stomach.
  • Action: If you notice any signs of an allergic reaction (rash or itching), stop use and consult a healthcare provider.

Precautions and Warnings

  • Professional Diagnosis: It is recommended to have a semen analysis performed by a doctor to confirm that motility is the specific area requiring support.
  • Consistency is Key: Skipping doses frequently may reduce the effectiveness of the supplement.

searchable.name: Deep Relief Heat Rub
searchable.brief_info: Deep Relief Heat Rub is a powerful topical analgesic designed to provide fast, soothing relief from deep-seated muscular aches and pains. Manufactured by Embassy, this cream uses a specialized warming formula that penetrates deep into the tissues to stimulate blood flow and relax tight muscles. It is an ideal choice for athletes, individuals with chronic joint stiffness, or anyone recovering from physical overexertion.
searchable.description: Deep Relief Heat Rub creates a dual-action effect on the skin. Upon application, it provides a comforting warmth that helps to "loosen up" stiff joints and soothe sore muscles. The active ingredients work as counter-irritants, which distract the brain from the underlying pain while simultaneously increasing local circulation to promote the body’s natural healing process.
searchable.how_to_use:
Application Instructions

  1. Clean the Area: Ensure the skin is clean and dry before application.
  2. Apply Sparingly: Squeeze a small amount of cream onto the affected area.
  3. Massage: Rub the cream into the skin until it is fully absorbed. You will begin to feel a warming sensation within a few minutes.
  4. Frequency: Use 2 to 3 times daily, or as needed. Do not exceed the recommended frequency.

Proper Usage Tips

  • Wash Hands: IMPORTANT: Wash your hands thoroughly with soap and water immediately after use to avoid accidentally transferring the cream to your eyes, nose, or mouth.
  • Do Not Bandage: Avoid covering the treated area with tight bandages or heating pads, as this can cause excessive skin irritation or burns.
  • Clothing: Allow the cream to dry before letting clothing touch the area to prevent staining and ensure full absorption.

How to Store and Dispose of the Cream

  • Storage: Store in a cool, dry place below 30°C. Keep the cap tightly closed.
  • Disposal: Keep out of reach of children and pets. Return expired tubes to your local pharmacy.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: Available in various tube sizes (e.g., 30g, 50g).
  • Form: Topical Cream/Rub.
  • Manufacturer: Embassy.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Safety and Precautions

Contraindications and Restrictions

  • Broken Skin: DO NOT apply to wounds, irritated skin, or sensitive areas (like the face and genitals).
  • Allergy: Do not use if you are allergic to aspirin, salicylates, or any of the listed ingredients.
  • Children: Not recommended for children under 5 years of age.

Side Effects of Deep Relief

  • Common: Temporary skin redness or a strong burning sensation (this is usually a sign the cream is working).
  • Action: If the burning becomes unbearable or you develop a rash/blisters, wash the area with cool soapy water and discontinue use.

Precautions and Warnings

  • Asthma: Some individuals with asthma may be sensitive to Methyl Salicylate.
  • Pregnancy: Consult your doctor before use if you are pregnant or breastfeeding.
  • Inhalation: Avoid inhaling the strong vapors if you have sensitive respiratory pathways.

searchable.name: Nature’s Field Pre-Workout Blend (225g)
searchable.brief_info: Nature’s Field Pre-Workout Blend is an advanced, scientifically formulated supplement designed to maximize your training potential.1 This high-potency powder combines essential amino acids, natural stimulants, and performance enhancers to provide the "surge" needed for intense physical activity.2 Whether you are a professional athlete or a fitness enthusiast, this blend helps you push past plateaus by increasing focus, delaying fatigue, and enhancing muscle pump.
searchable.description: The Pre-Workout Blend is engineered to prime your body and mind before you hit the gym.3 It works by increasing nitric oxide levels in the blood, which dilates blood vessels to deliver more oxygen and nutrients to working muscles. Additionally, it provides a sharp cognitive boost to ensure your mental focus matches your physical output.4+1
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage and Administration

  • Standard Serving: Mix one (1) scoop (approx. 7.5g–10g) with 200ml–300ml of cold water.
  • Method: Shake or stir well until the powder is fully dissolved.
  • Timing: Consume 20 to 30 minutes before your workout session.

Proper Usage Tips

  • Assess Tolerance: If you are new to pre-workouts, start with a half-scoop to see how your body reacts to the stimulants.
  • Stay Hydrated: This blend increases metabolic activity; ensure you drink plenty of water throughout your workout to avoid dehydration.
  • Avoid Late Use: Due to the caffeine content, avoid taking this blend within 5 to 6 hours of bedtime to prevent insomnia.

How to Store and Dispose of the Blend

  • Storage: Store in a cool, dry place. Keep the lid tightly sealed, as pre-workout powders can be sensitive to humidity and may "clump" if exposed to air.10
  • Disposal: Keep out of reach of children. The plastic tub is recyclable in most areas once empty.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Safety and Precautions

Contraindications and Restrictions

  • Heart Health: DO NOT USE if you have high blood pressure, heart arrhythmias, or a history of cardiovascular disease.
  • Caffeine Sensitivity: Not suitable for individuals highly sensitive to stimulants.
  • Age: Only intended for use by healthy adults 18 years and older.

Side Effects of Pre-Workout

  • The "Tingle": You may feel a tingling sensation on the skin (paresthesia) shortly after taking it; this is a harmless effect caused by Beta-Alanine.
  • Common: Increased heart rate, jitters, or a "crash" once the caffeine wears off.
  • Action: If you experience chest pain, dizziness, or severe shortness of breath, stop exercising immediately and seek medical attention.

Precautions and Warnings

  • Don't Stack Stimulants: Avoid consuming coffee, soda, or energy drinks while using this product to prevent caffeine overdose.
  • Pregnancy: Not recommended for pregnant or nursing women.
  • Creatine Note: If you have kidney disease, consult your doctor before using supplements containing Creatine.

searchable.name: Nature’s Field Post-Workout Blend (300g)
searchable.brief_info: Nature’s Field Post-Workout Blend is a professional-grade recovery formula designed to take advantage of the "anabolic window" immediately following intense exercise. By replenishing depleted nutrients and repairing micro-tears in muscle fiber, this blend helps transition your body from a state of breakdown (catabolism) to a state of growth and repair (anabolism).
searchable.description: The Post-Workout Blend is engineered to stabilize the body after physical stress. While the Pre-Workout blend focuses on stimulation and blood flow, the Post-Workout blend prioritizes inflammation reduction, hydration, and protein synthesis. It works by driving essential amino acids into exhausted muscle cells and restoring electrolyte balance lost through sweat.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage and Administration

  • Standard Serving: Mix one (1) scoop with 250ml–350ml of cold water.
  • Timing: For maximum benefit, consume immediately or within 30 minutes of finishing your workout.
  • Frequency: Use after every intense training session to ensure consistent recovery.

Proper Usage Tips

  • The "Golden Hour": Your muscles are most receptive to nutrients right after exercise. Don't delay your serving.
  • Combine with Protein: While this blend provides key recovery aminos, pairing it with a scoop of Nature’s Field Whey Protein can further enhance muscle volume.
  • Water Intake: Recovery requires hydration. Continue to sip water for 1–2 hours after your post-workout drink.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Safety and Precautions

Contraindications

  • Kidney Health: Individuals with pre-existing kidney conditions should consult a doctor due to the amino acid concentration.
  • Diabetics: Monitor blood sugar levels, as post-workout metabolic shifts can affect insulin sensitivity.

Side Effects

  • Digestive Comfort: Highly concentrated amino acids can occasionally cause mild bloating if taken on a completely empty stomach; drinking with plenty of water mitigates this.
  • Non-Stimulant: Unlike the Pre-Workout blend, this contains no caffeine, making it safe for evening use without affecting sleep.

searchable.name: Nature'sfield Immune Defence Advance Tab x100
searchable.brief_info: Nature’s Field Immune Defence Advanced is a premium, high-potency supplement scientifically formulated to provide robust support for the body’s natural defense systems.
searchable.description: Nature’s Field Immune Defence Advanced is a premium, high-potency supplement scientifically formulated to provide robust support for the body’s natural defense systems. In an era where environmental stressors and pathogens are constant, this advanced formula offers a comprehensive 7-in-1 blend of essential vitamins, minerals, and herbal extracts. It is a trusted choice for individuals looking to maintain peak health, reduce the frequency of seasonal illnesses, and ensure rapid recovery from physical stress.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Nature’s Field Immune Defence Advanced This is a dietary supplement. Take as directed by the pharmacist or physician.

  • Standard Dose: For adults, take one (1) tablet daily.
  • Intensive Support: During times of high seasonal risk, your doctor may suggest two tablets daily.
  • Timing: Best taken with a meal and a full glass of water to maximize the absorption of fat-soluble Vitamin D and Zinc.

How to Store and Dispose

  • Storage: Store in a cool, dry place. Keep the bottle tightly closed to protect the tablets from humidity and oxidation.
  • Disposal: Keep out of reach of children. The plastic bottle is recyclable once empty.

Quick Tips for Nature’s Field Immune Defence Advanced

  • Morning Routine: Take your tablet with breakfast to provide immune coverage throughout the day.
  • Stay Consistent: Immune health is built over time; daily use is more effective than "burst" dosing.
  • Avoid Zinc on an Empty Stomach: Taking Zinc without food can cause nausea in sensitive individuals.
  • Healthy Lifestyle: Supplementation works best when paired with 7–8 hours of sleep and adequate hydration.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: 100 Tablets.
  • Form: Large, easy-to-swallow coated tablets.
  • Strength: Professional Grade 7-in-1 formula.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Nature’s Field Immune Defence Advanced

  • Autoimmune Diseases: Individuals with conditions like Lupus or Multiple Sclerosis should consult a doctor, as Echinacea can stimulate the immune system in ways that may conflict with their condition.
  • Allergies: Avoid if you are allergic to "daisy-like" flowers (Asteraceae family) or any of the listed herbal extracts.
  • Surgery: Discontinue use at least 2 weeks before scheduled surgery due to the blood-thinning potential of garlic.

Side Effects of Nature’s Field Immune Defence Advanced

  • Common: Mild stomach upset, nausea, or a lingering garlic aftertaste.
  • Rare: Allergic skin rashes or dizziness.
  • Action: If you experience any swelling of the face or difficulty breathing, stop use immediately and seek medical care.

Precautions and Warnings

  • Pregnancy & Breastfeeding: Consult your healthcare provider before use due to the high concentration of herbal extracts.
  • Kidney Stones: Patients with a history of calcium-oxalate kidney stones should be cautious with high doses of Vitamin C.

value.title: Nature'sfield Immune Defence Advance Tab x100

searchable.name: Hexedene Mouthwash 100ml
searchable.brief_info: Hexedene Mouthwash 100ml is a high-performance antiseptic oral rinse designed to maintain superior oral hygiene and treat localized infections.
searchable.description: Hexedene Mouthwash 100ml is a high-performance antiseptic oral rinse designed to maintain superior oral hygiene and treat localized infections. Formulated with Chlorhexidine Digluconate, it is widely regarded as the "gold standard" in dental care for its ability to eliminate harmful bacteria, fungi, and viruses. Whether you are recovering from dental surgery or managing persistent gum issues, Hexedene provides a powerful protective shield that keeps your mouth healthy and your breath fresh.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage of Hexedene Mouthwash 100ml This is an Over-the-Counter (OTC) medication. Take as directed by the pharmacist or physician.

  • Standard Use: Rinse the mouth with 10ml of the solution for approximately 60 seconds, twice daily (morning and evening).
  • Administration: Use the cap provided to measure the dose. Spit out the liquid after rinsing.
  • Duration: Usually used for a period of 1 to 4 weeks depending on the condition being treated.

How to Store and Dispose of Hexedene Mouthwash 100ml

  • Storage: Store in a cool, dry place below 30°C. Protect from direct sunlight.
  • Disposal: Keep out of reach of children. Dispose of the bottle in accordance with local plastic recycling guidelines.

Quick Tips for Hexedene Mouthwash 100ml

  • The "Toothpaste Rule": Do not use Hexedene immediately after brushing with regular toothpaste. Many toothpastes contain surfactants that can deactivate Chlorhexidine. Wait at least 30 minutes or rinse thoroughly with water first.
  • Avoid Food/Drink: For maximum effect, do not eat or drink for at least 30–60 minutes after using the mouthwash.
  • Tannin Warning: Limit consumption of tea, coffee, and red wine during the treatment period to minimize the risk of tooth staining.
  • Denture Care: If treating denture sores, soak your dentures in the solution for 15 minutes twice daily.
  • Short-Term Power: Use it as an intensive "treatment" rather than a permanent daily mouthwash to avoid staining.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: 100ml bottle.
  • Form: Liquid Oral Rinse.
  • Strength: 0.2% Chlorhexidine Digluconate.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications of Hexedene Mouthwash 100ml

  • Hypersensitivity: Do not use if you have a known allergy to Chlorhexidine Digluconate.
  • Children: Not recommended for children under 12 years of age unless specifically directed by a dentist.
  • Pregnancy: Generally safe, but consult your dentist or doctor before starting long-term use.

Side Effects of Hexedene Mouthwash 100ml

  • Common: Temporary change in taste (bitterness), mild tongue tingling, or harmless surface staining of the teeth.
  • Rare: Swelling of the salivary glands or oral irritation.
  • Action: If you experience swelling of the face, lips, or tongue, or difficulty breathing, stop use immediately and seek medical attention as this may indicate a severe allergic reaction.

Precautions and Warnings

  • Tooth Staining: Prolonged use (longer than 2–4 weeks) may cause brownish staining on teeth or fillings. This is usually removable by a professional dental cleaning.
  • Avoid Swallowing: This product is for topical oral use only; do not swallow the liquid.
  • External Use: Keep away from eyes and ears.

searchable.name: Aqueous Cream
searchable.brief_info:
Aqueous Cream is a versatile, dual-purpose skin treatment designed for dry and sensitive skin. It works in two ways:

As a Soap Substitute: It cleanses the skin without the harsh chemicals and fragrances found in regular soap that strip away natural oils.

As an Emollient: It provides a light, protective layer of oil (paraffin) on the skin's surface to trap moisture and prevent dryness.

It is one of the most common treatments for managing eczema, psoriasis, and dermatitis because it is non-greasy and absorbs quickly.
searchable.description: Aqueous Cream is a clinically proven, non-greasy formula used to soothe and hydrate dry skin. It is an "oil-in-water" emulsion that helps restore the skin’s natural barrier. By locking in moisture, it relieves the itching and discomfort associated with various skin conditions, leaving the skin feeling soft and smooth.
searchable.how_to_use:
Administration

  • As a Moisturizer: Apply to the affected area and massage gently until absorbed. Use as often as needed (ideally 3–4 times a day).
  • As a Wash: Use in place of soap. Apply to wet skin, massage gently, and rinse with warm water.

Storage and Disposal

  • Storage: Store in a cool, dry place below 25°C. Keep the container tightly closed.
  • Disposal: Check local guidelines; return expired tubs to a pharmacy for safe disposal.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: 100g, 500g, and 1kg options.
  • Formulation: Fragrance-free and Lanolin-free.
  • Texture: Light, white cream.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications

  • Allergies: Do not use if you are sensitive to any ingredients, especially preservatives or Sodium Lauryl Sulfate (SLS).
  • Infected Skin: Consult a doctor if the skin is oozing, bleeding, or appears infected.

Side Effects

  • Common: Mild stinging or redness, particularly if used as a leave-on cream on broken skin.
  • Action: If irritation persists, stop using it as a moisturizer and use it only as a wash-off cleanser.

Precautions and Warnings

  • Fire Hazard: Paraffin can soak into fabrics. Keep bandages and clothing away from open flames.
  • Slip Hazard: Be careful in the shower, as the cream makes the floor very slippery.

searchable.name: MINADEX MULTIVITAMIN LIQUID 300ML
searchable.brief_info: Minadex Multivitamin Liquid is a classic, trusted liquid tonic designed to support the nutritional needs of both children and adults. It is specifically formulated to provide a boost during or after illness (convalescence), during periods of rapid growth, or when a restricted diet may lead to vitamin deficiencies. Its easy-to-swallow liquid format and orange flavor make it an ideal choice for those who dislike tablets but need a comprehensive range of essential vitamins to support immunity, energy, and overall vitality.
searchable.description: Minadex Multivitamin Liquid is a balanced blend of 8 essential vitamins aimed at maintaining healthy growth and development. Whether you are recovering from a cold or simply looking to fill nutritional gaps, this liquid formula ensures your body receives the "spark plugs" it needs for metabolic processes. It is particularly well-known for being gentle on the stomach and highly palatable for picky eaters.
searchable.how_to_use:
Dosage and Administration

  • Children (6 months to 5 years): Usually 5ml daily.
  • Children (over 5 years) and Adults: Usually 10ml daily.
  • Administration: Use the provided measuring spoon to ensure an accurate dose. It can be taken on its own or mixed with water or fruit juice if preferred.
  • Shake Well: Always shake the bottle thoroughly before use to ensure the vitamins are evenly distributed.

How to Store and Dispose

  • Storage: Store in a cool place (below 25°C) out of direct sunlight. Ensure the cap is tightened securely after every use.
  • Disposal: Once opened, use within the timeframe specified on the bottle (usually 3–4 months). Return expired bottles to a pharmacy for safe disposal.
searchable.specification:
• Pack Size: 300ml Bottle.
  • Flavor: Delicious Orange.
  • Key Feature: Alcohol-free and easy-to-dose liquid format.
searchable.famasi_advice:
Contraindications

  • Vitamin A Excess: Do not take if you are pregnant or planning to become pregnant, as high levels of Vitamin A can be harmful to the unborn baby (unless advised by a doctor).
  • Allergies: Check the label for specific additives or flavorings if you have a known sensitivity to food colorings or preservatives.

Side Effects

  • Common: Generally very well tolerated. Excessive intake may lead to mild laxative effects or bright yellow urine (due to Vitamin B2), which is harmless.
  • Action: If an allergic reaction (like a rash or swelling) occurs, discontinue use immediately.

Precautions and Warnings

  • Do Not Exceed Dose: Taking too many fat-soluble vitamins (A and D) can be harmful as they store in the body.
  • Dietary Supplement: Supplements should not be used as a substitute for a varied, balanced diet.
